Text.en: You know why I did it—to save our people.
Text.zh: 你清楚我的目的——那就是拯救我的人民。

Text.en: You think I don't know that?
Text.zh: 你以为我不知道吗？

Text.en: 'Course I care. What do you think it means?
Text.zh: 我当然在乎。你以为这是闹着玩的？

Text.en: That's no small task. Far greater than chasing wisps.
Text.zh: 这可不是小菜一碟。比追那些鬼灵可要命多了。

Text.en: More dangerous prey, then. Fine by me.
Text.zh: 那就是更狠的角色了？成，我没意见。

Text.en: Every beast? Even those it don't possess?
Text.zh: 所有怪物？连那些没发疯的也不放过？

Text.en: I've no love for the Vaal, but if not for their virtue gems, our village would be a smolderin' ruin right now.
Text.zh: 瓦尔人？我对他们没啥好感。可要不是靠他们的古灵宝石，咱们村子这会儿早化成一地焦土了！​

Text.en: You think that preferable?
Text.zh: 你觉得那样更好吗？

Text.en: Lucky? Speak for yourself.
Text.zh: 走运？那是你走运吧。

Text.en: Lovely. Just what this place needs—more things what won't stay dead.
Text.zh: 呵，真棒！这下好了——这鬼地方又多了一堆死不透的东西！

Text.en: Think the Spirit's trying to tell us somethin'?
Text.zh: 你觉不觉得……灵魂想告诉我们点什么？

Text.en: I'm here, aren't I?
Text.zh: 我不是已经在这儿了么？

Text.en: Aye. It's me.
Text.zh: 嗯，是我。

Text.en: I wish it were—but I'm glad yer okay. How'd you end up here?
Text.zh: 我倒希望没看到你——不过你没事就好。你怎么跑这鬼地方来了？

Text.en: The name's Tujen. I'm the harbourmaster 'round here. <continue>Welcome to our fair little town. You've a vessel charter, I see?
Text.zh: 我是图金，这里的港务长。<continue>欢迎来到我们美丽的小镇。你租了船对吧？

Text.en: Greetings, Tujen. I'm lookin' for Makoru.
Text.zh: 你好，图金，我在找马克鲁。

Text.en: Yes. I seek Makoru.
Text.zh: 正是，我为马克鲁而来。

Text.en: That's right. I'm looking for Makoru.
Text.zh: 没错，我在找马克鲁。

Text.en: Hello, little one! Yes. I'm looking for Makoru.
Text.zh: 你好，小家伙！对，我在找马克鲁。

Text.en: Greetings, Master Tujen. Indeed, I have a charter. I seek Makoru.
Text.zh: 你好，图金大人。我的确拿到了许可证。我在找马克鲁。

Text.en: Yes. Where can I find Makoru?
Text.zh: 没错。请问哪里能找到马克鲁？

Text.en: Hey, mate. Yeah... <continue>Know where Makoru is?
Text.zh: 嘿，伙计。对……<continue>知道马克鲁在哪吗？

Text.en: Aye that's right, wee fella. Where will I find Makoru?
Text.zh: 没错，小家伙。我该上哪儿找马克鲁？

Text.en: Aye. Makoru's had her eyes on it.
Text.zh: 没错，马克鲁早就盯上这买卖啦。

Text.en: Yes. Makoru is now in my employ.
Text.zh: 对，马克鲁现已受雇于我。

Text.en: That's right. <continue>Makoru has accepted the charter.
Text.zh: 没错，<continue>马克鲁已经接受了合约。

Text.en: Yes, yes. Makoru has seen it.
Text.zh: 对，对，马克鲁已经看过了。

Text.en: Indeed. Makoru has seen it.
Text.zh: 当然，马克鲁已经看过了。

Text.en: Yes. Makoru has seen it.
Text.zh: 没错，马克鲁已经看过了。

Text.en: That's right. Makoru's agreed to work for me.
Text.zh: 没错。马克鲁同意为我工作了。

Text.en: That's right. Makoru's taken the charter.
Text.zh: 没错，马克鲁已经拿到了许可证。

Text.en: Just down the pier. It's the only ship on the dock right now.
Text.zh: 就在码头。现在码头只有她那一艘船了。

Text.en: Nice to hear. I'm sure she'll appreciate the work.
Text.zh: 行啊，她能有活儿干肯定乐意。

Text.en: The name's Tujen. I'm the harbourmaster 'round here. <continue>Welcome to our fair little town. What ya need?
Text.zh: 我是图金，这里的港务长。<continue>欢迎来到我们美丽的小镇。你需要什么？

Text.en: I'm seeking a ship and crew.
Text.zh: 我在找船和船员。

Text.en: Hello, little one! I need a boat and some... boat people.
Text.zh: 小家伙你好！我需要一条船，还要一些……开船的人。

Text.en: Good day, Master Tujen. I need a ship and a crew.
Text.zh: 你好，图金大人。我需要找条船和船员。

Text.en: I'm looking for a ship and crew.
Text.zh: 我正在找船和船员。

Text.en: I'm in need of a ship and crew.
Text.zh: 我需要一艘船和船员。

Text.en: I seek safe passage on these waters.
Text.zh: 我想在这片海域找个安全的航行方式。

Text.en: Hey, mate. Lookin' for a ship and crew.
Text.zh: 嘿，伙计。我在找船和船员。

Text.en: This land-locked soul is after a ship - and hands to crew it.
Text.zh: 困于陆地的可怜人正在找船——和开船的人。

Text.en: Well... first of all, you'll need a charter. Rog's your man for that. <continue>Once you have one, Makoru, Captain of the Aurora May is your best option for gettin' around these waters.
Text.zh: 呃……首先得搞份船只租约，找罗格就行。<continue>拿到租约后，极光五月号船长马克鲁就是你在这片海域最好的选择。

Text.en: This is it? This... is Kingsmarch? Science and civilisation must have never recovered.
Text.zh: 就是这里？这……就是君锋镇？我怀疑科学文明根本没能在这里复苏。

Text.en: Your time was different, yes, but don't discount the Kalguurans just yet. They have potential.
Text.zh: 你们那个年代是不同，但也别小看卡古兰人。他们深具潜力。

Text.en: Hmm... we shall see.
Text.zh: 哼……走着瞧吧。

Text.en: Oi. Where did Alva get to?
Text.zh: 喂，阿尔瓦去哪儿了？

Text.en: So... where is Alva?
Text.zh: 所以……阿尔瓦去哪了？

Text.en: Where is Alva?
Text.zh: 阿尔瓦呢？

Text.en: Where's the annoying optimist?
Text.zh: 那个乐观过头的家伙呢？

Text.en: Where did Alva go?
Text.zh: 阿尔瓦去哪儿了？

Text.en: Did Alva come this way?
Text.zh: 阿尔瓦往这边来了吗？

Text.en: So, fellas... where's Alva?
Text.zh: 话说……阿尔瓦人呢？

Text.en: Where's Alva got to?
Text.zh: 阿尔瓦去哪儿了？

Text.en: She has gone ahead to meet her local contact.
Text.zh: 她先一步去见本地联络人了。

Text.en: We will need a vessel to navigate the archipelago. We must begin our search to locate the pieces of the Weapon.
Text.zh: 我们得弄艘船游览群岛。必须要开始寻找武器碎片了。

Text.en: Behave yourselves, will ya?
Text.zh: 安分点行不行？

Text.en: Please - remain civil in my absence.
Text.zh: 那么，我不在的时候也请保持克制。

Text.en: Try and get along, you two.
Text.zh: 我不在时，你们俩好好相处。

Text.en: Don't kill each other while I'm gone... or do.
Text.zh: 要决斗也请等我回来再说……随便你们了。

Text.en: Please... try to put aside your differences in my absence.
Text.zh: 拜托，我走后请你们俩暂且放下分歧。

Text.en: Try not to bicker too much while I'm gone, will you?
Text.zh: 我不在的时候，尽量别吵得太凶，可以吗？

Text.en: Alright. Don't go havin' a street brawl while I'm gone. I wanna watch.
Text.zh: 行了，我走后你们别打起来，我还想看热闹呢。

Text.en: Save yer strength, lads. Dinnae waste it snappin' at each other.
Text.zh: 省省吧，小子。互相拌嘴只会浪费力气。

Text.en: So... where should I start huntin'?
Text.zh: 所以……狩猎该从哪里开始呢？

Text.en: I do not see an immediate path. Where should we begin?
Text.zh: 我看不出明确的方向。我们从哪里入手？

Text.en: With all you know of the Weapon, where should our search begin?
Text.zh: 按你对那武器的了解，我们应该从哪里开始？

Text.en: Where am I to search for your toys?
Text.zh: 我该去哪里找你的玩具呢？

Text.en: Where should we be looking for the pieces?
Text.zh: 我们该去哪里寻找碎片呢？

Text.en: Where are we headed first?
Text.zh: 我们应该先往哪里去？

Text.en: So... if I were a weapon piece, where'd I be hidin'?
Text.zh: 那么……要是我是武器碎片，会藏哪儿呢？

Text.en: Right then... where should we cast our net first?
Text.zh: 好吧……那我们第一站该去哪儿呢？

Text.en: We know the pieces of the Weapon radiate intense latent Corruption. <continue>The more dangerous an island is, the more likely it is to contain a piece of it.
Text.zh: 武器碎片会散发出强烈的腐化气息。<continue>岛是越凶险，藏有碎片的可能性就越大。

Text.en: It is crucial that we find a Captain with in-depth knowledge of the local area. Then we will stand a better chance of finding what we seek.
Text.zh: 当务之急是找到一位熟悉这片海域的船长。只有这样，我们才更有把握找到武器碎片。

Text.en: Is this the friend you mentioned?
Text.zh: 这就是你提过的那位朋友？

Text.en: Ah, there you are! <continue>This is my contact Rog, a trader with a keen eye for valuable artefacts! <continue>Rog, my friends are after a ship... <continue>And it just so happens we've a cart load of Vaal treasure to cover the charter.
Text.zh: 哎呀，你们可算来了！<continue>给你们介绍下，这位是罗格，倒腾神器的行家，眼光毒得很！<continue>罗格，我这几位朋友要租船……<continue>巧了不是？咱们手头正好有一整车瓦尔宝藏，押上当船费绰绰有余！

Text.en: My hunt leads me toward the most dangerous islands.
Text.zh: 我的狩猎之旅将我引向那些最危险的岛屿。

Text.en: My path unfortunately leads me to your most dangerous islands.
Text.zh: 不幸的是，我的道路通向你们最危险的岛屿。

Text.en: We need a skilled Captain. We seek the most dangerous islands in the region.
Text.zh: 我们需要一位资深船长。我们前往的是这片海域最危险的岛屿。

Text.en: What I'm looking for makes itself known with danger. It may be on several islands.
Text.zh: 我要找的东西总是危险异常，很可能散落在众多岛屿之上。

Text.en: I need a guide - someone capable of taking me to your most dangerous islands.
Text.zh: 我需要一位向导，能带我去这里最危险的岛屿。

Text.en: We're looking for something that can only be found on the most dangerous islands.
Text.zh: 我们要找的东西只可能在最危险的岛屿之上。

Text.en: Apparently, we're looking to head right to the most dangerous islands.
Text.zh: 看样子我们要直奔最危险的那些岛了。

Text.en: We seek a bounty which cannae be found on all but the most dangerous islands.
Text.zh: 只有在最危险的岛屿上，才能找到我们的宝贝。

Text.en: Hmm, Kalguuran merchant vessels don't intentionally seek out danger. However... there is one Captain who may be up to the task. Name's Makoru. <continue>I'll set up an account for you, but for now, here is your charter. Take it to her. I've no doubt she'll accept.
Text.zh: 嗯……卡古兰的商船向来不主动找晦气。不过嘛……倒是有位船长，说不定能接这活儿，名字叫马克鲁。<continue>我给你们开个账户，先用着。许可证拿着，直接去找她。放心，这买卖她铁定接。

Text.en: I suppose it's time we said farewell, for now. <continue>I'm off to study a tome on Blood Magic I... found... back in Utzaal. How exciting!
Text.zh: 那……我们得先说再见了。<continue>我得赶着去研读一本祭血术典籍——乌扎尔那边刚淘来的！想想就带劲！

Text.en: Freya Hartlin? Is that you?
Text.zh: 芙蕾雅·哈特林？是你吗？

Text.en: Yes. It is.
Text.zh: 是我。

Text.en: You've been a while, old woman.
Text.zh: 别来无恙啊，老太太。

Text.en: You remind me of the tale-woman of my <i>{akhara}. Please... how long have you been here, dear Freya?
Text.zh: 您让我想起<i>{阿卡拉}的说书人。请问……您受困多久了，亲爱的芙蕾雅？

Text.en: How long have you been here?
Text.zh: 你被困了多久？

Text.en: Time must've moved slow for ya here...
Text.zh: 困在这里的时光一定很难熬……

Text.en: How long have you been trapped here?
Text.zh: 你在此受困多久了？

Text.en: How long have you been here, Freya?
Text.zh: 芙蕾雅，你在这待了多久？

Text.en: Blimey. How long you been here?
Text.zh: 我的天，你在这儿待多久了？

Text.en: How long have ye been bound here?
Text.zh: 你被困在这里多久了啊？

Text.en: Longer than I can fathom.
Text.zh: 久到记不清了。

Text.en: Any ideas on how to remove your curse?
Text.zh: 你知不知道如何解除身上的诅咒？

Text.en: My heart is in pain for you. How can we break this magic?
Text.zh: 我为你心痛，我们该如何破除这邪术？

Text.en: How can we help you?
Text.zh: 我们该怎么帮你？

Text.en: How can we break this? Can I smash it?
Text.zh: 怎么才能打破这诅咒？砸了它有用吗？

Text.en: There must be a way to get you out of this.
Text.zh: 一定有办法能解救你。

Text.en: If the Dreamer wills it, you will be freed.
Text.zh: 如果幻梦者准许，你会获得自由。

Text.en: Alright. How we gettin' you out?
Text.zh: 好吧，咱们怎么把你弄出去？

Text.en: There <i>{must} be a way to break this binding.
Text.zh: <i>{一定}有办法打破这束缚。

Text.en: My boy... he's lost somewhere on the island. <continue>And with him... our trove of raw Verisium. <continue>It must be runesmithed into spikes... <continue>It is the only way to break this seal.
Text.zh: 我那孩子……他在岛上不见了。<continue>跟着他丢了的……还有我们那批未加工的维金。<continue>必须用符文工艺做成钉子！<continue>这是打破这封印的唯一办法。

Text.en: Captain Grisham Hartlin.
Text.zh: 船长格里沙姆·哈特林。

Text.en: I also fear... for his fate.
Text.zh: 我也……很担心他的处境。

Text.en: Hail, newcomer! Name's Tujen, and I'm the harbourmaster in Kingsmarch.
Text.zh: 哟！新来的！我叫图金，我是君锋镇的港务长。

Text.en: Haha! This child has a beard!
Text.zh: 哈！这小鬼头长胡子啦！

Text.en: Watch it!
Text.zh: 当心！

Text.en: Hello to you, Master Tujen.
Text.zh: 你好，图金大人。

Text.en: What do you make of this, Tujen?
Text.zh: 图金，这事儿你怎么看？

Text.en: Hello to you, Tujen.
Text.zh: 图金，你好啊。

Text.en: Greetings, Tujen.
Text.zh: 图金，幸会。

Text.en: Good day.
Text.zh: 你好。

Text.en: Hey mate. Nice to meet ya.
Text.zh: 嘿伙计！认识你很高兴！

Text.en: Well met, wee fella. Ye know anything about this?
Text.zh: 你好啊，小家伙。你了解这事吗？

Text.en: Well then. Best we find him. Dannig can help with the Verisium. <continue>Now, get your arse moving and look for the Captain!
Text.zh: 行吧！咱们最好赶紧找到他。维金的事儿交给丹宁处理。<continue>现在，赶紧找船长去！

Text.en: I'll stay with Freya.
Text.zh: 我留下陪芙蕾雅。

Text.en: Poor ol' Freya here needs our help. Best we look for her boy... <continue>Dannig can help with the Verisium back in Kingsmarch. <continue>Now, get your arse moving and look for the Captain!
Text.zh: 可怜的老芙蕾雅等不起！得赶紧找到她家小子……<continue>维金的事儿交给君锋镇的丹宁处理。​<continue>现在，赶紧找船长去！

Text.en: Poor ol' Freya here needs our help. Best we look for her boy... <continue>Once you've found the Verisium, seek out Dannig back in Kingsmarch. <continue>Now, get your arse moving and look for the Captain!
Text.zh: 可怜的老芙蕾雅等不起！得赶紧找到她家小子……<continue>等维金找着了，就回君锋镇找丹宁。<continue>现在，赶紧找船长去！

Text.en: I'll stay with Freya.
Text.zh: 我留下陪芙蕾雅。

Text.en: Oh, Kingsmarch? It's what we Kalguurans call this little port town of ours, and also the region around it.
Text.zh: 哦，你说君锋镇？这是我们卡古兰人对这个小港口城市和周边地带的称呼。

Text.en: <i>{Kings}march... you answer to some sort of King, then?
Text.zh: <i>{君}锋镇……所以，你们效忠于某位君主？

Text.en: Never seen a place like this. Must I speak to someone in charge?
Text.zh: 我还真没见过这种地方，非得要我去和管事的谈谈吗？

Text.en: And whose law must I follow in this place?
Text.zh: 途经此地，我该遵谁之法？

Text.en: And what petty little man calls himself your lord?
Text.zh: 又是哪个小人自称是你们君主？

Text.en: <i>{Kings}march? Ugh. So you've got a King to worry about, I take it?
Text.zh: <i>{君}……锋镇？哼，看来你们还有个君主要侍奉，是吧？

Text.en: <i>{Kings}march... hmm. We have Counts and Thanes in Ezomyr.
Text.zh: <i>{君}锋镇……嗯，在艾兹麦，我们有伯爵和领主。

Text.en: Cuttin' in on Trarthan trade, I see. Who's responsible?
Text.zh: 我看明白了，这是在插手特拉特斯的生意。带头的是谁？

Text.en:
Who do ye follow, fat ma–
 <continue>I mean, uh, Rog.
Text.zh:
你为谁效忠，死胖……
<continue>那个，我是说，罗格。

Text.en: All this has been authorised by the King... and we certainly pay enough taxes that we can never forget that... but we're quite far from home. We're mostly left to our own devices. <continue>Oh, except for the King's Hand. He spends a season here each year to make sure we're on the up-and-up.
Text.zh: 名义上嘛……国王陛下授权管辖的。瞧咱交的税，想忘也忘不了这茬儿啊……不过天高皇帝远的，日常事务基本是自个儿管。<continue>当然，除了国王之手。那位爷每年在这待三个月，专盯着我们有没有按规矩办事。

Text.en: [DNT]
Text.zh: 其实也没什么好说的。<continue>名义上嘛……国王陛下授权管辖的。瞧咱交的税，想忘也忘不了这茬儿啊……<continue>不过天高皇帝远的，日常事务基本是自个儿管。<continue>当然，除了国王之手。那位爷每年在这待三个月，专盯着我们有没有按规矩办事。

Text.en: There is no greater concentration of loyal followers of the King than here in Kingsmarch... know what I mean, <i>{friend?}
Text.zh: 普天之下，就数君锋镇这儿国王的忠臣最扎堆儿了……懂我意思不，<i>{朋友？}

Text.en: I understand. I recently became a very loyal and dedicated follower of my own Count. <i>{Friend}.
Text.zh: 理解，我最近也成了某位伯爵的忠实追随者，<i>{朋友}。

Text.en: I like you. You're funny... <i>{friend.}
Text.zh: 我喜欢你，你很幽默……<i>{朋友。}

Text.en: This king of yours would do well to stay away, lest he end up skinned.
Text.zh: 你们的这位国王最好躲远点，不然我把他的皮剥了。

Text.en: I'm not your <i>{friend}, Kalguuran.
Text.zh: 我不你的<i>{朋友}，卡古兰人。

Text.en: I feel like I'm missing somethin'.
Text.zh: 我好像没搞懂你的意思。

Text.en: Loyalty and dedication are valuable traits to have.
Text.zh: 忠心和奉献确实是好品质。

Text.en: Heh heh, I catch your drift, <i>{friend.} I'm always in for a <i>{good cause.}
Text.zh: 嘿嘿，我懂你的意思，<i>{朋友。}我总是乐意支持<i>{正义事业。}

Text.en: Enough word tricks! Speak plain, will ye?
Text.zh: 少给我咬文嚼字了！说人话，行吗？

Text.en: It's always good to meet a new <i>{friend.} Let's keep in touch.
Text.zh: 真高兴能认识新<i>{朋友。}以后常来往。

Text.en: Oh, wow... that's rather direct... You and I should keep in touch.
Text.zh: 呃，嚯……你这人可真够直接的……咱们以后该多联系。

Text.en: Oh... okay then.
Text.zh: 呃……那好吧。

Text.en: Alright, never mind then.
Text.zh: 好吧，那算了。

Text.en: What is it you want to know about us?
Text.zh: 你想知道我们什么事儿？

Text.en: Just tell me your roles, so I can understand how this place functions.
Text.zh: 你就告诉我你们的职责吧，好让我明白这地方是怎么运转的。

Text.en: What do you all do in this grand stone village?
Text.zh: 你们在这石头砌成的大村子里做些什么？

Text.en: What is life like here?
Text.zh: 此地的生活如何？

Text.en: I don't know. I don't do small talk.
Text.zh: 不知道。我不爱闲扯。

Text.en: We all have a tale. I want to know what makes you, you.
Text.zh: 人人都有故事，我想听听你自己的故事。

Text.en: What do you do here? I've never seen a village this large.
Text.zh: 你们在这里都做些什么？我从没见过这么大的村落。

Text.en: How does one make money around here?
Text.zh: 这地方怎么发财？

Text.en: How do ye and yours fare here?
Text.zh: 你跟你的族人在这儿过得怎样啊？

Text.en: Fair enough. I'm terrible at it, too.
Text.zh: 行吧，这事儿我也不在行。

Text.en: Well, most Kalguurans here on Wraeclast are in various guilds. I'm in the Meridian Free Traders, the trade guild that owns the charter for Kingsmarch. You can't beat our logistics! <continue>Dannig is in the Artificers' Guild these days. Tujen's a freelance harbourmaster, but he stays close. You gotta keep the family together, you know? <continue>The wife's the only one still carrying on our grand quest... I sure do miss her... but she always comes back soon enough. <continue>On an unrelated note... the King's Hand is due to return to Kalguur any day now... take care if you see <i>{him} around.
Text.zh: 嗯，流落在瓦尔克拉斯的卡古兰人大多都加入了各种公会。我加入了子午线自由贸易商会，君锋镇的特许经营权就在我们手上。我们的物流服务举世无双！ <continue>丹宁最近加入了巧匠公会。图金是特聘港务长，他也离得不远。一家人必须团结在一起，对不对？ <continue>唉，只有我家里那口子，到现在还在坚持伟大使命那档子事……我真的很想念她……不过她总会回来的。<continue>对了，顺便提一句……国王之手这几天就要回卡古兰了……遇见<i>{他}时留点神。

Text.en: This shop is my pride and joy. I've been dreaming of running my own place since my younger days, even though that was impossible back home.
Text.zh: 这铺子可是我的命根子。年轻时做梦都想有个自个儿的买卖，虽然在故乡想都甭想。

Text.en: What brought you here?
Text.zh: 你为什么来到这里？

Text.en: I'd never have left me home of my own choosin', no matter what I had to endure.
Text.zh: 无论受多大的罪，我都不会自愿离开自己的家乡。

Text.en: You followed a dream. I can respect that. What was your hardship?
Text.zh: 你追随梦想，值得尊敬。你受过怎样的磨难？

Text.en: What drove you away, fat one?
Text.zh: 胖哥，你是怎么流落至此的？

Text.en: This sounds like a beautiful dream. Tell me more of this, Sir Rog.
Text.zh: 听起来很美好，多说说吧，罗格先生。

Text.en: Home is wherever your family is. What made you leave Kalguur?
Text.zh: 家人在处即家乡，什么事让你离开了卡古兰？

Text.en: Ah, the quest for wealth. What was the issue in Kalguur?
Text.zh: 啊，想必是发财的使命。卡古兰那边出什么事了？

Text.en: What stopped ye?
Text.zh: 为什么在故乡想都甭想？

Text.en: There are a limited number of merchant licenses, all owned by wealthy families. New licenses only come up every few years, but I could never afford one back in Kalguur. I've fallen on better times here in Wraeclast, you might say! <continue>So, here I am. I was never one for grand quests. Always preferred sorting logistics from the back... but I'm glad I'm here. I'd never have had my children, or built all this. <continue>The wife says I'm the real hero, because I have a business and support my family. She might just be buttering me up, but I still take it to heart.
Text.zh: 行商许可证就那么几张，还都捏在那几家大族手里。新许可证几年才批一回，在卡古兰那会儿，我就是把裤子当了也买不起。要说呢，在瓦尔克拉斯，可以说时来运转了！<continue>这不，就到这儿来了。我这人没啥闯劲儿，不爱为冒险大事业啥的风里来雨里去。就喜欢在后面理理货算算账……但我挺高兴我来了这儿，不然我哪会有孩子，有这么多家当。<continue>我家里那口子老说我才是真英雄，因为我做生意养活一家人。她八成是哄我高兴呢……可我心里还是美滋滋的。

Text.en: Family's important. Take the compliment, I say.
Text.zh: 家人才最重要。夸你就接着。

Text.en: Please, stop. I'd rather dig my own grave than listen to this!
Text.zh: 求你了，打住。我宁愿自己挖个坑把自己埋了，也不想听这个！

Text.en: Take the compliment. Just don't get complacent.
Text.zh: 夸你就接着。别飘起来就行。

Text.en: I think 'buttering up' is putting it lightly.
Text.zh: 我看说她是“哄你高兴”都算是轻的了。

Text.en: Aye. As you should.
Text.zh: 对，就应该这样。

Text.en: From the looks of it, you've been buttered up enough.
Text.zh: 看你这模样，她是把你哄得够高兴的。

Text.en: You have built a strong foundation. There is merit in that.
Text.zh: 你打下了牢固的根基，这一点值得肯定。

Text.en: She speaks sweet out of love, no matter the truth.
Text.zh: 不管是真是假，她说得那么好听，是因为爱你。

Text.en: The grand quest that brought me here? Oh, no, that's a long story. I couldn't possibly.
Text.zh: 把我带到这里的伟大使命？哦，算了，那可说来话长，我一时讲不完。

Text.en: Alright then - if you insist, I'll tell the tale! Two decades ago, our glorious leader, Dannig, led us on an expedition across stormy and dangerous oceans to look for an artefact called the Triskelion Flame. <continue>Our search took us to the forsaken continent of Wraeclast, a land filled with horrible monsters and raving mad exiles!
Text.zh: 好吧，既然你非要听，我就讲讲这个故事！二十年前，我们的伟大领袖丹宁带领我们穿越了危险的风暴海域，去寻找一件叫做三耀之火的神器。<continue>探险把我们带到了鸟不拉屎的瓦尔克拉斯大陆，这里满地都是可怕的怪物和疯狂的流放者！

Text.en: It's not quite <i>{that}... well, yeah. It is bad.
Text.zh: 也没那么<i>{糟}……呃，好吧，确实挺糟的。

Text.en: So I've seen.
Text.zh: 我早就见识过。

Text.en: So it seems.
Text.zh: 确实如此。

Text.en: A sad state of affairs.
Text.zh: 真是可悲。

Text.en: And <i>{me.}
Text.zh: <i>{我}也是。

Text.en: Outside the Vastiri, maybe. You should visit our desert sometime. It is quite beautiful.
Text.zh: 应该把瓦斯提里排除在外。你真该来看看我们那里的沙漠，很美。

Text.en: Ain't that the truth.
Text.zh: 我不会说出去的。

Text.en: Aye... sadly, that much is true...
Text.zh: 对……可惜啊，这一点千真万确……

Text.en: But we excavated many ancient sites, uncovering some of the lost history of our people's short residence here. Long ago, Kalguurans tried to settle on Wraeclast, and uh... well, yeah... it did not go well. <continue>In the end, they did not survive, and they lost the Triskelion Flame. We've been looking for it for over twenty years now, and, to be honest, we've gotten a bit sidetracked, but my wife refuses to give up on the dream.
Text.zh: 我们挖掘了许多古代遗址，发现了先民在此处暂居时的那段失落的历史。很久以前，卡古兰人试图在瓦尔克拉斯定居，不过事与愿违。<continue>最后，所有人都死光了，三耀之火也从此流失。过去二十多年间我们一直在寻找它。实话说，我们现在已经不怎么关注当初的目标了。但我的老婆始终不肯放弃这个梦想。

Text.en: Oh, my Gwennen never did feel quite comfortable here. She spends much of her time off continuing our adventure. Doesn't have anything to do with the King's Hand being in town this year...
Text.zh: 哦，我家桂温妮，在这儿老觉得浑身不自在。一门心思扑在外头，老想继续探险。这跟今年城里来了国王之手可没什么关系。

Text.en: It's how I'd live, if I was here.
Text.zh: 换做是我，我也会这么干。

Text.en: Ah. Say no more.
Text.zh: 啊，别再说了。

Text.en: I see.
Text.zh: 我懂了。

Text.en: Okay. Sure thing.
Text.zh: 好吧，当然了。

Text.en: I understand you. I am not exactly welcome back home either. It is my bane to bear.
Text.zh: 我理解你。我在故乡也不受欢迎，这是我必须承受的苦难。

Text.en: I won't say a word.
Text.zh: 我不会说出去的。

Text.en: I catch what you're danglin'.
Text.zh: 我明白你话里有话。

Text.en: Aye. I take yer meanin'.
Text.zh: 行了，我懂的。

Text.en: Business has been on the rise ever since he took up residence outside my shop...
Text.zh: 多亏了这位爷在我店外边杵着。我的生意可真是越来越好了。

Text.en: Has it now?
Text.zh: 还有这种事？

Text.en: People duck in here to seek refuge from him, and I make a sale while they hide. It's a win for everybody!
Text.zh: 大伙儿为了躲他，慌慌张张扎我店里猫着，都里面躲着，我就顺便卖个东西。这可是皆大欢喜啊！

Text.en: Ah, the specialty service of Rog's Rarities! Thanks to my contact on the docks—that'd be Tujen, right out there through the window—I can ship you in anything and everything on Wraeclast!
Text.zh: 啊，这就是罗格珍奇屋的特色服务！码头那边有我的路子——就窗户外头晃悠的那位图金——只要您开口，整个瓦尔克拉斯，甭管哪的货，我都能给您弄来。

Text.en: [NOAUDIO] That may be useful.
Text.zh: 兴许用得上。

Text.en: [NOAUDIO] I do have eclectic tastes.
Text.zh: 我这人喜好挺杂的。

Text.en: [NOAUDIO] I've heard many <i>{akharas} trade with Kingsmarch.
Text.zh: 我听说不少<i>{阿卡拉}都跟君锋镇有贸易来往。

Text.en: [NOAUDIO] How does that work?
Text.zh: 那该怎么操作？

Text.en: [NOAUDIO] How do I do that?
Text.zh: 具体该怎么做？

Text.en: [NOAUDIO] A worthwhile service.
Text.zh: 这服务倒是挺有用。

Text.en: [NOAUDIO] Eh? Forgive this old Druid his ignorance o' naval trade.
Text.zh: 呃？您别见怪，我这老德鲁伊对海运一窍不通。

Text.en: [NOAUDIO] I'll take you up on that, no doubt.
Text.zh: 回头一定找你帮忙。

Text.en: [NOAUDIO] Please do.
Text.zh: 那就有劳了。

Text.en: I can post your trade orders, and fulfill them for you. You just let me know what you're looking to trade!
Text.zh: 我可以帮你们发布交易订单，也能帮你们完成交易。您只管说想要啥！

Text.en: The Twilight Order are trying to put your 'gods' back to sleep and create a utopia? That sounds rather nice.
Text.zh: 你说暮光会想把你们那些“神”哄睡着，然后创造一个乌托邦？听起来挺美。

Text.en: Utopia already exists. It's out there, in nature, away from cities like this one...
Text.zh: 乌托邦早就存在了，就在大自然里，离这种城市十万八千里……

Text.en: They believe what they say. <continue>And that is <i>{not} a good thing.
Text.zh: 他们是真信自己那一套啊。 <continue>这可<i>{不是}什么好事情。

Text.en: I would support them myself, if I had not... met them.
Text.zh: 要不是……碰巧了解过他们，我自己都可能支持他们。

Text.en: I've got my own plans for Wraeclast... They're just getting in the way.
Text.zh: 我在瓦尔克拉斯有自己的打算，他们碰巧挡了我的路。

Text.en: I do not think it is all it seems. Besides, I want to walk my own path, not one set before me by others. Especially them.
Text.zh: 我感觉他们有所隐瞒。我只走自己的路，而不是别人铺好的路。尤其是他们。

Text.en: You wouldn't think that if you'd seen the consequences.
Text.zh: 你是没见着后果，瞅见就不会这么想了。

Text.en: Lotta folks on Wraeclast been trying to make a utopia or two... <continue>Usually by exiling folks they don't like.
Text.zh: 几百年来，瓦尔克拉斯上很多人都在折腾乌托邦……<continue>套路都一样，把他们看不顺眼的全轰了出去。

Text.en: A decent message, maybe. Not so, the messenger.
Text.zh: 话说的好听，说话的人可不咋样。

Text.en: Oh of course. But every continent has its... problematic personas. At least yours think they're trying to do the right thing. Ours... well. Count yourself lucky.
Text.zh: 哦，当然。但每个大陆都有它那些……麻烦人物。至少你们那帮人还觉得自己是在做好事。我们这儿的嘛……唉。您就知足吧。

Text.en: So, you're off then? I don't know much about Oriath. All I've ever heard are about its numerous disasters.
Text.zh: 所以，你这是要走了？我对那个“奥瑞亚”不太了解。听说那儿一直多灾多难，没太平过。

Text.en: Mostly deserved, from what I've heard. Now it's my mess to infiltrate.
Text.zh: 据我所知，大部分人都是活该。现在轮到我去渗透了。

Text.en: Disasters? I've not heard about any disasters.
Text.zh: 多灾多难？我怎么没听说过？

Text.en: Indeed, it bears a curse – the actions of man.
Text.zh: 确实，那里沾着不祥。人心浇灌出的诅咒罢了。

Text.en: Sounds delightfully dangerous, don't you think?
Text.zh: 听起来危险又刺激，你觉得呢？

Text.en: Yes, and I aim to bring its last. From there, perhaps it will find hope again.
Text.zh: 没错，而我正要去终结那些灾难。之后，那地方或许能重见希望。

Text.en: I fear what I might find. What I might... remember, should my suspicions prove correct.
Text.zh: 我怕我寻得的真相，怕它会印证我的猜想，怕我因此……回忆起什么。

Text.en: A glorious end for the last of the Eternal 'Empire.' Good riddance. I'll burn the whole place down.
Text.zh: “永恒帝国”最后这根毒草，总算有个痛快的结局。活该，我要一把火烧个干净。

Text.en: Oriath's a black well o' despair. I'll have to brave its darkness if we're to find the light.
Text.zh: 奥瑞亚就是个黑窟窿！想见光？那就得去闯一闯。

Text.en: Well, I've got everything I need in life, so you can have <i>{my} luck, as they say.
Text.zh: 好吧，我这辈子该有的都有了，你就拿走他们说的<i>{我的}好运吧。

Text.en: Kingsmarch was founded by Kalguurans in recent times. <continue>These <i>{particular} Kalguurans are new to Wraeclast. They come from the far east.
Text.zh: 君锋镇是卡古兰人近年来建立的。<continue>这<i>{帮}卡古兰人是新来的瓦尔克拉斯。他们从遥远的东方而来。

Text.en: That may explain why I detect no Corruption in their flesh... how odd...
Text.zh: 难怪我在他们身上感觉不到一丝腐化……真稀罕……

Text.en: You can detect Corruption in <i>{people}?
Text.zh: 你……能觉察<i>{他人}身上的腐化？

Text.en: You can sense it? <i>{Rathin}?
Text.zh: 你是能感觉到它吗？<i>{腐化}？

Text.en: You notice Corruption in others?
Text.zh: 你注意到别人身上的腐化了？

Text.en: You sense Corruption in others? Hmm.
Text.zh: 你能感觉到别人身上的腐化吗？嗯。

Text.en: You can feel Corruption?
Text.zh: 你能感觉到腐化？

Text.en: You feel Corruption within <i>{people}?
Text.zh: 你能感觉到<i>{人}身上的腐化？

Text.en: You can tell that? Wild trick.
Text.zh: 你能察觉到这点？这本事够神的。

Text.en: Ye can tell when Corruption has taken root?
Text.zh: 你连有没有腐化都能看出来？

Text.en: Of course I can. I am the greatest single expert on Corruption that has ever lived!
Text.zh: 当然能！我可是史上最厉害的腐化研究专家！

Text.en: The Weapon piece you carry is drawn to Corruption, is it not?
Text.zh: 你带的那块武器碎片会被腐化吸引，对吧？

Text.en: Ah, yes, there's... also that. How did you know?
Text.zh: 啊对，它确实……也行。你怎么知道的？

Text.en: I can... feel it. Like a subtle vibration in the air...
Text.zh: 我能……感觉到，就像空气中有种微妙的震动……

Text.en: Curious.
Text.zh: 有趣。

Text.en: Before you go... perhaps I can ask a favour. <continue>See, Kingsmarch trade has seen better days. Ships go out and they don't come back. <continue>And that kinda shite is bad for business...
Text.zh: 在你走之前……能不能帮我个忙。<continue>你看，君锋镇的生意大不如前了。船开出去就回不来了。<continue>这事儿太影响生意了……

Text.en: Hmm...before you set off... perhaps you could look into a little problem of ours. <continue>See, Kingsmarch trade has seen better days. Ships go out and they don't come back. <continue>And that kinda shite is bad for business.
Text.zh: 嗯……在你走之前……或许能帮我们了结一桩麻烦事。<continue>你看，君锋镇的贸易已经大不如前了。船出去了，但就是回不来。<continue>这状况可太影响生意了……

Text.en: The water is not my home... but what do you need?
Text.zh: 水面不是我的地盘……不过你说说看吧？​

Text.en: What's the problem then?
Text.zh: 问题出在哪儿？

Text.en: Mysterious.
Text.zh: 真神秘。

Text.en: Dark foreboding seas! Oh, I can't wait.
Text.zh: 阴森凶险的大海！噢，我已经等不及了！

Text.en: Oh, dear. I feel seasick already.
Text.zh: 老天，我已经开始晕了。​

Text.en: What's the cause of this?
Text.zh: 这到底是怎么回事？

Text.en: Alright. Who I gotta kill?
Text.zh: 好吧，我要去干掉谁？

Text.en:
I'm at home on land, not sea.  
<continue>But, if ye're truly desperate... what is it ye need?
Text.zh:
陆地上的事儿我能管，海上就不行了。
<continue>不过你们这么惨……我该怎么帮你？

Text.en: A local island we call 'Journey's End' is spewing out blasted fog all over the sea, as thick as mud! <continue>The Karui know all about it, but won't seem to touch it. Somethin' has to be done.
Text.zh: 有个我们叫它“旅途终点”的一个小岛，正在向海上喷出恶臭的浓雾，那雾又浓又厚，浓得跟泥汤似的！<continue>卡鲁人对此了如指掌，但他们打死都不沾边儿。咱不能干瞪眼不是。

Text.en: How can <i>{we} get there?
Text.zh: <i>{我们}该怎么过去？

Text.en: But how will we fare through that fog?
Text.zh: 但这大雾遮天蔽日的我们怎么去？

Text.en: If this fog is blinding... we can't make it there.
Text.zh: 若是迷雾遮蔽视线……我们便无法抵达。

Text.en: Fog like a thick cold blanket. Mmm. Wait. How will we get there?
Text.zh: 浓雾如寒毡一般。唔，等等，我们怎么过去？

Text.en: This fog will prevent us from making the journey, no?
Text.zh: 雾挡着路，咱们到不了吧？

Text.en: How will we find our way through the fog?
Text.zh: 如何在迷雾中找到道路？

Text.en: Sure. But how we gettin' there?
Text.zh: 行啊！可我们怎么去呢？

Text.en: That fog'll swallow ship and soul alike. How do we get there?
Text.zh: 那雾会把船和灵魂都吞没。我们怎么过去呢？

Text.en: Yes. I've seen these shores.
Text.zh: 我见识过那些海岸。

Text.en: Yeah. Been there. Right nightmare, it is.
Text.zh: 嗯，我去过，那地方简直是个噩梦。

Text.en: The Dreamer has led me there already.
Text.zh: 幻梦者早带我去过那里。

Text.en: Ah yes. Been there. Perhaps I should go a little further...
Text.zh: 啊，是的。去过那里。也许我应该再往前走走……

Text.en: Yes. I have seen this island.
Text.zh: 是的，我见识过这个岛。

Text.en: I've seen that place. We've already landed on Kedge Bay before.
Text.zh: 我见识过那地方，我们在落锚湾登上了那座岛。

Text.en: Do I really wanna go back? Suppose I could...
Text.zh: 我真的想回去吗？我想我应该……

Text.en: I've walked those shores. Nothing good grows there.
Text.zh: 我去过那片海岸。那就是片不毛之地。

Text.en: Makoru can do it. She's Karui, and grew up on these waters. <continue>If anyone can get you there, it's her, no doubt.
Text.zh: 马克鲁能行，她是卡鲁人，在这片海里长大。<continue>如果要问有谁能把你们送到那儿，那肯定是她，毫无疑问。

Text.en: I'll look into it.
Text.zh: 我会去调查的。

Text.en: Spirit guide me, this fog won't linger.
Text.zh: 愿灵魂指引我，这雾不会一直这么浓。​

Text.en: I'll ease your trouble, Kalguuran.
Text.zh: 替您解忧，卡古兰朋友。​

Text.en: Fog clearer at your service, I guess.
Text.zh: 那就需要我这个迷雾清道夫为你效劳了呗。

Text.en: I will do my best for you, Master Tujen.
Text.zh: 我会尽我所能帮助你，图金大人。

Text.en: I'll do what I can.
Text.zh: 我会尽我所能的。

Text.en: A job's a job. Sure thing.
Text.zh: 任务就是任务。没问题。

Text.en: Seems I've a job to do.
Text.zh: 看来我有活儿干了。

Text.en: [DNT]
Text.zh: 看来我有活儿干了。

Text.en: We'd be in your debt! And... I've got somethin' special with your name on it... <continue>... if you can clear that bloody fog!
Text.zh: 那太感谢了！而且……我这儿有点东西，可以说是专门为你准备的……<continue>……如果你能驱散那该死的浓雾！

Text.en: Oh my... what's that there? It's beautiful!
Text.zh: 哦，我的天……那是什么？真漂亮！

Text.en: It's a pearl.
Text.zh: 一颗珍珠。

Text.en: A pearl I found in a clam.
Text.zh: 蚌壳里头摸出来的一颗珍珠。

Text.en: A treasure of the sea. A pearl.
Text.zh: 海之珍宝，一颗珍珠。

Text.en: A pearl, of course.
Text.zh: 一颗珍珠，当然了。

Text.en: I found it in some sort of shelled creature. I think you call it a... 'pearl'?
Text.zh: 我在某种甲壳动物体内找到了这个。你们是不是叫它“珍珠”？

Text.en: It's a pearl. I found it in a clam.
Text.zh: 一颗珍珠。我在蚌壳里找到的。

Text.en: A big ol' pearl!
Text.zh: 好大的珍珠！

Text.en: A pearl, pulled from the belly of a clam.
Text.zh: 一颗珍珠，蛤蜊肚子里拔出来的。

Text.en: That's not just any pearl... Hmm. I've an idea. I know I've got something around here that'd fit that nicely...
Text.zh: 那可不是寻常珠子……嗯，有了。我这儿正有件配它的好东西……

Text.en: For me...? Huh... nobody's ever given me a gift like this before.
Text.zh: 给我的？哈，从来没人送过我这种礼物。

Text.en: Thank you kindly.
Text.zh: 谢谢你。

Text.en: I accept this gift. Thank you.
Text.zh: 我接受这份礼物。感谢你。

Text.en: Hmm... a bit shiny. But I suppose I'll take it.
Text.zh: 嗯……有点闪眼睛，不过我还是收下了。

Text.en: Oh Sir Rog! Haha! I don't think you know what this means in the Vastiri, but I will take it as you intended.
Text.zh: 哦，罗格先生！哈哈！我敢说您肯定不知道这在瓦斯提里意味着什么，礼物我收下了，您的好意我领了。

Text.en: Skilled work, my friend.
Text.zh: 手艺不错，我的朋友。

Text.en: I'm always up to be bribed.
Text.zh: 我向来乐意收揽好处。

Text.en: I'll wear it well.
Text.zh: 我会好好佩戴它的。

Text.en: Consider this kindness in the future, <i>{friend.}
Text.zh: 将这份情记在心里吧，<i>{朋友。}

Text.en: Freya Hartlin's still around, and trapped on Journey's End? How strange... I believe I know the runes that could break that seal.
Text.zh: 芙蕾雅·哈特林还活着，而且被困在旅途终点？真奇怪……我想我刚好知道能打破那个封印的符文。

Text.en: Forge them and I'll return with Freya.
Text.zh: 把符文钉子炼出来，我自会带回芙蕾雅。

Text.en: Hop to it, will ya? She's not gettin' any younger.
Text.zh: 快动手吧，她可等不起。

Text.en: Time is of the essence, smith.
Text.zh: 时间紧迫，铁匠。

Text.en: I think... something's quite off with her.
Text.zh: 我觉得……她有点不对劲。​

Text.en: I must hurry. I trust you, Lord Dannig. I beg you, do your best work for me.
Text.zh: 时间紧迫。我信任您，丹宁大人。我请求您尽全力为我打造。

Text.en: Strange things are all I see of late.
Text.zh: 最近我看到的都是些怪事。

Text.en: C'mon then. Lady's waitin'.
Text.zh: 那，动手吧。女士在等着呢。

Text.en: Best get to it, then. Afore the fog claims her for good.
Text.zh: 那最好赶紧行动。免得大雾将她永远吞噬。

Text.en: Wraeclast has always been full of surprises. So be it. I'll forge those spikes with haste.
Text.zh: 瓦尔克拉斯向来充满了意外。好吧。我会尽快把钉子锻造出来。

Text.en: There we go. That should do it. Be careful out there.
Text.zh: 好了。应该没问题了。外边儿凶险，千万当心。

Text.en: Ah, a Sorceress in Kingsmarch! What a strange sight. I've heard tales of your kind. My name is Dannig. I am the humble leader of this fair port... and its smith.
Text.zh: 啊，君锋镇来了一位魔巫！真是稀罕。我听说过关于你们的传说。我是丹宁，是这个美丽港口的主事人……和铁匠。

Text.en: Oh... I am pleased to meet you, Lord Dannig. You are so... tall. <continue>Hmm, I must know... what kind of smithing is that? It's like none I've ever seen.
Text.zh: 哦……很高兴见到您，丹宁大人。您真是……高大。 <continue>嗯，我还是想知道……这是什么锻造法？我从来没见过。

Text.en: Observant! Yes, I'm a bit more than a blacksmith. I am also skilled in runecraft.
Text.zh: 眼力不错！是的，我可不只是普通的铁匠。我还会点符文工艺。

Text.en: Runecraft. Oh, it sounds like such beautiful sorcery. Do tell me its tale.
Text.zh: 符文工艺。哦，听上去就像美妙的巫术。快告诉我这技法的来历吧。

Text.en: Oh, it's not sorcery. It's science, taught to me by priests in my younger days. <continue>But enough about me. You're as far from home as we are... more or less. We should exchange tales over an ale sometime soon!
Text.zh: 噢，这不是巫术。这是科学，我年轻时从祭司那儿学的。<continue>不过我的事说够了。你和我们一样远道而来……或者说，差不多远。我们该找个时间边喝麦酒边聊聊家常！

Text.en: A Witch in Kingsmarch! Never a good omen. Dark times ahead, I take it.
Text.zh: 君锋镇来了一位女巫！这可不是什么好兆头。看来，是黑暗的时代要来临了吧。

Text.en: If I have my way... then yes.
Text.zh: 如果按我的路子来……那的确如此。

Text.en: Oh? Planning to bring doom and death to us all, are you? Just another day in Wraeclast.
Text.zh: 哦？是打算给我们所有人带来末日和死亡吗？不过是瓦尔克拉斯的又一天罢了。

Text.en: I suppose I do need to save the world before I conquer it.
Text.zh: 我想在征服世界之前，我是得先拯救一下这个世界。

Text.en: I thought so. Let me know when you begin your <i>{'evil crusade'} and perhaps I'll get up an hour early to stop you.
Text.zh: 我就知道。等您开始您的<i>{“邪恶远征”}，不妨告知一声，或许我会特意早起一小时来阻止您。

Text.en: It's a date.
Text.zh: 一言为定。

Text.en: Ah, a fellow blacksmith! You and I must share tales of ancestral bravery over an ale one of these days. I am Dannig, the smith and leader of this fair port.
Text.zh: 啊，一名铁匠同行！我俩得找个日子边喝麦酒边闲聊，谈谈先祖的勇武传奇。我叫丹宁，是这个美丽港口的铁匠和主事人。

Text.en: I've been away from the flame too long. I could use a bit of home. And that ale.
Text.zh: 我离开炉火太久了。真想感受些故乡的气息。还有那麦酒。

Text.en: You are most welcome at my forge any time. If you're around long enough, I'll even teach you the art of runecraft. Takes a couple years to learn, though.
Text.zh: 随时欢迎你来我的铁匠铺。如果你待得够久，我甚至可以教你符文工艺。不过得花上个几年才能学会。

Text.en: If I survive the coming days, that would be an intriguing challenge.
Text.zh: 如果我能挺过接下来的几天，那倒会是个有趣的挑战。

Text.en: Then it's all settled. Welcome to Kingsmarch!
Text.zh: 那就这么说定了。君锋镇欢迎你！

Text.en: Well, well, a Trarthan! Greetings, Mercenary. You'll find plenty of work here in Kingsmarch, if you're so inclined. I'm Dannig, the smith and leader of this fair port. You may come to me for your equipment needs.
Text.zh: 哎呀呀，特拉特斯人！你好，佣兵。如果你在找工作，君锋镇有很多机会。我叫丹宁，是这个美丽港口的铁匠和主事人。如果你需要装备，可以来找我。

Text.en: You get enough Trarthans here you recognise one on sight?
Text.zh: 你们这儿特拉珊人很多吗？一眼就能认出一个来？

Text.en: We've had one or two show up over the years... caused us a fair amount of trouble. You're not still involved in the Death Trades, are you?
Text.zh: 这些年确实来过一两个……给我们添了不少乱子。你还没继续干那些亡命买卖吧，对吗？

Text.en: No more than the next weapon-for-hire.
Text.zh: 和其他拿钱办事的人没区别。

Text.en: Fair enough.
Text.zh: 很公平。

Text.en: Welcome to Kingsm—
Text.zh: 欢迎来到君锋——

Text.en: I know that kind of fake smile. No need for blustering introductions. I'm not here to make friends.
Text.zh: 我认得那种假笑，没必要装腔作势地自我介绍。我不是来交朋友的。

Text.en: It's not entirely fake. I'm just getting tired as the years wear on, you know?
Text.zh: 那笑容可不全是假的。我只是年岁渐长，容易倦怠，你明白吗？

Text.en: Such is the way of things.
Text.zh: 世间事，莫不如是。

Text.en: So it is. Well, I'm the smith here, as you can tell. If you need anything, let me know.
Text.zh: 确实。好吧，如您所见，我是这儿的铁匠。有什么需要，尽管开口。

Text.en: I will.
Text.zh: 我会的。

Text.en: Hail. Welcome to Kingsmarch. I am Dannig, the smith and leader of this fair port town.
Text.zh: 幸会。欢迎来到君锋镇。我叫丹宁，是这个美丽港口的铁匠和主事人。

Text.en: Greetings, Dannig. I'm a mountainborn, of the Azmeri... or rather, I <i>{was}.
Text.zh: 幸会，丹宁。我是山民，来自阿兹莫里……或者说，我<i>{曾经是}。

Text.en: Ouch. That's a pain I recognise. You know, we can't exactly go home, either. If you ever want to grab an ale and talk about it, feel free to stop by.
Text.zh: 唉。这苦楚我晓得。你知道，我们其实也回不了家。如果你哪天想喝杯麦酒聊聊这事，随时可以过来坐坐。

Text.en: I might do just that.
Text.zh: 也许我会的。

Text.en: A Monk! Incredible. Monks are a true rarity in Kalguur these days, but that was not always the case. I am interested in learning about your beliefs.
Text.zh: 行者！真不可思议。行者在如今的卡古兰可是名副其实的稀客，但以前并非如此。我对你们的信仰很感兴趣。

Text.en: The Dreamer guides all who are willing to see.
Text.zh: 幻梦者总会为觅道者指引证道之途。

Text.en: The Dreamer? Is that one of Wraeclast's 'gods?'
Text.zh: 幻梦者？那是瓦尔克拉斯的一个“神明”吗？

Text.en: No. But we can talk about that another time. I am compelled to continue on with haste.
Text.zh: 不。不过我们可以改日再谈。我有要事必须立刻动身。

Text.en: Of course. Right. Uh, this is Kingsmarch, I am Dannig, smith and leader of this fair port town. Come to me for your equipment needs.
Text.zh: 当然。好的。呃，这里是君锋镇。我叫丹宁，是这个美丽港口的铁匠和主事人。如果你需要装备，可以来找我。

Text.en: I shall.
Text.zh: 我会的。

Text.en: A Druid, in the flesh! Pardon my surprise, wise one. My people once had an order of Druids long ago. You have my utmost respect. I'm Dannig. Welcome to Kingsmarch!
Text.zh: 一位活生生的德鲁伊！请原谅我的惊讶，智者。我的族人在很早以前曾有过一支德鲁伊教团。请让我对您表示最诚挚的敬意，我叫丹宁，欢迎来到君锋镇！

Text.en: Yer kind had Druids?
Text.zh: 你们这类人也有过德鲁伊？

Text.en:
Yes. The Druids of the Broken Circle. Their tales are quite extensive, albeit ancient. 
Gronel Starseer, Smalon Thickett, Avon Bruhn... all very illustrious stories in their own right.
Text.zh:
是的，叫裂环祭司。他们的传说相当丰富，虽然年代久远。
格罗内尔·斯塔西尔、斯玛隆·希克特、埃文·布鲁恩..……每个名字都代表着一段独属自己的辉煌传奇。

Text.en: I've no use for names. Tell me how they lived.
Text.zh: 我不关心他们叫什么，告诉我他们怎么生活的。

Text.en: I'm always up for a tale or two. And an ale or two! Let's meet at the tavern sometime.
Text.zh: 我最爱听故事了！再配上两杯麦酒。改天咱们酒馆聚聚吧。

Text.en: Ale, ye say? Say no more.
Text.zh: 麦酒？不用说了，我肯定去。

Text.en: Hmm... what do we have here?
Text.zh: 嗯……你找到了什么？

Text.en: Precisely what I'd like to know.
Text.zh: 这正是我想问的。

Text.en: Aye. That's what <i>{I'm} wonderin'.
Text.zh: 啊， <i>{我}也头疼这个呢。

Text.en: Enlighten me, Kalguuran.
Text.zh: 卡古兰人，给我解释一下。

Text.en: That's what you're here to tell me.
Text.zh: 应该由你来告诉我。

Text.en: I was wondering the same. Let us think about this.
Text.zh: 我也发愁呢，你来帮我看看。

Text.en: I hoped you could tell <i>{me}.
Text.zh: 我本来还指望你能告诉<i>{我}。

Text.en: Cut to the chase, mate.
Text.zh: 少兜圈子了，伙计。

Text.en: Haven't the foggiest. What d'ye make of all this?
Text.zh: 我完全搞不懂。你们怎么看？

Text.en: Makeshift lodgings... markers... Yes. This looks like Gwennen's handiwork. She is still pursuing our grand quest, after all. But... she didn't finish what she started here. How odd.
Text.zh: 临时住所……标记……嗯。像是桂温妮的手笔。她果然还在追寻我们的伟大使命。但……她没完成她在这儿的事。真蹊跷。

Text.en: Where do you think she is now?
Text.zh: 你觉得她现在在哪儿？

Text.en: Seems she ain't here to speak to why.
Text.zh: 她可没留这儿解释原委。

Text.en: What do you think became of Gwennen?
Text.zh: 你觉得桂温妮遭遇了何事？

Text.en: Oh my, is she dead? Where's her body?
Text.zh: 天啊，她死了？她的遗体呢？

Text.en: We must remain hopeful. Perhaps she just became distracted.
Text.zh: 我们必须往好处想。或许她只是被什么事缠住了。

Text.en: What stopped her?
Text.zh: 是什么阻止了她？

Text.en: Left without the treasure... <continue>Not a good sign.
Text.zh: 扔下宝藏不要……<continue>这可不是好兆头。

Text.en: Not one to leave a job half-done, then?
Text.zh: 她可不是个会半途而废的人，对吧？

Text.en: I'm sure she had her reasons to cut and run. There's all manner of monstrosities out here! In any case, it seems she left us some clues as to what's in the area... <continue>When you're ready, let's see what we can unearth. Place the first explosive and we'll get started.
Text.zh: 她肯定有不得不撒腿就跑的理由。这鬼地方到处都是怪物！无论如何，她似乎留了些线索表明附近有什么……<continue>准备好了就动手吧。放好第一个炸药，我们开工。

Text.en: You made that look easy, dare I say! You're well on your way to being a qualified archaeologist at this rate.
Text.zh: 敢说一句，你弄得可真轻松！照这速度，你都快成专业考古学家了。

Text.en: I'd prefer a more peaceful line of work.
Text.zh: 我宁愿干点更安稳的行当。

Text.en: Let's do that again sometime!
Text.zh: 找机会再来一次吧！

Text.en: It was quite loud... but enjoyable.
Text.zh: 声响很大……不过很过瘾。

Text.en: The explosions were quite delightful, I must admit...
Text.zh: 老实说，这些爆炸相当带劲……

Text.en: You are quite the charmer. But yes, my heart is still racing!
Text.zh: 你可真厉害，老实说，我的心现在还在怦怦跳！

Text.en: Seems a risky occupation...
Text.zh: 这工作看起来风险挺大的……

Text.en: Cheers, Dannig. I had... a blast.
Text.zh: 谢了丹宁。我……玩得心潮澎湃。

Text.en: Done plenty o' diggin' in my time. Never like <i>{that}.
Text.zh: 我这辈子挖过不少东西。但从来没见过<i>{这阵仗}。

Text.en: Well, I hope the bounty was worth the risk. I must say, it usually is... <continue>I'll stay behind and see if I can find any clues as to where Gwennen went off to. See you back in Kingsmarch!
Text.zh: 行，但愿这趟没白冒险。要我说，通常都不亏……<continue>我留下看看能不能找到桂温妮去向的线索。君锋镇见！

Text.en: This little jewel on the sea might have been granted an official charter by the King, but it's those of us here on Wraeclast that have built it into the trading hub it is today.
Text.zh: 虽然是国王给予了我们这颗海上明珠官方的特许权，但把它打造成如今这个贸易中心的不是别人，而是我们这些生活在瓦尔克拉斯的人。

Text.en: I suppose I've seen worse.
Text.zh: 想来，这里还算不错了。

Text.en: Never seen anything like it.
Text.zh: 我从未见过这样的村落。

Text.en: You should be proud of what you have built here.
Text.zh: 你们理当为自己的营造深感自豪。

Text.en: I suppose there's really nothing to criticise. It's... fine.
Text.zh: 无可指摘。这地方……还不错。

Text.en: It has a... charm, I suppose. Though it does make me homesick for the Vastiri. Still, it is impressive what you have built.
Text.zh: 确有几分……魅力。这确实让我想起了瓦斯提里的家乡。你们的营造确实令人赞叹。

Text.en: It reminds me of home. You've done well here.
Text.zh: 这让我想念家乡。你们很了不起。

Text.en: Reminds me a bit of Korathin. I mean that as a compliment.
Text.zh: 有点像柯拉辛的感觉。这其实是好话。

Text.en: Made somethin' from nothin'. That's to be commended.
Text.zh: 这算是白手起家了。真厉害啊。

Text.en: To be fair, we did have local help...
Text.zh: 说真的，当地人帮衬了不少……

Text.en: The King commissioned this port for trade <i>{after} we'd been operating it as an outpost for many years. <continue>We ourselves would like to investigate the remnants of our own culture, but he is... <continue>... very interested in Vaal artefacts.
Text.zh: 我们将这处前哨经营了多年<i>{之后}，国王才特许它作为贸易港口的。<continue>我们想要调查自己文明的遗物，但国王……<continue>他最感兴趣的是瓦尔人的遗物。

Text.en: A mistake men of power often seem to repeat. What's <i>{his} goal?
Text.zh: 掌权的人就爱犯这种错误。 <i>{他} 想干什么？

Text.en: Doesn't he know the danger Vaal artefacts bring?
Text.zh: 难道他不知道瓦尔遗物有多么危险？

Text.en: And why is that?
Text.zh: 为何？

Text.en: Ominous. Any idea why?
Text.zh: 这是不祥之兆。你知道为什么吗？

Text.en: How strange. Why is he wasting his time with the remnants of a dead Empire? Seems all Kings obsess over ridiculous things.
Text.zh: 奇怪。他为什么要在灭亡帝国的残骸上浪费时间？似乎所有国王都痴迷于荒唐事物。

Text.en: The Vaal? Why?
Text.zh: 瓦尔遗物？为什么？

Text.en: That's right foolish! What's he up to?
Text.zh: 这不是瞎胡闹吗！他到底在搞什么？

Text.en: The crimes o' the Vaal are best left buried. What's your King playin' at?
Text.zh: 瓦尔昔日的罪业，最好长埋地下！你们的国王在搞什么？

Text.en: Your guess is as good as mine.
Text.zh: 我跟你一样不清楚。

Text.en: Kingsmarch is actually our second attempt at settling on Wraeclast. Our first expedition, thousands of years back, was mysteriously lost.
Text.zh: 君锋镇其实是我们第二次尝试在瓦尔克拉斯定居了。几千年前的第一次远征队，神秘失踪了。

Text.en: Really? Are you sure?
Text.zh: 真的？你确定？

Text.en: The Azmeri remember. The stories say we came to their aid, but it was too late. What happened?
Text.zh: 阿兹莫里人还记得。传说我们曾经施以援手，但为时已晚。究竟发生了什么？

Text.en: History lost outweighs history remembered. Do you have any idea what happened?
Text.zh: 青史所失远多于所存，你可知晓个中往事？

Text.en: Typical Wraeclast. What happened?
Text.zh: 典型的瓦尔克拉斯故事。发生了什么？

Text.en: To lose the telling of a tale is one of the heart's worst burdens.
Text.zh: 失传的往事是心灵最沉重的负担之一。

Text.en: What happened to them?
Text.zh: 他们遭遇了什么？

Text.en: Their mistake was trying the mainland. Probably a tragic tale, that. What happened?
Text.zh: 他们错在想打大陆的主意。估计是个悲剧。到底怎么回事？

Text.en: No mystery there. Wraeclast swallows folk whole. <continue>Or d'ye think it was somethin' else?
Text.zh: 没什么稀奇的。瓦尔克拉斯吞噬了他们。<continues>还是你们觉得另有隐情？

Text.en: That's why we came here twenty years ago, to find out... and we also sought the artefact of power our forebears brought with them to Wraeclast. It has become my life's work: the search for the Triskelion Flame!
Text.zh: 这正是我们二十年前来此的目的，为了查明真相……也是为寻找先祖带到瓦尔克拉斯的强大神器。这已成了我的毕生所求：追寻三耀之火！

Text.en: The most powerful artefact in our known tales was brought to this continent by the first expedition thousands of years ago. The songs tell of it incinerating evil, purifying tainted fields, and warding off those of ill intent.
Text.zh: 民间传说，我们最强大的神器在数千年前被先遣探险队带到了这片大陆。歌谣里说，神器可以焚灭邪恶，净化腐土，驱除恶人。

Text.en: That sounds like our fable of the Runic Triquetra. If it was actually real, it would make a tremendous difference.
Text.zh: 这听起来就像我族的符文三角传说。如果真的存在，一定会起大作用。

Text.en: Our stories mention your people havin' that. <continue>It'd be a powerful weapon in this fight.
Text.zh: 我族人的传说提过你们的族人拥有它。<continue>在这场战斗中会是件强大的武器。

Text.en: This would be a fortuitous time for such an artefact to resurface.
Text.zh: 此刻正是这等神兵利器重现于世的良机。

Text.en: I'm intrigued. That thing sounds rather useful for our current situation.
Text.zh: 有意思，那东西听起来对眼下的局势很有用处。

Text.en: I can incinerate evil myself, but purification... Wraeclast could use that.
Text.zh: 我自己就能焚灭邪恶，但净化腐土就……瓦尔克拉斯会需要它的。

Text.en: If Ogham had possessed something like that... well, we still need it, even now.
Text.zh: 要是欧甘能拥有这种神器……唉，即便现在我们也需要它。

Text.en: Sounds like a fae tale, but I'll take anything, considering what we're up against.
Text.zh: 听着像童话故事，不过考虑到咱们面对的东西，什么我都信。

Text.en: If it truly purifies... then it belongs in these blighted lands.
Text.zh: 如果它真能净化……那这片被污染的土地最需要它。

Text.en: My thoughts exactly. I still intend to get out there - I just get bogged down by the work of running Kingsmarch...
Text.zh: 正是如此。我依然打算重拾线索——只是打理君锋镇的俗务缠身……

Text.en: Life is too short to live it passively.
Text.zh: 人生苦短，怎么能被牵着鼻子走呢。

Text.en: Aye, you're an Elder now... no offence.
Text.zh: 是啊，你如今也算是长者了……无意冒犯。

Text.en: All paths have detours. You should get back on the trail.
Text.zh: 众道皆有歧途，你合该重回正途。

Text.en: Let the weaklings <i>{administrate.} Stop wasting time.
Text.zh: 让弱者打理<i>{俗务}去吧。别浪费时间。

Text.en: The burden of leadership usually falls on the unwilling. It is a sign of your virtue. I admire you for this.
Text.zh: 领袖的重担总是降于不情愿之人。这是你美德的象征。我敬佩你这一点。

Text.en: Trust me. The hour is always later than you think.
Text.zh: 相信我，时间总是比你预想的更紧迫。

Text.en: If there's one thing that grinds a man down more than anything else, it's paperwork.
Text.zh: 要说什么最能把人折腾死，那就是文书工作。

Text.en: Life at a desk's no life at all. Best ye get back out there.
Text.zh: 整天坐在书桌前有什么意思。赶紧收拾行李上路吧！

Text.en: One day, there will be a glorious return! One day, we Grand Four will finish our quest, and perhaps do a little saving of this fair Wraeclast. Yes. One day. Soon.
Text.zh: 总有一天，我们会荣耀回归！总有一天，我们无畏四人组会完成伟业，或许还能顺手拯救下这美好的瓦尔克拉斯。是的。那一天。很快了。

Text.en: The runes on our armour essentially capture and shape starlight. Sounds poetic, but don't be fooled. The smiths of the Kalguur turned these runes toward killing work long ago, as soon as we discovered we could compel arrows to find their mark and blades to bite deeper.
Text.zh: 我们盔甲上的符文，其本质是捕获并淬炼星光。听起来很有诗意，但千万别误会，。卡古兰人的铁匠们很久以前就用这些符文制造致命武器，因为铁匠们发现它们可以让刀箭更准更狠。

Text.en: I've never seen runes with such power. Can they really do all that?
Text.zh: 我从未见过如此强力的符文。它们真的有那么大用处？

Text.en: The Spirit has never spoken to us of such things. These runes, do they really do all that?
Text.zh: 万灵从未向我们透露过这种东西。这些符文，真的那么强大？

Text.en: Some of our teachings mention such runes, but they suggest avoiding them. <continue>Do runes really hold power of that sort?
Text.zh: 我们的某些教义曾提及此种符文，建议我们避而远之。<continue>此种符文果真有这等力量？

Text.en: I'm always interested in learning a new thing or two. Can runes really do that?
Text.zh: 我一向乐于学习新鲜事物。这种符文真有那么强大？

Text.en: I hang on these words. Remarkable. And you, Lord Dannig, can do this? I am in awe. <continue>Tell me, can runes truly accomplish such things?
Text.zh: 我会牢牢记住你的话，真了不起。丹宁大人，你会做这些符文吗？我深表敬畏。<continue>告诉我，这种符文真的能做到这些？

Text.en: The Ezomytes also smith runes, but not with such power. Can your runes truly do all that?
Text.zh: 艾兹麦人也打造符文，但没有这种威力。你的符文真的能做到这些吗？

Text.en: Well that sounds downright useful. Can runes really do all that?
Text.zh: 听起来挺厉害的。符文真有这么神？

Text.en: That's no small claim. Can runes truly do all that?
Text.zh: 你说得可真厉害。这符文真有这么神？

Text.en: All that, and more. The greatest smiths became known as artificers, and produced work of singular genius. I'm not quite there yet, but it's only a matter of time and determination.
Text.zh: 不仅是这样，远超乎此。我们把最伟大的铁匠称为巧匠，他们的作品举世无双。我目前还不够格，不过只要有足够的时间和决心，总有一天我也能达到那样的境界。

Text.en: We've had twenty years on Wraeclast, and those gems you use continue to perplex me. Clearly, they grant you mystical abilities, but they simply don't do anything in the hands of a Kalguuran.
Text.zh: 我们在瓦尔克拉斯生活了二十多年，却还是不能理解你们使用的那些宝石。它们显然能赋予你们神秘的力量，但在卡古兰人手里却毫无作用。

Text.en: That speaks to deeper mysteries in your nature. You sure?
Text.zh: 这揭示了你天性中的奥秘。你确定真的没用吗？

Text.en: Reckon you're lucky, then. They bring evil. <continue>You sure it's never worked for ya?
Text.zh: 这说明你很幸运。宝石会招来邪恶。<continue>你确定它们对你从来不起效？

Text.en: Hmm... your presence does feel different to me. <continue>Are you sure it has never once worked?
Text.zh: 嗯……我感知到你的存在确实有所不同。<continue>你确定它们从未起效？

Text.en: What, really? I can't believe I'm saying this, but that seems rather... unfair.
Text.zh: 什么，真的吗？我简直不敢相信我会这么说，但这确实有些……不公平。

Text.en: I know it's impolite to ask this of a strong man, but did you make sure you... properly focused your will?
Text.zh: 我知道质疑像你这样的强者略显无礼，但你确定你……凝聚意志力了吗？

Text.en: Are you sure? Even with focused will?
Text.zh: 你确定？即便你凝聚了意志力？

Text.en: Well good on ya for holding your own. If you're this good <i>{without} gems, just imagine...
Text.zh: 没宝石你都这么厉害，真不错。要是<i>{有了}宝石，简直不敢想象……

Text.en: They've never worked for ye? Not even a glimmer?
Text.zh: 对你们完全无效？哪怕亮一下都没有？

Text.en: Believe me, I've tried. We have our own methods of mystical power, to be fair, but your gems remain an enigma. Somehow, I suspect the power is actually inside you, and these 'virtue gems' are just the particular way you believe the world works. I'm no priest, though, so take my opinion for what it's worth.
Text.zh: 相信我，我试过。平心而论，我们自有一套运用神秘力量的方法，但你们的宝石依然谜团重重。不知何故，我怀疑力量实际上是蕴藏在你们体内的，这些“古灵宝石”只是你们所认定的世界法则。不过我也不是祭司，我的话随便听听就行。

Text.en: Our trade with the Karui fluctuates. There are so many tribes with different beliefs and different propensities... some days, we're all profiting. Other days, they're raiding our shipping lanes.
Text.zh: 我们与卡鲁人的贸易波动很大。他们有这么多部落，信仰各异、倾向迥然……有些日子，我们一起盈利。其他时候，他们就在袭击我们的航运路线。

Text.en: Sounds about right.
Text.zh: 可不就这么回事儿嘛。

Text.en: Do they not feel the Spirit? No unity? Strange.
Text.zh: 难道他们感受不到万灵？从不联合起来？真奇怪。

Text.en: This imperfect world makes monsters of us all, given enough time.
Text.zh: 假以时日，残缺的世道终将把我们尽皆变为怪物。

Text.en: This type of situation is common in the Vastiri. The strong tend to do as they please.
Text.zh: 这种情况在瓦斯提里稀松平常。强者往往为所欲为。

Text.en: Shameful behaviour.
Text.zh: 可耻的行径。

Text.en: It never changes. Warlords vying for power.
Text.zh: 天下无旧事，全是督军争权夺利。

Text.en: Sounds like the sea herself... Calm one day, ragin' the next.
Text.zh: 看来卡鲁人就像大海……今天风平浪静，明天就怒涛汹涌。

Text.en: The Tukohama Tribe, the largest in the region, welcomed us at first. We got along very well. Too well. When some of their younger members became interested in Kingsmarch, their Chieftain, Tavakai, began to see us a little differently.
Text.zh: 本地最大的图克哈玛部落起初接纳了我们。我们相处得非常融洽。实在是太要好了。当他们的族中青年对君锋镇产生兴趣时，他们的酋长塔瓦凯开始对我们有了不同的看法。

Text.en: I don't think we're going to find ourselves in open warfare, but Tavakai has recently slowed trade and restricted us to the docks at their settlement. That whale incident certainly didn't help...
Text.zh: 我不认为会爆发战事，但塔瓦凯最近放缓了交易，并限制我们在他们的定居点只准使用海港。那起鲸鱼风波当然没有帮上忙……

Text.en: Did something happen to a whale?
Text.zh: 一条鲸鱼出了事？

Text.en: What? What happened?
Text.zh: 什么？出了什么事？

Text.en: What happened with the whale?
Text.zh: 鲸鱼怎么了？

Text.en: Whale incident? That sounds juicy.
Text.zh: 什么风波？听起来很刺激。

Text.en: A what? A... whale?
Text.zh: 什么？一条……鲸鱼？

Text.en: What whale incident?
Text.zh: 什么鲸鱼风波？

Text.en: Oi... whale incidents are never good.
Text.zh: 唉……鲸鱼出事从来不是好征兆。

Text.en: Might have misheard ye. Did ye say 'whale incident'?
Text.zh: 我没听错吧？你刚才说的是“鲸鱼风波”吗？

Text.en: Our king commanded one of our vessels to hunt and harvest meat from a sacred whale, knowing full well what it meant to the Karui. By the time I found out, I was already too late. Tavakai hasn't spoken to me since.
Text.zh: 我们那位国王啊，明知道那头鲸鱼对卡鲁人有多神圣，还非派我们的船去捕杀取肉。等我发现的时候，已经太晚了。打那以后，塔瓦凯再没搭理过我。

Text.en: I should have trusted my instincts. I knew something was strange about that situation. <continue>I suppose this confirms the Hartlins are long dead...
Text.zh: 我早该信自己的直觉。当时就觉得这事儿不对劲。<continue>我想这证实了哈特林一家早就没了……

Text.en: On the rare occasions I trust, I tend to get burned.
Text.zh: 我很少信任他人，信任的结果总是受伤。

Text.en: No way we coulda known.
Text.zh: 我们当时不可能知道。

Text.en: Hopefully, it happened for a reason.
Text.zh: 但愿事出有因。

Text.en: Obviously. Tujen insisted, though, so I decided... why not?
Text.zh: 显而易见。但图金坚持，所以我想……何妨一试？

Text.en: I think it used my memories of my <i>{akharas} tale-women against me... it made fools of us all.
Text.zh: 我觉得它利用我记忆中的<i>{阿卡拉}说书人来对付我……它把我们都耍了。

Text.en: My father taught me to help those in need. Lying is their dishonour, not ours.
Text.zh: 我的父亲教导我帮助落难之人。错不在我们，撒谎是他们的耻辱。

Text.en: Damn thing played on my penchant for older women. Bastard genius.
Text.zh: 这混蛋专挑我喜欢成熟女人的毛病下手。真是个混蛋。

Text.en: You and me both. I've heard tell o' the Raven Trickster. That I could not see what was before my very eyes... Shameful.
Text.zh: 我和你一样。我早就听过“黑鸦欺诈者”的传说。可真相就摆在眼前，我居然没看出来……真丢人啊。

Text.en: The situation has become dire. But we will aid you in any way that we can. <continue>First priority has to be saving the Tukohama Tribe.
Text.zh: 情况很严峻，但我们会竭尽全力帮助你。<continue>当务之急是拯救图克哈玛部落。

Text.en: Aye. I'll do what I can.
Text.zh: 对，我会尽我所能。

Text.en: This region has suffered from their dreaded blood fever before. This could be a disaster...
Text.zh: 这片地区曾深受血热病的折磨，如果再度爆发……后果不堪设想……

Text.en: Win or lose, you're about to weave a glorious tale. <continue>Make sure you come back in one piece, so you can tell it to me.
Text.zh: 输赢不论，你这回肯定能谱出段传奇。<continue>记得全须全尾地回来，好讲给我听。

Text.en: Corruption must not be allowed to spread!
Text.zh: 我绝不允许腐化蔓延！

Text.en: Aye. I will.
Text.zh: 好，我会的。

Text.en: If I am led here once more, I'll make a point of it.
Text.zh: 若再度被引领至此，我定会为你诉说。

Text.en: Oh trust me, I'm sure you'll hear all about it.
Text.zh: 哦，相信我。我保证你一个字都不会落下。

Text.en: Seems the duty of a tale-woman might find me after all. <continue>I will definitely be back for you someday, Lord Dannig.
Text.zh: 看来说书人的使命终究还是找上了我。丹宁大人，我早晚会回来找你的。

Text.en: Yes. I will go there with haste.
Text.zh: 没错。我会尽快前往那里。

Text.en: Isn't that big a deal, mate. Just doing what I gotta do.
Text.zh: 没啥大不了的，兄弟。该干啥干啥。

Text.en: I'll do my best to give ye a tale worth tellin'.
Text.zh: 我会尽我所能，给你们创造一段传奇。

Text.en: We meet again! Your exploits inspired us to come out of retirement, so to speak. The Grand Four are once again searching for the Triskelion Flame! Wraeclast could sorely use its power in this time of darkness and despair...
Text.zh: 我们又见面了！你的事迹可算把我们这帮家伙从退休状态里勾出来了。无畏四人组再次出发，寻找三耀之火！在这个黑暗与绝望的时代，瓦尔克拉斯迫切需要这股力量……

Text.en: I'll help, if I can.
Text.zh: 如果能行，我一定帮忙。

Text.en: Aye. I'm glad.
Text.zh: 好，我很高兴。

Text.en: I suspected this would happen. I am pleased for you.
Text.zh: 我对此早有预感。我为你高兴。

Text.en: Well that's... good, actually.
Text.zh: 好吧，这倒是……好事。

Text.en: You Kalguurans are so joyful. It is... replenishing. But yes, now our amazing tale begins!
Text.zh: 你们卡古兰人总是这么乐观，真让人……开心。没错，我们激动人心的冒险开始了！

Text.en: It's about time you got back out there.
Text.zh: 你们是时候重出江湖了。

Text.en: Good on ya.
Text.zh: 干得漂亮。

Text.en: About time ye took up the hunt again.
Text.zh: 你们早就该重操旧业了。

Text.en: You've found a Runic Splinter, eh? Let me take a look. <continue>Ah, yes! This is a sliver of the Triskelion Flame itself! Our first proof it truly is on Wraeclast!
Text.zh: 搞到块符文碎片了，是吗？让我看看。<continue>啊，是的！这是三耀之火的一小块碎片！头回找到它真在瓦尔克拉斯的铁证！

Text.en: The Runic Triquetra actually exists...
Text.zh: 符文三角真的存在……

Text.en: Glad I picked it up, then.
Text.zh: 很高兴我找到了它。

Text.en: Intriguing. What of the rest of it?
Text.zh: 有趣。其余碎片在何处？

Text.en: A piece of it, anyway.
Text.zh: 只是其中一块而已。

Text.en: History is alive in our very hands! What a journey we share.
Text.zh: 历史正在我们手中苏醒！多么奇妙的旅程啊。

Text.en: This is good news.
Text.zh: 确实是个好消息。

Text.en: You... you weren't sure it was on Wraeclast?
Text.zh: 你……你之前不确定它在瓦尔克拉斯？

Text.en: So the tales weren't just tales.
Text.zh: 看来，那些传说是真的。

Text.en: It's not <i>{great} that a piece came off, but it's tiny, and the artefact itself was quite large. Nothing I can't repair. <continue>If you find enough of these, I could use their runic signature to determine the location of the Flame. These might lead us straight there!
Text.zh: 虽然掉下来一块不是什么<i>{好事}，但碎片很小，而神器本身相当大。没什么我不能修复的。<continue>你要是多找来些碎片，我就能靠上面的符文印记定位三耀之火。这些碎片可以为我们指引方向！

Text.en: You've collected enough Runic Splinters for me to track the Triskelion Flame's unique signature! <continue>I've mapped it out. Use these in the Realmgate to open the path. If I was twenty years younger, I'd go with you, but too many people rely on me now. <continue>It's up to you, then. Gird yourself, hero. You're about to make history!
Text.zh: 你收集的符文碎片已经足够我追踪到三耀之火的独特印记了！<continue>我已将其标绘出来。用这个在界域之门上开启通路吧。若我再年轻二十岁，定会与你同去，可如今有太多人仰仗着我。<continue>所以，就靠你了。打起精神来，英雄。你即将创造历史！

Text.en: Yes. Stay and lead, do what you do best.
Text.zh: 好，留下统领大局，你最擅长这个。

Text.en: Don't worry. You'd have just gotten in the way.
Text.zh: 别担心，你去了也只会碍手碍脚。

Text.en: One day we will run together, but fear not - I won't fail you, Lord Dannig.
Text.zh: 总有一天我们会并肩驰骋，但别担心——我不会让你失望的，丹宁大人。

Text.en: I understand. I'll take care of it.
Text.zh: 我明白。交给我吧。

Text.en: Your people need you. Stay. <i>{I'll} go.
Text.zh: 你的人民需要你。留下吧，<i>{我}去。

Text.en: So it must be.
Text.zh: 理当如此。

Text.en: Probably for the best. You lot are a bit liberal with explosives.
Text.zh: 这样也好。你们这帮人抬手就扔炸弹。

Text.en: Not to worry. I work best alone.
Text.zh: 放心，我习惯独来独往。

Text.en: It's up to you, then. Gird yourself, hero. You're about to make history!
Text.zh: 所以，就靠你了。打起精神来，英雄。你即将创造历史！

Text.en: So, Olroth indeed has the Triskelion Flame! There's no shame in being defeated by him, of course. He is <i>{the} great hero from history.
Text.zh: 所以，欧罗什确实拥有三耀之火！当然，被他击败并没有什么可羞耻的。他是历史上<i>{那位}伟大的英雄。

Text.en: It seemed the Flame enhanced his abilities...
Text.zh: 看来那火焰确实给他助了力……

Text.en: I didn't <i>{fail}. I was just <i>{learning.}
Text.zh: 我没<i>{输}，只是在<i>{吸取经验。}

Text.en: Yes, but I wasn't fighting Olroth alone. The Triskelion Flame aided him.
Text.zh: 是啊，欧罗什不是一个人在战斗，有三耀之火帮他呢。

Text.en: I don't need reassurance. I'll persevere.
Text.zh: 不用安慰我，我扛得住。

Text.en: You couldn't be more right.
Text.zh: 你说得太对了。

Text.en: A stinging defeat, but I'll recover.
Text.zh: 输得是挺惨，但我会缓过来的。

Text.en: Whatever it takes.
Text.zh: 跟他拼了。

Text.en: A hero, aye... but even heroes fall.
Text.zh: 英雄，是啊……但英雄也会倒下。

Text.en: Let's find more Runic Splinters and try again.
Text.zh: 我们再找些符文碎片，再试一次。

Text.en: You actually defeated Olroth, the legend himself, in a one-on-one battle! This will make for an epic saga!
Text.zh: 你居然单挑赢了传说本尊欧罗什？！这够写部史诗了！

Text.en: Yes. But for some reason, the Flame collapsed at the end.
Text.zh: 是的。但不知为何，三耀之火最终倒塌了。

Text.en: I didn't manage to save the Flame. It were destroyed.
Text.zh: 我没能救下三耀之火。它被摧毁了。

Text.en: The Flame exerted its last for Olroth. It is no more.
Text.zh: 三耀之火为欧罗什燃烧殆尽，已不复存在。

Text.en: I'm just simply too powerful. The Flame didn't survive. Too bad really.
Text.zh: 哎，我还是太强了。三耀之火没能幸存。真是可惜。

Text.en: A grand tale indeed... but I am sorry, the Flame was destroyed in the battle.
Text.zh: 确实够写一部史诗……不过很抱歉，三耀之火在战斗中被摧毁了。

Text.en: Yes... it might... but I have to tell you... the Flame disintegrated.
Text.zh: 是……只是……我必须坦白……三耀之火崩塌了。

Text.en: Uh, so the mission didn't exactly go as planned. the Flame... it got all... buggered up.
Text.zh: 呃，任务没完全按计划走。三耀之火……被彻底搞砸了。

Text.en: Afraid yer saga didnae end the way you wanted. The Flame was destroyed.
Text.zh: 恐怕这次传奇冒险要让你失望了。三耀之火已被摧毁。

Text.en: The Triskelion Flame... was destroyed? I need time to fully comprehend this. <continue>In any case, the quest is done. At least we finally know the truth of our own history. Great work, hero.
Text.zh: 三耀之火……被摧毁了？我需要时间缓缓。<continue>无论如何，我们的任务结束了。至少我们现在终于知道了我们自身历史的真相。干得漂亮，英雄。

Text.en: Perhaps when all is said and done, there will be time to make a tale of our own, Lord Dannig.
Text.zh: 等一切结束后，也许我们有时间写下自己的传奇，丹宁大人。

Text.en: I will be waiting.
Text.zh: 我会等你的。

Text.en: We're back on the trail of the Triskelion Flame! Our grand quest has resumed once more. I'm a little fearful, but also excited. I have a good feeling about this.
Text.zh: 我们又回到了寻找三耀之火的路上！我们伟大的使命再次重启。我有点发怵，但也非常兴奋。这回感觉能成。

Text.en: You know what? Me too.
Text.zh: 你猜怎么着？我也一样。

Text.en: The hunt can be set aside, but it never ends.
Text.zh: 狩猎之旅可以暂歇，但从未停止。

Text.en: As do I.
Text.zh: 我亦然。

Text.en: That makes one of us.
Text.zh: 我还是算了。

Text.en: It's good to see you out here, Sir Rog. I know you will achieve great things.
Text.zh: 很高兴看到你如此生龙活虎，罗格先生。我就知道你一定能成就一番事业。

Text.en: That makes two of us.
Text.zh: 我也是。

Text.en: Heheheh! You got a taste for it again?
Text.zh: 嘿嘿嘿！又来兴趣了？

Text.en: Let's see if we can pick up the trail.
Text.zh: 看看我们能不能找到些线索。

Text.en: The mind is willing... let's see how the body goes.
Text.zh: 我倒是想……就看我的身体争不争气了。

Text.en: I am bound by honour to discover the fate of Uhtred and the Order of the Chalice on Wraeclast. I'll trade you for any relics that you find with their marks and runes.
Text.zh: 我的毕生心愿就是探索圣杯教团和乌崔德的真相。你找到的任何带有他们符文印记的遗物我都会买下。

Text.en: Who was in this Order?
Text.zh: 教团里都是些什么人？

Text.en: I'll bring you what I find. Who were they?
Text.zh: 我会把找到的东西带回来给你。他们是些什么人？

Text.en: Tell me more of this 'Order of the Chalice.'
Text.zh: 多跟我说说“圣杯教团”之事。

Text.en: I've never heard of this 'Order of the Chalice.'
Text.zh: 我从没听说过什么“圣杯教团”。

Text.en: Order of the Chalice? They sound interesting. Tell me this tale.
Text.zh: 圣杯教团？听起来很有意思。跟我说说他们的来历。

Text.en: The Order of the Chalice? Who were they?
Text.zh: 圣杯教团？他们是什么人？

Text.en: Will do. Out of curiosity, who were they?
Text.zh: 我会办的。好奇问一下，他们是什么人？

Text.en: I've not heard o' this 'Order of the Chalice'.
Text.zh: 我从没听说过什么“圣杯教团”。

Text.en: They were the primary priesthood and religious order that went in with the initial ships to Wraeclast.
Text.zh: 他们是最早一批随船来到瓦尔克拉斯的祭司和宗教团体。

Text.en: A religious order? I thought the Kalguurans... hmm. What kind of priests?
Text.zh: 宗教教团?我还以为卡古兰人……嗯。都是些什么样的祭司？

Text.en: What is a 'priest?'
Text.zh: 什么是“祭司“？

Text.en: Ah, so heretics. Strange. I haven't heard you mention faith. Who were these priests?
Text.zh: 啊，异端邪教。怪哉，我从未听闻你提及信仰。这些祭司是什么人？

Text.en: I thought you odd bunch didn't have a religion. What kind of priests were they?
Text.zh: 我还以为你们这些怪家伙没有宗教信仰。他们是哪种祭司？

Text.en: I did not know Kalguurans were religious types. What kind of priests were they?
Text.zh: 我不知道你们卡古兰人原来也信教。他们是哪种祭司？

Text.en: They were priests?
Text.zh: 他们是祭司？

Text.en: Ahh. So, a cult. Got it. What were they like?
Text.zh: 啊，原来是邪教。明白了。他们什么样？

Text.en: Priests, eh? Didnae think you Kalguurans were fond o' religion.
Text.zh: 祭司，嗯？真没想到你们卡古兰人会对宗教感兴趣。

Text.en: Not quite the type you have out here. They interpreted the stars and the workings of mysterious forces, such as alchemy and runes.
Text.zh: 他们可不是你们这儿那种类型的祭司。他们阐述星辰和神秘力量的运作方式，比如炼金术和符文。

Text.en: You're right, that's not like priests here...
Text.zh: 你说得对，这确实不像我们这儿的祭司...

Text.en: I get ya. Elders and wise-men, then.
Text.zh: 懂了。那就是长老和智者呗。

Text.en: To each their own.
Text.zh: 各有各的宗教。

Text.en: But those are <i>{real} things. Sciences.
Text.zh: 但这些是<i>{实在}的学问。科学。

Text.en: Oh, they were tale-women! We are not so different after all.
Text.zh: 哦！她们就是说书人嘛！看来我们也没那么不同。

Text.en: That sounds more like smiths and engineers.
Text.zh: 这听起来更像铁匠和工程师的活儿。

Text.en: Ey? That's not a religion... huh.
Text.zh: 嗯？这不算宗教啊...啧。

Text.en: No denyin', there's wisdom to be found in the stars.
Text.zh: 不可否认，星象中确实蕴藏着智慧。

Text.en: I've always wanted to join the Order. I quite like the idea of spending my days in a laboratory doing research.
Text.zh: 我一直想加入那个教团。整天泡在实验室搞研究，这日子听着就舒坦。

Text.en: Thousands of years ago, the last news coming back home painted Uhtred in quite the negative light.
Text.zh: 几千年前，传回家乡的最后一批消息把乌崔德描绘得相当负面。

Text.en: How's that relevant now?
Text.zh: 现在提这个有什么用？

Text.en: And this is still important?
Text.zh: 这事现在还重要吗？

Text.en: I understand all too well.
Text.zh: 我太懂了。

Text.en: I know too well how vicious people can be...
Text.zh: 我太清楚人心能有多恶毒了……

Text.en: I can imagine this pain. His honour was blackened, yes?
Text.zh: 能想象这种痛苦。他的名誉被抹黑了，是吧？

Text.en: You don't believe it?
Text.zh: 你不相信那些说法？

Text.en: Were the reports <i>{true?}
Text.zh: 那些消息<i>{属实吗？}

Text.en: Tall tales can travel far. Was there truth to these words?
Text.zh: 谣言总能不胫而走。这些消息可不可靠？

Text.en: Some called him a traitor, but the details were sparse and confusing. I'm here to clear his name... or condemn him. The truth shall stand above all.
Text.zh: 有人叫他叛徒，但细节寥寥、疑点重重。我不知道我此行最后会为他澄清……还是落实他的罪名，我只知道真相高于一切。

Text.en: It sounds like Uhtred was indeed a traitor, but I feel like the story is not yet finished. Before I send word of this back home, would you find out the rest? It's... a matter of importance to me.
Text.zh: 由此看来，乌崔德还真是个叛徒。不过我觉得这个故事还不算完整。在我把这个消息送回国之前，能不能拜托你再把其它故事都找出来？这件事……对我很重要。

Text.en: I'll let you know what I find.
Text.zh: 我会把调查结果告诉你。

Text.en: Of course.
Text.zh: 当然。

Text.en: I shall.
Text.zh: 遵命。

Text.en: Alright... I'll try to look into it. <i>{Perhaps.}
Text.zh: 好吧…我试试看。<i>{可能吧}

Text.en: For you - yes, I will.
Text.zh: 为你调查？义不容辞。

Text.en: I'll do what I can, friend.
Text.zh: 我会尽力，朋友。

Text.en: If I can, I will.
Text.zh: 有机会的话会的。

Text.en: I'll do my best, lad.
Text.zh: 我尽量，小子。

Text.en: You finally found and defeated Olroth! A battle for the ages, no doubt!
Text.zh: 你终于找到了并击败了欧罗什！毫无疑问，那是一场史诗般的战斗！

Text.en: That's not important. The Flame was destroyed.
Text.zh: 这不是重点，重点是三耀之火被毁了。

Text.en: It would have been, if the Flame hadn't been destroyed.
Text.zh: 如果三耀之火没有被毁，那确实如你所言。

Text.en: It's not about that. I couldn't save the Flame.
Text.zh: 非也，我未能拯救三耀之火。

Text.en: Of course. Shame about the Flame, though.
Text.zh: 那当然了，只是可惜了三耀之火。

Text.en: I wish you could have seen it, Sir Rog. Perhaps then you could have salvaged the Flame.
Text.zh: 罗格先生，真希望你也在场，或许你能救下三耀之火。

Text.en: It was. The Flame, unfortunately, was destroyed.
Text.zh: 是的。只可惜三耀之火被毁了。

Text.en: Right you are! Could't get the Flame, though...
Text.zh: 你说得对！不过三耀之火没保住……

Text.en: Indeed it was. But I couldnae save the Flame.
Text.zh: 确实如此。不过我没能救下三耀之火。

Text.en: <i>{Olroth} had the Flame? Then Uhtred was not a traitor! I can finally set history right!
Text.zh: <i>{欧罗什}拥有三耀之火？那么乌崔德就不是叛徒！我终于可以改写历史这笔错账了！

Text.en: Why is this so important to you?
Text.zh: 你为什么这么重视这件事？

Text.en: What's got you so excited?
Text.zh: 你怎么那么激动啊？

Text.en: Indeed.
Text.zh: 确实。

Text.en: Yes, yes... Why do you care, anyway?
Text.zh: 是啊…话说你为啥在乎这个？

Text.en: A worthy accomplishment.
Text.zh: 算是了却一桩大事。

Text.en: So. It's personal.
Text.zh: 原来…是私仇啊。

Text.en: A couple thousand years too late, innit?
Text.zh: 都过去几千年了，现在搞清有啥用？

Text.en: Truth will out, in the end.
Text.zh: 真相总会水落石出。

Text.en: I am descended from Owen, the son that Uhtred sent back for safety. You've washed clean a black mark on my lineage. I thank you. <continue>Still... a shame about the Flame being destroyed, of course.
Text.zh: 我是欧文的后裔。当年乌崔德为保安全送回来的儿子，就是欧文。你洗刷了我家族历史上的污点。谢谢你。<continue>不过……三耀之火被摧毁了确实很可惜。

Text.en: Out there... ancient creatures... lurking beneath the surface... cloaked in darkness... They then burst forth to feast on the souls of the recently departed!  <continue>Trust me. I've seen them! The others think me mad, but mark my words... it is true.
Text.zh: 外面……有古老的生物……潜伏在地表之下……笼罩在黑暗中……然后猛地扑出来，吞噬最近死去之人的灵魂！<continue>相信我。我亲眼见过！别人都说我疯了，但记住我的话……这是真的。

Text.en: That sounds like you've seen the Mud Burrower.
Text.zh: 这么说，你见识过那个“掘泥兽”。

Text.en: And these things aren't the Devourer? You're sure?
Text.zh: 这些东西难道不是“暴噬虫”吗？你确定吗？

Text.en: Ancient creatures from beneath the surface... you don't mean the 'Devourer'?
Text.zh: 地底深处的远古生物……你说的不会是“暴噬虫”吧？

Text.en: It could be true.... or it could just be that 'Devourer' creature. In which case, you <i>{are} mad.
Text.zh: 也可能是真的……也可能只是“暴噬虫”那种生物。如果是这样，你<i>{确实}疯了。

Text.en: Are you sure it's not just the 'Devourer' that's tormenting the Encampment?
Text.zh: 你确定不只是“暴噬虫”在折磨营地吗？

Text.en: Are you sure it isn't the Devourer?
Text.zh: 你确定它不是“暴噬虫”？

Text.en: Surely you mean the Devourer, eh?
Text.zh: 你说的肯定是暴噬虫吧？

Text.en: No, no, no... but... that damned thing has likely opened their passage to the surface. <continue>These... creatures. They are something else. It is not but one threat... it is... <i>{many}. And I fear what it means for Clearfell.
Text.zh: 不，不，不是……但是……那个该死的东西很可能打开了它们通往地表的通道。<continue>这些……生物。它们是某种别的东西。不单是一个祸害……而是……<i>{一大群}。我担心这对克里费尔意味着什么。

Text.en: I won't let them destroy my forest.
Text.zh: 我不会放任它们摧毁我的森林。

Text.en: What can I do?
Text.zh: 我能做些什么？

Text.en: I see now why I was called here.
Text.zh: 我现在明白为什么被召唤到这里了。

Text.en: It's always something with this place, isn't it?
Text.zh: 这地方总有这样那样的麻烦事，对吗？

Text.en: Perhaps I can see what can be done...
Text.zh: 或许我能想到办法。

Text.en: We are tormented on all sides.
Text.zh: 我们现在四面受敌。

Text.en: I'll add it to the list.
Text.zh: 我会记下的。

Text.en: Depose them. Cave in the cracks. Cave in whatever you find. We've got enough trouble here as it is!
Text.zh: 灭了它们。堵上裂缝。把你找到的任何东西都堵上。我们这儿麻烦够多了！

Text.en: I'll look into it, Mortimer.
Text.zh: 我这就去，莫蒂默。

Text.en: Aye, I'll check out them cracks.
Text.zh: 好，我会去查看那些裂缝。

Text.en: As you wish.
Text.zh: 如你所愿。

Text.en: Alright, alright. Fine.
Text.zh: 好，好。行吧。

Text.en: Fear not, old one.
Text.zh: 别害怕，老人家。

Text.en: I'll see what I can do for Clearfell.
Text.zh: 我会尽我所能帮助克里费尔。

Text.en: Alright. I'll mess 'em up for ya.
Text.zh: 行，我去收拾它们。

Text.en: I knew I could count on you!
Text.zh: 我就知道我能指望你！

Text.en: Well... I don't know how else to describe them. They rip right up out of the dirt, fearsome and terrifying! I've never seen anything like it!
Text.zh: 嗯……我不知道该怎么形容它们。它们猛地从地里钻出来，凶猛而可怕！我这辈子没见过那样的东西！

Text.en: Neither have I. What do they look like?
Text.zh: 我也没有。它们长什么样？

Text.en: Hmm... tell me more.
Text.zh: 嗯……多跟我说说。

Text.en: There is some mentions of this in the teachings. <continue>Tell me more.
Text.zh: 教义中确实提到过这个。<continue>告诉我详情。

Text.en: Ooh, what do they look like?
Text.zh: 哦，他们长什么样？

Text.en: This bodes ill. Tell me of their appearance.
Text.zh: 情况不妙。多跟我说说它们的长相。

Text.en: What do they look like?
Text.zh: 他们长什么样？

Text.en: Sounds like trouble. What am I lookin' for here?
Text.zh: 听着像麻烦事。我要找什么？

Text.en: Black-blooded. Green-eyed. Darkness oozes about them wherever they skulk. They reek of a time long buried. Well... just speculation, of course!
Text.zh: 黑血，绿眼。无论他们潜伏在哪里，黑暗都围绕在他们身边。他们散发着一股子陈年墓土的味儿。呃……当然，这纯属推测！

Text.en: Long ago, followers of the Dreamer joined the Third Pact... <continue>Rallying against an ancient enemy with black blood and eyes of green. <continue>If they have returned... Perhaps I am meant to resist them.
Text.zh: 很久以前，幻梦者的信徒加入了第三契约……<continue>联合对抗一个黑血绿眼的远古敌人。<continue>如果他们回归了……也许我注定要阻止他们。

Text.en: Could it be? Hmm... perhaps the old enemy has returned. <continue>We Maraketh fought a war against them in ancient times. <continue>If it is them... I will destroy them all! <continue>I will drive them back into the darkness from whence they came!
Text.zh: 难道？嗯……或许宿敌回归了。<continue>远古时代，我们马拉克斯人曾与之交战。<continue>如果是他们……我会把他们斩尽杀绝！<continue>我必须把他们赶回黑暗老巢！

Text.en: You've seen them? Ah ha! Then my eyes do not deceive.
Text.zh: 你见过它们？啊哈！我就说我没眼花。

Text.en: They are not products of nature. Someone <i>{made them}.
Text.zh: 他们并非自然之物。有人<i>{创造了他们}。

Text.en: The Spirit dwells in most creatures, living or dead... <continue>Yet it's absent from <i>{them}.
Text.zh: 万灵栖息于生灵体内，无关生死……<continue>但他们体内却没有。

Text.en: They are indeed the enemy that the Third Pact fought against in ancient times.
Text.zh: 他们确实是第三盟约在远古时代对抗的敌人。

Text.en: You didn't tell me how adorable they are. Totally uncontrollable, though.
Text.zh: 你没提醒我他们这么可爱。不过，确实完全无法控制。

Text.en: Yes. I am now certain they are the same ancient enemy we Maraketh fought so long ago. <continue>I must tell you, this... is very concerning.
Text.zh: 没错。我确信他们就是我们马拉克斯人远古时期的宿敌。我必须告诉你，情况……非常令人担忧。

Text.en: Yes. Creatures of vile darkness.
Text.zh: 没错。卑劣的黑暗生物。

Text.en: Yeah, right bloody nightmares, they were.
Text.zh: 对，就是血腥噩梦，没错。

Text.en: We have to hold them back. Perhaps if we can keep them below ground... they may return to where they came from. Though... I wouldn't hold my breath.
Text.zh: 我们必须阻止它们。要是能一直压在地底下……说不定它们就回老巢了。不过……别抱太大希望。

Text.en: So, you did it. Within the lair of that Devourer was more to this story! How did you defeat them?
Text.zh: 这么说，你搞定了。在那暴噬虫的老巢里还有内情！你怎么干掉它们的？

Text.en: They were the prey. I, the hunter.
Text.zh: 它们是猎物，而我，是猎人。

Text.en: These ones seemed weak. Like scouts. More may follow.
Text.zh: 这些怪物似乎很弱小，像是侦查队。它们还会攻过来。

Text.en: Carefully and methodically.
Text.zh: 靠谨慎和周密。

Text.en: I feel like that should be obvious.
Text.zh: 我觉得这很明显。

Text.en: Simple. My power was greater than theirs.
Text.zh: 简单，我比它们更强大。

Text.en: With a blow they won't soon forget.
Text.zh: 用让它们永生难忘的一击。

Text.en: No need to get into gory details.
Text.zh: 那些可怕的细节就别深究了。

Text.en: I see. Well, it is my duty to defend our kin from these monsters, and I will do my best - but do keep collapsing in their entry points. I'm not quite the shot I used to be. <continue>You have my thanks.
Text.zh: 明白了。嗯，保护我们的族人免受这些怪物侵害是我的职责，我会尽我最大的努力——但请继续摧毁它们的入口。我的准头已经大不如前了。<continue>非常感谢你。

Text.en: I am curious to learn more about these creatures... do let me know what you discover.
Text.zh: 我对这些玩意儿挺好奇的……请务必告诉我你的新发现。

Text.en: Forgive my manners, young one... I am Mortimer. I've been a steward in these parts for longer than you have drawn breath. Over the years, my canines and I have seen Ogham in turmoil and peace, and all that lay between...
Text.zh: 抱歉，年轻人……我是莫蒂默。我在这片地界当管事儿的年头，比你的岁数还长。多年来，我和这几条老伙计，啥阵仗没见过？欧甘这地方，乱也乱过，安也安过，风风雨雨都趟过来了……

Text.en: I've seen you sometimes, though you may not have have seen me. <continue>Is this the worst it's ever been for Ogham?
Text.zh: 我似乎见过你，你可能没见过我。欧甘从没像现在这样乱过吗？

Text.en: You're an Elder, then. Is this the worst you've seen?
Text.zh: 这么说，您是一位长者。您见过比这更糟的情况吗？

Text.en: And with all that you've seen, what do you make of Ogham's plight now?
Text.zh: 经历了这一切之后，你会如何看待欧甘如今的困境？

Text.en: You've got a <i>{dog!} Can I pet him?
Text.zh: 你养了<i>{狗！}我能摸摸它吗？

Text.en: Well, yes, of course... but as I was saying, these dark times...
Text.zh: 嗯，可以，当然可以……但就像我刚才说的，这些黑暗的时光……

Text.en: It's always a dark time in Wraeclast.<continue>Good dog! Your teeth are so menacing!
Text.zh: 黑暗的时光总是笼罩着瓦尔克拉斯。<continue>乖狗狗！你的牙齿真吓人！

Text.en: He is a very good dog, yes...
Text.zh: 它确实是一条很好的狗……

Text.en: You have the wisdom that only age can bring. How do you judge the current danger your people face?
Text.zh: 您拥有唯有岁月才能赋予的智慧。您如何看待族人眼下面临的危险？

Text.en: This is a dark time for our lands.
Text.zh: 这是我族这片土地的黑暗时光。

Text.en: And how do you rate Ogham's problems now, Mort?
Text.zh: 那你对欧甘现在的麻烦有何高见，莫特？

Text.en: It is in a league of its own. But we will persevere. We always do.
Text.zh: 这回可超出了我们的预料。但我们能挺过去。老规矩。

Text.en: I'm an old timer. I've seen the Clans at war. Seen the Thanes at each other's throats. But... never one treating his own quite like this.
Text.zh: 我是个老家伙了。我见过部族干仗，领主掐脖子。但是……从未见过有人像这样对待自己的族人。

Text.en: I don't doubt it. He's mad.
Text.zh: 我毫不怀疑。那家伙疯了。

Text.en: It's true, then - the Count weren't always so vicious?
Text.zh: 这么说是真的，伯爵并不是从来都这么凶残？

Text.en: This is what Corruption brings. It must have affected the Count's mind.
Text.zh: 这就是腐化造成的后果。它一定影响了伯爵的心智。

Text.en: Power always corrupts. Not me, of course. Just the Count.
Text.zh: 力量总会腐化人心。当然不包括我，只是那个伯爵。

Text.en: A <i>{Sekhema} would never have done these things. The Count is mad.
Text.zh: <i>{丝克玛}绝不会做这些事。伯爵疯了。

Text.en: The Count has betrayed us all.
Text.zh: 伯爵背叛了我们所有人。

Text.en: That Count fella sounds like a right prick.
Text.zh: 那个伯爵听起来真是个混蛋。

Text.en: Yes. Once we called him 'The Wolf' for his sense of kinship. Now... 'The Mad Wolf'. Rabid decisions. Profane thinking... and putrid results.
Text.zh: 是的。以前我们因为他重情义而称他为“狼”。如今……都喊“疯狼”。疯狂的决定，亵渎的念头……还有恶臭的结果。

Text.en: Why are you alone in this?
Text.zh: 你怎么一个人在这里？

Text.en: Where are your other tribes? Shouldn't they aid you?
Text.zh: 其他部族呢？他们不该援助你吗？

Text.en: Have you no allies you can call for aid?
Text.zh: 你没有可以求助的盟友吗？

Text.en: Aren't your Thanes supposed to be doing something about all this?
Text.zh: 你们的领主老爷呢？他们不该为此做些什么吗？

Text.en: I know a thing or two about Ezomyr. Where are your Thanes? It is their duty to aid you, is it not?
Text.zh: 我对艾兹麦人略知一二。你们的领主呢？帮助你们是他们的职责，不是吗？

Text.en: Why have the Thanes not come to aid us?
Text.zh: 为什么领主们不来援助我们？

Text.en: Seems like you need to bring in your allies.
Text.zh: 看来你得叫上你的盟友了。

Text.en: One of the first things Count Geonor did in his madness was damage our relationship with the Thanes. Insulted them and cut off contact, paranoid that they were plotting against him.
Text.zh: 吉恩诺伯爵发疯后做的第一件事就是破坏了我们与领主们的关系。他侮辱了他们并切断了联系，因为他偏执地认为他们在密谋反对他。

Text.en: The ties that bind are precious.
Text.zh: 联系彼此的纽带弥足珍贵。

Text.en: That's terrible. He's isolated you.
Text.zh: 太糟糕了。他害得你们孤立无援。

Text.en: Such is the way of madness.
Text.zh: 疯狂就是如此。

Text.en: Gotta hand it to him. That's a great strategy.
Text.zh: 高明的计策，不得不佩服他。

Text.en: Of course. A tale as old as time.
Text.zh: 这不奇怪。自古以来，皆是如此。

Text.en: The bonds of our people have been savagely wounded.
Text.zh: 我们族人之间的纽带岌岌可危。

Text.en: He'd have fit right in back home.
Text.zh: 他在我老家肯定很吃得开。

Text.en: Those relationships were vital! Built on the very blood and bones of those who fought for Ezomyr. It is nothing but a spit in the face of those who died for these lands!
Text.zh: 这些关系至关重要！它建立在为艾兹麦而战的人们的鲜血和骸骨之上。他这么搞，就是往那些为这片土地战死的人脸上啐唾沫！

Text.en: You have done us a great deed here, friend. Do not hesitate to ask me for assistance. Old Mortimer is still the Steward, for what it's worth. If I can aid you, I shall.
Text.zh: 你在这里为我们做了件大好事，朋友。往后有啥用得着我这把老骨头的，尽管开口。我老莫蒂默还是这儿的管事，能搭把手的，绝不推辞。

Text.en: I appreciate that, Mortimer.
Text.zh: 谢谢你，莫蒂默。

Text.en: I'll aid ye as well if ye need it, if I can.
Text.zh: 只要你开口，我也一定尽力帮忙。

Text.en: May your path be ever clear.
Text.zh: 愿你的道路永远明朗。

Text.en: I'm more interested in your dog.
Text.zh: 我对你的狗狗更感兴趣。

Text.en: You honour me with your promise.
Text.zh: 您的承诺让我荣耀万分。

Text.en: I will take you up on that.
Text.zh: 那我就指望你了。

Text.en: Yeah I could probably do with a lift at some point...
Text.zh: 对，我确实可能需要人搭把手……

Text.en: You've been out here for so many years. How did you survive?
Text.zh: 您在这儿熬了这么多年，怎么活下来的？

Text.en: Shellfish... rainwater... <continue>And hope.
Text.zh: 吃蛤蜊……喝雨水……<continue>还有希望。

Text.en: Remarkable.
Text.zh: 真不容易。

Text.en: Save the fanciful stories for your son.
Text.zh: 把你那些不着边际的故事留着给你儿子听吧。

Text.en: I don't know all the ways of the Karui, but I doubt they intended this trap for you.
