Text.zh: 我不了解卡鲁人的习俗，但我怀疑他们设下这个陷阱并非为了对付你。

Text.en: The Dreamer has brought me to this place for a reason. <continue>I shall aid you.
Text.zh: 幻梦者引我来这儿自有道理。<continue>我会帮助你。

Text.en: I'll get you out of there. <continue>I give you my word.
Text.zh: 我会救你出来。<continue>说到做到。

Text.en: I'll 'ave you out of there right quick, granny.
Text.zh: 我马上把你救出来，老太太。

Text.en: You're no <i>{balbalakh}. You do not deserve this fate. I shall free you.
Text.zh: 你又不是<i>{叛逃者}。不该遭这罪。我会救你的。

Text.en: Don't worry. I'll have you out of that cage in no time.
Text.zh: 别担心。我马上放你出来。

Text.en:
Malice fills this place...   
<continue>To survive so long... it defies sense.
Text.zh:
这里邪气冲天……
<continue>你居然能挺这么多年……简直不合常理。

Text.en: Hasn't she been through enough?
Text.zh: 她遭的罪还不够多吗？

Text.en: Hear that, Freya?
Text.zh: 听见没，芙蕾雅？

Text.en: Now you're talkin'!
Text.zh: 你说得对！

Text.en: There were times... I almost... <continue>...gave up.
Text.zh: 有时候……我差点……<continue>……撑不下去了。

Text.en: Now look whatcha done!
Text.zh: 现在看你干的好事！

Text.en: Now, now! We've arrived just in time.
Text.zh: 好了好了！我们及时赶到了。

Text.en: Please, don't cry. We're here.
Text.zh: 别哭啊，我们来了。

Text.en: I remember your boy, Freya. Worked for us for a long while. <continue>Captain Hartlin. A capable seafarer. Well respected among his crew. <continue>Good drinker, too.
Text.zh: 芙蕾雅，我记得你那小子。他为我们工作了好一阵子。<continue>哈特林船长。行船是把好手。手底下人都服他。<continue>酒量也不错。

Text.en: He's the apple of my eye.
Text.zh: 他是我心头肉啊。

Text.en: Really? I thought you'd fallen out over the whole -
Text.zh: 是吗？我还以为你们因为那事儿闹掰了——

Text.en: We're still family, and family is all that matters.
Text.zh: 怎么闹也是一家人。一家人比什么都重要。

Text.en: Aye. True that is.
Text.zh: 嗯，是这理儿。

Text.en: Aye, blood is thicker than water.
Text.zh: 没错，自家人终归是自家人。

Text.en: Aye, true enough.
Text.zh: 是啊，确实如此。

Text.en: Ugh, <i>{family this, love that}. Are you so easily fooled, little one?
Text.zh: 呃，<i>{家庭这个，爱情那个}。你这么容易被愚弄吗，小家伙？

Text.en: Yes... family <i>{is} all that matters... 'til it's torn from ye.
Text.zh: 是啊……家人<i>{就是}一切……直到他们被夺走。

Text.en: Don't test me, dark one!
Text.zh: 别试探我，黑暗生物。

Text.en: I would do anything to rejoin the mountainborn.
Text.zh: 只要能重回山民怀抱，让我干什么都愿意。

Text.en: Blood may bind us... <continue>...but choice defines us.
Text.zh: 血脉让家族凝聚在一起……<continue>……但选择大于一切。

Text.en: You're a jolly one, aren't ya?
Text.zh: 你可真是个乐天派，是吧？

Text.en: I couldn't agree more.
Text.zh: 我完全同意。

Text.en: Family? Appreciate it while you have it. It can be taken away quicker than you think.
Text.zh: 家庭？趁你还有的时候好好珍惜吧。它会在你未察觉之际，飞快地支离破碎。

Text.en: Speak for yourself. I do just fine on my own.
Text.zh: 你只能代表自己。我一个人过得很好。

Text.en: Well... aren't you just a ray of sunshine?
Text.zh: 嗯……你真像一抹阳光呀。

Text.en: With respect, there's one or two things that matter more to us low-lives...
Text.zh: 恕我直言，对我们这些小人物来说，还有一两样东西更重要……

Text.en: Hahaha! I know exactly what you're gettin' at!
Text.zh: 哈哈哈！我太明白你意思了！

Text.en: I know very little of the fog, other than its malice. <continue>It drew us in, and led us to our doom.
Text.zh: 我对迷雾所知不多，只知道它充满恶意。<continue>它把我们引诱进来，引我们走向绝路。

Text.en: It is known to wreak havoc on the mind. <continue>Mirages. Whispers. Lies. <continue>Every captain I know has reported strange sightings in the fog over the years, and it's only gotten worse of late.
Text.zh: 迷雾以扰乱心智而闻名。<continue>幻象、低语、谎言。<continue>多年来，我认识的船长都报告过这种怪事，而且最近情况越来越严重了。

Text.en: Something's wrong out there. With the world. Something's happening... <continue>I have to get out of here.
Text.zh: 外头不对劲。有事要发生了……<continue>我必须离开这里。

Text.en: Speak for yourself. I do just fine on my own.
Text.zh: 你只能代表自己。我一个人过得很好。

Text.en: Aye. The Spirit knows it too.
Text.zh: 嗯。灵魂也感觉到了。

Text.en: Things beyond our understanding are always in motion.
Text.zh: 超越我们理解范围的事情总是在发生。

Text.en: Yes. It's all rather dire isn't it?
Text.zh: 是的。情况确实相当严峻，不是吗？

Text.en: Indeed. But... what do you specifically speak of?
Text.zh: 确实。不过……你说的到底是什么？

Text.en: What do you mean?
Text.zh: 你这话究竟什么意思？

Text.en: Yep. Mad world.
Text.zh: 是的。疯狂的世界。

Text.en: The earth feels it too. A shadow spreads, from root to branch.
Text.zh: 大地也感觉到了。阴影正在弥漫……从里到外。

Text.en: I just have to get out...! <continue>It's been too long...
Text.zh: 我只想离开这儿……！<continue>太久了……

Text.en: All I remember... is the horrible sound of our ship slamming against the rocks. <continue>I crawled through the sand and mist, beset by the cries of the dying... <continue>...and when I opened my eyes, I was here. <continue>Safe, but trapped.
Text.zh: 我只记得……我们的船撞上礁石那可怕的巨响。<continue>我爬过沙地，穿过浓雾，耳边尽是垂死者的哭喊……<continue>……当我睁开眼睛时，就在这儿了。<continue>安全了，但被困住了。

Text.en: A cage of safety.
Text.zh: 安全的牢笼。

Text.en: What a story...
Text.zh: 多么离奇的故事……

Text.en: The Dreamer has a plan for you.
Text.zh: 幻梦者对你自有安排。

Text.en: Explain this... safety of yours...
Text.zh: 说说你这所谓的……安全……

Text.en: Incredible. This magic fortress protected you.
Text.zh: 难以置信，这座魔法壁垒保护了你。

Text.en: You were kept safe? In there?
Text.zh: 你在里面安全吗？

Text.en: You've done well, Freya. <continue>Not bad for an old bird.
Text.zh: 芙蕾雅，你做得很好。<continue>对于一个老妇人来说不算差。

Text.en: A cage can <i>{shield} as well as bind.
Text.zh: 牢笼既能成为<i>{庇护），也能变成束缚。

Text.en: Something about these Karui totems keeps the malice of the fog at bay.
Text.zh: 这些卡鲁图腾有点门道，能把雾里的邪气挡在外头。

Text.en: Will this plan actually work?
Text.zh: 这个计划真的能成功吗？

Text.en: How do we know this verisium will help?
Text.zh: 我们怎么知道这种维金能管用？

Text.en: You are sure this verisium will help your plight?
Text.zh: 你确定这种维金能帮你摆脱困境？

Text.en: How are you sure this substance will save you, crone?
Text.zh: 你怎么确定这种物质能救你，老妇人？

Text.en: Are you sure this verisium substance will work?
Text.zh: 你确定这种叫维金的东西会管用吗？

Text.en: You are sure the verisium will break the binding?
Text.zh: 你确定维金能打破束缚吗？

Text.en: How we do know this is all gonna work?
Text.zh: 我们怎么知道这行得通？

Text.en: This Verisium... How can ye be sure it will break the bind?
Text.zh: 这种维金……你怎么知道它能打破束缚？

Text.en: Are you not familiar with the power of runes?
Text.zh: 你难道不懂符文的力量？

Text.en: Verisium is the very foundation of Kalguuran runework. We call it 'truth metal'. <continue>As they say, 'What is runed, becomes reality.'
Text.zh: 维金是卡古兰符文术的根基。我们叫它“真理金属”。<continue>俗话说，“符文所刻，即成现实”。

Text.en: A metal born of the very stars themselves.
Text.zh: 一种源自星辰的金属。

Text.en: Dannig would know more of the details... <continue>...but if a skilled smith imprints the rune for 'deadly' on a sword, that sword <i>{becomes}... well, deadlier.
Text.zh: 细节得去问丹宁……<continue>……如果一位技艺精湛的铁匠在剑上刻下“致命”符文，那这把剑就会<i>{变得}更致命。

Text.en: A type of magic...
Text.zh: 一种魔法……

Text.en: Aye. Magic. <continue>Like them bloody gems.
Text.zh: 是啊。魔法。<continue>就像那些该死的宝石。

Text.en: Magic courses through all lands.
Text.zh: 魔法遍布所有土地。

Text.en: What delightful magic. Splendid.
Text.zh: 多么美妙的魔法。太棒了。

Text.en: Amazing. Magic truly thrives in all places!
Text.zh: 太棒了，魔法真是遍地开花！

Text.en: A curious magic.
Text.zh: 奇妙的魔法。

Text.en: More magic. Great.
Text.zh: 更多的魔法。太好了。

Text.en: Truth hammered into iron. A curious craft.
Text.zh: 把真理锻打入铁。好绝的手艺。

Text.en: Magic? It's not magic. It's science!
Text.zh: 魔法？这不是魔法。这是科学！

Text.en: Finally, someone who sees it for what it is! Most folk just gape and mutter 'magic.'
Text.zh: 可算有个明白人了！那些门外汉就会目瞪口呆地嘟囔着“魔法”。

Text.en: One and the same.
Text.zh: 一回事儿。

Text.en: Science? What the bloody hell is that?
Text.zh: 科学？什么玩意儿？

Text.en: Live in your lie, if you must.
Text.zh: 你要活在谎言里，随你便。

Text.en: Whatever you say, little one.
Text.zh: 随你怎么说，小家伙。

Text.en: Oh come now, it <i>{is} magic.
Text.zh: 得了吧，这<i>{就是}魔法。

Text.en: ...sounds like magic.
Text.zh: ……听起来像是魔法。

Text.en: Yeah, whatever. Science, magic. Semantics.
Text.zh: 行行，不管是科学还是魔法，都一个意思。

Text.en: Science, magic... both just words for truths older than memory.
Text.zh: 科学，魔法……都只是已被遗忘的真理的代名词。

Text.en: Ugh! Never mind.
Text.zh: 啊！管它呢。

Text.en: Perhaps this Dannig knows someone capable of runesmithing the Verisium for us...
Text.zh: 也许丹宁认识一个有能力用维金为我们打造符文物品的人……

Text.en: Dannig <i>{is} a smith. Don't you know?
Text.zh: 丹宁<i>{就是}铁匠啊。你不知道？

Text.en: I think he himself could do it...
Text.zh: 我看他自己就能干……

Text.en: Dannig claims to be a smith. Shouldn't you know that?
Text.zh: 丹宁自称是铁匠。你不应该知道这个吗？

Text.en: Ha! Keep up the ruse will you? Dannig <i>{is} a smith...
Text.zh: 哈！还装傻呢？丹宁<i>{就是}个铁匠……

Text.en: The tall and handsome one <i>{is} qualified.
Text.zh: 那个高个子帅哥<i>{就}有这本事。

Text.en: Dannig <i>{is} a smith. <continue>And a good one at that. I'm sure he can help us.
Text.zh: 丹宁<i>{就是}铁匠。<continue>还是把好手。他肯定能帮上我们。

Text.en: Poor old dear. <continue>Mind's almost completely gone. <continue>Dannig <i>{is} a smith, love!
Text.zh: 可怜的老人家。<continue>脑子基本糊涂了。<continue>丹宁<i>{就是}铁匠啊，亲爱的！

Text.en: Dannig's a smith, aye. More capable than most.
Text.zh: 丹宁是铁匠。他可是个中好手。

Text.en: You know that, Freya. You remember Dannig.
Text.zh: 你知道的，芙蕾雅。你记得丹宁。

Text.en: Oh... forgive me, of course! Yes. Sweet, Dannig. He can help us.
Text.zh: 哦……当然！抱歉！是的。丹宁，好孩子。他能帮我们。

Text.en: My boy is dead? <continue>I knew. In my heart, I knew. <continue>It's been so long... <continue>I don't care about getting out of here anymore. <continue>Just leave me to die.
Text.zh: 我的儿子死了？<continue>我知道。心里早就知道。<continue>太久了……<continue>我不在乎能不能出去了。<continue>就让我留在这里等死吧。

Text.en: If you wish... It is your choice.
Text.zh: 如果你想的话……这是你自己的选择。

Text.en: Hey now, chin up. <continue>We'll get you outta here.
Text.zh: 嘿，打起精神来。我们会把你带出去的。

Text.en: Empty words. <continue>You know you want to live.
Text.zh: 废话。<continue>你明明想活下去。

Text.en: <i>{Ohhh how pitiful!} I've seen better acting from the undead.
Text.zh: <i>{哦，真可怜！} 我见过比你演得更逼真的亡灵。

Text.en: Come now, Freya... you are better than this.
Text.zh: 拜托了，芙蕾雅……你应该坚强起来。

Text.en: Don't give up. <continue>Your son would want you to go on.
Text.zh: 别放弃。<continue>你的儿子会希望你活下去。

Text.en: Don't talk like that, love. You've come this far...
Text.zh: 别这么说，亲爱的。你都坚持到这儿了……

Text.en:
Ye've lasted this long.  
<continue>Don't let the fog claim ye now.
Text.zh:
你都挺这么久了。
<continue>这会儿可别让迷雾把你吞噬了。

Text.en: Perhaps... if you can runesmith the Verisium and free me...<continue>...I can go and see my boy one last time...
Text.zh: 也许……要是你能符文锻造维金，放我出去，我还能最后再看我儿子一眼……

Text.en: Of course, Freya. <continue>Newcomer - get the Verisium to Dannig. Quickly!
Text.zh: 当然，芙蕾雅。<continue>新来的——赶紧把维金带给丹宁。快！

Text.en: I should have known something was off about all that. <continue>In my younger days, I'd never have been fooled by such a charlatan...
Text.zh: 我早该看出那一切都不对劲。<continue>搁我年轻那会儿，这种骗子可糊弄不了我……

Text.en: I don't believe my eyes or ears anymore.
Text.zh: 我都不敢信自己的眼睛和耳朵了。

Text.en: I'm just as surprised as you. We weren't to know.
Text.zh: 我跟你一样懵。我们当时并不知道。

Text.en: That being... was powerful beyond our means.
Text.zh: 那玩意儿……它的力量远在我们之上。

Text.en: Wasn't it obvious? Idiot.
Text.zh: 这不明摆着吗？白痴。

Text.en: That thing... fooled us both.
Text.zh: 那东西……把咱俩都耍了。

Text.en: We both were fooled. There was no way to know.
Text.zh: 我们俩被骗了。根本没办法预料。

Text.en: Look. Shite happens. What you gonna do?
Text.zh: 听着。世事难料。你又能怎么办呢？

Text.en: When ye want somethin' to be true, it's easier to be led astray.
Text.zh: 你太想相信了，这种时候更容易被钻空子。

Text.en: Aye, perhaps. <continue>Nonetheless, the fog is cleared, and a Kalguuran always pays up. <continue>As promised - this is for you.
Text.zh: 是啊，也许吧。<continue>不管咋说，雾散了，咱卡古兰人说话算话。正如承诺的那样——这是给你的。

Text.en: I'm not a tour guide. This here's the harbour. <continue>Got an harbour concern? That's me. For all other concerns... <continue>Best ask someone else!
Text.zh: 我不是导游。这里是港口。<continue>有港口相关的问题？就来找我，要是有别的问题……<continue>找别人去。

Text.en: Short <i>{and} sweet. Fair enough.
Text.zh: 简单<i>{而且}明了，非常好。

Text.en: Blimey. Thought we might be friends.
Text.zh: 好家伙，我还以为咱俩能交个朋友。

Text.en: I see.
Text.zh: 懂了。

Text.en: How rude! Wonderful.
Text.zh: 如此无礼！太好了。

Text.en: Well... is this truly how you greet visitors, Master Tujen?
Text.zh: 嗯……你就这样迎接访客，图金大人？

Text.en: Huh. Quite the welcome...
Text.zh: 哈，真是好客。

Text.en: Jeez. That's a bit impolite.
Text.zh: 天啊，这话有点伤人。

Text.en: Och... yer welcome's colder than the tide.
Text.zh: 唉……你这“欢迎”可真冷淡啊。

Text.en: Don't take it personal. We got a lot of people comin' and goin' here. <continue>I lost count of all the ones that rubbed me the wrong way. <continue>Who knows? Maybe you'll surprise me.
Text.zh: 别往心里去。我们这里来来往往的人很多。<continue>记不清有多少个让我瞅着不顺眼的了。<continue>谁知道呢？也许你会让我刮目相看。

Text.en: I used to believe a whole load 'a bollocks about honour and tradition. <continue>'We do this not for ourselves, but for our children.' <continue>The words were hollow, but the intent was good. <continue>It really is all about making a better world for those that'll follow us.
Text.zh: 过去我曾相信那些关于荣誉和传统的废话。<continue>我们的所作所为不是为了自己，而是为了孩子。<continue>听上去可能很空洞，但出发点是好的。<continue>一切都是为了给后代创造更美好的世界。

Text.en: So you do all this for new generations?
Text.zh: 所以，你所做的一切都是为了后代？

Text.en: So you do this for the future of your kin. <continue>I respect that.
Text.zh: 所以，你所做的一切都是为了未来的族人？<continue>这一点我很钦佩。

Text.en: Hmm. Forward thinking for future Kalguurans.
Text.zh: 嗯。对未来的卡古兰人来说很有远见。

Text.en: So little Tujen and friends came to build a new tomorrow for the Kalguurans? Of course he did.
Text.zh: 所以，图金和他的朋友们来到这里，是为了给卡古兰人创造美好的明天？这还用问？

Text.en: So you are here to build a new future for your people. Admirable.
Text.zh: 所以，你们来到这里，是为了给族人创造美好的明天？值得钦佩。

Text.en: So you came here to build a better life for future Kalguur? How noble.
Text.zh: 所以，你们来到这里，是为了给未来的卡古兰人创造更美好的世界？崇高的使命。

Text.en: Better future for the kids, that kinda thing?
Text.zh: 为了孩子有更好的未来，这类的？

Text.en: So ye toil for those yet unborn? A noble burden.
Text.zh: 那你们是在为未来的人努力？真高尚啊。

Text.en: Yeah. Something like that.
Text.zh: 嗯。差不多吧。

Text.en: Things are never this simple. Go on.
Text.zh: 事情从来不会这么简单，你继续说。

Text.en: But what of it? There must be more to it than that.
Text.zh: 那又如何呢？肯定还有别的原因。

Text.en: You don't inspire confidence in the virtue of that reasoning.
Text.zh: 你的这番理论缺了几分说服力。

Text.en: Now, now... don't tell me half the story.
Text.zh: 好了，好了……别总说话说一半。

Text.en: I feel you are leaving out some... important details.
Text.zh: 我觉得你隐瞒了一些事……一些重要的细节。

Text.en: There is more to this story. There always is.
Text.zh: 故事远不止于此，大家总是有所保留。

Text.en: Come on. I don't completely buy it, mate.
Text.zh: 得了吧，我可不全信，伙计。

Text.en: Fair enough. But you're not tellin' the whole of it.
Text.zh: 好吧。可你话只说了一半。

Text.en: Quite worldly, aren't ya? <continue>The situation back in Kalguur made the prospect of Wraeclast a little more appealing than it otherwise would've been.
Text.zh: 你真挺门儿清啊？<continue>要不是卡古兰老家的状况太糟，瓦尔克拉斯这地方我可不想来。

Text.en: A strange choice for a new home. What happened?
Text.zh: 瓦尔克拉斯可算不上理想的新家。发生了什么事？

Text.en: What happened?
Text.zh: 家乡发生了什么？

Text.en: What took place?
Text.zh: 发生了什么事？

Text.en: Kalguur must really be a dump to abandon it for Wraeclast... Do tell, why?
Text.zh: 卡古兰一定烂透了，你们才会选择瓦尔克拉斯……说吧，为什么？

Text.en: Not that I know of your home, but it must have been dire for you to become an immigrant on Wraeclast. What happened in Kalguur?
Text.zh: 虽然我不了解你们的家乡，但背井离乡来移民瓦尔克拉斯一定让你们饱受苦难。卡古兰究竟怎么了？

Text.en: Wraeclast is anything <i>{but} appealing. What happened back in Kalguur?
Text.zh: 瓦尔克拉斯绝对<i>{算不上}宜居。卡古兰究竟发生了什么？

Text.en: I know all about being forced out due to political nonsense... <continue>What happened?
Text.zh: 我完全理解被政治纠纷赶出家乡的感觉……<continue>到底发生了什么？

Text.en:
Folk dinnae leave their homelands for naught.   
<continue>What brought ye here?
Text.zh:
谁都不会无缘无故离开家乡。
<continue>你怎么会来这儿？

Text.en: Ah, you know, the usual things that make good folk run to the ends of the world. <continue>Water under the bridge, now. No sense poking a hornet's nest. <continue>The big man's resolved to leave us alone, so long as we keep sending back Vaal artefacts... <continue>Or whatever else his heart desires...
Text.zh: 如你所知，那些让好人跑到世界尽头去的事情。<continue>都过去式了，翻篇了。没必要去捅马蜂窝。<continue>上头那位大佬打定主意不招惹咱了，只要我们继续送回瓦尔古董…… <continue>或者他心里想要的其他任何东西……

Text.en: Why are you asking? Who sent you? <continue>Bugger off!
Text.zh: 问这干嘛？谁派你来的？<continue>滚蛋！

Text.en: What causes your paranoia?
Text.zh: 你怎么突然犯起了疑心病？

Text.en: No one sent me, save the Spirit.
Text.zh: 除了万灵，我不受谁的指派。

Text.en: You speak with fear in your throat. <continue>What is the matter with you?
Text.zh: 你说话时声音在颤抖。<continue>你怎么了？

Text.en: The King sent me. I'm here to torment you.
Text.zh: 国王派我来的，让我来折磨你。

Text.en: Why do you live in fear of him?
Text.zh: 你为什么活在他的恐惧之下？

Text.en: No one <i>{sent} me. Why do you fear him?
Text.zh: 没有人<i>{派}我来。你为什么畏惧他？

Text.en: Oh, shite. Sounds like you've got a spot of trouble on your hands, huh?
Text.zh: 哦，糟了。听起来你摊上大麻烦了，是吧？

Text.en:
Easy, wee fella. No one sent me.  
<continue>Ye quake at his name - why?
Text.zh:
别激动，自己人。没人派我来。
<continue>听到他的名字，你就吓成这样——为什么啊？

Text.en: Not funny. Move on.
Text.zh: 不好笑。走开。

Text.en: None of your business. Move on.
Text.zh: 不关你的事。走开。

Text.en: Makoru's got something to prove. Lucky for you, she's got the talent to back it up. <continue>You won't go wrong gettin' on that ship. <continue>She's been underestimated, by my people <i>{and} her own.
Text.zh: 马克鲁憋着股劲儿想证明自己。幸运的是，她真有那本事。<continue>上她的船错不了。<continue>她一直被我的族人<i>{和}她的族人低估。

Text.en: Her own discarded her?
Text.zh: 她的族人抛弃了她？

Text.en: Why do you fear him?
Text.zh: 你为什么畏惧他？

Text.en: The Karui are brutal.
Text.zh: 卡鲁人很野蛮。

Text.en: Her tribe, I take it?
Text.zh: 我猜，是她的部族？

Text.en: Her own people did not believe in her? Outrageous.
Text.zh: 她的族人不相信她？岂有此理。

Text.en: The Karui?
Text.zh: 卡鲁人？

Text.en: They abandon her?
Text.zh: 他们把她给抛弃了？

Text.en: Not like the Karui to shun their own.
Text.zh: 这可不像是卡鲁人的作风，竟然会排斥自己人。

Text.en: Aye. She's left 'em behind, but she's got her people's spirit. <continue>I'm fond of the Karui. They value honour, and ancestral tales of bravery. <continue>Not just talk. For real. <continue>They live the way that us Kalguurans <i>{claim} we do. <continue>They're wild. And free.
Text.zh: 对。虽然她抛下了族人，但她里面那股劲还是一个样。<continue>我很喜欢卡鲁人。他们看重荣耀，还有祖先英勇的传说。<continue>不是说说而已，真的。<continue>他们活得就像我们卡古兰人<i>{自称}的那样。<continue>他们很野，也很自由。

Text.en: They underestimate her because they don't understand her.
Text.zh: 他们低估她，因为他们不了解她。

Text.en: I know how <i>{that} feels.
Text.zh: 我懂<i>{那种}感受。

Text.en: Why do they underestimate her?
Text.zh: 那他们为什么要低估她的力量？

Text.en: Why do her own people underestimate her? She seems strong.
Text.zh: 那他们为什么要低估她的力量？她看上去很强大。

Text.en: I am confused. Why would they underestimate such a capable leader? She is a strong woman.
Text.zh: 我不懂。他们为什么低估这么能干的领袖？她是位强大的女人。

Text.en: Why do the Karui underestimate Makoru?
Text.zh: 卡鲁人为何低估马克鲁？

Text.en: Why are they underestimating her then?
Text.zh: 那他们为什么小看她？

Text.en: But why cast her aside, if she's as strong as ye say?
Text.zh: 要是她真有你说的那么厉害，那族人为什么排斥她？

Text.en: Oh, you know how it is, in times of change. <continue>The younger ones get ideas, and the older ones try to push 'em back toward tradition. <continue>The Karui passionately follow what they call 'the Way.'
Text.zh: 唉，你知道，时代在变嘛。<continue>年轻人有了新想法，老人又想把他们拉回传统。<continue>卡鲁人以满腔热忱遵循他们所谓的“道”，卡鲁之道。

Text.en: What do you know about 'The Way'?
Text.zh: 你对这个“卡鲁之道”了解多少？

Text.en: Tell me what you know of it. 'The Way'.
Text.zh: 跟我说说看吧，这个“卡鲁之道”。

Text.en: Do you respect their 'Way', Kalguuran?
Text.zh: 你尊重他们的“道”吗，卡古兰人？

Text.en: What's all this 'Way' business?
Text.zh: 这个什么“道”是什么东西？

Text.en: What do you know of 'The Way'?
Text.zh: 关于这个“卡鲁之道”，你知道些什么？

Text.en: What do <i>{you} make of 'The Way'?
Text.zh: <i>{你}觉得这个“卡鲁之道”究竟是什么？

Text.en: What do you think about that 'Way'?
Text.zh: 你怎么看那个“卡鲁之道”？

Text.en: My memory's mush. What d'ye know of this 'Way'?
Text.zh: 我这记性跟糨糊似的。关于这个“卡鲁之道”，你知道些什么？

Text.en: Well, I dunno all the ins and outs of it, but it's a kind of <i>{code of honour}.
Text.zh: 我也说不清到底是什么，算是一种<i>{荣誉准则}吧。

Text.en: So she is her own person and rejects this 'Way'? I see no problem.
Text.zh: 所以，她坚持自我，拒绝了“卡鲁之道”？这有什么错？

Text.en: So she rejects 'The Way' of her people? <continue>Tough path to take.
Text.zh: 所以，她拒绝了族人的“卡鲁之道”？<continue>这条道可不好走。

Text.en: Makoru rejects her people's traditions... <continue>Of course there would be consequences.
Text.zh: 马克鲁背叛了她族人的传统……<continue>自然会有后果。

Text.en: So... Makoru is a little upstart do-gooder that rejects tradition. How dull. I get it.
Text.zh: 所以……马克鲁是个拒绝传统、自命不凡的改良者。无聊，我明白了。

Text.en: I see. So Makoru... she rejects 'The Way' of her people?
Text.zh: 我懂了。所以，马克鲁……她拒绝了族人的“卡鲁之道”？

Text.en: And Makoru rejects 'The Way' of her tribe?
Text.zh: 然而马克鲁拒绝了族人的“卡鲁之道”？

Text.en: So she rejects it? <continue>I can relate. The Way reminds me of the damn Trarthan Code.
Text.zh: 所以她不接受？<continue>我能理解。那个“卡鲁之道”让我想起该死的特拉特斯规范。

Text.en:
So it's <i>{she} who rejects <i>{them}.   
<continue>That's no small thing.
Text.zh:
那就是<i>{她}主动拒绝了<i>{族人}。
<continue>这可不是闹着玩的。

Text.en: Reject is a strong word. You'd have to ask her. <continue>She forges her own path... kinda like we did coming here, to Wraeclast. <continue>I admire that.
Text.zh: “拒绝”这个词太重了，你得亲自问她。<continue>她走自己的路……就像我们来瓦尔克拉斯一样。<continue>这一点我很欣赏。

Text.en: Makoru's fallen ill! I can't believe it. <continue>You've gotta do what you can to help her!
Text.zh: 马克鲁病倒了！我简直不敢相信。<continue>你一定要尽力救治她！

Text.en: Tavakai took her and said <i>{he} would heal her.
Text.zh: 塔瓦凯抓走了她，说<i>{他}会把她治好。

Text.en: The Chieftain believes he can heal her.
Text.zh: 酋长自信能把她治好。

Text.en: Tavakai will heal her himself, or so he claims.
Text.zh: 塔瓦凯声称会亲自治愈她。

Text.en: Tavakai seems to think he can do it himself. <continue>I have my doubts considering what a fool he's been so far...
Text.zh: 塔瓦凯觉得他自己就能行。<continue>鉴于他至今的愚蠢表现，我表示强烈怀疑。

Text.en: Tavakai said he'd heal her, the Karui way. Though, I am not sure what that means.
Text.zh: 塔瓦凯会用卡鲁人的方式治好她。不过，我不确定他这话什么意思。

Text.en: Tavakai is certain he will do just that.
Text.zh: 塔瓦凯确信自己能成功。

Text.en: Tavakai reckons he can make her right again.
Text.zh: 塔瓦凯觉得自己能纠正她。

Text.en: Tavakai says he'll see to her. The Karui way.
Text.zh: 塔瓦凯说他会照料她。用卡鲁人的方式。

Text.en: The man's not in his right mind! Please... <continue>Just don't let her die.
Text.zh: 那人已经神志不清了！求你了……<continue>别让她死了。

Text.en: I'll try my best.
Text.zh: 我会尽力而为。

Text.en: She won't die. Not if I can help it.
Text.zh: 她不会死。只要我还在，就不会。

Text.en: I'll see what can be done.
Text.zh: 我会尽力而为。

Text.en: Death isn't always the end... <continue>But perhaps I can intervene.
Text.zh: 死亡并非终点……<continue>我或许能干预其中。

Text.en: I will redeem her. Do not worry.
Text.zh: 我会拯救她。不用担心。

Text.en: I'll do what I can.
Text.zh: 我会尽力而为。

Text.en: She's been good to me. I'll have a look into it.
Text.zh: 她待我不错。我会想想办法的。

Text.en: I'll not stand by and watch her fade.
Text.zh: 我绝不会眼睁睁看着她慢慢死去。

Text.en: It fills my old heart to know she's well again. <continue>I hope after all this, we've learned enough to find a better way forward with the Karui.
Text.zh: 她能平安无事，我这老心头满是安慰。<continue>希望这一切之后，我们能多吸取吸取教训，找到与卡鲁族的相处之道。

Text.en: Perhaps with mutual respect, you can work together.
Text.zh: 只有相互尊重，你们才能携手合作。

Text.en: I believe you can do it. Work with 'em. <continue>Build summat together.
Text.zh: 我相信你们能做到。与他们合作，<continue>共同取得成果吧。

Text.en: If you can, put aside your differences and live in harmony.
Text.zh: 如果可能的话，就抛开分歧，和谐共处吧。

Text.en: Maybe now you can all just... get along?
Text.zh: 或许现在你们能……和谐共处了吧？

Text.en: I have experience in this... so listen to me now, it is better if you can work together. Build a future on the back of mutual respect.
Text.zh: 这种事我有经验……都听我说，和谐共处是更好的选择。在相互尊重的基础上共创未来吧。

Text.en: Kingsmarch and the Tukohama tribe must find a way to thrive together.
Text.zh: 君锋镇和图克哈玛部族必须找到共同繁荣的道路。

Text.en: Leave the past in the past, mate. <continue>Move forward together.
Text.zh: 过去的就让它过去吧，伙计。<continue>我们一起往前看。

Text.en:
A wound can knit, if ye let it.   
<continue>So too with people.
Text.zh:
皮肉伤自己也能长好，只要你别去碰它。
<continue>人心也是这样。

Text.en: I look forward to that. Truly, I do.
Text.zh: 希望如此。真心的。

Text.en: He's fairly new in town. I heard he had too many 'modern' ideas for the Chieftain's liking. <continue>He seems capable enough, and Makoru's taken a liking to him.
Text.zh: 他是镇上的新面孔。我听说他有太多“现代”想法，酋长们不喜欢。<continue>他看起来挺能干的，马克鲁也喜欢他。

Text.en: He's fairly new in town. I heard he had too many 'modern' ideas for the Chieftain's liking. <continue>He seems capable enough, and he's loyal to Makoru.
Text.zh: 他是镇上的新面孔。我听说他有太多“现代”想法，酋长们不喜欢。<continue>他看起来挺能干的，对马克鲁也很忠诚。

Text.en: Tell me about this Chieftain.
Text.zh: 跟我说说这位酋长。

Text.en: I'd like to meet this Chieftain. <continue>Tell me about him.
Text.zh: 我想见见这位酋长。<continue>跟我说说有关他的事。

Text.en: This Chieftain... what of him?
Text.zh: 这个酋长……你认为他如何？

Text.en: Who is the <i>{mighty} Chieftain around here?
Text.zh: 这一带的<i>{伟大}酋长是谁？

Text.en: Tell me, who is this Chieftain?
Text.zh: 说吧，这位酋长是谁？

Text.en: Who is the Chieftain in these parts?
Text.zh: 这一带的酋长是谁？

Text.en: Guess I better know more about this Chieftain fella.
Text.zh: 我觉得我得多了解一下这位酋长。

Text.en: This Chieftain... what can ye tell me about him?
Text.zh: 这位酋长……你还知道关于他的什么事？

Text.en: I should tread lightly around Tavakai.
Text.zh: 在塔瓦凯身边，我可要小心行事。

Text.en: I ought to mind my tongue around Tavakai then?
Text.zh: 那么，在塔瓦凯身边，我需要小心说话吗？

Text.en: Tavakai values tradition.
Text.zh: 塔瓦凯看重传统。

Text.en: Tavakai seems a bully.
Text.zh: 塔瓦凯看着像个恶霸。

Text.en: So I should be cautious around this 'Tavakai'.
Text.zh: 所以，我需要对这个“塔瓦凯”多加小心。

Text.en: Tavakai seems like someone to avoid upsetting...
Text.zh: 这个塔瓦凯看起来不好惹……

Text.en: Tavakai is a stern bugger.
Text.zh: 塔瓦凯是个严厉的老家伙。

Text.en: Tavakai seems a hard man to please.
Text.zh: 看来塔瓦凯是个很难讨好的人。

Text.en: His name's Tavakai. He's a bit of a hard arse. A real warrior. <continue>And we do our very best not to cross him!
Text.zh: 他叫塔瓦凯，是个硬茬，真正的战士。<continue>咱们尽量别惹他！

Text.en: That's right. He's a tough one. <continue>Best not to cross him.
Text.zh: 没错，他是个硬茬。<continue>最好别惹他。

Text.en: I will not intentionally upset him.
Text.zh: 我可不会没事招惹他。

Text.en: I'll treat him with the respect he deserves. No doubt.
Text.zh: 毫无疑问，我会以礼相待。

Text.en: A decorated warrior deserves respect.
Text.zh: 一位战功赫赫的战士，理应受到尊敬。

Text.en: I look forward to arguing with him.
Text.zh: 我倒很想跟他吵一架。

Text.en: Don't worry. I will be respectful. I am his guest, after all.
Text.zh: 别担心，我会心存敬意。毕竟，我只是来客。

Text.en: I'll keep that in mind.
Text.zh: 我会注意的。

Text.en: Blimey. I'll watch my mouth then.
Text.zh: 天哪。那我得看着点我的嘴了。

Text.en: A man o' war, then. I'll not test his temper - unless he tests mine.
Text.zh: 原来是个狠角色。我不会去触他的霉头——除非他先来惹我。

Text.en: Heh! Good luck with that.
Text.zh: 呵！那祝你好运喽。

Text.en: Wise.
Text.zh: 很明智。

Text.en: That maggot bastard! <continue>Ugh, just goes to show, ya never truly know someone...
Text.zh: 那个混账东西！<continue>呃，你看吧，人永远无法真正了解他人……

Text.en: He learned the hard way.
Text.zh: 他付出了沉重代价。

Text.en: He'll be judged by his Ancestors for what he did.
Text.zh: 他的所作所为将由先祖来审判。

Text.en: His path was flawed. <continue>It is not uncommon for weak minds.
Text.zh: 他的道路有缺陷。<continue>这在意志薄弱的人身上很常见。

Text.en: Dead now. No longer a concern.
Text.zh: 死了，不用操心了。

Text.en: He paid the ultimate price for his betrayal.
Text.zh: 他为背叛付出了最沉重的代价。

Text.en: It's unfortunate what became of him. <continue>He was lost.
Text.zh: 他迷失了自我，<continue>才会有这样可悲的结局。

Text.en: Well... he got what was comin'.
Text.zh: 嗯……他算是自食恶果。

Text.en: Even the stoutest tree can rot from within.
Text.zh: 不管多可靠的人，内心也有可能腐朽。

Text.en: But how did I not see it? <continue>I got blind drunk with him only a few days ago!
Text.zh: 可我怎么就没看出来？<continue>我前几天才和他喝了个烂醉如泥！

Text.en: Your judgement was impaired by your choices.
Text.zh: 你的判断力被你的选择蒙蔽了。

Text.en: Sometimes we can't see what's right in front of us.
Text.zh: 有时候，越是熟悉的事，你就越是认不清。

Text.en: Spend less time at the bottom of a glass, perhaps.
Text.zh: 也许该少花些时间酗酒。

Text.en: Maybe try being less of a drunken idiot?
Text.zh: 你也许不该总是喝得像个醉醺醺的白痴。

Text.en: Come now, Master Tujen. The drink got in the way of your senses.
Text.zh: 行了，图金大人。酒精麻痹了你的理智。

Text.en: Can't see if you're blind.
Text.zh: 眼睛瞎了自然看不出来。

Text.en: We can't see everything all the time, mate.
Text.zh: 我们也不可能什么都看得到，伙计。

Text.en: Ale's a friend one night, an enemy the next. Much like Kanu.
Text.zh: 卡努就跟烈酒一样，当时喝得痛快，隔天就让你头疼欲裂。

Text.en: Mm. Good point.
Text.zh: 嗯，说得对。

Text.en: Well... you met the Chieftain. How was it?
Text.zh: 嗯……你见过酋长了，感觉如何？

Text.en: He's certainly strong-willed.
Text.zh: 他的意志非常坚定。

Text.en: He's an honourable man. <continue>He values tradition highly.
Text.zh: 他是个可敬之人。<continue>他极其尊崇传统。

Text.en: He knows his place in the world. He leads a strong path.
Text.zh: 他知道自己在世界中的位置。他走着坚定的道路。

Text.en: Well... he has a lot of confidence. I'll give him that.
Text.zh: 这……他非常有自信，这点我承认。

Text.en: He is powerful. I am impressed with him.
Text.zh: 他很强大，令我印象深刻。

Text.en: He's strong. There is no doubt about it.
Text.zh: 毫无疑问，他很强大。

Text.en: He's someone to keep on your good side, I reckon...
Text.zh: 我觉得吧，他可是个不好惹的家伙……

Text.en: He's strong as an oak... and just as rigid.
Text.zh: 他像树一样强壮，也像树一样顽固。

Text.en: Hah! To be sure. I've two minds about him, though. <continue>On one hand, he's fostering tradition, allowing it to thrive. <continue>Yet on the other... well. He can be a bit much.
Text.zh: 哈！那是。但我跟他不对付。<continue>他一方面在延续传统，让它得以昌盛。<continue>可另一方面……嗯，他有点过头了。

Text.en: He loves his people. It cannot be easy what he is trying to do.
Text.zh: 他爱他的人民。他追求的事业并不简单。

Text.en: He's committed to his tribe, and it can't be easy.
Text.zh: 他始终忠于自己的部族，这不容易。

Text.en: Hah! Subtle as the roaring tide.
Text.zh: 哈！如怒海咆哮般含蓄。

Text.en: Dedicating yourself to an idea... never seems to end well.
Text.zh: 为了信念献身……从来没有好下场。

Text.en: He pursues what he values. It is not a simple thing to do.
Text.zh: 他追寻珍视之物。这本就不简单。

Text.en: Balancing your convictions is never easy.
Text.zh: 平衡信念本就不简单。

Text.en: Can't be an easy gig.
Text.zh: 不是什么轻松活儿。

Text.en: Aye. Honour's a heavy thing. It can steady a man... or sink him.
Text.zh: 是啊。荣誉是件沉重的东西。可以让人站稳脚跟……也能可以人沉沦覆灭。

Text.en: Heh! You're telling me.
Text.zh: 哈！是吧。

Text.en: He's stubborn, to say the least. <continue>But if he believes he's the true <i>{Ngakuramakoi...} he'll think he's the one to bring the Karui together.
Text.zh: 他很固执，这么说反正没错。<continue>但如果他相信自己是<i>{纳库雷默柯……}那他肯定觉得自己能一统卡鲁。

Text.en: He betrayed us. He betrayed his own people.
Text.zh: 他背叛了我们，背叛了自己的人民。

Text.en: I know why he did it... but it doesn't make it right.
Text.zh: 我知道他的本意……但这不意味着他是对的。

Text.en: An odd way to go about it.
Text.zh: 可他的做法实在不对劲。

Text.en: Another leader... another power hungry moment of disgrace... oh, the drama.
Text.zh: 又一位领袖……又一个被权力吞噬的耻辱故事……啊，真是一出好戏。

Text.en: Either way, a fool he has been. The choices he has made have been... unfortunate to say the least.
Text.zh: 无论如何，他都是个蠢材。他所做的选择……很不幸。

Text.en: He has lost himself.
Text.zh: 他迷失了自我。

Text.en: The cheeky bugger.
Text.zh: 还真是个狂妄的混球。

Text.en: The way he's goin', he's just as wont to tear 'em apart.
Text.zh: 照他这么搞下去，一样会把族人搞得四分五裂。

Text.en: Sometimes our convictions make monsters of us. <continue>I hope there is a way to set all this right.
Text.zh: 有时候，我们的信念也会把我们变成怪物。<continue>希望这一切还有办法挽回。

Text.en: You never cease to amaze. I hear it was a fight for the ages. <continue>And yet you both came out alive. Heh. Remarkable.
Text.zh: 你总能让我惊叹。我听说打了一场旷世之战。<continue>可你们两个竟然都活着出来了。呵，真不简单。

Text.en: It was a fight I won't soon forget.
Text.zh: 这场战斗我永生难忘。

Text.en: I didn't want that fight. But there were no other way.
Text.zh: 我本不想动手，但我别无选择。

Text.en: The Chieftain learned his lesson.
Text.zh: 酋长吸取了教训。

Text.en: Not completely unscathed.
Text.zh: 也不是毫发无伤。

Text.en: I must say, it wasn't easy.
Text.zh: 不得不说，我赢得不轻松。

Text.en: Not without a scratch or two.
Text.zh: 也不是毫发无伤。

Text.en: He put up a serious fight.
Text.zh: 他打得很拼命。

Text.en:
He's proof of what we hoped: Corruption can be undone.   
<continue>Though not without a scar or two.
Text.zh:
他证明了我们的希望：腐化可以被清除。
<continue>尽管这会留下几道伤疤。

Text.en: Scars are reminders. Let Tavakai remember.
Text.zh: 伤疤能让人记住事。让塔瓦凯记住就好。

Text.en: Now there's a true friend. <continue>Me and him have been on this campaign here in Wraeclast since the start of this little venture, when it was but a lodge and a dream. <continue>Next thing you know... well, it all got away from us... <continue>... and here we are, with a whole town somehow grown up around us.
Text.zh: 他是个真正的朋友。<continue>从这次来瓦尔克拉斯的远征开始，我们就在一块了，那时候这里只有一座小屋和一个梦想。<continue>一转眼，事情就从手掌心跑飞了……<continue>……现在呢，我们身边不知怎的长出了一整座镇子。

Text.en: Time gets away from us.
Text.zh: 时光不等人啊。

Text.en: It's remarkable how things can change before we know it.
Text.zh: 世事变迁总是超出我们的想象。

Text.en: You chose this life, Kalguuran.
Text.zh: 这是你选择的生活，卡古兰人。

Text.en: Not everything grew up...
Text.zh: 也不是所有东西都长大了……

Text.en: You should be proud. It seems you have done well for yourselves here.
Text.zh: 你们应该自豪。看来你们在这里经营得很不错。

Text.en: Any regrets?
Text.zh: 那你后悔吗？

Text.en: Gettin' old, mate?
Text.zh: 怕老了吗，伙计？

Text.en: Time reshapes all things, wee fella. Even us.
Text.zh: 时间会改变一切，小家伙。包括你和我。

Text.en: I'm just now realisin' I haven't been on an expedition in... six bloody years! <continue>Time really is a cruel master.
Text.zh: 我现在才发觉，我已经……已经六年没出过远门了！<continue>时间真是个残酷的主子呐。

Text.en: You need to get out of this harbour for a time.
Text.zh: 你应该抽点时间，暂时离开这座港口。

Text.en: Join me on a hunt, Tujen!
Text.zh: 加入我的狩猎之旅吧，图金！

Text.en: Live your life - see where the Dreamer takes you.
Text.zh: 过好你的生活吧——看看幻梦者将你引向何方。

Text.en: Sounds like you're itching for adventure... let's get you back out there.
Text.zh: 看来你渴望冒险……那就让我们帮你重出江湖吧。

Text.en: I cannot imagine! You've been cooped up here too long. You must join me for an adventure sometime.
Text.zh: 难以想象！你被困在这里太久了。总有一天，你该跟我一同去冒险。

Text.en: Maybe one day, you and I could venture out together.
Text.zh: 也许哪天，我们可以一起探险。

Text.en: Well... I'm sure I could use a hand sometime. <continue>How about it, mate?
Text.zh: 嗯……我想我有时候也需要帮手。<continue>怎么样，伙计？

Text.en:
Aye. It's taken much from me, too.   
<continue>But never too late for a new chapter.
Text.zh:
是啊。它也夺走我很多东西。
<continue>但开启新的篇章，永远都不晚。

Text.en: Stranger things have happened, I suppose.
Text.zh: 奇事一箩筐，应该也不是没可能。

Text.en: Now, that there's a good man. He's led us through thick and thin. <continue>An aspiring dreamer <i>{and} a cynical realist. He's a unique fellow.
Text.zh: 他是个好人。一路带着我们走过风风雨雨。<continue>既怀揣梦想，<i>{也}是个愤世嫉俗的现实主义者。这人真特别。

Text.en: He seems like just another leader to me. What of him do you admire?
Text.zh: 在我看来，他不过是又一个领袖而已。你为什么这么欣赏他？

Text.en: What makes you trust him so deeply?
Text.zh: 你为什么这么信任他？

Text.en: What makes this Dannig so important to you?
Text.zh: 这个丹宁对你为何如此重要？

Text.en: What do you admire about the tall one?
Text.zh: 你为什么这么欣赏那个大个子？

Text.en: You speak with great respect for him. What makes you admire him so, Master Tujen?
Text.zh: 你对他抱有很高的敬意。你为什么这么欣赏他，图金大人？

Text.en: What is it about him that inspires you?
Text.zh: 他哪一点激励了你？

Text.en: Seems an alright bloke, I guess. <continue>What makes him such a great leader?
Text.zh: 看着像个不错的家伙。<continue>是什么让他成了这么厉害的领袖？

Text.en: What sets him apart?
Text.zh: 那他最特别的地方在哪儿？

Text.en: His conviction. His passion. <continue>He could change the world, if he just believed he could.
Text.zh: 他的信念。他的热情。<continue>如果他够自信，那他真的能改变世界。

Text.en: It's quite the worry. Not one of us sleeps right at night lately. <continue>It's just not like her to disappear this long.
Text.zh: 真叫人担心。我们最近一个个晚上都睡不好。<continue>她不是那种会消失这么久的人。

Text.en: She likely can take care of herself. Why the concern?
Text.zh: 她应该能照顾好自己。你为什么这么担心？

Text.en: Surely she'll be back. Keep hope.
Text.zh: 她肯定会回来的。往好处想。

Text.en: She will return if it is destined.
Text.zh: 如果命中注定，她会回来的。

Text.en: So she's missing then? Probably dead.
Text.zh: 所以她失踪了？很可能已经死了。

Text.en: I would be troubled too, if it's not like her.
Text.zh: 换做我也会很不安，毕竟这不像她的风格。

Text.en: How long has it been since you saw her?
Text.zh: 距离你上次见到她已经多久了？

Text.en: Not a good sign. Not good at all.
Text.zh: 这不是好兆头。非常不妙。

Text.en: The wild takes many who wander too far.
Text.zh: 那鬼地方可是吃人不吐骨头的。

Text.en: Great... Great, yeah. <i>{Real reassurin'.}
Text.zh: 好……太好了，那我可<i>{太安心}了。

Text.en: We'd seen her a lot more recently, after certain folk made their way back to Kalguur some years back. <continue>She's not one to be tied down to mortar and stone, mind you. But weeks without a word... <continue>No. That's not our Gwen.
Text.zh: 过去几年，在某些人返回卡古兰后，我们还经常见到她。<continue>她不是会被砖石束缚的那种人，这你也知道。但几周没消息……<continue>不，我们的桂温妮不会这样。

Text.en: I'll look out for her. But I'm sure she's just fine.
Text.zh: 我会留意她的行踪，但我确信她肯定没事。

Text.en: I wish the best for your friend. I'll have a look on me travels.
Text.zh: 我为你的朋友祈祷。我会沿途多加关注。

Text.en: If I see her, I'll tell her of your concern.
Text.zh: 如果见到了她，我会转达你的关切。

Text.en: Well, if I find her and she <i>{isn't} dead... perhaps I'll tell her to come by.
Text.zh: 好吧，如果我找到她，而且她<i>{还没}死的话……我会劝她顺路来看看。

Text.en: Rest assured. I will see if I can find your friend.
Text.zh: 放心。我会想办法找到你的朋友。

Text.en: I'll do my best to find her.
Text.zh: 我会尽力留意她的行踪。

Text.en: I'll keep an eye out.
Text.zh: 我会盯着点的。

Text.en: If fate wills it, I'll find her.
Text.zh: 若命运如此安排，我定会找到她的。

Text.en: Please do.
Text.zh: 拜托了。

Text.en: Those filthy sniveling rotbeards! Scourge of the sea! <continue>To take our Gwen... unthinkable.
Text.zh: 这帮脏兮兮、流鼻涕的烂胡子海盗！海上的祸害！<continue>竟然敢抓走我们的桂温妮……真不敢相信。

Text.en: Perhaps they are the ones who should live in fear from now on.
Text.zh: 从现在开始，轮到他们日夜担惊受怕了。

Text.en: Let us hunt these vile pirates!
Text.zh: 我会猎杀这些肮脏的海盗！

Text.en: We need to address this situation.
Text.zh: 我们需要处理这个情况。

Text.en: Let's make them regret their decision?
Text.zh: 我会让他们后悔莫及！

Text.en: I share your anger. They will die one thousand deaths!
Text.zh: 我和你一样愤怒。我会让他们死上千遍万遍！

Text.en: They'll learn their lesson.
Text.zh: 我去教训教训他们。

Text.en: Sounds like it's time to bust some heads.
Text.zh: 听起来该动手揍人了。

Text.en: Aye. Deeds like that demand answerin'.
Text.zh: 是啊。这事儿绝对不能就这么完了。

Text.en: Too bloody right! If so much as a hair is outta place on her head... <continue>... I'll hunt every last one of them to their grave!
Text.zh: 就该这样！要是他们动了她哪怕一根头发……<continue>……我会把他们一个个送进棺材！

Text.en: They weren't always around down here. Too scared of the Karui. <continue>Cowards.
Text.zh: 他们以前在这片地界不怎么出现。他们很怕卡鲁族。<continue>一帮懦夫。

Text.en: Why have they been allowed here?
Text.zh: 那他们为什么会被放进来？

Text.en: What changed?
Text.zh: 情况变了？

Text.en: Were the Karui complacent?
Text.zh: 卡鲁人太大意了吗？

Text.en: Fear is usually a good prevention...
Text.zh: 恐惧向来是有效的震慑手段……

Text.en: I've heard stories of Pirates. So they are real. What brings these Brinerot here now?
Text.zh: 我听说过海盗的故事。所以，他们是真实存在的。是什么把这些布琳洛特人吸引到了这里？

Text.en: And now?
Text.zh: 那现在呢？

Text.en: Why are they here now then?
Text.zh: 那他们现在怎么来了？

Text.en: So why now?
Text.zh: 那为什么现在来了？

Text.en: I'd wager the Karui didn't even know they were here either. <continue>Ugh, that damn fog. Caused all sorts of problems.
Text.zh: 我敢说卡鲁族根本不知道他们藏在这里。<continue>呃，该死的迷雾，惹出来一堆麻烦。

Text.en: I can't thank you enough for helping us save her. <continue>She is one of us. Family.
Text.zh: 我真不知道该怎么谢谢你救了她。<continue>她是我们自己人。是我们的家人。

Text.en: I'm glad she is safe.
Text.zh: 很高兴她没事。

Text.en: The Brinerot won't forget this. Bastards.
Text.zh: 布琳洛特人不会善罢甘休。这群杂种。

Text.en: There is more to her future, I believe.
Text.zh: 我相信她的未来还有更多可能。

Text.en: Yes, yes. Fine, fine.
Text.zh: 对，对。好，好。

Text.en: You are welcome, Master Tujen. It was my honour.
Text.zh: 谢谢您，图金大师。这是我的荣幸。

Text.en: I understand.
Text.zh: 我明白。

Text.en: One less damsel in distress.
Text.zh: 又少了一个等人救的姑娘。

Text.en: If anything's worth fightin' for, it's family.
Text.zh: 如果还有什么值得为之而战，那就是家人。

Text.en: Rumour has it you're lookin' for objects of grand importance. <continue>Should we be concerned?
Text.zh: 传言说你在找什么特别重要的东西。<continue>我们该担心吗？

Text.en: Rumours won't help anyone.
Text.zh: 传言帮不上谁的忙。

Text.en: The world is at stake. That's all that matters.
Text.zh: 世界危在旦夕，这才是最重要的。

Text.en: Yes. Be concerned.
Text.zh: 是的。值得担心。

Text.en: Oh this thing is grand alright. And yes, you should be concerned.
Text.zh: 这东西确实很重要。没错，你们应该担心。

Text.en: I would not lie to you. Yes. It is quite concerning. But tell me... how do you know of this?
Text.zh: 实不相瞒，情况确实令人担心。不过请你告诉我……你是怎么知道的？

Text.en: It concerns the entire world. <continue>But what of these rumours?
Text.zh: 这事关全世界。<continue>这些传言是怎么回事？

Text.en: Yeah, not gonna lie... <continue>Things are looking pretty rough.
Text.zh: 是啊，不瞒你说……<continue>情况看起来挺糟的。

Text.en:
I'll not pretend things are fine and dandy.   
<continue>But what's this about rumours?
Text.zh:
我不会假装平安无事。
<continue>不过，你刚才说的传闻是怎么回事？

Text.en: Nothing is a secret around here for long, see. At least, not to me. <continue>Just be careful. That's all I ask.
Text.zh: 在这儿，没有什么能长久保密。至少对我来说是这样。<continue>只求你小心。就这样。

Text.en: I shoulda known that wasn't Freya Hartlin. <continue>Whatever it may have been, it gives me chills thinkin' about it. So I don't want to.
Text.zh: 我早该知道那人不是芙蕾雅·哈特林。<continue>不管那是什么，想起来就让我起鸡皮疙瘩。所以我宁愿不想。

Text.en: That had to have been a god. The Black Crow... <continue>The gods have many names across Wraeclast, but the Ezomytes do not know his.
Text.zh: 那肯定是被称为“黑鸦”的神祇……<continue>瓦尔克拉斯的众神拥有万千名讳，但艾兹麦人从未听说过这一位。

Text.en: He were a God. Tangmazu. A mortal turned divine by unknown means. <continue>Nothing like our sacred Spirit.
Text.zh: 他是唐玛祖，曾是一位神祇。通过未知手段获得神格的凡人。<continue>与我们神圣的万灵截然不同。

Text.en: That was a being of supreme power. It must have been a god.
Text.zh: 那是拥有至高力量的存在。必定是个神祇。

Text.en: You'd rather not think of the God you saw? Oh, no. <continue>No one mention the god! Or the Kalguuran will lose his little mind.
Text.zh: 你宁愿不去想刚才看到的神祇？哦，不。<continue>谁都不许提那个神！不然这个卡古兰人会疯掉的！

Text.en: The tale-women tell of a cowardly god of lies... not one of ours, but Azmeri. They called him the Raven.
Text.zh: 说书人曾提及一位怯懦的欺诈之神……他不是我们的神，而是阿兹莫里人的神。他们称他为黑鸦。

Text.en: He was not a First One, but there was a Deceiver among those that came after...<continue>A Black Crow. An ancient God of lies.
Text.zh: 他并非初生之子，但在后继者中确实诞生了一位欺诈者……<continue>一只黑鸦。远古时代的欺诈之神。

Text.en: I know, mate. We don't have much of that nonsense back home neither.
Text.zh: 我知道，伙计。我们老家也没那么多破事儿。

Text.en:
He was meant to be dealt with. Locked away. But I know who that was.   
<continue>The Raven Trickster. And I... the fool who freed him.
Text.zh:
他本应被处理掉，被永远关起来。但我知道那是什么谁了。
<continue>黑鸦欺诈者。我……就是那个把他放出来的蠢货。

Text.en: Tell it to the skalds, will ya? I'd rather not know! <continue>Bugger off!
Text.zh: 去和吟游诗人说去吧！我不想知道！<continue>得了，快走吧！

Text.en: Why are you being rude?
Text.zh: 你为什么如此无礼？

Text.en: I sense fear in ya. Why's that?
Text.zh: 我感受到了你的恐惧。为什么？

Text.en: It is what it is, you know. You can't change reality.
Text.zh: 现实就是如此。你无法改变现实。

Text.en: Hmm. Did I mention that god you saw?
Text.zh: 嗯，我跟你提过你之前见过的那位神吗？

Text.en: Please... what concerns you so deeply about this, Master Tujen?
Text.zh: 请告诉我……是什么让你如此忧心忡忡，图金大人？

Text.en: Why are you being so irate about this?
Text.zh: 你为什么对此大动肝火？

Text.en: Calm down, will ya?
Text.zh: 冷静点，行吗？

Text.en: Fear's no shame, lad. But you cannae will away a god by refusin' to name it.
Text.zh: 会害怕并不丢人，小子。但不听不看可没法让一个神明消失。

Text.en: It's unnatural! Like a bloody curse. You all just go about your days like nothing's wrong... <continue>Yet at any moment some almighty being could appear and cause mayhem! <continue>Like I said... it's best not to even think about these 'gods' of yours.
Text.zh: 这就不合天理了！像遭了诅咒一样。你们都像什么都没发生一样过日子……<continue>可随时都会有什么无比强大的存在突然出现，引发灾难！<continue>我说了……最好别去想你们那些“神”。

Text.en: We can't change the nature of things. Even that which disturbs us most.
Text.zh: 我们没法改变事物的天性，哪怕是那些让我们头疼的东西。

Text.en: I'm sorry it worries ya so. <continue>But we saw what we saw.
Text.zh: 很抱歉让你操心了。<continue>但看见了就是看见了。

Text.en: The Dreamer will reveal all. <continue>Learn to trust your senses, Kalguuran.
Text.zh: 幻梦者会揭示一切。<continue>学会相信你的感官，卡古兰人。

Text.en: It was... a... god.
Text.zh: 那是……一位……神祇？

Text.en: We have to stand against beings like that. We can't ignore them or they will rule us.
Text.zh: 我们必须直面那样的存在。如果放任不管，他们早晚会奴役我们。

Text.en: That won't stop the danger. <continue>They're very real.
Text.zh: 逃避无法化解危难。<continue>他们确实存在。

Text.en: Stop runnin' from the truth. <continue>Trust me, it'll get ya in the end.
Text.zh: 别再逃避现实了。<continue>相信我，这破事迟早会找上你的。

Text.en:
Best not to think? Aye... 'til the shadow's on your doorstep.   
<continue>Then it's too late.
Text.zh:
最好别想？是啊……直到阴影找上门来。
<continue>那时可就晚了。

Text.en: Yeah, yeah, yeah. In the twenty years we've been here, I've seen shite that'd knock your boots off. <continue>You know how I get through it? I <i>{drink,} not <i>{think}. <continue>You should try it sometime.
Text.zh: 是是是。在我们到这儿的二十年里，我见过的稀奇古怪的事多了去了。<continue>你知道我怎么熬过来的？我<i>{喝酒}，不<i>{动脑}。<continue>你也该试试。

Text.en: Who'd have thought? We're finally back at it. <continue>Guess we've got you to thank... or to blame.
Text.zh: 谁想得到？我们终于又回来了。<continue>看来我们该谢你……或者怪你。

Text.en: You're welcome.
Text.zh: 不客气。

Text.en: It had to be done.
Text.zh: 这是我的职责.

Text.en: My path is set before me by the Dreamer... but you're welcome.
Text.zh: 我的道路由幻梦者指引……不过不用谢。

Text.en: So sorry to inconvenience you by trying to save the world.
Text.zh: 真是抱歉，拯救世界给您添麻烦了。

Text.en: I am pleased for you, Master Tujen. Duty falls upon those with power.
Text.zh: 我为您高兴，图金大人。能力越大，责任也就越大。

Text.en: You are most welcome.
Text.zh: 不客气。

Text.en: Some things never change.
Text.zh: 有些事永远不会变。

Text.en: Blame or thanks, makes no odds. The work still needs doin'.
Text.zh: 怪我还是谢我，都无所谓。该做的事总得有人做。

Text.en: The others have got their particular interests. <continue>I'm mainly here in search of an ancient rowdy gang called the Black Scythes. <continue>Gotta scratch up their relics and try to piece together what happened to 'em.
Text.zh: 大家都有自己感兴趣的东西。<continue>我主要是在找一支名叫漆黑之镰的古代好斗帮派。<continue>我得把他们的遗物刨出来，看看能不能拼凑出他们的结局。

Text.en: They were a group of mercenaries that accompanied the first expedition. <continue>Their founder, a particularly heroic warrior by the name of Vorana, shared ties to my bloodline.
Text.zh: 他们是一支雇佣兵队伍，随同第一次远征而来。<continue>他们的创始人是个叫沃拉娜的英勇战士，和我有血缘关系。

Text.en: I'm listening.
Text.zh: 我在听。

Text.en: I see. A family matter.
Text.zh: 明白了，这是家事。

Text.en: Interesting.
Text.zh: 有意思。

Text.en: Oh really? There's more to the little one's story!
Text.zh: 真的吗？小家伙的故事又有了新剧情！

Text.en: Ah, so this is a matter of honour. Say no more. I understand.
Text.zh: 啊，所以这事关荣誉。不必多说了，我明白。

Text.en: A search with personal meaning.
Text.zh: 一次对你来说有特别意义的搜寻。

Text.en: Oh, a fellow mercenary, eh?
Text.zh: 哦，同行的佣兵，嗯？

Text.en: Blood runs deep. No wonder ye seek her still.
Text.zh: 血脉之情，深厚难断。难怪你如今还在找她。

Text.en: Used to think it might change something if I found out what happened to her. <continue>Now, I just want to finish this quest and be done with it. <continue>Been half my bloody life at this point.
Text.zh: 以前我以为知道她的结局能改变什么。<continue>现在，我只想完成这段旅程，早点了结。<continue>这事都已经占了我人生的一半了。

Text.en: She was a fearsome and irrepressible warrior. <continue>Even defied Cadi - <continue>Oh, uh, His lordship the Third, and somehow won his respect for it. <continue>I like those who make their own way.
Text.zh: 她是个可怕至极，势不可挡的战士。<continue>她甚至违抗了卡迪——<continue>哦，也就是三世陛下，竟然还因此赢得了他的尊重。<continue>我喜欢那些走自己道路的人。

Text.en: Everyone <i>{should} make their own way.
Text.zh: 每个人都<i>{应当}开辟自己的道路。

Text.en: What happened to her?
Text.zh: 她出什么事了？

Text.en: Impressive. What was her fate?
Text.zh: 令人钦佩。她的命运如何？

Text.en: I'd like to meet this 'Vorana.'
Text.zh: 我很想见见这位“沃拉娜”。

Text.en: She sounds like a kindred spirit. Most intriguing.
Text.zh: 听起来她与我志趣相投。真有意思。

Text.en: Walking alone isn't always <i>{our} choice...
Text.zh: 独自前行并非总是<i>{我们}自己的选择……

Text.en: Don't we all.
Text.zh: 我们都喜欢。

Text.en: What became o' her?
Text.zh: 她后来怎么样了？

Text.en: Her fate here on Wraeclast was unknown, but I have a feeling she's still kicking about. <continue>A burning spirit like that never goes down without a legendary fight.
Text.zh: 她在瓦尔克拉斯的命运无人知晓，但我隐隐感觉她还活着。<continue>除非经历过一场传奇般的战斗，那种炽热的灵魂不会轻易倒下。

Text.en: Oh good, you're alive! <continue>Well... that was quite the adventure, wasn't it?
Text.zh: 哦好，你还活着！<continue>嗯……那真是相当不错的历险，对吗？

Text.en: Have you learned the location of the Weapon?
Text.zh: 你知道武器的位置了吗？

Text.en: He has told me the Weapon is in pieces. <continue>One is around his neck. The others are scattered in a Karui archipelago.
Text.zh: 他告诉我武器已经碎成了好几片。<continue>一片挂在他脖子上，其他的散落在卡鲁群岛。

Text.en: Aye. He mentioned the Weapon's in pieces. <continue>One piece is on him. The others, scattered around a Karui archipelago.
Text.zh: 知道了，他告诉我武器碎了。<continue>一片在他身上，其他的散落在卡鲁群岛各处。

Text.en: He has revealed the truth. The Weapon is in pieces. <continue>He retains one of them. The others are somewhere to be found in a Karui archipelago.
Text.zh: 他说出了真相。武器化作了碎片。<continue>他保留着其中一块。其他部分在某个卡鲁群岛等待发现。

Text.en: I have. But it has been split into pieces. <continue>The Royal Thaumaturge has one and claims the others are scattered around a Karui archipelago.
Text.zh: 我知道了。但武器已经碎成了好几块。<continue>皇家奇术师持有一片，他说其他的散落在卡鲁群岛附近。

Text.en: Doryani has informed me the Weapon is in pieces. <continue>He safeguards one piece, but the others are scattered around a Karui archipelago.
Text.zh: 多里亚尼告诉我武器已经碎了。<continue>他保管着其中一片，但其他的散落在卡鲁群岛各处。

Text.en: Doryani claims it is in pieces. <continue>He holds one. But there are three others he says are scattered in a Karui archipelago.
Text.zh: 多里亚尼说武器已经碎了。<continue>他持有一片，其余三片散落在卡鲁群岛。

Text.en: Yep. The weapon ain't whole no more. <continue>Doryani's got a piece of it. The rest are scattered around some Karui archipelago.
Text.zh: 没错。武器已经不完整了。<continue>多里亚尼拿走了一块。剩下的散落在卡鲁群岛各处。

Text.en:
Aye. He says the Weapon's in pieces. 
<continue>Keeps one on his person. The rest lie scattered in a Karui archipelago.
Text.zh:
对。他说那件武器已经碎成了好几块。
<continue>他自己随身带着一块。剩下的散落在卡鲁群岛之中。

Text.en: Ngamakanui. <continue>Interesting... <continue>We must make haste.
Text.zh: 纳玛鲁伊。<continue>有趣……<continue>我们必须抓紧时间。

Text.en: Well then... how about I take you and your merry friends to Kingsmarch? <continue>The port town is within the area of Ngamakanui. <continue>From there you can charter a ship from my contact and begin your search. <continue>We've quite a haul of treasure we've <i>{borrowed} from Utzaal... It will more than cover the charter cost.
Text.zh: 那么……我带你和你的伙伴们去君锋镇如何？<continue>这个港口城镇位于纳玛鲁伊区域。<continue>在那里，你可以从我的联系人那里租船，然后开始搜索。<continue>我们从乌扎尔那里<i>{借}了不少宝物……足够支付租船费。

Text.en: Hmm. Kingsmarch would indeed be a wise location from which to base ourselves.
Text.zh: 嗯。君锋镇确实是建立据点的明智选择。

Text.en: Great! <continue>We can leave whenever you're ready, just let me know.
Text.zh: 太好了！<continue>我们随时可以出发，告诉我一声就行。

Text.en: It's a long journey... but relatively safe once we're clear of the jungle. <continue>The Kalguurans keep the road pretty secure. Shall we?
Text.zh: 路程很长……但离开丛林后就相对安全了。<continue>卡古兰人把道路守护得很好。要出发吗？

Text.en: Well, he wasn't the worst captor I've ever had... and I suppose, he did save us back there. <continue>At least it <i>{appears} he is on your side for now... <continue>But you shouldn't forget who he is and all he has done. <continue>There is something eerily cold and calculating about him.
Text.zh: 他不算我遇过的最坏的囚禁者……而且他确实在那里救了我们。<continue>至少<i>{看起来}他现在站在你这边……<continue>但你不应该忘记他的身份和他的所作所为。<continue>他身上有种令人不寒而栗的冷酷和算计。

Text.en: Just another person I won't trust or understand.
Text.zh: 又一个我既不信任也不理解的人。

Text.en: Seems there's no sacrifice too large if it meant saving his people. <continue>I can <i>{almost} understand that.
Text.zh: 似乎为了拯救他的族人，任何牺牲都不算太大。<continue>我<i>{几乎}能理解这一点。

Text.en: Through the looking glass of history, it is easy to judge someone's actions.
Text.zh: 通过历史的透镜，很容易评判他人的行为。

Text.en: Cold and calculating? Hmmmm...
Text.zh: 冷酷和算计？嗯嗯……

Text.en: Yes, I know what you mean... His reputation precedes him, but this skinny Vaal man does not frighten me.
Text.zh: 是的，我明白你的意思……他声名狼藉，但这个瘦弱的瓦尔人吓不到我。

Text.en: History says he was a monster... <continue>Or... <i>{is} a monster.
Text.zh: 历史说他是个恶魔……<continue>或者……<i>{就是}个恶魔。

Text.en: Yeah. A man of ambition. Killing his people while trying to save them. <continue>A complicated fella.
Text.zh: 对，一个野心勃勃的人。在试图拯救族人时害死了他们。<continue>复杂的家伙。

Text.en:
Cold, aye. But hungry. 
<continue>Hunger makes a man dangerous.
Text.zh:
冷酷，没错。但他欲念更深重。
<continue>欲念会让人变得危险。

Text.en: You needn't try to understand him... <continue>Not trusting him sounds fine though!
Text.zh: 你不必试图理解他……<continue>不信任他听起来很明智！

Text.en: Almost, yes. But certainly not the lengths to which he went.
Text.zh: 几乎能理解，好吧。但我绝不认同他的极端做法。

Text.en: That sounds quite wise. In any case...
Text.zh: 这听起来很睿智。总之……

Text.en: Ew!
Text.zh: 恶心！

Text.en: True enough.
Text.zh: 确实如此。

Text.en: Complicated indeed.
Text.zh: 确实很复杂。

Text.en: I believe he will aid you so long as your goals align with his. The moment they do not... <continue>I'm just saying, don't turn your back on him.
Text.zh: 只要你的目标与他一致，他就会帮助你。可一旦有了分歧……<continue>我的意思是，永远别背对着他。

Text.en: I briefly saw the sky... and the people... they were... well... <continue>Let's just say, I now understand why Vaal ruins look the way they do.
Text.zh: 我短暂地瞥见了那片天空……还有人民……他们都……唉。<continue>只能说，我现在理解瓦尔的废墟为什么都是那副模样了。

Text.en: It cannot be unseen. I pity you.
Text.zh: 那景象无法抹去。我为你感到难过。

Text.en: No one should see such a thing.
Text.zh: 没人应该目睹那样的事情。

Text.en: You may never forget what you saw.
Text.zh: 你可能永远无法忘记所见之物。

Text.en: I can't imagine what you saw. And I am sorry you had to see it.
Text.zh: 很难想象你看到了什么。很抱歉你必须看到那些景象。

Text.en: It must've been... horrible.
Text.zh: 一定很……恐怖。

Text.en: Kinda thing you won't ever forget.
Text.zh: 那种事你永远忘不掉。

Text.en: Such sights change a soul... like fire chars wood.
Text.zh: 那种场景会彻底改变一个人……就像被火焰留下焦痕。

Text.en: It was unreal. Unlike anything I could have imagined. <continue>But it all happened so fast... <continue>Perhaps <i>{that} was a blessing.
Text.zh: 那太超现实了。超出了我的想象。<continue>但一切发生得太快……<continue>也许<i>{那}反而是种恩赐。

Text.en: Well... I wasn't expecting to see you quite so soon. Least of all, back here.
Text.zh: 嗯……没想到这么快又见到你。尤其是，又回到这里。

Text.en: It is regrettable to be here... again.
Text.zh: 又是这里，真是遗憾……

Text.en: Aye. Can't really believe it, me.
Text.zh: 是啊。我真不敢相信。

Text.en: The path turns as it chooses.
Text.zh: 道路如其所选般转向。

Text.en: Trust me, I'm not thrilled to see you either.
Text.zh: 相信我，见到你我也不高兴。

Text.en: It is unfortunate that we meet this way. But I am glad you are safe, Miss Valai.
Text.zh: 很遗憾我们是在这种情况下见面。但我很高兴你平安无事，瓦赖小姐。

Text.en: Things... didn't quite go as planned.
Text.zh: 事情……没有完全按计划进行。

Text.en: Yeah. Pretty dire situation all round, really.
Text.zh: 是的。各方面都相当严峻。

Text.en: Aye... life's twists and turns are seldom kind.
Text.zh: 是啊……人生就是如此曲折，很少有顺利的时候。

Text.en: I've been quite busy studying that Blood Magic tome I found. <continue>If I'm honest, I'm quite amazed how much it seems to have sunk in already... <continue>In any case, welcome back!
Text.zh: 我一直在钻研找到的那本祭血术典籍。<continue>说实话，我很惊讶自己已经吸收了这么多……<continue>不管怎样，欢迎！

Text.en: If it helps, history does tell of a slow recovery after a Cataclysm. <continue>It will likely take some time to set things right.
Text.zh: 如果有帮助的话，历史确实记载了大灾变后的缓慢复苏。<continue>让事情恢复正常可能需要一些时间。

Text.en: Things will never be the same, Alva.
Text.zh: 永远不会回到从前了，阿尔瓦。

Text.en: <i>{Rathin} plagues the world now. <continue>Spirit protect me mountainborn.
Text.zh: <i>{腐化}正在这个世界上肆虐。<continue>愿万灵庇佑我这个山民。

Text.en: Things are in motion. We must move with them and... adjust.
Text.zh: 时局在变化。我们必须顺应并且……适应。

Text.en: Set things right? The world is doomed, foolish girl.
Text.zh: 恢复正常？世界已经完了，愚蠢的姑娘。

Text.en: This is the worst possible outcome... but I remain resolute. We mustn't give up.
Text.zh: 这是最坏的结果……但我坚定如初，我们绝不能放弃。

Text.en: Will we even see the world cured?
Text.zh: 我们还能看到世界痊愈吗？

Text.en: I dunno if we can set this right, love.
Text.zh: 我不知道我们能否扭转局面，亲爱的。

Text.en: The land'll bear the scars, Alva. Same as any livin' thing.
Text.zh: 这片大地会留下伤疤，阿尔瓦。所有活物都会。

Text.en: Every bit of Corruption you cleanse helps rebuild the Wraeclast we knew. <continue>We've at least got to try.
Text.zh: 你净化的每一点腐蚀都有助于重建我们熟知的瓦尔克拉斯。<continue>我们至少得试试。

Text.en: I've heard about that massive pillar of flame you've spotted. <continue>Try to get to it as quickly as you can.  <continue>I imagine anyone else that's seen it will be trying to get there before you.
Text.zh: 我听说你发现了巨型的火柱。<continue>尽快赶往那里吧。<continue>我相信其他看到火柱的人，肯定都想着捷足先登……

Text.en: What is it?
Text.zh: 什么意思？

Text.en: Any idea what it is?
Text.zh: 那是什么？

Text.en: Hmm... we shall see what it bodes.
Text.zh: 嗯……它的意义，我们就走着瞧吧。

Text.en: What even is it?
Text.zh: 那到底是什么？

Text.en: I will get there as soon as I can. But what do you think it means?
Text.zh: 我会尽快赶去那里。你觉得那意味着什么？

Text.en: What do you make of it?
Text.zh: 你怎么看？

Text.en: Got any ideas on it?
Text.zh: 对它有什么想法？

Text.en: Flame that high's no natural fire. What do ye reckon it is?
Text.zh: 这火柱不对劲，居然那么高。你觉得那是什么？

Text.en: I've not got a clue. But...  I'll do some research and get back to you.
Text.zh: 我完全摸不着头脑。但是……我会做些研究再告诉你。

Text.en: At first it seemed there was nothing in the historical record about that strange pillar of flame you found... <continue>But then it occurred to me... a great deal has been written about times of ash. <continue>Fires that scorched the land, clouds that blotted out the sun, the Winter of the World...
Text.zh: 起初历史文献完全没有提到你所发现的奇特火柱……<continue>然后我就灵光一闪……灰烬时代其实留下了不少记录。一<continue>片烈火席卷大地，乌云遮蔽了太阳，世界之冬降临了……

Text.en: But why is it here now?
Text.zh: 但它为什么在现在出现？

Text.en: But what's it mean?
Text.zh: 但这意味着什么？

Text.en: It is still a curious time to see it.
Text.zh: 在这种时候看到它仍然很奇特。

Text.en: Makes you wonder, why has it showed up now... how ominous.
Text.zh: 让人不禁思考，为什么它现在现身了……多么不祥。

Text.en: The timing of this seems mysterious. The question we must ask is, why do we see this now?
Text.zh: 它现身的时机神秘莫测。我们必须搞清楚，它为什么会在此刻现身。

Text.en: But where has it come from?
Text.zh: 但它从何而来？

Text.en: Yeah... but why's it showin' up now?
Text.zh: 对……但它为什么现在冒出来？

Text.en: That was long ago... Why now?
Text.zh: 那都是很久以前的事了……为什么现在冒出来？

Text.en: If that place is somehow connected to those times of ash, then perhaps we have quite the problem on our hands. <continue>As if we didn't have enough already! <continue>I fear... it may have ended entire civilisations. <continue>It may have ended the world as we know it. <continue>You really must get in there first. Everything could depend upon it.
Text.zh: 如果那个地方以某种方式与灰烬时代相关，那我们可能面临着大麻烦了。<continue>好像我们的麻烦还不够多！<continue>我担心……它可能终结了整个文明。<continue>它可能终结了我们所知的世界。<continue>你真的必须率先进入那里。一切都可能取决于此。

Text.en: Ever since you encountered that strange mirror, this place is darker now, in a way I can't describe... <continue>Somebody's here. Someone that isn't us.
Text.zh: 你遇到那种奇怪的镜子之后，这个地方就变得越发阴暗了，我甚至很难用语言去形容……<continue>除了你我之外，这里还存在着某个实体。

Text.en: I don't hear anything.
Text.zh: 我什么都没听到。

Text.en: I <i>{do} sense something...
Text.zh: 我<i>{确实}感觉到了什么……

Text.en: There is a trace of shadow upon you.
Text.zh: 你身上有阴影的印记。

Text.en: So it's not just me, then.
Text.zh: 所以不只是我有这种感觉。

Text.en: You mean... a presence? A spirit? Speak plainly.
Text.zh: 你说什么……某个实体？灵魂？你简单说说。

Text.en: You feel that too?
Text.zh: 你也感觉到了？

Text.en: You're really creeping me out, miss.
Text.zh: 你真的让我毛骨悚然，小姐。

Text.en: I keep thinking I hear laughter, mocking us... but I look around, and I don't see anything. <continue>You just... you keep your guard up, alright?
Text.zh: 我好像听见了笑声，它在嘲笑我们……可我环顾四周，却什么也没看见。<continue>你……一定不要放松戒备，好吗？

Text.en: This unnatural splinter I found - it's got markings. Any ideas?
Text.zh: 我发现的这块诡异碎片，上面有标记，你认识吗？

Text.en: Had quite the vision, but it weren't from the Spirit. Summat to do with this Splinter?
Text.zh: 我见过相当怪异的幻想，并非来自万灵。一定与这碎片有关。

Text.en: Does your expertise tell you anything about this strange grey splinter?
Text.zh: 你的专业眼光能看出这块奇异灰色碎片的什么门道吗？

Text.en: Tell me, darling, what you make of this bewitching splinter.
Text.zh: 告诉我，亲爱的，你要拿这块迷人的碎片怎么办？

Text.en: The Azmeri deceiver... one of his assaults left something behind. What do you make of it?
Text.zh: 阿兹莫里欺诈者……他在袭击后留下了些东西。你觉得这是什么？

Text.en: The Black Crow tried to deceive me. My attack chipped off this strange splinter from his... manifestations.
Text.zh: 黑鸦想要欺骗我。但我从他的……化身上，砍下了这块奇怪的碎片。

Text.en: Got a real doozy of a remnant here. Can you take a look?
Text.zh: 拿到了一块非常古怪的残片。你能帮忙看看吗？

Text.en: Let me see... this marking... we've come across it in our excavations. <continue>In context, it was treated as something quite negative, something Karui myths referred to as 'sealed away,' or 'imprisoned.' <continue>If this is related to that entity you released near Journey's End... whatever it is, it's now fixated on you. <continue>You should try to gather more of these splinters. With enough of them, perhaps we can decipher the story of these markings. <continue>As a treasure hunter, I know: the past holds all the answers, if you're willing to look hard enough.
Text.zh: 让我看看……这个印记……在发掘工作中遇到过。<continue>根据语境来看，它传达着负面的意思，卡鲁神话似乎认为这表示“封印”或“囚禁”。<continue>如果这与你在落锚湾附近释放的那个东西有关联……不管那是什么，它现在已经盯上你了。<continue>你应该多收集一些这样的裂片。有了足够的裂片，我们或许就能破解印记之中的秘密了。<continue>作为寻宝者，我再清楚不过了：只要你愿意努力寻找，所有的答案都隐藏在历史长河里。

Text.en: I've found a little jar of... something. Any idea what it does?
Text.zh: 我找到了一小瓶……不知道什么东西。知道这东西的用途吗？

Text.en: Found a right strange little jar. You know it?
Text.zh: 找到了一个相当邪门的小瓶子。你认识这玩意儿吗？

Text.en: How is this possible? It's a jar of... undisciplined, but concentrated emotions.
Text.zh: 这如何可能？一小瓶……原始萃炼的情感精华。

Text.en: Distilling emotions is rather insane, even for me. Do you know anything about this?
Text.zh: 就算对我来说，萃取情感都相当疯狂。你了解这东西吗？

Text.en: The Maraketh evoke emotions with tales, but someone tried to do it much more... directly. What sorcery is this?
Text.zh: 马拉克斯人善于用故事挑起情感，但某人的做法更加……直接。这是什么巫术？

Text.en: This jar of liquid disturbs me.
Text.zh: 这灌液体让我烦躁不安。

Text.en: This jar. Makes me... feel things. I don't like feeling things.
Text.zh: 这个罐子。让我……有感觉。我不喜欢有感觉。

Text.en: Hmm... we once excavated a ruin where the engraved pictures told a peculiar story. <continue>It appeared as if they were teaching their children new knowledge by imbuing emotions in a piece of jewelry. <continue>It was a very old ruin, but... maybe the distilled energy you found is a remnant of that lost culture. <continue>If you find a few more, you might be able to instill knowledge in something yourself...
Text.zh: 唔……我们以前挖掘过一处古老的遗迹，那里铭刻的图案讲述了一个奇怪的故事。<continue>他们似乎会把情感灌输到一件饰品里，从而将新的知识传授给孩子们。<continue>那处遗迹年代久远，不过……或许你找到的净化能量就是那个失落文明的遗留之物了。<continue>如果你能再找到一些，或许就能将知识注入你自己的饰品里……

Text.en: Now we know where we might find our unwelcome guest. Let's hit the trickster where he lives, in his so-called 'Simulacrum.' <continue>It might still be a trap, but... it's the only way. He will never leave us alone until we face him.
Text.zh: 我们知道该去哪里找这个不速之客了。我们要闯进那个欺诈者的老家，也就是他所谓的“拟像”。<continue>这或许是个圈套，但……没有别的办法了。除非我们与他正面对峙，否则他不会放过我们的。

Text.en: How was the 'Simulacrum?'
Text.zh: 那个“拟像”怎么样？

Text.en: He caught me off guard. Plagued me with visions of Areagne and Ervig, dead.
Text.zh: 他偷袭了我。用阿莉格涅和厄维格死去的幻象折磨我。

Text.en: He's a bloody bastard. Made me see the faces of my kin, those I lost.
Text.zh: 他是个该死的混账。让我看见了我族人的面容，那些我痛失的人。

Text.en: I had the mental discipline to stave off his visions, but I wasn't able to best him... physically.
Text.zh: 我的意志坚强，足以抗拒他的幻象，但在……肉体上，我很难战胜他。

Text.en: The visions... were too distracting. I'm going to... clear my head...
Text.zh: 那些幻象……太分散注意力了。我得去……理理思绪……

Text.en: He tormented me with visions of what I left behind. I wasn't able to destroy him... yet.
Text.zh: 他曾用我抛弃的一切的幻象来折磨我。我还无法摧毁他……暂时还不行。

Text.en: It was like stepping into a nightmare. I saw Ogham, in flames...
Text.zh: 就像踏入了噩梦一般。我看到欧甘被火焰吞噬……

Text.en: He won't face me like a man. Just kept flitting around. So, I got bored and left.
Text.zh: 他不敢像个真正的勇士那样面对我。只会四处闪躲。所以我觉得无聊就走了。

Text.en: Oh. That sounds bloody awful! I suppose he was simply toying with you. A shame you didn't beat him at his own game.
Text.zh: 喔，听起来太可怕了！我猜他只是在和你闹着玩的，可惜你没能在他自己的游戏里战胜他。

Text.en: You beat that shadowy entity at his own game! Maybe now he'll stop frequenting our minds and tormenting us with all those whispers and shadows... <continue>That <i>{was} him, right...?
Text.zh: 你让那个阴暗的家伙自讨苦吃了！希望他以后不会钻进我们的头脑，用低语和阴影来折磨我们了<continue>……等等，那<i>{确实是}他干的，对吧……？

Text.en: Sometimes prey plays dead. Time will tell.
Text.zh: 有时猎物会装死。时间会告诉我们真相。

Text.en: I sure hope it were that simple.
Text.zh: 我真希望事情能这么简单。

Text.en: Yes. I defeated him soundly.
Text.zh: 没错。我将他彻底击败了。

Text.en: Oh, this is far from over, dear. But don't worry. He's been put back under his stump.
Text.zh: 哦，这还远远没有结束，亲爱的。不过别担心，那家伙已经被我们塞回他的树洞底下去了。

Text.en: This tale is still being told. We shall have to see.
Text.zh: 这个故事还在上演，我们拭目以待吧。

Text.en: It was a victory, but... I can't be sure.
Text.zh: 确实是一场胜利，可是……我无法确定是谁。

Text.en: Yeah! Yeah it was him. I'm pretty sure it was.
Text.zh: 对！对，就是他。我敢肯定就是他。

Text.en: What about those old ruins? The ones with the 'distilled emotions.'
Text.zh: 那些古老遗迹怎么样？就是那些有“萃取情感”记录的。

Text.en: They weren't like anything I've seen. Not Vaal, not Primeval, not 'Precursor.' <continue>They could've been Caaltu, honestly, but I don't know enough to be sure. <continue>Do you think your 'Strange Voice' might be from that long lost people? <continue>He'd have to be very old... if you ever get the chance to ask him in person, I'd be curious to see what he says.
Text.zh: 它们跟我见过的任何东西都不一样。不属于瓦尔人、史前种族和“先驱”。<continue>说实话，可能是卡尔图的，但我了解得不够多，不敢确定。<continue>你觉得“奇怪的声音”会来自那个早已失落的文明吗？<continue>他肯定历史悠久……如果你有机会向他本人提问的话，我倒要听听他会说些什么。

Text.en: As I've studied these grey splinters you found, I've come to believe that they have a kind of knowledge imbued in them. <continue>It's fragmented, of course. Not enough to glean a conscious thought. But I keep having dreams... nothing coherent yet... but I'll let you know...
Text.zh: 我研究了你找回的灰色裂片，它们肯定是被注入了某种知识。<continue>不过它们毕竟都是裂片，不足以产生清晰的思想。可我还一直梦见……断断续续的景象……我以后会告诉你……

Text.en: I had a more coherent dream after working with a larger number of splinters... <continue>I saw a feast. A peaceful, tranquil place. I felt... smiles. I felt calm.
Text.zh: 研究了更多裂片之后，我的梦境也变得连贯了……<continue>我看到了一场盛宴，一个宁静祥和的地方。我感觉到了……微笑，还有平静。

Text.en: Was that in a forest? Or a village?
Text.zh: 那是在森林里？还是村庄？

Text.en: Sounds like home.
Text.zh: 就像我的家乡一样。

Text.en: A good feeling, in a dark time. Where was this place?
Text.zh: 在黑暗时代中的美好感受。那会是什么地方？

Text.en: That can't be anywhere on Wraeclast.
Text.zh: 那绝对不是瓦尔克拉斯的任何角落。

Text.en: Sounds like home. Was it the Vastiri?
Text.zh: 听起来就像我的家乡。是在瓦斯提里吗？

Text.en: A memory of peace. Do you know where it was?
Text.zh: 祥和的回忆。你知道在哪里吗？

Text.en: So it was a dream, then. Can't imagine where that would be.
Text.zh: 所以那是个梦境，对吧。想象不出那会是什么地方。

Text.en: I didn't get the impression that this was part of a vast empire, or a grand civilisation, or anything like that. <continue>Just a rare haven from the world's ills. <continue>I really wish I could have written it down... but it's gone. I can't hold on to the sensations...
Text.zh: 我感觉那并不属于什么帝国或宏大的文明。<continue>只是一个避风的港湾，躲避着这个世界的病痛。<continue>我真希望能把这些都记下来啊……可它却消失了，这种感觉稍纵即逝……

Text.en: I had another dream... well, more like a nightmare. <continue>I was running through a glade, chasing a rabbit, but no matter what, I couldn't catch it. <continue>It fled into a stump, and disappeared into darkness... while I was peering down, something loomed above me. <continue>A horned creature. Emaciated. I could see its shadow fall over me but... it seemed impossible. <continue>It was like the shadow came from... below. <continue>When I finally met its gaze, I expected horror, but instead, I was blinded by a void. <continue>My eyes were open, yet I saw only... eternity. <continue>A creature reached out its claw and cut deeply into my forehead. Countless screaming voices poured into my mind. <continue>Then... I woke. Disturbed, but... still myself. <continue>What do you think it means?
Text.zh: 我又做了一个梦……更像是噩梦。<continue>我在林间空地里奔跑，追赶一只兔子，但怎么也抓不到它。<continue>它钻进了一个树桩，消失在黑暗中……当我向下窥探时，有什么东西显现出来。<continue>长着角的东西。枯瘦如柴。我能看到它的影子投在我身上，但……感觉不可能。<continue>就像影子是从……下面投来的。<continue>当我与它对视，准备面对恐怖时，我被虚无致盲。我睁着眼睛，却只看到……永恒的空无。<continue>那生物伸出爪子，在我额头上狠狠划了一道。无数尖叫声涌进我脑子里。<continue>然后……我醒了。很不安，但……还是我自己。<continue>你……你觉得这意味着什么？

Text.en: We can't be sure what it means yet. Try to get some sleep.
Text.zh: 我们还无法确定这意味着什么。先去休息一下吧。

Text.en: The elders told me of a darkness that skulks deep in the world. <continue>Could it be the very same?
Text.zh: 长者告诉我，世界深处潜伏着黑暗力量。<continue>那会是同一种东西吗?

Text.en: It's an ominous sign of evil.
Text.zh: 此乃邪祟降临之恶兆。

Text.en: I don't know what it means, but I'm excited.
Text.zh: 我不知道这意味着什么，但我很兴奋。

Text.en: I believe this is someone else's tale, conveyed to you by <i>{their} memory. <continue>Try to remember every detail. It could be important.
Text.zh: 我觉得这大概是某人的经历，通过<i>{他们的}记忆传递给了你。<continue>尝试记住每一个细节，可能会很重要。

Text.en: I think you need some rest. Whatever that nightmare means, I'll handle it.
Text.zh: 我觉得你需要好好休息。不管那噩梦意味着什么，我们会处理的。

Text.en: I think it means... you took a sip of the wrong drink, love.
Text.zh: 我觉得这意味着……你喝错药了，亲爱的。

Text.en: I believe I had the final dream. <continue>I think I felt... divinity, as crazy as that sounds.
Text.zh: 我似乎梦见了最后的景象。<continue>我觉得我感受到了……神性，虽然这听起来很疯狂。

Text.en: Divinity? What was it like?
Text.zh: 神性？那是什么感觉？

Text.en: I'm listenin'.
Text.zh: 我在认真听着。

Text.en: Perhaps the memory of a god. Go on.
Text.zh: 也许是某位神祇的记忆。继续说。

Text.en: Tell me <i>{everything.}
Text.zh: 把<i>{一切}都告诉我。

Text.en: Perhaps not as crazy as you think. Now... finish the tale.
Text.zh: 可能并不像你想的那么疯狂。好了，说完这个故事吧。

Text.en: Tell me more.
Text.zh: 继续说下去。

Text.en: I've heard crazier. Go on then.
Text.zh: 我听过更疯狂的事。那就继续吧。

Text.en: In the dream, I was hollow. Completely empty. I was a liar. A torturer. A deceiver. <continue>I'd perfected the art of contorting reality to my will, purely to bring untold misery upon the world. <continue>Perhaps strangest of all, I had a... portal of sorts... in my forehead. <continue>A gateway from my mind to the world. Where all the horrors I imagined could be made real... <continue>I think I'm done with those splinters. I don't want to know anymore.
Text.zh: 在梦中，我仿佛被挖空了一般，彻头彻尾的空洞。我是个骗子，拷问者，欺诈者。<continue>我精通扭曲现实的手段，就为了给世界带来无尽痛苦。<continue>最奇怪的是，我额头上有个……传送门之类的东西。<continue>从我意识通往现实世界的门户。我想象的所有恐怖都能成为现实……<continue>我觉得我受够这些碎片了。我不想再了解更多。

Text.en: It must be <i>{his} memories. The Black Crow.
Text.zh: 这肯定是<i>{他的}记忆，黑鸦的记忆。

Text.en: I know it, now. It's <i>{his} memories. How he came to be... the Raven.
Text.zh: 我明白了。这是<i>{他的}记忆，升格为黑鸦的记忆。

Text.en: The memories of a dark god. The one tormenting us.
Text.zh: 黑暗之神的记忆。那个一直折磨我们的存在。

Text.en: Ah, it's the trickster's memories!
Text.zh: 啊，这是那个欺诈者的记忆。

Text.en: I see. It is the tale of the trickster. The Raven himself.
Text.zh: 我明白了，这是欺诈者的故事，黑鸦的故事。

Text.en: It's him. <i>{His} memories. The strange voice is... the Black Crow.
Text.zh: 就是他，这是<i>{他的}记忆。那个神秘声音就是……黑鸦。

Text.en: That must be the strange voice. His memories.
Text.zh: 那肯定就是神秘声音。他的记忆。

Text.en: The completed object... when the splinters are reassembled... it's a fruit. <continue>A stone carving of a fruit we used to gather from the shore. <continue>Sweet and juicy, like summer, now lost forever... <continue>Sorry, what <i>{they} used to gather...
Text.zh: 完整的物品……当碎片重新拼合时……是一枚果实。<continue>一个我们曾经从海岸采集的果实的石雕。<continue>甜美多汁，如夏日般美好，如今永远失去了……<continue>抱歉，是<i>{他们}曾经采集的……

Text.en: Friend, I have urgent news for you. <continue>Time is short and the unmaking of the world is nigh! <continue>Please, listen to what I have to say.
Text.zh: 朋友，我有紧急情况要告诉你。<continue>时间不多了，世界正处在崩溃的边缘！<continue>请听听我要说的话吧。

Text.en: Get on with it.
Text.zh: 快说吧。

Text.en: Oh, no. What are you selling?
Text.zh: 哦不。你又要推销什么？

Text.en: Please. Go on.
Text.zh: 请说。

Text.en: I'm listening.
Text.zh: 我在听。

Text.en: Go on, then.
Text.zh: 那就说吧。

Text.en: You have my attention.
Text.zh: 你成功引起了我的注意。

Text.en: Alright. Let's have it then.
Text.zh: 好吧。那就说出来吧。

Text.en: Go on, then. Time's wastin'.
Text.zh: 那快说吧。别磨蹭了。

Text.en: I am pleased to meet you. I am Lorandis. A missionary of the Twilight Order. But I am here to warn you... <continue>The end of days approaches. Something evil has awoken on Wraeclast. <continue>You have faced it, have you not? I can see it in your eyes. You have faced the wickedness in the hearts of men!
Text.zh: 很荣幸见到你。我是洛兰迪斯。暮光会的传道士。但我来这里是要警告你……<continue>世界末日即将降临，邪恶在瓦尔克拉斯大陆觉醒了。<continue>你已经与它对峙过了吧？我能从你的眼睛里看出来，你曾面对人类内心的邪恶。

Text.en: Wickedness is all around us. It cannot be avoided.
Text.zh: 邪恶无处不在。这是无法避免的。

Text.en: Haven't we all? What of it?
Text.zh: 谁没遇到过呢？那又如何？

Text.en: Wickedness lies where we least expect. Yes. I know this.
Text.zh: 邪恶总是出现在我们最意想不到的地方。是的。我深知这一点。

Text.en: Yes. Yes I have.
Text.zh: 是的。确实如此。

Text.en: Aye. True enough.
Text.zh: 没错。说得对。

Text.en: The hearts of men have always languished for more. What of it?
Text.zh: 人心总是贪得无厌。那又怎样？

Text.en: Sure. I've seen my fair share of wickedness.
Text.zh: 当然。我见过不少邪恶的事。

Text.en: Wickedness? Oh, aye. As it happens, I've a wicked desire to be anywhere else right now.
Text.zh: 邪恶？哦对，巧了，我现在就有个邪念，就是立刻逃离这里。

Text.en: You jest - but this is no laughing matter.
Text.zh: 你真会开玩笑——但这可不是闹着玩的事！

Text.en: They seek to conquer us, to rule us. We must act! We must fight back!
Text.zh: 他们想要征服我们，统治我们。我们必须行动起来！我们必须反击！

Text.en: Not interested.
Text.zh: 我没兴趣。

Text.en: Sorry, places to go, people to maim...
Text.zh: 抱歉，还有地方要去，还有人要收拾……

Text.en: I've no time for this.
Text.zh: 我没时间搞这些。

Text.en: No.
Text.zh: 不。

Text.en: Sorry, not today.
Text.zh: 抱歉，今天不行。

Text.en: No, thank you.
Text.zh: 不，谢谢。

Text.en: Heard enough of that.
Text.zh: 这种话听够了。

Text.en: Time's short, is it? Then I'll not waste it listenin' to you.
Text.zh: 时间紧迫是吧？那我可没闲工夫听你叨叨。

Text.en: Oh... alright then. Perhaps next time.
Text.zh: 哦……好吧。也许下次有机会。

Text.en: Do you hear that, Kalguurans? Here is one who will join us in the fight! We will save this world together!
Text.zh: 你们听到了吗，卡古兰人？这个人愿意加入我们的战斗！我们将拯救这个世界。

Text.en: Will you stop that? I've not yet joined any fight of yours.
Text.zh: 你能别这样吗？我还没有同意参加你们的战斗。

Text.en: Great. Now he's yelling nonsense at the Kalguurans.
Text.zh: 太棒了。现在他开始对卡古兰人胡言乱语了。

Text.en: Please, leave <i>{them} and <i>{me} out of this. You're making fools of us both.
Text.zh: 拜托，别把<i>{他们}和<i>{我}扯进来。你这样只会让你我都难堪。

Text.en: Excuse me. Do not assume I am onboard.
Text.zh: 抱歉。别擅自认为我会支持你。

Text.en: Wait, wait! First of all, how are we saving the world?
Text.zh: 等等，等等！首先，我们要怎么拯救世界？

Text.en: Keep your voice down. It's unbecoming.
Text.zh: 小声点。这样很不合适。

Text.en: Sheesh. Keep it subtle, eh?
Text.zh: 天哪。低调一点，行吗。

Text.en: I made no such pledge. Ye twist my words quicker than a snake.
Text.zh: 我可没做过这种保证。你那张巧嘴还真是会胡编乱造。

Text.en: Utopia is a dream, but Wraeclast is a nightmare. Let us choose which we live in, yes?
Text.zh: 乌托邦虽然只是个梦想，但瓦尔克拉斯已然是一场噩梦。让我们自己选择要做什么样的梦吧，好吗？

Text.en: Utopia is not possible while wickedness in the hearts of men can be rewarded so extravagantly. <continue>Our Saviour will bring about that utopia, and in it, you shall be free. We all shall be free! <continue>There will be none to rule you, none to tell you how to live.
Text.zh: 如果人类内心的邪恶能换来如此丰厚回报，那乌托邦将永远无法成真。<continue>我们的救赎者会建立乌托邦，你们将在那里获得自由。我们所有人都将获得自由！<continue>不会有人来统治你们，不会有人来执掌你们的人生。

Text.en: It is already the case. I am my own man.
Text.zh: 我本来就是自由之身，向来如此。

Text.en: Do you see anyone pulling my strings?
Text.zh: 你见过有人执掌过我吗？

Text.en: I am a free woman. Banished... but free.
Text.zh: 我是自由的女人。虽被流放……但仍然自由。

Text.en: No one owns <i>{me} - missionary.
Text.zh: <i>{我}没有什么主人，传教士。

Text.en: Only the Spirit may lay claim upon me. I welcome it.
Text.zh: 只有万灵能够主宰我。我心甘情愿接受。

Text.en: The Dreamer does not enforce. Simply guides.
Text.zh: 幻梦者不会强制任何人。只是给予指引。

Text.en: Ain't no one telling me how to do nothing.
Text.zh: 没人能对我指手画脚。

Text.en: Only one soul who could ever tell me how to live... and she's long gone.
Text.zh: 这世上只有一人有资格指点我该怎么活…可她早已不在了。

Text.en: My condolences. But...
Text.zh: 节哀顺变。不过…

Text.en: Please understand... It will be a glorious thing to behold. <continue>The struggle for freedom from tyranny will finally be over!
Text.zh: 请理解……那将是何等壮丽的景象。<continue>从暴政中争取自由的斗争将彻底结束！

Text.en: Our Saviour is a mere mortal, like you or I... only, better. <continue>The Saviour is being raised free from the corruption of wickedness. <continue>This... this is the key to our success. <continue>If you wish to know more, you should visit our enclave on Arastas. It is not too far from here!
Text.zh: 我们的救世主也是凡人，和你我一样……只是更加完美。<continue>救世主正在远离邪恶腐蚀的环境中成长。<continue>这……这就是我们成功的关键所在。<continue>如果你想了解更多，应该去我们在阿拉斯塔的聚居地看看。离这里不太远！

Text.en: As we speak, the Karui flock to our island. Eager to join the cause and save Wraeclast!
Text.zh: 就在我们说话的这一刻，卡鲁人正蜂拥前往我们的岛屿。他们渴望加入这个事业，拯救瓦尔克拉斯！

Text.en: That alone must cause Tavakai great concern.
Text.zh: 光是这一点就足以让塔瓦凯忧心忡忡了。

Text.en: The Chieftain must be <i>{really} pleased about that.
Text.zh: 酋长肯定<i>{非常}高兴吧？

Text.en: That is particularly distressing for the Chieftain.
Text.zh: 这对酋长来说特别苦恼。

Text.en: You've caused great upset in these parts.
Text.zh: 你在这一带引起了巨大的骚动。

Text.en: You're causing harm... luring young Karui there.
Text.zh: 你在制造伤害……引诱年轻的卡鲁人去那里。

Text.en: You are part of the cause of Tavakai's ill temper.
Text.zh: 你就是导致塔瓦凯脾气暴躁的原因之一。

Text.en: Tavakai would have a word with you, I'd say...
Text.zh: 我敢说塔瓦凯很想和你聊聊……

Text.en: Aye - and Tavakai's well pleased about that.
Text.zh: 是啊……塔瓦凯可是满意的不得了。

Text.en: I'll see if I can find time.
Text.zh: 我看看能不能抽出时间。

Text.en: Sounds like torture. We shall see.
Text.zh: 听起来像是折磨。我们走着瞧吧。

Text.en: I will consider it.
Text.zh: 我会考虑的。

Text.en: I'll think about it.
Text.zh: 我会想想看。

Text.en: Perhaps I will.
Text.zh: 也许我会去。

Text.en: I go where I am guided.
Text.zh: 我去命运指引我的地方。

Text.en: I might have a look. Dunno.
Text.zh: 我可能会去看看。说不准。

Text.en: Perhaps. But I've no taste for sermons.
Text.zh: 也许吧。但我实在没兴趣听人说教。

Text.en: It will all be clear to the Chieftain in time. <continue>So... will you pledge yourself to the Twilight Order?
Text.zh: 酋长迟早会想通这一切的。<continue>那么……你愿意向暮光会宣誓效忠吗？

Text.en: You will not regret your visit. There, you'll have the chance to pledge to the Twilight Order.
Text.zh: 你不会为这次造访后悔的。在那里，你将有机会向暮光会宣誓。

Text.en: We are an order of true believers dedicated to the salvation of humanity! <continue>To that end, we have given everything, and will continue to give of ourselves until Wraeclast is saved.
Text.zh: 暮光会由真正的信徒组成，致力于拯救人类！<continue>为此，我们已经献出了一切，我们会继续无私奉献，直到瓦尔克拉斯获得救赎。

Text.en: You make a good sales pitch. But what is the catch?
Text.zh: 你这套说辞倒是不错。但要付出什么代价？

Text.en: Sounds too good to be true. Probably is.
Text.zh: 听上去好得不像是真的。恐怕确实不是真的。

Text.en: Your cause sounds admirable. But just as the sands, nothing is perfect.
Text.zh: 你们的事业听上去很崇高，但就和沙子抓不住一样，世上没有完美的东西。

Text.en: I don't really know what to make of any of it. It sounds unrealistic.
Text.zh: 我真搞不懂这些到底是怎么回事。听起来不太靠谱。

Text.en: If you lot are trying hard to do the right thing... I can't condemn ya.
Text.zh: 如果你们真心想做正确的事……我不能说什么。

Text.en: If humanity can even be saved, is it really in your power to do so?
Text.zh: 就算人类真能获得拯救，这真是你们能办到的吗？

Text.en: Sounds good on the tin. But I'm curious what's behind it all.
Text.zh: 说得天花乱坠。但我好奇背后到底藏着什么猫腻。

Text.en: So ye say. But talk is cheap, lad.
Text.zh: 你尽管说。但光耍嘴皮子可没用，小子。

Text.en: Friend, we are on the same side! Surely, you will pledge yourself to aid in the cause!
Text.zh: 朋友，我们是站在同一条战线上的！毋庸置疑，你会宣誓投身我们的大业！

Text.en: Ah. So you've met Servitor Marius. A diligent Shepherd of Tomorrow.
Text.zh: 啊。看来你见过仆从马里乌斯了。一位尽职的明日牧者。

Text.en: He was not very forthcoming about what you believe in.
Text.zh: 他对你们的信仰三缄其口。

Text.en: He wanted a lot, but gave nothing.
Text.zh: 他要求很多，却什么都不肯给。

Text.en: I didn't get much information from him. Quite strange.
Text.zh: 我从他那里套不出什么有用的消息，很奇怪。

Text.en: He told me nothing really.
Text.zh: 他什么关键信息都没透露。

Text.en: Why was he afraid to tell me anything?
Text.zh: 他为什么不敢跟我说任何实话？

Text.en: Marius did not wish to part with any important details of your Order.
Text.zh: 马里乌斯不肯泄露你们教会的任何核心机密。

Text.en: Seemed a bit dodgy. Sounded like he wasn't sure what to share and what not to.
Text.zh: 看上去鬼鬼祟祟的。感觉他搞不清该说什么不该说什么。

Text.en: Strange... For a preacher man, he said precious little.
Text.zh: 怪了…身为传教之人，他却惜字如金。
