Text.en: They'd be quite hard to access. But don't worry - I can help you look!
Text.zh: 那些区域确实难以进入。不过别担心——我可以帮你找！

Text.en: What? That rundown old pile?
Text.zh: 什么？就那堆破烂的旧石头？

Text.en: <i>{That} temple? Are you certain?
Text.zh: <i>{那座}神庙？你确定？

Text.en: You're shittin' me....
Text.zh: 你逗我玩呢？

Text.en: You had no idea, did you? This is incredible! I can't wait to get in and... <i>{explore!}
Text.zh: 你完全不知道，是吧？这太不可思议了！我已经等不及要进去……<i>{探索一番了！}

Text.en: How far the mighty have fallen.
Text.zh: 昔日荣光竟沦落至此。

Text.en: Indeed. Let's hope that fall rattled out all their gold!
Text.zh: 确实。但愿那些滚落的砖石里能晃出黄金来！

Text.en: It's no wonder I can feel such darkness here.
Text.zh: 难怪我能感受到如此浓郁的黑暗气息。

Text.en: This place is still poisoned by Corruption.
Text.zh: 这片土地依然被腐化侵蚀着。

Text.en: So that's why the <i>{rathin} is so strong here.
Text.zh: 所以这里的<i>{腐化}才会如此剧烈。

Text.en: This was where the end began, so to speak.
Text.zh: 可以说，这里正是终结的开端。

Text.en: This collection belongs to Juatalotli. Now that's a name you don't hear every day!
Text.zh: 这批藏品属于华塔洛蒂。这名字可是大有来头啊！

Text.en: How disrespectful! Let's return the favour, shall we?
Text.zh: 太不敬了！咱们不妨以牙还牙？

Text.en: You know of him?
Text.zh: 你知道他？

Text.en: Or ever, in my case.
Text.zh: 我反正从没听过。

Text.en: I know nothing of this man.
Text.zh: 我对此人一无所知。

Text.en: Should I know who he is?
Text.zh: 我该认识他吗？

Text.en: I may have heard of him once before. Remind me - who is he?
Text.zh: 好像以前听过这名字。他是谁？

Text.en: If I ever knew his name I've long since forgotten it. Who is he?
Text.zh: 就算以前知道也早忘了。他到底是什么人？

Text.en: Apparently, he's an Architect in charge of preserving ancient and notable relics. <continue>Let's see what he's gathered!
Text.zh: 据说他是负责保管重要古文物的建筑师。<continue>来看看他收藏了些什么！

Text.en: Let me guess. Another Vaal thief.
Text.zh: 让我猜猜——又是个瓦尔窃贼。

Text.en: You called it. He 'collected' ancient and notable relics through trade, excavation, and... raids.<continue>Why don't we conduct a little raid of our own?
Text.zh: 说对了。 他通过交易、挖掘和……搜刮来“收集”重要古文物。<continue>要不咱们也来场小小的“搜刮”？

Text.en: The elders once spoke of him. We gave him some of our sacred objects for preservation.
Text.zh: 长老们曾提起过他。我们曾把一些圣物托付给他保管。

Text.en: Then technically this stuff might belong to you anyway, right? Let's check it out!
Text.zh: 那严格来说这些东西本来就该归你们吧？ 咱们快去瞧瞧！

Text.en: Hmm... this vault does belong to Atziri, but this can't be what the legends speak of...
Text.zh: 嗯……这宝库确实属于阿兹里，但传说中的描述可比这夸张多了……

Text.en: There is tremendous wealth here.
Text.zh: 这里的财宝堆积如山。

Text.en: I'll take your word for it.
Text.zh: 我信你这话。

Text.en: I am the first to admit that legends can sometimes be... larger than life.
Text.zh: 我得承认，传说有时难免……言过其实。

Text.en: Her vaults are supposed to be two vast ziggurats full of gold, jewels, and priceless artifacts...  <continue>This looks more like a tribute paid by the Kamasan sect.
Text.zh: 她的宝库本该是两座堆满黄金、珠宝和无价之宝的巨型金字塔……<continue>眼前这些倒更像是卡马萨教派进贡的贡品。

Text.en: We better save it from the Cataclysm then.
Text.zh: 那我们最好在灾变前抢救这些财宝。

Text.en: My thoughts exactly!
Text.zh: 正合我意！

Text.en: It's all much of a muchness to me. You can tell these trinkets apart?
Text.zh: 在我看来这些都大差不差。你竟能分辨这些玩意儿的来历？

Text.en: Kamasan sect?
Text.zh: 卡马萨教派？

Text.en: That sounds familiar.
Text.zh: 听着耳熟。

Text.en: How'd ya figure?
Text.zh: 你怎么看出来的？

Text.en: The patterns in the gold are quite unique. See there? The mark of the renowned Mektul.
Text.zh: 黄金上的纹饰很独特。瞧见没？这是著名的梅克图尔标记。

Text.en: A hoard of soul cores... piled up and forgotten...
Text.zh: 一堆灵核……堆积于此，被人遗忘……

Text.en: This is sickening. Souls collected like trinkets.
Text.zh: 真令人作呕。灵魂竟然像小饰品一样被收集。

Text.en: The Vaal so often claimed to be peacekeepers. There is so much pain in this place...
Text.zh: 瓦尔人常自诩为和平守护者。可此地却弥漫着如此深重的痛苦……

Text.en: Leaving these souls trapped is deeply dishonourable.
Text.zh: 任由这些灵魂被困于此，实乃大不敬。

Text.en: This unsettles me. Such callous brutality.
Text.zh: 这让我深感不安。何等残忍的行径。

Text.en: Nothing we can do about that now, though. We should use what we can for a good cause.
Text.zh: 不过我们现在也无能为力。倒不如物尽其用，行善事之需。

Text.en: I'm surprised she abided this... clutter.
Text.zh: 她竟能容忍这般……杂乱。

Text.en: How could she see these without thinking of all the souls trapped inside?
Text.zh: 她怎能目睹这些而不思及其中禁锢的万千灵魂？

Text.en: I'm not defending her, but it's unlikely Atziri herself ever actually used this chamber.
Text.zh: 我并非为她开脱，但阿兹里本人很可能从未亲自涉足此处。

Text.en: Still, it's unseemly.
Text.zh: 即便如此，还是很不妥。

Text.en: Someone did...
Text.zh: 另有他人来过……

Text.en: This is everything the Azmeri feared about <i>{rathin}.
Text.zh: 这完全应验了阿兹莫里人对<i>{腐化}的所有恐惧。

Text.en: Finder's keepers.
Text.zh: 谁捡到就归谁。

Text.en: This looks like the spoils of the famed Kishara, the greatest treasure hunter of the ancient world!
Text.zh: 这看起来像是著名的琪莎拉的战利品，她是古代世界最伟大的宝藏猎人！

Text.en: The Ezomytes have a song about her visit to Phaaryl. How far did she end up sailing?
Text.zh: 艾兹麦人有首歌谣传唱过她到访法瑞欧的事迹。她究竟航行了多远？

Text.en: A role model of yours?
Text.zh: 她是你的榜样吗？

Text.en: A kindred spirit, then.
Text.zh: 那就是志趣相投了。

Text.en: I do look up to her! But there's something I've always wondered...
Text.zh: 我确实敬仰她！但有个问题始终让我好奇……

Text.en: I was taught that Kishara was captain of a Maraketh merchant vessel. You're saying she was Vaal?
Text.zh: 我听说琪莎拉是马拉克斯商船的船长。你却说她是瓦尔人？

Text.en: That's curious. Her treasures <i>{are} here, but I suppose that doesn't prove anything...
Text.zh: 真奇怪。她的宝藏<i>{确实}在此，但这也不能证明什么……

Text.en: Kishara? This name is unfamiliar to me.
Text.zh: 琪莎拉？这名字我很陌生。

Text.en: Would you say it... doesn't ring a bell?
Text.zh: 你是不是想说……完全没印象？

Text.en: It does not.
Text.zh: 确实没有。

Text.en: Oh come on, that was brilliant! You're no fun.
Text.zh: 拜托，这多有意思啊！你真无趣。

Text.en: Aye. My memory's faint, but... I believe she visited the Wildwood to trade, when I was still a young buck. Lively one, she was.
Text.zh: 是啊。我记忆模糊了……但记得她曾去荒林做交易，那时我还是个年轻小伙。她可是活力四射啊。

Text.en: Excuse me? Just how old are you?
Text.zh: 等等？你究竟多大年纪？

Text.en: Not as old as you're thinkin'. Time just runs a bit differently there. I always wondered what became o' her.
Text.zh: 没你想得那么老。只是那里时间流速不同。我一直想知道她后来如何了。

Text.en: Never heard of her.
Text.zh: 从没听说过她。

Text.en: Kishara, the Southern Star? The Wayward Gull? Her seventeen children founded the Brinerot pirate band?
Text.zh: 南方之星基莎拉？叛逆之鸥？她的十七个子女创立了布林洛特海盗团？

Text.en: Still haven't—wait, <i>{seventeen?} How? When did she even have time?
Text.zh: 还是没——等等，<i>{十七个？}怎么生的？她哪来的时间？

Text.en: She was renowned for manning the helm while pregnant, and giving birth during battles.
Text.zh: 她以孕期掌舵闻名，常在战斗间隙分娩。

Text.en: <i>{Battles?} It happened multiple times?
Text.zh: <i>{战斗？}还不止一次？

Text.en: Let's not get distracted. This treasure could be the find of... some century!
Text.zh: 别扯远了。这些宝藏说不定是……百年不遇的发现！

Text.en: Heh heh. The Brinerot sure tell some lurid tales o' her.
Text.zh: 呵呵。布林洛特海盗团给她编排了不少香艳故事啊。

Text.en: Keep your trousers on. She's a respected figure! And this treasure...
Text.zh: 别太激动。她可是位备受尊敬的人物！而这些宝藏……

Text.en: Popular writings claimed she sailed all the way to Middengard on her last voyage. <continue>Supposedly, Queen Atziri didn't like all the attention Kishara was getting, so she impounded everything she brought back and executed her crew...  <continue>Oh, I can't wait to see if the myth is true!
Text.zh: 民间野史说她最后一次航行直达米登加德。<continue>据说阿兹里女王不满琪莎拉声名太盛，便没收了她带回的所有财物，处决了她的船员……<continue>我等不及要验证传说的真假了！

Text.en: It's not traditional treasure, but I'm sure it's quite valuable all the same. <continue>What do you make of these?
Text.zh: 这并非传统意义上的财宝，但我肯定它同样价值连城。<continue>你们怎么看？

Text.en: Fragments o' history, made real... names are a powerful thing...
Text.zh: 历史的碎片，化为了真实……名字蕴藏着力量……

Text.en: Names? What do you mean?
Text.zh: 名字？你什么意思？

Text.en: A story for another time, lass.
Text.zh: 这故事改天再讲吧，姑娘。

Text.en: The songs of the Ezomytes have become... gems?
Text.zh: 艾兹麦人的歌谣……化成了……宝石？

Text.en: In a manner of speaking.
Text.zh: 可以这么说。

Text.en: I've got a suspicion, but I'll keep <i>{that} to myself.
Text.zh: 我有个猜测，不过先不提<i>{这茬}。

Text.en: Tales incarnate. I am intrigued.
Text.zh: 故事的化身。真让人着迷。

Text.en: Were the gems of the Vaal... changing over time?
Text.zh: 难道瓦尔人的宝石……会随时间改变？

Text.en: It makes sense, in a way. Modern gems are different, too.
Text.zh: 从某种角度说，这确实讲得通。现代的宝石也各不相同。

Text.en: I wonder if my mother's story is among them...
Text.zh: 不知其中是否有我母亲的故事……

Text.en: I wonder if the Spirit would have cut me off for using these?
Text.zh: 不知万灵是否会因我用了这些而抛弃我？

Text.en: More tools for killing. Same as always.
Text.zh: 不过是多了些杀戮工具。从来都是如此。

Text.en: I fancy myself a historical expert, but these... <continue>Ah, these are Precursor artifacts!
Text.zh: 我自诩是个历史专家，可这些……<continue>啊，这些是先驱者的遗物！

Text.en: Older than memory, these. From before the time of the Maji.
Text.zh: 这些玩意比最古老的记忆还要久远。源自众神诞生之前的时代。

Text.en: And how old is that, exactly?
Text.zh: 那到底有多古老呢？

Text.en: We left for the Wildwood durin' the Winter o' the World.
Text.zh: 我们是在世界之冬时期前往荒林的。

Text.en: Wow. That... doesn't clarify things for me at all. Must ask the Maraketh about that sometime...
Text.zh: 哇哦……这么说我根本不明白。以后得找马拉克斯人问问……

Text.en: It seems Doryani wasn't the only one studying them...
Text.zh: 看来不是只有多里亚尼在研究它们……

Text.en: These will be very useful.
Text.zh: 这些东西会很有用的。

Text.en: We shall make good use of these.
Text.zh: 我们会善加利用。

Text.en: Perhaps we were meant to find these.
Text.zh: 或许我们注定要找到这些。

Text.en: Just another tool, to my eye.
Text.zh: 在我眼里，就是另一种工具。

Text.en: Nice find. I'll grab 'em.
Text.zh: 找得好。我收下了。

Text.en: I'll scoop 'em up. We'll figure that out later.
Text.zh: 我来捞走。以后慢慢研究。

Text.en: You're really getting in the spirit of treasure hunting!
Text.zh: 你可越来越有寻宝的劲头了！

Text.en: This was the capital of the Vaal Empire for much of its history, but some sort of... incident... burned much of it down. <continue>After that, Azala Vaal became the seat of power, until Queen Atziri returned the royal court to Lira Vaal and rebuilt it. <continue>Atziri's treasure vaults are legendary! I can only hope they're somewhere inside...
Text.zh: 在瓦尔帝国的大半历史中，这里都是其都城，但后来一场……变故……将大半城市焚为废墟。<continue>此后，阿扎拉瓦尔成为了权力中心，直到阿兹里女王将王室迁回利拉瓦尔并重建了它。<continue>阿兹里的藏宝库可是个传说！我只盼它们就在这遗迹深处……

Text.en: This is a place of death and misery. Can you not feel it?
Text.zh: 这是个充满死亡与苦难之地。你感觉不到吗？

Text.en: There could be powerful weapons and armour still within.
Text.zh: 这里或许还藏着强大的武器与护甲。

Text.en: Perhaps death and misery can be... overcome.
Text.zh: 或许死亡与苦难……可以被战胜。

Text.en: What about dark forbidden secrets? Any of those rumoured to be lying around?
Text.zh: 那些黑暗的禁忌秘密呢？有传言说这里藏着这类东西吗？

Text.en: If we do not find her vaults, what else might lie within?
Text.zh: 若找不到她的宝库，这里还会有些什么宝贝？

Text.en: All I seek is a way to remove the mark of Corruption... to hear the Spirit once more.
Text.zh: 我只求能祛除腐化印记……再次聆听万灵之音。

Text.en: That's the great thing about the Vaal. You never know.
Text.zh: 这就是瓦尔遗迹的妙处——你永远猜不到会发现什么。

Text.en: An <i>{incident?} Lira Vaal was set ablaze by Orbala herself, on her second adventure. Unintentionally.
Text.zh: <i>{变故？}利拉瓦尔是欧巴拉本人在第二次冒险时意外焚毁的。

Text.en: Is that so? I've been meaning to learn more about Maraketh history. Vaal accounts of the incident gloss over the details.
Text.zh: 当真？我一直想多了解马拉克斯的历史。瓦尔人对这场变故的记载总是语焉不详。

Text.en: As expected.
Text.zh: 果然如此。

Text.en: Oo, we're gonna strike it rich, I can feel it.
Text.zh: 噢，我们要发大财了，我能感觉到！

Text.en: You know it!
Text.zh: 说得对！

Text.en: The air still reeks o' sorrow.
Text.zh: 空气中仍弥漫着悲伤的气息。

Text.en: There is something very wrong with this place.
Text.zh: 这地方很不对劲。

Text.en: Terrible things happened in that temple...
Text.zh: 那座神庙里发生过惨剧……

Text.en: Then let us purge what pain still lingers.
Text.zh: 那就让我们净化残留于此的痛苦吧。

Text.en: The legends differ on the source of the wealth. Some say she demanded tribute from all over the Empire.  <continue>Some say suitors and powerseekers simply gifted it to her in vast caravans.
Text.zh: 关于她财富的来源众说纷纭。有人说她在帝国全境征收贡品，<continue>也有人说求爱者和权力追逐者自发组成庞大商队将厚礼献到她面前。

Text.en: Why? What did they hope to gain?
Text.zh: 为什么？他们想得到什么？

Text.en: Her favour. Their lives. Supposedly, in many cases, simple acknowledgement. They were that desperate for her approval.
Text.zh: 她的青睐。他们的性命。据说很多时候，仅仅是为了得到她的一句认可。他们就是如此渴望被女王垂青。

Text.en: When folk surrender their will to another, such madness marks the end. I know it all too well.
Text.zh: 当人们将自身意志拱手相让时，便是终结的开始。这种疯狂我太熟悉了。

Text.en: Yes... we have the benefit of history, but they couldn't see it...
Text.zh: 是啊……我们是站在历史后来者的角度，可当时的人身在局中……

Text.en: I pour everything I have into study, practice, and power... and yet some just have the world handed to them.
Text.zh: 我倾尽全力投入学习、苦修和力量……而有些人，什么好处都自动送上门来。

Text.en: Can't argue with that. Life definitely seems unfair sometimes.
Text.zh: 确实如此。人生有时的确很不公平。

Text.en: You're one to talk.
Text.zh: 你还好意思说。

Text.en: I haven't the slightest idea what you mean...
Text.zh: 我完全不明白你在说什么……

Text.en: I am sometimes disgusted by the weakness of men.
Text.zh: 我有时真为男性的劣根感到作呕。

Text.en: Hah, don't get me started!
Text.zh: 哈，可别让我打开话匣子！

Text.en: Wealthy Maraketh merchants did send caravans to curry favour.
Text.zh: 确实有富有的马拉克斯商人派商队去讨好她。

Text.en: So it's true, then! I feel like I'm learning so much from you.
Text.zh: 这么说传言是真的！感觉从你这儿学到了好多。

Text.en: Don't make a habit of it. I left the life of a tale-woman behind long ago.
Text.zh: 别养成习惯。我早已不是那个说书人了。

Text.en: Still... I appreciate it.
Text.zh: 不过……还是谢谢你。

Text.en: Ugh. Of course.
Text.zh: 啧。果然如此。

Text.en: Right? Men!
Text.zh: 对吧？男人啊！

Text.en: In any case, if the vaults actually existed, they were lost in the Cataclysm... but this is a great place to start looking!
Text.zh: 总之，就算宝库真的存在，也该在灾变中湮没了……但这里绝对是个绝佳的搜寻起点！

Text.en: It is not my goal, but... for you, I will remain vigilant.
Text.zh: 这虽非我的目标……但为了你，我会仔细留意的。

Text.en: I happen to have a knack for finding things...
Text.zh: 我恰好对寻物颇有些天赋……

Text.en: I'll give it a good look. See what I can scrounge up.
Text.zh: 我会仔细搜寻的。看看能翻出什么宝贝。

Text.en: In my readings, accounts of the Cataclysm are scattered, as one might expect.  <continue>Some say it began here. Some say it happened at the mountain we now call Highgate. <continue>Supposedly, it had something to do with Atziri's obsession with immortality, but that's all the survivors knew.  <continue>The Empire died in a single night. Only three thousand, one-hundred, and twenty-six Vaal survived to reach the Azmeri mountains...
Text.zh: 根据我的研读，关于灾变的记载如预料中那样杂乱无章。<continue>有人说灾难始于此地，也有人认为发生在如今被称为统治者之殿的山脉。<continue>据说这与阿兹里对永生的痴迷有关，但幸存者所知仅限于此。<continue>整个帝国在一夜之间覆灭。最终只有 3126 名瓦尔人幸存，逃到了阿兹莫里山脉……

Text.en: A few escaped to the Wildwood by pure chance... but they didnae last long. It was already too late.
Text.zh: 还有少数人侥幸逃进了荒林……但他们也没能撑多久。那时已经太迟了。

Text.en: What happened to them?
Text.zh: 他们遭遇了什么？

Text.en: They met a terrible fate.
Text.zh: 结局相当凄惨。

Text.en: Ooh, I want details!
Text.zh: 哇，快细细道来！

Text.en: You'll not get them from me.
Text.zh: 别想从我这儿打听。

Text.en: Aw, <i>{fine}.
Text.zh: 哼，<i>{好吧}。

Text.en: That is the price of meddling with forces one doesn't understand.
Text.zh: 这就是贸然染指未知力量要付出的代价。

Text.en: Don't you do that rather often?
Text.zh: 你自己不也常这么干？

Text.en: I meddle, yes, but I also make sure I <i>{understand} first.
Text.zh: 我是会染指，但会确保自己先<i>{摸清门道}。

Text.en: Really? You've never reached beyond your grasp even a <i>{little?}
Text.zh: 真的？你就从来没有<i>{稍微}逞能过？

Text.en: Maybe a little...
Text.zh: 可能……偶尔吧……

Text.en: If we learn more about their Cataclysm, perhaps we could stop another.
Text.zh: 若能弄清灾变的真相，或许我们能阻止类似灾难重演。

Text.en: That's history for you. It's got all the answers, if you're willing to look.
Text.zh: 这就是历史的妙处——只要你愿意探寻，答案尽在其中。

Text.en: We knew little of the event itself. <continue>From what is told, the sky to the south raged with crimson fire, and the moon turned to blood.  <continue>Scouts that returned in the following days died soon after telling us the Vaal were simply gone. <continue>Their lands became forbidden, and still are today... mostly.  <continue>We've been dealing with the consequences of Corruption ever since.
Text.zh: 我们当时对事件本身知之甚少。<continue>据传闻，南方的天空燃着猩红烈焰，血色浸染明月。<continue>后续返回的侦察兵在告知我们瓦尔人已全体消失后，也很快相继离世。<continue>他们的领土成了禁区，至今大部分依然如此……<continue>我们至今仍在承受腐化带来的苦果。

Text.en: Intriguing! I've never thought about the Maraketh perspective on all this.
Text.zh: 有意思！我从没想过马拉克斯人会怎样看待此事。

Text.en: And Wraeclast is still suffering from the consequences to this day.
Text.zh: 瓦拉克拉斯至今仍深受其害。

Text.en: So much suffering. So much pain. It's still harming the world to this day.
Text.zh: 太多苦难，太多伤痛。至今仍在荼毒这个世界。

Text.en: The legacy of the Vaal might always be with us...
Text.zh: 瓦尔的遗物或许将永远与我们共存……

Text.en: As the elders tell it, my people were happy to take them in. They'd always been kind to us.
Text.zh: 据长老所述，我的族人当时很乐意接纳他们。瓦尔人向来待我们宽厚。

Text.en: I'm glad. Such charity, in the face of such horror...
Text.zh: 值得庆幸。面对如此浩劫，仍能保有这般善心……

Text.en: How many were there before?
Text.zh: 他们原先有多少人口？

Text.en: If I had to guess, I'd wager... millions.
Text.zh: 若要我猜测，恐怕有……数百万之众。

Text.en: Oof, millions. That's a tough record to beat.
Text.zh: 嚯，数百万。这战绩可难超越了。

Text.en: Record?
Text.zh: 战绩？

Text.en: Yeh. It's a soldier's game, to keep your mind. Confirmed kills.
Text.zh: 嗯。当兵的都这么比，图个乐子。指的是确认击杀数。

Text.en: I'm sorry, are you competing with the legendary Queen Atziri for <i>{number of kills?}
Text.zh: 等等，你是在和传奇的阿兹里女王比<i>{杀人数量？}

Text.en: I <i>{said} it's a tough one to beat.
Text.zh: 我<i>{说了}这记录很难破。

Text.en: You are absolutely... ridiculous...
Text.zh: 你真是……无可救药……

Text.en: A pact forged in flame.
Text.zh: 契约铸于烈焰。

Text.en: The oasis bears my oath.
Text.zh: 绿洲铭记吾誓。

Text.en: We are bound, as stone to sand.
Text.zh: 你我相连，若石缚沙。

Text.en: Ugh... what... happened?
Text.zh: 呃……这是……怎么回事？

Text.en: You have done well. But your task is not yet over. <continue>Using this flesh of the depraved, we can now locate the enemy's bastion.<continue>Enter... their Twisted Domain.
Text.zh: 你……做得很好。但你的任务尚未完成。<continue>借由这些堕落者的血肉……我们便能锁定敌军的堡垒。<continue>进入……它们的扭曲领域吧。

Text.en: Your task is not yet complete. <continue>Using the flesh of the depraved, we can now locate the enemy's bastion.<continue>Enter... their Twisted Domain.
Text.zh: 你的任务尚未完成。<continue>借由这些堕落者的血肉……我们便能锁定敌军的堡垒。<continue>进入……它们的扭曲领域吧。

Text.en: Before you leave, Acolyte – a simple question...<continue>Do you accept the path before you? Do you embrace all that I have given you?
Text.zh: 在你离开之前，侍僧——有个简单的问题……<continue>你可愿接受眼前的道路？你可愿接纳我所赐予你的一切？

Text.en: Of course, master.
Text.zh: 当然，主人。

Text.en: And so, my will radiates within you.
Text.zh: 如此，我的意志便在你的心中生根。

Text.en: The enemy falters. Directionless. Mindless. For now, you have saved this world.
Text.zh: 敌人溃败，迷失方向，丧失心智。目前来说，你拯救了这个世界。

Text.en: I couldn't have done so without Ailith.
Text.zh: 若是没有艾利丝，我肯定办不到。

Text.en: Indeed. My daughter, you are one of a kind.
Text.zh: 确实。我的女儿，你无人能及。

Text.en: It was my honour to serve.
Text.zh: 能为您效劳是我的荣幸。

Text.en: Aren't you lucky I came along when I did?
Text.zh: 要不是我刚好来了，你哪能这么走运？

Text.en: The Keepers will not forget what you've done, I assure you.
Text.zh: 守护者们不会忘记你所做的一切，我向你保证。

Text.en: As well they shouldn't.
Text.zh: 那是自然，他们本就不该忘。

Text.en: May this be a firm lesson to anyone who would invade our world.
Text.zh: 但愿此事能给那些胆敢入侵我们世界的家伙一个教训。

Text.en: Never thought we'd end up here back when we first met.
Text.zh: 当初刚遇见你的时候，哪能想到会走到这一步。

Text.en: Your scepticism was understandable... but unfounded. As this victory has proven.
Text.zh: 你当时会怀疑，也正常……但实属多虑。这场胜利就说明了一切。

Text.en: Give Ailith her flowers. She did her part too.
Text.zh: 也夸夸艾利丝吧。她也出了力。

Text.en: Indeed she did. My daughter, you served admirably, as always.
Text.zh: 她确实出了力。我的女儿，你向来都是这么可靠。

Text.en: You honour me, Dreamer.
Text.zh: 你过誉了，幻梦者。

Text.en: I could get used to this 'chosen one' stuff. Don't suppose it comes with a pay rise, does it?
Text.zh: 没想到当“天选之人”还挺爽的。就是不知道给不给加钱？

Text.en: The defeat of Xesht is its own reward.
Text.zh: 击败薛斯本身就是天大的奖励。

Text.en: Ah. Was afraid you'd say that.
Text.zh: 啊，我就怕你会这么说。

Text.en: I am glad to have served you, master. I await your next instruction.
Text.zh: 能为您效劳是我的荣幸，主人。静候您的下一个指示。

Text.en: Relish in your victory. The work yet to be done shall be revealed in due course.
Text.zh: 好好享受你的胜利吧。未尽之事，自会在适当的时机显现。

Text.en: A moment's respite. You have earned it.
Text.zh: 稍作喘息吧，这是你应得的。

Text.en: I am damn well joyous of it. Wading through endless muck, blood and filth... for a war I should have no part in!
Text.zh: 我可真是太开心了。在那没完没了的烂泥、血水和污秽里打滚……就为了一场跟我八竿子打不着的破战争！

Text.en: And yet, your part was the greatest of all.
Text.zh: 但论功劳，谁也比不上你。

Text.en: Yes. The pulse of life shall remember your actions.
Text.zh: 是啊。众生的脉搏会铭记你的功绩。

Text.en: Now, before you leave, fellow Keeper... I wish to celebrate with you.
Text.zh: 在你离开之前，守护者同伴……我想和你一起庆祝一下。

Text.en: Please join me at the training area in the Monastery proper.
Text.zh: 请到修道院主殿的训练场来找我。

Text.en: I greet you... incumbent warrior.
Text.zh: 幸会……现任勇士。

Text.en: Greetings, Dreamer. We have gone to great effort to see you reborn. Ailith speaks highly of you.
Text.zh: 幸会，幻梦者。为了将你复活，我们费了很大的力气。艾利丝对你赞誉有加。

Text.en: She has been a loyal Keeper. And both your efforts will bear fruit, in due course.
Text.zh: 她一直都是忠心耿耿的守护者。你们二人的努力，假以时日，自会开花结果。

Text.en: I greet you... dark one.
Text.zh: 幸会……黑暗之子。

Text.en: That was... fascinating. I'm no stranger to waking the dead, but... well, were you even dead to begin with?
Text.zh: 这……可真有意思。我也不是没见过把死人复活，不过……话说回来，你之前真的死了？

Text.en: Dead to the world, perhaps. Not so to the Keepers. Merely in a kind of... slumber.
Text.zh: 对这个世界而言，或许算是。但对守护者来说并非如此。更像是……沉睡了一阵。

Text.en: Thus the 'Dreamer' title. So, what now then?
Text.zh: 难怪他们叫你幻梦者。接下来怎么办？

Text.en: I greet you... brazen child.
Text.zh: 幸会……厚脸皮的小子。

Text.en: Greetings, Dreamer. I have seen much in my travels... but never have I encountered a being such as you. <continue>I confess, I am fascinated.
Text.zh: 幸会，幻梦者。我游历四方，见过不少世面……却从未遇到过像你这样的存在。<continue>不瞒你说，我挺感兴趣的。

Text.en: Your intellectual curiosity speaks well of you. There are some who would recoil.
Text.zh: 你这份求知欲，倒是挺难得的。换作别人，恐怕要退避三舍了。

Text.en: Not I.
Text.zh: 我可不会。

Text.en: I greet you... recluse.
Text.zh: 幸会……隐士。

Text.en: Recluse? What is it you think you know about me... and how?
Text.zh: 隐士？你凭什么觉得你了解我……你从哪儿知道的？

Text.en: My sight is not limited to this corporeal form.
Text.zh: 我的视野不受这具躯壳的限制。

Text.en: I greet you... hunter.
Text.zh: 幸会……猎手。

Text.en: Likewise, Dreamer. Hope you enjoyed your little kip. <continue>Now you can help us see this war through.
Text.zh: 彼此彼此，幻梦者。希望你这一觉睡得还不错。<continue>现在该醒来帮我们把这场仗打完了。

Text.en: And so I shall.
Text.zh: 理当如此。

Text.en: I greet you... wanderer.
Text.zh: 幸会……流浪者。

Text.en: So you're the famous Dreamer. I'd offer to shake your hand, but you look a bit, uh... <i>{sticky.}
Text.zh: 你就是那个大名鼎鼎的幻梦者？本想跟你握个手，不过你看着有点……呃……<i>{黏糊糊的。}

Text.en: Turn your hand instead toward defeating the Hiveborn.
Text.zh: 不如把你的手，用来对付那些裂隙虫群。

Text.en: That I can do.
Text.zh: 这我倒是在行。

Text.en: I greet you... lost one.
Text.zh: 幸会……迷途之人。

Text.en: The Dreamer, I take it? Lost I may have been... but I found yer war. And here you've been sleepin', while we fight it for ye.
Text.zh: 你就是幻梦者，对吧？我或许曾经迷失过……但这场战斗我可没缺席。你可倒好，一直在这儿睡大觉，让我们替你卖命。

Text.en: You will come to see the reason for the way things must be.
Text.zh: 你终会明白，万事皆有缘由。

Text.en: Now... pose your question.
Text.zh: 行了……有什么想问的就说吧。

Text.en: The Keepers know me as the Benevolent Dreamer. <continue>The enemy knows me as the One Who Dreamt. <continue>You... may call me ally.
Text.zh: 守护者们称我为仁爱的幻梦者。<continue>敌人则称我为织梦者。<continue>你……可以叫我盟友。

Text.en: An ally born out of a sac before my very eyes. That's... a new one.
Text.zh: 一个在我眼皮子底下从囊里生出来的盟友。这……我还真是头一回见。

Text.en: What exactly can you offer me?
Text.zh: 你到底能帮上我什么忙？

Text.en: And I shall. Though I usually attain my allies through more... <i>{conventional} means.
Text.zh: 我当然会考虑。不过，我平时结交盟友的方式……可比这<i>{正常}多了。

Text.en: You expect me to trust you?
Text.zh: 你觉得我该相信你？

Text.en: I've had my share of unlikely allies... What's one more?
Text.zh: 我那些个不靠谱的盟友还少吗……再多一个又何妨。

Text.en: Well, lucky me.
Text.zh: 那我可真是走运。

Text.en: I'd sooner call ye a violation of nature.
Text.zh: 要我说，你这是违背自然。

Text.en: What is important is that you and I share a desire to thrive. To <i>{preserve} life. To cherish it. <continue>The enemy would see it destroyed.
Text.zh: 重要的是，你我都有同一个心愿——活下去。让生命<i>{延续}……珍视生命。<continue>而敌人只想将其毁灭。

Text.en: Xoph, Esh, Tul and Uul-Netol.... <continue>Our melding failed. I was torn asunder. Cast into the void between worlds. <continue>But they... became Xesht. <continue>Vile Lords. Once my brethren, now a monstrous fiend.
Text.zh: 索伏、艾许、托沃、乌尔尼多……<continue>我们的融合失败了。我被撕裂，抛入诸界间的虚空。<continue>但它们……变成了薛斯。<continue>堕落领主。我曾经的同胞手足，如今却成了可怕的恶魔。

Text.en: So you... are one of them?
Text.zh: 所以……你是它们中的一员？

Text.en: They sound like good fun.
Text.zh: 听起来还挺有意思的。

Text.en: Then you are not one of them?
Text.zh: 那你不是它们中的一员？

Text.en: So are you one of them, or not?
Text.zh: 你到底是不是它们一伙的？

Text.en: Your brethren? Oh. So you're like family?
Text.zh: 你的同胞手足？噢，那你们算是亲戚？

Text.en: That'd make you the black sheep of the family, then?
Text.zh: 那你就是家里的“异类”咯？

Text.en: That is one perspective.
Text.zh: 可以这么说。

Text.en: Then you were allies, once?
Text.zh: 那你们曾经是盟友？

Text.en: Yes, and no.
Text.zh: 是，也不是。

Text.en: I see the beauty of existence, but they see nothing beyond their rage and hunger. <continue>Limited minds seeking only the unity of flesh. <continue>And so, this world is in grave danger. <continue>I cannot let them consume it, as they have their own.
Text.zh: 我看到了生命之美，而它们眼中只有怒火与饥渴。<continue>心智狭隘，只追求血肉的融合。<continue>所以，这个世界危在旦夕。<continue>我不能让它们像吞噬自己的世界一样，将这个世界也吞噬掉。

Text.en: Everything has a price. You would still see our world changed in some way.
Text.zh: 万事皆有代价。到头来，你还是想改造我们的世界。

Text.en: Why do you care what happens to this world? It isn't even yours.
Text.zh: 你为什么要在意这个世界会变成什么样？这根本不是你的世界。

Text.en: Forgive me, but you do not seem the altruistic type. What do you gain from this?
Text.zh: 恕我直言，你看着可不像那种无私的人。你从中能得到什么好处？

Text.en: I don't believe for a second you want to save this world. <continue>Not unless it benefits you in some way.
Text.zh: 我可不信你是单纯想拯救这个世界。<continue>除非这对你也有好处。

Text.en: This isn't your world. Why do you want to save it?
Text.zh: 这又不是你的世界。你为什么要拯救它？

Text.en: Look, cards on the table - you don't seem like someone who wants to <i>{save} the world.
Text.zh: 咱们打开天窗说亮话——你看着可不像是想<i>{拯救}世界的人。

Text.en: Grave danger or not - why should you care?
Text.zh: 就算真有危险，你为什么要操这份心？

Text.en: Must everything have a cost?
Text.zh: 难道万事万物都得有代价吗？

Text.en: I see your world for what it is and what it could be. For it's... potential. <continue>It is worth saving.
Text.zh: 我看到了你们世界的现在，也看到了它可能成为的样子。看到了它的……潜力。<continue>它确实值得被拯救。

Text.en: You are not telling me everything.
Text.zh: 你还是有所隐瞒。

Text.en: I guess...
Text.zh: 大概吧……

Text.en: On that, we can agree, but... I suspect you're not telling me everything.
Text.zh: 这一点我同意。但……我觉得你还是有所隐瞒。

Text.en: How magnanimous of you.
Text.zh: 你可真是乐于助人。

Text.en: Aye. True enough.
Text.zh: 嗯。这话倒是不假。

Text.en: Not to put a damper on our new friendship... but I keep waitin' for the catch.
Text.zh: 不是我想给咱这段新交情泼冷水……可我总觉得这里面有猫腻。

Text.en: I wasn't born yesterday, lad. You, on the other hand... <continue>Suffice it to say there's always an agenda.
Text.zh: 小子，我跟你不一样，我可不是刚生出来的毛头小子……<continue>这么说吧，凡事总会有个目的。

Text.en: Perhaps. But know this...
Text.zh: 也许吧。但你要知道……

Text.en: There is no value in the endless pursuit of abundance. It only brings death. <continue>I dream of a world that holds life precious above all. So ask yourself... what ill could come of such a dream? <continue>The vile lords will bring nothing but death to your world. I offer only lasting peace.
Text.zh: 无休止地追逐繁盛毫无意义。它只会带来死亡。<continue>我梦想着一个视生命高于一切的世界。所以你不妨问问自己……这样的梦想，会有什么坏处呢？<continue>堕落领主只会给你的世界带来死亡。而我能给的，是长久的和平。

Text.en: I would know more about this... 'melding' you spoke of.
Text.zh: 我想多了解一下你刚才说的……那个“融合”。

Text.en: I'd be lying if I said I wasn't intrigued by this melding you spoke of.
Text.zh: 说实话，你刚才说的那个融合，我还真有点兴趣。

Text.en: This melding of which you speak... tell me more.
Text.zh: 再多讲讲……你说的那个融合吧。

Text.en: You made reference to a 'melding'. What is it?
Text.zh: 你刚才提到了“融合”，那是什么？

Text.en: Before, you mentioned that your melding failed... how? What is it?
Text.zh: 刚才你说融合失败了……怎么失败的？到底什么是融合？

Text.en: This 'melding' thing... sounds kinda freaky.
Text.zh: 你说的这个“融合”……听着怪瘆人的。

Text.en: You'll have to explain this 'melding' to me. <continue>As with the rest o' ye, it sounds... <i>{unnatural.}
Text.zh: 你得给我解释解释这个“融合”是怎么回事。<continue>怎么跟你们这些人一样，听着就……<i>{不太自然。}

Text.en: It is why I have languished here for so many years. Healing. Recovering. <continue>The vile Lords sought our union. A binding. Our flesh... to coalesce into a singular being. <continue>But what mind would govern such a creature? I saw the darkness in their hearts. <continue>I escaped before they could subsume me. <continue>But they... they became pure hatred. Xesht.
Text.zh: 正因如此，我才在这里困了这么多年。疗养。恢复。<continue>堕落领主想要我们融为一体。这是一种结合，可以让我们的血肉……凝聚成单一的存在。<continue>但这样的怪物，该由谁来主宰？我看到了它们内心的黑暗。<continue>在它们吞噬我之前，我逃了出来。<continue>但它们……变成了纯粹的憎恨。薛斯。

Text.en: In destroying this Xesht... will the Hiveborn relent?
Text.zh: 杀了这个薛斯……裂隙虫群就会退却吗？

Text.en: Say I kill this Xesht - will that stop the Hiveborn?
Text.zh: 假如我杀了薛斯，裂隙虫群就会停手吗？

Text.en: Were we to kill Xesht, what would happen to their brood?
Text.zh: 要是我们杀了薛斯，它们那些崽子会怎么样？

Text.en: If Xesht dies, what happens to the Hiveborn?
Text.zh: 如果薛斯死了，裂隙虫群会怎么样？

Text.en: Alright, let's say we defeat Xesht... then what? What happens to the Hiveborn?
Text.zh: 咱们要是打败了薛斯……然后呢？裂隙虫群会怎么样？

Text.en: So if we kill this Xesht fella — or is it fellas? — that will stop the Hiveborn?
Text.zh: 要是我们杀了那个薛斯——或者说薛斯们——裂隙虫群就能消停了？

Text.en: So, if we slay Xesht, will that rid us o' the Hiveborn?
Text.zh: 宰了薛斯之后，能摆脱裂隙虫群吗？

Text.en: No. Kill Xesht, and in time they shall make another.
Text.zh: 不会。杀了薛斯，它们迟早会再造一个出来。

Text.en: They are of one mind. One army. One force of will. <continue>We must destroy them in their domain. Driving them back. Shattering their will. <continue>Then... I will seek to do what must be done.
Text.zh: 它们万众一心，一支军队，一个意志。<continue>我们必须杀进它们的领地，摧毁它们，击退它们，粉碎它们的意志。<continue>之后……我会去做该做的事。

Text.en: And if we do not act?
Text.zh: 那要是我们不去管呢？

Text.en: 'What must be done.' So what happens if we just... don't?
Text.zh: “该做的事”？那如果我们……不去做呢？

Text.en: And if they prevail? What then?
Text.zh: 要是它们赢了呢？到时候会怎样？

Text.en: Say that – hypothetically – the Hiveborn prove too much for us... <continue>What then?
Text.zh: 假如说——只是假如——那些裂隙虫群太强，我们对付不了……<continue>到时候会怎样？

Text.en: What's the alternative?
Text.zh: 还有别的办法吗？

Text.en: And if we don't?
Text.zh: 要是我们不管呢？

Text.en: And if Xesht proves a stubborn weed?
Text.zh: 万一薛斯那家伙像野草一样，除不尽呢？

Text.en: Your world will end.
Text.zh: 你们的世界就会终结。

Text.en: Tell me, Dreamer, with Xesht dead... what is the final step in your plan?
Text.zh: 幻梦者，跟我说说吧，要是薛斯死了……你计划的最后一步是什么？

Text.en: Xesht is dead, but let me guess... there's still more to be done.
Text.zh: 薛斯死了，但我感觉……这一切还没终结。

Text.en: Your instincts are correct.
Text.zh: 你的感觉没错。

Text.en: Xesht is dead... but the Hiveborn remain. How will you ensure they do not rise again?
Text.zh: 薛斯死了……可裂隙虫群还在。你要怎么保证它们不会死灰复燃？

Text.en: With Xesht dead and gone, what comes next?
Text.zh: 薛斯已经死了，接下来该怎么办？

Text.en: I'm guessin' you have a plan for dealin' with the rest o' the Hiveborn.
Text.zh: 我猜，你已经想好该怎么对付剩下的那些裂隙虫群了吧。

Text.en: Xesht is dead. So that's it, right? Job's done?
Text.zh: 薛斯死了。这事算是了结了吧？

Text.en: No. Not as long as their horde remains.
Text.zh: 不。只要它们的族群还在，一切就还没结束。

Text.en: The Depraved Lords are dead. Advise us of your will, master.
Text.zh: 堕落领主已死。请指示下一步的行动，主人。

Text.en: The abomination is now but a memory. What say ye of yer next move?
Text.zh: 那邪祟已成往事。接下来你有什么打算？

Text.en: The Hiveborn thrive under a singular commanding mind... <continue>I will come to them in their hour of desperation, while they are confused and battered. <continue>Then I shall <i>{will} them... to satiate their hunger... once and for all.
Text.zh: 裂隙虫群的繁衍依赖于一个至高无上的统一意志……<continue>我会在它们最绝望、最迷茫、最疲惫的时候降临。<continue>然后，我会<i>{用意志命令}它们……去满足它们的饥饿……一劳永逸。

Text.en: You would turn them against one another?
Text.zh: 你是要让它们自相残杀？

Text.en: You'll force the Hiveborn to tear each other limb from limb? Gosh! Is it hot in here?
Text.zh: 让裂隙虫群互相啃咬，撕碎彼此？天啊！听得我都热血沸腾了。

Text.en: You will command them to... <i>{consume} one another?
Text.zh: 你要命令它们互相<i>{吞噬}？

Text.en: They would eat each other?
Text.zh: 它们……会吃掉彼此？

Text.en: 'Once and for all'... Wait.<continue>You don't mean they'll <i>{eat} eachother.
Text.zh: “一劳永逸”……等等。<continue>你该不会是说它们会<i>{吃掉}彼此吧？

Text.en: Satiate their hunger... with what?
Text.zh: 满足它们的饥饿……拿什么满足？

Text.en: One another.
Text.zh: 拿彼此。

Text.en: <i>{Oh}. Blimey.
Text.zh: <i>{哦}。我的天。

Text.en: I understand. You would turn the enemy on themselves. Yet for them... it would be pure ecstasy.
Text.zh: 我明白了。你要让敌人自相残杀。可对它们来说……这却是无上的欢愉。

Text.en: You'd come to them as a new master... and command them to eat one another?
Text.zh: 你要作为新的主人降临……然后命令它们自相残杀？

Text.en: Yes. And they will rejoice in their fervour of belonging again.
Text.zh: 没错。它们会为再次找到归属而狂喜。

Text.en: A final feast. A final supper under their broken sun.
Text.zh: 最后的盛宴。在它们破碎的太阳下，最后的晚餐。

Text.en: Though they bear no semblance of sanity... that is a fearsome fate.
Text.zh: 虽然它们早已没有神智可言……但这下场，也够可怕的。

Text.en: Yet they will enjoy every moment of it.
Text.zh: 可它们会享受其间的每一刻。

Text.en: A pity I won't be there to see it.
Text.zh: 可惜我不能亲眼看到那一幕。

Text.en: It would be gruesome to behold.
Text.zh: 那场面肯定相当血腥。

Text.en: Oh, stop! Give a girl a break. You're making me jealous.
Text.zh: 哎呀，行了！饶了人家吧，你说得我都有点羡慕了。

Text.en: A cruel, brutal punishment, but... dare I say, not undeserved.
Text.zh: 残酷又野蛮的刑罚。但也算是罪有应得。

Text.en: And not without reason.
Text.zh: 而且这也不是毫无理由。

Text.en: That's nature for you. Eat or be eaten.
Text.zh: 自然之道嘛。不是你吃别人，就是别人吃你。

Text.en: Awful grim. But serves 'em right, I s'pose.
Text.zh: 听着怪惨的。不过也是它们活该。

Text.en: Ooh, that's proper dark. Cruel even. But who am I to judge, eh?
Text.zh: 嚯，这可真够阴暗的，甚至有点残忍。不过我又有什么资格评判呢，对吧？

Text.en: There was no pleasant ending on their horizon. It is the only way.
Text.zh: 它们的下场注定不会有多好。这是唯一的办法。

Text.en: Praise the Dreamer.
Text.zh: 赞美幻梦者。

Text.en: Praise the Dreamer.
Text.zh: 赞美幻梦者。

Text.en: A monstrous act. Though admittedly... they deserve no less.
Text.zh: 手段是残忍了点。不过话说回来……它们就该是这种下场。

Text.en: Take heart in the end of their suffering.
Text.zh: 它们的痛苦终结了，你该感到欣慰才是。

Text.en: I seek the opposite of the Depraved Lords. I seek to preserve life itself. To cherish it, above all else.
Text.zh: 我与堕落领主所求的恰恰相反。我要保全生命本身。珍视生命，高于一切。

Text.en: A noble goal. But how can we achieve it? Through what means?
Text.zh: 志向高远。但我们要如何实现？怎么做到？

Text.en: The depraved must die. The enemy will never relent. Therefore, they must be forced to do so. <continue>Or else they will never stop pursuing me, or this world.
Text.zh: 堕落者必须死。敌人永远不会罢休。因此，必须逼得它们罢休。<continue>否则，它们必将对我穷追不舍，直到吞噬这个世界。

Text.en: What drives them toward you so tirelessly? Toward us all?
Text.zh: 它们为什么这么执着地追杀你？追杀我们所有人？

Text.en: Xoph, Esh, Tul and Uul-Netol.... <continue>Our melding failed and I was torn asunder. Cast into the void between worlds. <continue>But they... became Xesht. <continue>They will not rest until they subsume me.
Text.zh: 索伏、艾许、托沃、乌尔尼多……<continue>我们的融合失败了。我被撕裂，抛入诸界间的虚空。<continue>但它们……变成了薛斯。<continue>不将我吞噬，它们誓不罢休。

Text.en: But you are nothing like them. Why can't they see that?
Text.zh: 可你跟它们完全不一样。它们看不出来吗？

Text.en: Once they may have... but now they see nothing. Blind in their hunger. <continue>It matters not. All that does, is that they... still... come.
Text.zh: 也许曾经能看出来……但现在它们什么也看不见了。被饥饿蒙蔽了双眼。<continue>这已经不重要了。重要的是，它们……还是……来了。

Text.en: If they never give up, is our world doomed?
Text.zh: 如果它们永不放弃，那我们的世界注定要毁灭吗？

Text.en: There is hope. A hope that bloomed here in the Monastery and still continues to grow. <continue>If we wage war upon the enemy, in their own domain... we can change the outcome. <continue>With the enemy weakened, I will erase them. I shall destroy them utterly.
Text.zh: 还有希望。这希望从修道院萌芽，仍在不断生长。<continue>如果我们在敌人的领地与它们开战……就能扭转局面。<continue>待敌人虚弱之际，我将抹除它们。我要将它们彻底消灭。

Text.en: And what of the Keepers then?
Text.zh: 那守护者们呢？

Text.en: They remain to protect the world from itself. From those who hunger. Those who rage. <continue>There will come a time when life is protected. When quiet prevails.
Text.zh: 他们将继续守护这个世界，防止它走向自毁，防止它受到贪婪之人和狂暴之人的侵害。<continue>终有一天，生命会得到庇护。安宁会降临世间。

Text.en: I dream of that day. I can almost see it in my mind's eye.
Text.zh: 我盼着那一天。它仿佛就在我眼前。

Text.en: I have long dreamed of it. You needn't wait much longer, my child.
Text.zh: 我期盼这一天已经太久太久。这一天就快到了，我的孩子。

Text.en: Forgive me, but my curiosity of the melding gets the better of me. <continue>Why would you take part in such a thing with the vile Lords?
Text.zh: 恕我冒昧，可我对融合那件事实在太好奇了。<continue>你当初为什么要跟那些堕落领主一起搞这种勾当？

Text.en: It is a meritable question. <continue>The melding is why I have languished here for so long. Healing. Recovering. <continue>The vile Lords sought our union above all else. A binding. Our flesh... to coalesce.  <continue>I was foolish. I believed... I could find reason within them. <continue>But I saw only darkness and I escaped before they could subsume me. <continue>They became pure hatred. They became... Xesht.
Text.zh: 这个问题问得好。<continue>正是因为融合，我才在这里困了这么多年。疗养。恢复。<continue>堕落领主最渴望的便是融为一体。这是一种结合，可以让我们的血肉……凝聚。<continue>我当初太愚蠢。我曾以为……能在它们心中找到理性。<continue>但我只看到黑暗，所以在它们吞噬我之前逃了出来。<continue>而它们变成了纯粹的憎恨。它们变成了……薛斯。

Text.en: In killing Xesht, will that be enough to defeat the enemy?
Text.zh: 杀死薛斯，就可以打败敌人吗？

Text.en: They are of one mind. One army. One force of will. <continue>We must destroy them in their domain. Shatter their very will. <continue>Then... I will seek to do what must be done.
Text.zh: 它们万众一心，一支军队，一个意志。<continue>我们必须杀进它们的领地，摧毁它们，粉碎它们的意志。<continue>之后……我会去做该做的事。

Text.en: And if we do not succeed?
Text.zh: 如果我们失败了呢？

Text.en: This world will end.
Text.zh: 这个世界就会终结。

Text.en: Master... Ailith spoke your true name. She knows what you have planned for this world. <continue>It causes her great... distress.
Text.zh: 主人……艾利丝念出了你的真名。她知道你打算对这个世界做什么。<continue>这让她非常……痛苦。

Text.en: Ailith is where my Dream began. But she is not where it ends. <continue>She has strayed from the path. I felt it. Her thoughts often evade me. <continue>Observe her, for now. If she cannot be perfected... her line must end.
Text.zh: 艾利丝是我的梦开始的地方。但并非其终点。<continue>她已偏离了道路。我能感觉到。她的思绪常常避开我。<continue>先观察她。若她无法达到完美……她的血脉就必须终结。

Text.en: I, however, have great aspirations for you. For you, Archon... are perfection.
Text.zh: 然而，我对你寄予厚望。执政官，你……就是完美本身。

Text.en: I, however, have great aspirations for you. For you... are perfection.
Text.zh: 然而，我对你寄予厚望。你……就是完美本身。

Text.en: As you wish, master.
Text.zh: 如您所愿，主人。

Text.en: Well... you appear quite capable. I seek your aid. The very world is at stake!
Text.zh: 嗯……你看起来挺有本事的。我需要你的帮助。这世界危在旦夕！

Text.en: ... I am surprised to see you out here.
Text.zh: ……真没想到会在这儿见到你。

Text.en: I grow tired of attempting to save the world... but go on.
Text.zh: 我越来越厌倦拯救世界这种破事了……不过你接着说吧。

Text.en: I can relate to that.
Text.zh: 我懂你这种感觉。

Text.en: What is it this time?
Text.zh: 这回又是什么事？

Text.en: Does the end of the world bore you?
Text.zh: 你觉得世界末日很无聊吗？

Text.en: Yes... but only because I'm not the one ending it.
Text.zh: 确实无聊……谁让动手的人不是我呢。

Text.en: I... see...<continue>Well, your fearlessness is admirable!
Text.zh: 我……懂了……<continue>好吧，你这胆子倒是挺大。

Text.en: As ever. What threatens us now?
Text.zh: 又是这样。这回又是什么威胁？

Text.en: This is Wraeclast we're talking about. It'd be stranger if it wasn't.
Text.zh: 这可是瓦尔克拉斯。要是不出点事才怪呢。

Text.en: Composed in the face of danger. That's a good sign!
Text.zh: 临危不乱。真是好胆量！

Text.en: Aye, love. It always is. <continue>But you'll have to be a smidge more specific.
Text.zh: 是啊，亲爱的，我向来如此。<continue>不过你得说具体点。

Text.en: You're tellin' me...<continue>What exactly are we talkin' about here?
Text.zh: 你倒是说说……<continue>这回到底什么情况？

Text.en: What is it ye need?
Text.zh: 需要我帮什么忙？

Text.en: Ailith... it has been so long.
Text.zh: 艾利丝……好久不见了。

Text.en: Before us is the grasping hand of our enemy. We call them the 'Hiveborn'. <continue>They are creatures from another world, intent on invading Wraeclast. <continue>They operate under one mind... and they mean our doom.
Text.zh: 在我们面前，是敌人伸出的利爪。我们称之为“裂隙虫群”。<continue>它们是来自另一个世界的生物，意图入侵瓦尔克拉斯。<continue>它们受同一个意志支配……它们的目标，就是毁灭我们。

Text.en: Your timing is fortuitous. I need your aid.
Text.zh: 你来得正是时候。我需要你的帮助。

Text.en: What would you have me do?
Text.zh: 你要我怎么做？

Text.en: I admire their ambition if nothing else. How do we stop them?
Text.zh: 别的不说，它们的野心倒让我佩服。我们该怎么阻止它们？

Text.en: They will not eclipse us so easily. What must I do?
Text.zh: 想击垮我们可没那么容易。我该怎么做？

Text.en: Then let's make them work for it.
Text.zh: 那就让它们尝尝苦头。

Text.en: Let's get to it, then. What needs doin'?
Text.zh: 那就开始吧。需要我做什么？

Text.en: Just what I wanted to hear. How do we stop 'em?
Text.zh: 这话我爱听。我们该怎么收拾它们？

Text.en: Otherworldly creatures? How am I to deal with that?
Text.zh: 异世界的生物？我要怎么对付它们？

Text.en: What is the will of the Dreamer?
Text.zh: 幻梦者有何旨意？

Text.en: Before us is the grasping hand of our enemy. The Hiveborn's threat has intensified. <continue>Their numbers continue to grow and they are intent on invading Wraeclast. <continue>These are dire times...
Text.zh: 在我们面前，是敌人伸出的利爪。裂隙虫群的威胁更甚了。<continue>它们的数量持续增长，意图入侵瓦尔克拉斯。<continue>形势危急……

Text.en: How can I serve?
Text.zh: 我能做些什么？

Text.en: I admire your enthusiasm!
Text.zh: 我很欣赏你的干劲！

Text.en: When you are ready... step forth and open the breach. Remember your training!
Text.zh: 准备好了……就上前打开裂隙。拿出你训练的成果来！

Text.en: Unfortunately, we must open their breaches to be able to drive them back. But it must be done!
Text.zh: 遗憾的是，我们必须打开它们的裂隙才能将它们击退。但这事非做不可！

Text.en: Step forth and open the breach. Be ready to fight!
Text.zh: 上前，打开裂隙。准备战斗！

Text.en: Impressive! I knew I sensed greatness in you!
Text.zh: 漂亮！我就知道你不是凡人！

Text.en: You have advanced well. Please, you must rejoin the war effort!
Text.zh: 你进步很大。请务必回到战场上去！

Text.en: You did well. With training, you could be a worthy Keeper!
Text.zh: 你做得很好。经过训练，你完全有资格成为一名守护者！

Text.en: Do not despair. If you rejoin the war effort, your training can continue from where you left off!
Text.zh: 别灰心。只要你重新投入战斗，就能从之前的进度继续往下练。

Text.en: I am Ailith. Founder of the Keepers of the Flame. We are all that stands in the way of the Hiveborn consuming our world.
Text.zh: 我是艾利丝，苍焰守护者的创立者。我们就是阻挡裂隙虫群吞噬这个世界的最后一道防线。

Text.en: As you know, the Keepers of the Flame are all that stands in the way of the Hiveborn consuming our world.
Text.zh: 如你所知，苍焰守护者就是阻挡裂隙虫群吞噬这个世界的最后一道防线。

Text.en: The enemy left these behind. They are critical to our mission and will help us in the war ahead. <continue>Collect all that you find. But first...
Text.zh: 敌人留下的这些东西，对我们的任务至关重要，也会在接下来的战斗中帮到我们。<continue>收集这些东西。但在那之前……

Text.en: On behalf of the Keepers of the Flame, I invite you to our monastery. <continue>There, I can reveal more about our cause and how we can aid each other.
Text.zh: 我谨代表苍焰守护者，邀请你来我们的修道院。<continue>在那里，我可以向你进一步展示我们的事业，以及我们如何合作。

Text.en: On behalf of the Keepers of the Flame, I welcome you back to the Monastery.<continue>It has... changed somewhat since you left. Travel there. Then I can reveal more about our next steps.
Text.zh: 我谨代表苍焰守护者……欢迎你回到修道院。<continue>自你离开后，这里……有些变化。先去那边吧，之后我会告诉你下一步的计划。

Text.en: Hmm. I suppose I could pay a visit.
Text.zh: 嗯……去看看倒也无妨。

Text.en: This better not be another sort of cult... thing...
Text.zh: 希望别又是什么邪教组织……

Text.en: Of course not! I suggest you give us a chance.
Text.zh: 当然不是！你应该给我们一个机会。

Text.en: As you wish.
Text.zh: 那就随你吧。

Text.en: Hmm... I'll consider it.
Text.zh: 嗯……我会考虑的。

Text.en: If these Hiveborn are as dangerous as you say, perhaps I should stop by.
Text.zh: 如果这些裂隙虫群真像你说的那么危险，或许我该去看看。

Text.en: Twist my arm, why don't ya? Yeah, alright.
Text.zh: 非要逼我是吧？好，我去。

Text.en: A monastery, you say? Well, who am I to turn down a lass in distress?
Text.zh: 你说修道院？行吧，哪有拒绝落难姑娘的道理？

Text.en: If it is the Dreamer's will to have me return, then so be it.
Text.zh: 若这是幻梦者的意志，那我便回去吧。

Text.en: You won't regret it.
Text.zh: 你不会后悔的。

Text.en: Excellent.
Text.zh: 太好了。

Text.en: We call them... the 'Hiveborn'. <continue>They are creatures from another world, intent on invading Wraeclast.<continue>They operate under one mind... and they mean our doom.<continue>The Dreamer is pleased that you have come...
Text.zh: 我们称之为“裂隙虫群”。<continue>它们是来自另一个世界的生物，意图入侵瓦尔克拉斯。<continue>它们受同一个意志支配……它们的目标，就是毁灭我们。<continue>幻梦者对你的到来感到很欣慰……

Text.en: I am relieved to see you. I wasn't sure you'd come, given what we faced. The <i>{Dreamer} is pleased.
Text.zh: 看到你回来，我松了口气。经历了那么多事，我还以为你不会来。<i>{幻梦者}很高兴。

Text.en: You have returned! It is good to see you. I admit... I did not expect you would ever return.
Text.zh: 你回来了！见到你真高兴。说实话……我没想到你还会回来。

Text.en: The what?
Text.zh: 幻什么？

Text.en: Am I supposed to know who that is?
Text.zh: 我该知道那是谁吗？

Text.en: And who would that be?
Text.zh: 那是谁？

Text.en: You've mistaken me for someone who knows who that is.
Text.zh: 你可能搞错了吧，我可不知道那是谁。

Text.en: Are they now? <continue>Who's this dreamer then?
Text.zh: 是吗？<continue>幻梦者是谁？

Text.en: Who's this Dreamer fella, then? Sounds like he's sleepin' on the job! Heh heh!
Text.zh: 这位幻梦者又是何方神圣？听着像是在睡大觉！嘿嘿！

Text.en: He does not choose to sleep! He was forced to rest... to recover.
Text.zh: 他不是自己想睡的！他是被迫休眠……为了恢复力量。

Text.en: Sorry, miss. Just a little joke.
Text.zh: 抱歉，小姐。开个玩笑。

Text.en: Ah, the man in charge here, yes? I would speak with this Dreamer of yours. Where is he?
Text.zh: 啊，你们这儿的老大，对吧？我想跟你们的幻梦者聊聊。他在哪儿？

Text.en: He recovers, for now. Though I hold hope that you will have the chance to speak with him someday.<continue>But yes... the Benevolent Dreamer is indeed who we serve here.
Text.zh: 他目前还在恢复。不过我相信，总有一天你能见到他。<continue>不过没错……我们侍奉的正是仁爱的幻梦者。

Text.en: It is good to see you too, Ailith. The Dreamer's path has led me here... and perhaps, it is time I make amends.
Text.zh: 见到你我也很高兴，艾利丝。幻梦者的道路将我引向此处……也许，是时候让我弥补过错了。

Text.en: The Benevolent Dreamer guides us. He knows the enemy's weaknesses... and their strengths.<continue>As we speak, they attempt to breach our world and the Dreamer warns us we must act now.
Text.zh: 仁爱的幻梦者指引着我们。他了解敌人的弱点……也了解它们的长处。<continue>就在此刻，它们正试图撕裂我们的世界。幻梦者警告我们，必须立刻行动。

Text.en: The Dreamer forgives via actions, not words. But I do have hope for you. <continue>As you can see, the monastery has... changed since you left. But our cause has not. <continue>Our enemy grows in number. As we speak, they attempt to breach our world and the Dreamer warns us we must act now.
Text.zh: 幻梦者的宽恕，不靠言语，只在行动。不过我对你还有期待。<continue>如你所见，自你离开后，修道院……有些变化。但我们的事业没有改变。<continue>敌人的数量在增长。就在此刻，它们正试图撕裂我们的世界。幻梦者警告我们，必须立刻行动。

Text.en: How can we take on such a foe? Given their sheer numbers... it seems hopeless.
Text.zh: 我们真能对付这样的敌人吗？单看它们的数量……似乎没什么希望。

Text.en: <i>{We} must act? What is your Dreamer doing?
Text.zh: <i>{我们}必须行动？那你的幻梦者又在做什么？

Text.en: He was... forced to rest, and now gathers his strength for the coming battle. <continue>In the meantime, we carry out his will.
Text.zh: 他……被迫休眠，正在为即将到来的战斗积蓄力量。<continue>在此期间，由我们来执行他的意志。

Text.en: In other words, the war's barely begun – and you're already losing.
Text.zh: 换句话说，战争才刚刚开始——你们就已经节节败退了。

Text.en: Given that they are so many, and we are so few, his warning seems warranted.
Text.zh: 敌人那么多，我们人这么少，他的警告倒也在理。

Text.en: 'Attempt' to breach our world? <continue>If that fight was any indication, I'd say they're succeeding.
Text.zh: “试图”撕裂我们的世界？<continue>从之前那场战斗来看，应该说它们已经得手了。

Text.en: Seems these Hiveborn have made quite a bit o' headway already.
Text.zh: 看来这些裂隙虫群已经占了不小的先机。

Text.en: Call me pessimistic, but we seem pretty well breached as is, no?
Text.zh: 就当我是悲观吧，不过我们这边已经被打穿了吧？

Text.en: If this Dreamer of yours is so wise and powerful, why is he cooped up dreamin' in his bed while you're all riskin' your lives?
Text.zh: 既然你的幻梦者如此睿智强大，为什么还躲在床上做美梦，而你们却要去拼命？

Text.en: As I said, he is recovering. <continue>He does not sleep safely in a warm bed!
Text.zh: 我说了，他在恢复。<continue>不是在温暖的床上做美梦！

Text.en: Well in any case, what hope do we have against an enemy such as this... Hiveborn? <continue>They'll surely overwhelm us all.
Text.zh: 好吧，不管怎样，面对这样的敌人……裂隙虫群……我们还有什么希望？<continue>它们肯定会把我们全都吞了。

Text.en: The Hiveborn threat must be eliminated, but how?<continue>What can be done?
Text.zh: 裂隙虫群的威胁必须消除，可要怎么办呢？<continue>我们能做些什么？

Text.en: It stands before us...  the Genesis Tree.
Text.zh: 它就在我们面前……起源之树。

Text.en: Here she stands... the Genesis Tree.
Text.zh: 她就在这儿……起源之树。

Text.en: It is... an interesting looking tree.
Text.zh: 这棵树……看着倒是挺特别。

Text.en: And what a tree it is.
Text.zh: 这树不一般啊。

Text.en: That term is not known to me.
Text.zh: 我没听说过这名字。

Text.en: Tree?
Text.zh: 树？

Text.en: Not like any tree I've ever seen.
Text.zh: 我从没见过这样的树。

Text.en: Oh. So <i>{that's} what this is.
Text.zh: 哦。原来<i>{这就是}那东西啊。

Text.en: The bloody what now? I cannae remember a single tree so hideous in all my days!
Text.zh: 你说什么玩意儿？我活了这么久，从没见过这么丑的树！

Text.en: Well, its appearance does not alter its wondrous function!
Text.zh: 它的外表并不妨碍它惊人的作用！

Text.en: She has grown greatly since last I saw her.
Text.zh: 她比我上次见她时长大了不少。

Text.en: The Genesis Tree is a gift to us from the Dreamer himself. The tree provides everything we need to sustain ourselves and protect this world from the Hiveborn. <continue>She is... life. In its most essential form.
Text.zh: 起源之树是幻梦者亲自赐予我们的礼物。这棵树可以提供我们所需的一切，让我们得以生存并保护这个世界免受裂隙虫群的侵袭。<continue>她就是……生命最本质的形态。

Text.en: Yes. We have continued to nourish her, and in return, she provides everything we need to sustain ourselves. <continue>She is... life. In its most essential form.
Text.zh: 是的。我们不断滋养她，而她则回报给我们生存所需的一切。<continue>她就是……生命最本质的形态。

Text.en: Fine. But... how can it aid us? It's a tree.
Text.zh: 好吧。可……它到底能怎么帮我们？它就是棵树。

Text.en: War and gardening are quite different things... How could this possibly help?
Text.zh: 打仗和种花养草可不是一回事……这东西到底能帮上什么忙？

Text.en: Curious. What precisely does it do?
Text.zh: 有意思。它到底有什么用？

Text.en: Aren't all trees?
Text.zh: 哪棵树不是这样？

Text.en: You misunderstand.
Text.zh: 你没搞明白。

Text.en: Dare I say, it reminds me o' the Spirit.
Text.zh: 容我说一句，这让我想起万灵。

Text.en: I wouldn't know anything about that. But...
Text.zh: 那我可不懂。不过……

Text.en: Yeah, yeah... but what does it actually <i>{do?}
Text.zh: 行了行了……但它到底有什么<i>{用？}

Text.en: I ken a thing or two about trees. This is <i>{not} a tree of any natural order. <continue>What must I do? Pour blood on it? Feed it some offal?
Text.zh: 我对树还是略知一二的。这可<i>{不是}自然长成的树。<continue>我该怎么做？给它浇血？喂它吃内脏？

Text.en: Well... I... Allow me to explain.<continue>You're not yet understanding what she is capable of!
Text.zh: 这……我……让我解释一下。<continue>你还没明白她真正的能力！

Text.en: I worry she will reject me. Because of my absence... she may not recognise my imprint.
Text.zh: 我担心她会拒绝我。毕竟我离开了这么久……她可能认不出我的印记了。

Text.en: Nourish the tree and she will nourish you in return. I will show you. <continue>Take this... and go to her.
Text.zh: 滋养这棵树，她也会滋养你。我来教你。<continue>拿着这个……到她那里去。

Text.en: She is not so fickle. She understands your heart. Let us see. <continue>Take this... and go to her.
Text.zh: 她没那么善变。她能读懂你的心。试试看吧。<continue>拿着这个……到她那里去。

Text.en: Now, it is time to place the Wombgift on the tree.
Text.zh: 现在，是时候把孕育赠礼放到树上了。

Text.en: See? She does not reject you!
Text.zh: 看吧，她没有拒绝你！

Text.en: Now, the true test... give her the Wombgift.
Text.zh: 接下来是真正的考验……把孕育赠礼交给她。

Text.en: A womb what?
Text.zh: 孕育什么？

Text.en: A what? Did you misspeak?
Text.zh: 什么？你没说错吧？

Text.en: Can you repeat that? I fear I misheard you.
Text.zh: 能再说一遍吗？我怕我听错了。

Text.en: The what? You say that like it's a normal thing.
Text.zh: 什么？你说得跟这东西很平常似的。

Text.en: Place the what?
Text.zh: 放什么？

Text.en: Eh? Womb <i>{what?} You havin' a laugh?
Text.zh: 呃？孕育<i>{什么？}你在开玩笑吧？

Text.en: A womb what? Oh, aye... this is a true abomination! I can feel it in my bones!
Text.zh: 孕育什么来着？哦，对……这绝对是邪物！我这心里头直发毛！

Text.en: She accepts. She is a wonder to behold.
Text.zh: 她接受了。她可真是个奇物。

Text.en: Not at all.
Text.zh: 怎么会呢。

Text.en: A Wombgift. It <i>{is} a fitting name... given all she means to us.
Text.zh: 孕育赠礼。这名字<i>{很是}贴切……毕竟她对我们来说意义重大。

Text.en: It sounds... monstrous.
Text.zh: 听起来……多少有点可怕。

Text.en: It <i>{is} rather adorable...
Text.zh: <i>{倒是}挺可爱的……

Text.en: I... see...
Text.zh: 我……懂了……

Text.en: I still don't understand what it <i>{is}. <continue>But maybe I don't want to.
Text.zh: 我还是没明白它到底<i>{是}什么。<continue>不过也许我根本就不想明白。

Text.en: Aye. If you say so.
Text.zh: 行吧，你说是就是。

Text.en: Still think you could've called it somethin' less... strange.
Text.zh: 我觉得你至少能给它起一个不那么……奇怪的名字。

Text.en: Fitting or not, I shan't be calling this... thing... a tree. Even if it is of some use!
Text.zh: 名字贴不贴切另说，反正我是不会把这……东西……叫做树的。就算它真有点用处！

Text.en: Remember, the Genesis Tree is not of this world. The Dreamer captured her from the enemy... then gifted her to us.
Text.zh: 记住，起源之树并不属于这个世界。是幻梦者从敌人手中俘获了她……然后作为礼物送给了我们。

Text.en: The Dreamer captured her from the enemy... then gifted her to us.
Text.zh: 是幻梦者从敌人手中俘获了她……然后作为礼物送给了我们。

Text.en: Now, to grow the Wombgift, we must nourish it with the blood of the enemy.
Text.zh: 好了，要让孕育赠礼成长，我们必须用敌人的血液来浇灌它。

Text.en: Strange. And yet... impressive.
Text.zh: 真离奇啊。但也……很厉害。

Text.en: Ha! If it offers power, who am I to say no?
Text.zh: 哈！如果它能让我变强，我没理由拒绝。

Text.en: Most peculiar. But undoubtedly useful.
Text.zh: 挺诡异的，不过确实有用。

Text.en: Still feels wrong... but I suppose it's not hurting anybody. <continue>Besides the Hiveborn, that is.
Text.zh: 感觉还是不太对……不过好像也没伤到谁。<continue>裂隙虫群那群怪物除外。

Text.en: I see what you mean. This here could come in handy. <continue>Even if it does make me skin crawl.
Text.zh: 我明白你的意思。这东西应该能派上用场。<continue>虽然确实有点让人发毛。

Text.en: Not sure how I feel about this...
Text.zh: 总感觉哪里不太对……

Text.en: It's perfectly safe, I assure you.
Text.zh: 我向你保证，这绝对安全。

Text.en: Ahh! I knew it! It damn well drinks blood, doesn't it? Strange weapons for damned stranger foes!
Text.zh: 啊哈！我就知道！它果然喝血，是吧？对付该死的邪物，就得用这种邪门的武器！

Text.en: I understand it seems odd. But you will come to see her beauty. I promise you!
Text.zh: 我知道这看起来怪怪的。但你终究会明白她的美。我向你保证！

Text.en: Remarkable. Her potential is limitless!
Text.zh: 太惊人了，她的潜力无穷无尽！

Text.en: Yes. She is vital to the war effort!
Text.zh: 没错。她是咱们打赢这场仗的关键。

Text.en: Yes. She will make all the difference in the war ahead!
Text.zh: 没错。她将决定这场战争的走向。

Text.en: Now, the time comes for you to do your part. <continue>First, you must find more of the enemies' breaches. Stabilise them. Drive them back!
Text.zh: 现在轮到你出手了。<continue>首先，你必须找到更多的敌人裂隙。稳住它们，然后把它们击退！

Text.en: How will I find more of them?
Text.zh: 我该怎么找到更多裂隙？

Text.en: You'll have to tell me where to find them first.
Text.zh: 你得先告诉我上哪儿去找它们。

Text.en: Gladly. But where might I find these breaches?
Text.zh: 乐意效劳。但我上哪儿能找到这些裂隙？

Text.en: Have to find them first.
Text.zh: 那也得先找到它们才行。

Text.en: Aye, that I can do. Any idea where to start?
Text.zh: 行，这事我能干。知道该从哪儿开始吗？

Text.en: Anythin' to get me away from this 'tree'. <continue>Where do I start?
Text.zh: 只要能离这破“树”远点，干什么都行。<continue>我从哪儿开始找？

Text.en: How do I seek this foe?
Text.zh: 我要怎么找到这些敌人？

Text.en: Forgive me... how will I seek out the enemy?
Text.zh: 不好意思……我该如何找到敌人？

Text.en: They are difficult to miss. But... <i>{this} might aid you in getting started.
Text.zh: 想不碰到都难。不过……<i>{这个}能给你指个路。

Text.en: You will know when they are near. But... this may aid you in making a start.
Text.zh: 它们在附近时，你自然就会察觉。不过……这个能给你指个路。

Text.en: The Dreamer observes you. He believes in you. As do I.
Text.zh: 幻梦者注视着你。他相信你。我也是。

Text.en: Return to me once you have faced the enemy's breaches.
Text.zh: 处理完敌人的裂隙，就回来见我。

Text.en: The Dreamer observes you. He holds hope for your redemption. As do I.
Text.zh: 幻梦者注视着你。他相信你能获得救赎。我也是。

Text.en: Return to me once you have faced the enemy breaches. Do not fail us!
Text.zh: 处理完敌人的裂隙，就回来见我。不要让我们失望！

Text.en: You've done well. The enemy was dealt a significant blow. May it give them pause. <continue>Now... we must raise the stakes.
Text.zh: 你做得很好。给了敌人沉重的一击，应该能让它们消停一阵。<continue>现在……我们必须玩点大的了。

Text.en: I am ready. Let us strike while they remember their fear.
Text.zh: 我准备好了。趁它们还记得什么叫害怕，我们主动出击。

Text.en: I'm listening.
Text.zh: 我听着呢。

Text.en: What do you propose?
Text.zh: 你有什么提议？

Text.en: Raise the stakes, how?
Text.zh: 玩点大的，怎么玩？

Text.en: Go on, then. What's next?
Text.zh: 接着说，下一步怎么做？

Text.en: Ooh, I like the sound of that!
Text.zh: 噢，听起来不错啊！

Text.en: I am ready to prove myself.
Text.zh: 该我上场证明自己了。

Text.en: And prove yourself, you shall.
Text.zh: 你定能证明自己。

Text.en: So be it. The ghoulish bastards willnae stand a chance.
Text.zh: 就这么办。那些恶心的杂种没戏唱了。

Text.en: Not if the world is to survive!
Text.zh: 要想保住这个世界，就必须这么做！

Text.en: The splintered pieces of the enemy's world, when brought to the Genesis Tree, can create a... tactical weapon of sorts. <continue>We have already successfully birthed one from the Tree. Let us see what it can do.
Text.zh: 把敌人世界的碎片交给起源之树，就能制造出某种……战术武器。<continue>我们已经成功从树上孕育出了一个。来试试它的能耐吧。

Text.en: Here, you can see an area affected by the enemy. But... the reality of their presence is worse than it appears. <continue>Using these weapons against them, we can uncover their pending invasion. <continue>Take the stone. Use it to reveal the truth.
Text.zh: 来，你可以看到被敌人影响的区域。但……实际渗透的情况，比你看到的要严重得多。<continue>用这些武器对付它们，就能揭开它们的入侵计划。<continue>拿上这块石头，去揭露真相吧。

Text.en: Unbelievable... they were there all along.
Text.zh: 难以置信……它们居然一直都在那里。

Text.en: Dear me... I thought you were exaggerating when you said 'cities'. <continue>What are they doing in there?
Text.zh: 天哪……你说“巢穴城”的时候，我还以为你在夸张。<continue>它们在里面搞什么名堂呢？

Text.en: They are a scourge. An infestation. Something must be done.
Text.zh: 它们就是灾祸，就是瘟疫。必须处理掉。

Text.en: My thoughts exactly. All along, there they've been...
Text.zh: 我也是这么想的。它们居然一直都在那儿……

Text.en: They're even greater in number than I imagined.
Text.zh: 数量甚至比我想象的还要多。

Text.en: It is hard to fathom the sheer scope of their invasion. There they've been...
Text.zh: 这入侵规模……大得离谱。它们一直都在那儿……

Text.en: Spirit's breath... All this belongs to the Hiveborn?
Text.zh: 万灵在上……这些都是裂隙虫群？

Text.en: I'm afraid so. And they've been there longer than you might think.
Text.zh: 恐怕是的。而且它们在那儿的时间，比你想的还要久。

Text.en: Blimey! How long have those been there?
Text.zh: 天哪！那些东西在那儿多久了？

Text.en: Too long.
Text.zh: 很久了。

Text.en: A scourge laying in wait... horrifying.
Text.zh: 伺机而动的灾祸……太可怕了。

Text.en: Mindless and vile.
Text.zh: 毫无心智，纯粹的恶。

Text.en: What in the Taisce's name is that?! A horror afore my very eyes!
Text.zh: 泰斯卡在上，这是什么鬼东西？！简直是活生生的噩梦！

Text.en: I'm glad you can appreciate the threat of this revelation. There they were...
Text.zh: 很好，你总算意识到事情有多严重了。它们就在那儿……

Text.en: Biding their time. Building their forces. But now, we catch them on the backfoot.
Text.zh: 静待时机，积蓄力量。但现在，我们打它们个措手不及。

Text.en: First, we'll enter one of their Hives on the ground. I will aid you in destroying it.
Text.zh: 首先，我们进入地面上的裂隙巢穴。我会帮你摧毁它。

Text.en: Next, we must assault their Hive Fortress, looming above. Bringing this down will cause chaos among them and get us closer to their core.
Text.zh: 接下来，我们必须进攻悬在上空的裂隙巢穴堡垒。把它打下来，肯定会让它们阵脚大乱，这样我们就能更接近它们的核心。

Text.en: Finally, we face their Depraved Lords within their Hive Colony. Esh and Tul.
Text.zh: 最后，我们要杀进巢穴城核心，对抗堕落领主，艾许和托沃。

Text.en: Killing them will bring complete disorder and stall their invasion.
Text.zh: 只要干掉它们，整个体系都会失控，也能拖延它们的入侵计划。

Text.en: This will give us time to await the word of the Dreamer... for the next stage of his plan.
Text.zh: 这样一来，我们就能争取时间……等待幻梦者给出下一步指示。

Text.en: I understand. We must prevail!
Text.zh: 我明白，这一仗我们必须赢！

Text.en: Sounds simple enough.
Text.zh: 听起来还挺简单的。

Text.en: It will not be easy. Esh and Tul are nothing if not formidable.
Text.zh: 这可不简单，艾许和托沃绝非等闲之辈。

Text.en: So it shall be done.
Text.zh: 那就这么干吧。

Text.en: Let's get one thing straight: your Dreamer doesn't tell me what to do. <continue>But it seems our interests are aligned, for now.
Text.zh: 先说清楚一点：你的幻梦者没资格对我指手画脚。<continue>不过眼下，我们的目标倒是一致。

Text.en: Then let's get started!
Text.zh: 那我们就开始吧！

Text.en: I do love me some depravity.
Text.zh: 我就喜欢跟这些邪门玩意儿打交道。

Text.en: I doubt you will love this kind. But not to worry...
Text.zh: 不过你未必会喜欢这种类型的。不过别担心……

Text.en: I am ready. I shall not fail you. I shall not fail... him.
Text.zh: 我准备好了。我不会让你失望的，也不会让……他失望。

Text.en: Alright. Let us see what can be done. Then I'd have some words with your... Dreamer.
Text.zh: 好，那就来试试看吧。完事之后，我要和你那个……幻梦者谈谈。

Text.en: I will be with you. And the rest of the Keepers will be waging war against the enemy across other fronts. <continue>Remember, you are not alone!
Text.zh: 我会与你并肩作战。其他守护者也会在各个战线上牵制敌人。<continue>记住，你不是一个人！

Text.en: So... you defeated Vruun. And were so kind as to... return with his head.
Text.zh: 这么说……你打败了弗伦。还顺手……把他的头带回来了。

Text.en: Hmm... it is strange when you put it that way.
Text.zh: 嗯……你这么一说，还真有点怪。

Text.en: Not to worry. Your instincts were correct in this case.
Text.zh: 别担心，这次你做得没错。

Text.en: Yes. And?
Text.zh: 对，然后呢？

Text.en: I didn't expect to see it, that's all.
Text.zh: 我只是没想到会看到这一幕。

Text.en: What better way to ensure he does not return?
Text.zh: 要确保他不会卷土重来，这不就是最好的办法了？

Text.en: Hard to argue with that.
Text.zh: 这话倒是没毛病。

Text.en: He proved himself undeserving of it.
Text.zh: 他不配留着那颗头。

Text.en: Yes, well... no arguments there.
Text.zh: 是啊，这点我同意。

Text.en: For every hunt, a trophy.
Text.zh: 每次狩猎，都得带点战利品回来。

Text.en: And a fine trophy it is.
Text.zh: 而且这战利品还挺不错。

Text.en: A trophy fit for a queen, I reckon!
Text.zh: 我看这战利品献给女王都够格！

Text.en: Ah, yes. The Genesis Tree will definitely enjoy this gift.
Text.zh: 啊，没错。起源之树肯定喜欢这份礼物。

Text.en: Oh... yeah. I brought it... for the tree.
Text.zh: 哦……对。我带回来……是想献给树。

Text.en: Give it to her. I believe she will reward you quite well for this feat.
Text.zh: 把它交给她吧。她绝对会好好回报你的。

Text.en: I recall that the Genesis Tree values certain... ranks... of the enemy.
Text.zh: 我记得起源之树只对某些……等级的敌人感兴趣。

Text.en: It is true, indeed.
Text.zh: 确实如此。

Text.en: I cannae keep track of what this damned tree wants or does not want to eat!
Text.zh: 这该死的树到底想吃啥不想吃啥，我真是记不住！

Text.en: You did well, rest assured!
Text.zh: 你做得很好，放心吧！

Text.en: Gift Vruun's head to the Genesis Tree. I believe she will reward you quite well for this feat.
Text.zh: 把弗伦的头献给起源之树把。我相信她会好好奖励你的。

Text.en: To deal with the fortifications of the enemy's realm, you must wield the Flame. Do you accept this gift?
Text.zh: 要想突破敌人的防御，你必须掌握苍焰之力。你愿意接受这份礼物吗？

Text.en: I trust you, Ailith.
Text.zh: 我相信你，艾利丝。

Text.en: Get on with it. Give it to me!
Text.zh: 别磨蹭了，给我吧。

Text.en: Yes. I willingly accept.
Text.zh: 是的，我接受。

Text.en: What happens if I do?
Text.zh: 如果我接受了，会怎样？

Text.en: No harm will befall you. The Flame will simply aid you against the Hiveborn's defences.
Text.zh: 你不会受到伤害。苍焰只会助你突破裂隙虫群的防御。

Text.en: Alright then. Guess we're doing this.
Text.zh: 好吧。那就来吧。

Text.en: No point turnin' back now. I'm ready.
Text.zh: 事到如今，也没法回头了。我准备好了。

Text.en: Sure. What's the worst that could happen?
Text.zh: 当然。再坏能坏到哪儿去？

Text.en: Yes. I am ready.
Text.zh: 是的。我准备好了。

Text.en: Well... we've come this far, haven't we?
Text.zh: 也罢……都走到这一步了，对吧？

Text.en: You are now one of us... a Keeper of the Flame! History will remember this moment!
Text.zh: 现在，你是我们的一员了……苍焰守护者！历史会铭记这一刻！

Text.en: Your training is complete. You are chosen. Burn bright, Keeper of the Flame!
Text.zh: 你的训练完成了。你已被选中。燃烧吧，苍焰守护者！

Text.en: Now, we've no time to waste. Approach the wall!
Text.zh: 我们不能再耽搁了。靠近那堵墙！

Text.en: You have done remarkably well. This may just change the course of history!
Text.zh: 你干得非常漂亮。这一仗，说不定真的会改写历史。

Text.en: Something tells me there is more to be done.
Text.zh: 我总觉得事情还没结束。

Text.en: I wish you were wrong. But yes.
Text.zh: 真希望你说错了。但你说得没错。

Text.en: You're welcome. You and your Dreamer.
Text.zh: 不用客气，你和你那位幻梦者。

Text.en: He will be pleased, as am I. But we could still use your help.
Text.zh: 他会很高兴的，我也是。但我们还需要你的帮助。

Text.en: Of course.
Text.zh: 没问题。

Text.en: There is still more to be done. I feel it.
Text.zh: 我总觉得事情还没结束。

Text.en: Yes. There is.
Text.zh: 没错。还没结束。

Text.en: Let's not count our rhoas before they hatch. <continue>It's not like the Hiveborn are dead and gone.
Text.zh: 别高兴得太早。<continue>裂隙虫群还没死绝呢。

Text.en: We achieved a great victory today... but yes, you are right.
Text.zh: 今天我们打了个漂亮的胜仗……但你说得没错。

Text.en: So... that's it?
Text.zh: 所以……就这么结束了？

Text.en: Well, no. This was a hard-fought victory, yes, but there is still more to be done.
Text.zh: 不，还没结束。今天这场胜仗来之不易，但还有很多事要做。

Text.en: Aye... I gathered as much. Lead on, then.
Text.zh: 嗯……我也猜到了。那就带路吧。

Text.en: Alright! First drink's on me!
Text.zh: 好！第一杯酒算我的！

Text.en: Don't get ahead of yourself. We have won the battle, but not the war.
Text.zh: 别高兴得太早。这场仗是赢了，但战争还没结束。

Text.en: Now, we must face the true threat.
Text.zh: 现在，我们必须面对真正的威胁。

Text.en: You have sensed it too? The Dreamer will reveal what is next.
Text.zh: 你也感觉到了？幻梦者会揭示下一步该怎么做。

Text.en: This old fool's enough wit left to know this isn't the end of it. What now, lass?
Text.zh: 我这个老糊涂还没糊涂到以为这就完了。接下来呢，姑娘？

Text.en: Not an old fool at all, it seems.
Text.zh: 看来你一点也不糊涂。

Text.en: We must return to the Monastery with the flesh of the Depraved Lords. There, we shall seek the counsel of the Dreamer.
Text.zh: 我们必须带着堕落领主的血肉回到修道院。去那里请示幻梦者的指引。

Text.en: It is peculiar to me, to fully understand what I feel right now. After... so long.
Text.zh: 此刻的心情，连我自己都难以说清。已经……太久没有这种感觉了。

Text.en: What is on your mind, Ailith?
Text.zh: 你在想什么，艾利丝？

Text.en: Uh oh. Are you about to get... emotional?
Text.zh: 呃，你不会是要……真情流露了吧？

Text.en: What troubles you, Ailith?
Text.zh: 你在烦恼什么，艾利丝？

Text.en: Xesht is defeated. I thought you'd be happy.
Text.zh: 薛斯已经死了，我还以为你会高兴。

Text.en: Thought you'd be in for celebration, not introspection.
Text.zh: 我还以为你会庆祝，没想到你却在胡思乱想。

Text.en: Are you... okay, miss?
Text.zh: 你……没事吧，小姐？

Text.en: I'm... not sure I understand.
Text.zh: 我……有点听不明白。

Text.en: Oh, dear... there's great sorrow in you. You've hidden it well, lass. Dinnae hold back now.
Text.zh: 哦，天哪……你心里藏着巨大的悲伤。姑娘，你藏得真好。这会儿就别憋着了。

Text.en: I do not have much time. Please, just listen.
Text.zh: 我时间不多了，请听我说。

Text.en: The Dreamer is not truthful. At least... not wholly. <continue>Over countless lives, I have pieced together fragments of the truth, and finally, I know his real nature. <continue>It is true, he seeks to protect life itself... but to do so, he would subjugate us all. <continue>He is both unlike his brethren and alike them. While they seek to consume us, he seeks to dominate us. <continue>Unthinking drones. Smiling peacefully. Our very humanity ripped from us. Thriving, but not living, within his version of a perfected world. <continue>That... is Chayula's perverse dream.
Text.zh: 幻梦者说的并非真话。至少……不全是真的。<continue>我历经无数个轮回，一点点拼凑出真相。终于，我看清了他的真面目。<continue>没错，他确实想保护生命本身……但为此，他要把我们所有人都置于他的掌控之下。<continue>他既不同于他的那些同类，却又在本质上跟它们相同。它们要吞噬我们，而他要统治我们。<continue>把我们变成没有思想的工蜂，脸上带着温顺的笑，却失去人性。在他所谓的完美世界里繁盛，却毫无生机。<continue>那……就是夏乌拉扭曲的梦想。

Text.en: Chayula?
Text.zh: 夏乌拉？

Text.en: Chayula?
Text.zh: 夏乌拉？

Text.en: Chayula?
Text.zh: 夏乌拉？

Text.en: Chayula?
Text.zh: 夏乌拉？

Text.en: Chayula?
Text.zh: 夏乌拉？

Text.en: Chayula?
Text.zh: 夏乌拉？

Text.en: Ailith! You should not speak his true name aloud!
Text.zh: 艾利丝！你不该念出他的真名！

Text.en: Chayula?
Text.zh: 夏乌拉？

Text.en: His true name. His Hive Lord name.
Text.zh: 他的真名。他……作为裂隙巢穴之主的名讳。

Text.en: I... am at loss for words. We must stop him.
Text.zh: 我……都不知道该说什么了。我们必须阻止他。

Text.en: His power is immense. You have not seen it or... felt it like I have.
Text.zh: 他的力量深不可测。你不曾像我一样见识过……感受过。

Text.en: Then what do we do? There must be some way I can help you.
Text.zh: 那我们该怎么办？一定有我能帮上忙的地方。

Text.en: I took one look at him and knew he was no good. <continue>How did you not see it? He fell out of a sac!
Text.zh: 我第一眼看见他就觉得不对劲。<continue>你怎么就没看出来？他可是从囊里蹦出来的！

Text.en: He has been within my every thought since I came into existence. <continue>Waking... sleeping... he's always been there.
Text.zh: 自我诞生之日起，他便一直占据着我的意识。<continue>不管清醒……还是沉睡……他从未离开过。

Text.en: A controlling master. And you... his puppet. There's a certain cruelty to enslaving the living that even I can't abide.
Text.zh: 一个控制欲极强的主人。而你……是他的傀儡。奴役活物这种残忍之事，连我都看不过去。

Text.en: Bah! So blinded by my fascination... I could not see him for what he truly was!
Text.zh: 唉！我被好奇心蒙住了眼……竟没看透他的真面目。

Text.en: We were both fooled. As all the Keepers continue to be.
Text.zh: 我们都被骗了。守护者们至今还被蒙在鼓里。

Text.en: And now all of Wraeclast will pay the price – unless he is brought to heel.
Text.zh: 现在，整个瓦尔克拉斯都要为此付出代价——除非我们能制服他。

Text.en: I knew I was right not to trust him! He is a snake, through and through.
Text.zh: 我早知道不该信他！他骨子里就是条毒蛇。

Text.en: I'm sorry to have led you down this path.
Text.zh: 对不起，是我把你们引上了这条路。

Text.en: Doesn't matter now, does it? We're here either way.
Text.zh: 现在说这些还有用吗？我们都已经走到这一步了。

Text.en: Spirit's breath... I trusted you, Ailith. I trusted <i>{him}.
Text.zh: 万灵在上……我信任过你，艾利丝。我也信任过<i>{他}。

Text.en: I know... I'm sorry. I truly am.
Text.zh: 我知道……对不起。真的对不起。

Text.en: Keep your bloody apologies. Ugh, what a wretched fool I've been.
Text.zh: 收起你那该死的道歉吧。唉，我真是个蠢货。

Text.en: I knew it! I knew this shite was too good to be true. He's been pullin' the wool all along!
Text.zh: 我早就觉得不对劲！怎么可能会有这么好的事。他一直在耍我们！

Text.en: It has cost me greatly to attain this knowledge. You can't imagine... the hold he has, and has <i>{always had}, over my mind...
Text.zh: 为了搞清这些真相，我付出了很大的代价。你无法想象…… <i>{从始至终}，他对我的思想有多深的掌控……

Text.en: Sure, that's your excuse. What's mine? Just went along with it all like a good little soldier! <continue>Bloody idiot.
Text.zh: 是啊，那是你的借口。那我该找什么借口呢？就这么乖乖地跟着，像个听话的小兵！<continue>真是蠢到家了。

Text.en: And tell me... who are you to say his vision is not the world we deserve?
Text.zh: 那你倒是说说……你凭什么觉得他眼中的完美世界，不是我们应得的结局？

Text.en: You must look inside yourself to answer that question. I cannot do it for you.
Text.zh: 这个问题，你得问自己。我无法替你回答。

Text.en: I wish I were wrong about folk... but in the pit o' my stomach, I felt no sense o' goodness in him!
Text.zh: 真希望我是看错了……可我打心底里，就没觉得他身上有半点善意！

Text.en: I could never see it clearly. Clues scattered through countless versions of myself... Only now do they finally make sense.
Text.zh: 我始终看不清真相。线索散落在无数个我身上……直到此刻才终于串联起来。

Text.en: I know what it means to reassemble your mind, dear lass. My heart breaks for ye. Just know that I'll be by yer side.
Text.zh: 我明白拼凑破碎的自我是什么滋味，姑娘。我为你感到心痛。但请记住，我会站在你这边。

Text.en: I feel... him... returning. Please. Remember what I have told you, but do not speak of it freely with She Who Comes Next.
Text.zh: 我能感觉到……他……快回来了。求你了。记住我告诉你的话，但不要轻易对我的后来者说起这些。

Text.en: They come from another world... a barren world... and they crave our living land and sky. <continue>Our unbroken sun. <continue>They cannot be allowed to gain a foothold here, or they will poison Wraeclast the same way they poisoned themselves.
Text.zh: 它们来自另一个世界……一个贫瘠的世界……渴求着我们生机勃勃的土地、天空。<continue>还有我们那未陨的太阳。<continue>绝不能让它们在此立足，否则它们会像毒害自己的世界那样，毒害整个瓦尔克拉斯。

Text.en: It sounds like a miserable place. I almost feel sorry for them.
Text.zh: 听起来那地方挺惨的。我都有点同情它们了。

Text.en: There is no room for pity if we are to do what must be done.
Text.zh: 若要成就必要之事，就要收起怜悯之心。

Text.en: Then there's no hope of redemption? For any of them?
Text.zh: 那就一点救赎的可能都没有吗？它们之中谁都不行？

Text.en: I'm afraid not. Their minds are long since gone. <continue>At this point, killing them is the only mercy we can offer.
Text.zh: 恐怕没有。它们的心智早已消失。<continue>到了这个地步，杀了它们，是我们唯一能给的慈悲。

Text.en: Sounds like the kind of place I'd like to visit. <continue>Perhaps not <i>{live}, though.
Text.zh: 那地方听着倒是个好去处。<continue>不过，去那儿<i>{生活}就算了。

Text.en: If they are not stopped, they will subsume us... just as their Depraved Lords subsumed them. <continue>Their hunger is ravenous. It is all they know.
Text.zh: 若不阻止它们，它们就会吞没我们……就像那些堕落领主吞没它们一样。<continue>它们的饥饿无休无止。那就是它们的一切。

Text.en: This world – what do you know of it?
Text.zh: 那个世界——你了解多少？

Text.en: Only what the Dreamer has shown me in his visions. What I have seen is... horrifying, to say the least. <continue>A lifeless land, devoid of hope or happiness. <continue>In the absence of these things, hate and hunger proliferate.
Text.zh: 我只在幻梦者展示的幻象中看过一些。我所看见的……可以说，相当可怕。<continue>一片死寂之地，没有希望，没有欢愉。<continue>失掉了这些，唯有仇恨与饥饿肆意滋长。

Text.en: It is miserable. It is no wonder they wish to leave it.
Text.zh: 这也太惨了，难怪它们想离开那里。

Text.en: Was their world always this way?
Text.zh: 它们的世界一直都是这样吗？

Text.en: It is hard to say for sure... but no, I don't believe so. <continue>A hivemind, by its very nature, leaves no room for diversity of thought. <continue>When an entire people become possessed of a singular purpose, at the expense of all else... nothing good follows.
Text.zh: 很难说……但我觉得并非如此。<continue>裂隙巢穴的意识，其本质就容不下思想的多样性。<continue>当整个族群都执着于同一个目的，其他一切都被抛弃……那便不会有好下场。

Text.en: If their world's so barren, how do they not die off?
Text.zh: 既然它们的世界那么贫瘠，那它们怎么还没死绝？

Text.en: The Depraved Lords provide them what sustenance they need. <continue>As to how they do that, I'm not entirely sure. <continue>But something tells me that in giving up their individuality, the Hiveborn become... easier to satiate.
Text.zh: 堕落领主为它们提供所需的养分。<continue>至于怎么做到的，我也不甚清楚。<continue>但总感觉，一旦舍弃了个体性之后，这些裂隙虫群……就更容易满足了。

Text.en: So they're all just mindless drones? What happens if one wants to break away... run away from home, you know?
Text.zh: 所以它们都只是没有思想的工蜂？要是有谁想脱离呢……你知道，就是离家出走？

Text.en: I'm not sure they are even capable of such a thought. <continue>It would be like swimming against an endless tide, when every fibre of your being is willing you to follow the current. <continue>If such a thing is possible, I am yet to see it.
Text.zh: 我不确定它们能不能产生这种念头。<continue>那就像是逆着无尽洪流而上，而你身体的每个部分都催你顺流而下。<continue>若真有人能做到，那我还没见过。

Text.en: Yes. Life as we know it weighs upon the outcome. <continue>But why has the enemy's threat worsened of late?
Text.zh: 是的。我们所知的一切生命，其存亡全系于此。<continue>不过……最近敌人的攻势怎么突然愈演愈烈了？

Text.en: We accumulate Keepers much slower than they accumulate their brood. <continue>We've grown year to year, but... we can't outpace them.
Text.zh: 我们培养守护者的速度，远不及它们繁衍的速度。<continue>我们一年比一年壮大，但……根本追不上它们。

Text.en: Wait... their sun is broken?
Text.zh: 等等……它们的太阳破碎了？

Text.en: I have only seen it in the Dreamer's visions. A vast horizon split in two. Heat distorting the air. Endless screams carrying on burning winds across empty plains. <continue>It is... horrifying.
Text.zh: 我仅在幻梦者的幻象中见过。无垠的地平线，被撕裂成两半。热浪扭曲了空气。无尽的哀嚎，乘着灼热的狂风，掠过空无一物的荒原。<continue>那景象……触目惊心。

Text.en: My skin crawls just hearin' of it.
Text.zh: 光是听你说，我就浑身发毛。

Text.en: No matter what, we must stop them. It is the very reason why the Monastery exists.
Text.zh: 无论如何，我们必须阻止它们。这正是修道院存在的意义。

Text.en: I founded the Keepers of the Flame long ago. <continue>The monastery serves as a sacrosanct location where we care for the Genesis Tree and await the will of the Benevolent Dreamer. <continue>His teachings and gifts keep us on the path of discipline and truth.
Text.zh: 很久以前，我创建了苍焰守护者。<continue>修道院是一处圣地，我们在此守护起源之树，静候仁爱的幻梦者的指引。<continue>他的教诲与恩赐，让我们始终走在戒律与真相的道路上。

Text.en: It's impressive, what you've assembled here.
Text.zh: 你能建立起这一切，真了不起。

Text.en: You're kind to say so, but I don't do this for praise.
Text.zh: 承蒙夸奖，但我做这些并非为了赞誉。

Text.en: And you're all his obedient little pets.
Text.zh: 听起来你们都是他听话的小宠物。

Text.en: That is... a cynical interpretation.
Text.zh: 这……也未免太刻薄了。

Text.en: But is it untrue?
Text.zh: 但你敢说不是事实？

Text.en: You have done well, to rally so many to your cause.
Text.zh: 你能召集这么多人共赴大业，实属不易。

Text.en: They answer a calling to serve the Dreamer's will, just as I do.
Text.zh: 他们和我一样，都是应召而来，奉行幻梦者的意志。

Text.en: I'm surprised you've managed to keep all this a secret.
Text.zh: 你竟能将这一切隐藏得如此之好，真让我惊讶。

Text.en: It hasn't been easy. But it's vital that we are able to operate unimpeded.
Text.zh: 这并非易事。但能够不受干扰地行事，确实很重要。

Text.en: Hmm. Seems you've all found purpose here.
Text.zh: 嗯。看来你们都在这里找到了归宿。

Text.en: We have. I don't know where I'd be without it.
Text.zh: 是的。我都不敢想，没有这一切，我会变成什么样。

Text.en: Quite the crew you've put together here.
Text.zh: 你这队伍，还真是藏龙卧虎。

Text.en: I am fortunate to have them. All of Wraeclast is, whether they know it or not.
Text.zh: 能有他们相助，是我的幸运，也是整个瓦尔克拉斯的幸运，只是他们还不知道而已。

Text.en: It appears that since I left, many more have joined the cause.
Text.zh: 看来我离开之后，又有很多人加入了。

Text.en: The Dreamer's influence has spread far and wide. <continue>He speaks to us now, in a voice clearer than ever before. You, I imagine, would appreciate that.
Text.zh: 幻梦者的影响力正在不断扩散。<continue>他如今与我们对话的声音，比以往任何时候都清晰。我想，你应该会很怀念那种感觉。

Text.en: Indeed. I hope to hear him speak once more.
Text.zh: 确实。我也希望还能再听到他的声音。

Text.en: Genesis Tree... Benevolent Dreamer... ach. Does it not all feel rather... unnatural?
Text.zh: 起源之树……仁爱的幻梦者……唉。难道你们不觉得这一切……不太对劲吗？

Text.en: Unnatural as it may appear to you, for me... it gives me hope.
Text.zh: 在你看来或许如此，但对我而言……它给予我希望。

Text.en: I suppose I must learn more of this Dreamer and his monastery, before I can judge his methods.
Text.zh: 我想，在评判他的做法之前，我得多了解了解这位幻梦者和他的修道院。

Text.en: As long as the Monastery stands, the Keepers of the Flame hold the enemy at bay. That is all that matters.
Text.zh: 只要修道院屹立不倒，苍焰守护者就能抵挡敌人，这才是最重要的。

Text.en: We wield his Flame. We honour his Will. We follow his Word.
Text.zh: 我们执掌他的火焰。我们尊奉他的意志。我们遵循他的训言。

Text.en: How does this 'Dreamer' speak to you, if he is not present?
Text.zh: 这位幻梦者既然不在这儿，他又怎么跟你们说话？

Text.en: And who interprets his Word? You?
Text.zh: 那谁来解读他的训言？你吗？

Text.en: No. He speaks to us directly, not through any medium.
Text.zh: 不。他会直接对我们讲话，无需通过任何媒介。

Text.en: Speaks to you how?
Text.zh: 那他是怎么跟你们说话的？

Text.en: But he is resting, is he not?
Text.zh: 可他不是正在休养吗？

Text.en: How is that possible? You say he's been resting for a long time.
Text.zh: 这怎么可能？你不是说他已经沉睡很久了吗？

Text.en: I've gone a long time without hearing the Spirit speak to me. It is difficult sometimes, to know what to do without their guidance. <continue>I imagine you must feel summat similar.
Text.zh: 我已经很久没听到万灵的声音了。有时没了指引，真不知该何去何从。<continue>想来你也差不多吧。

Text.en: It's true that I long for the day the Dreamer returns, but that does not mean he is lost to us.
Text.zh: 没错，我盼着幻梦者真正归来的那一天。但这不代表他已经离开我们了。

Text.en: What do you mean?
Text.zh: 这是什么意思？

Text.en: But he's asleep, ain't he? How's that work?
Text.zh: 可他睡着了，不是吗？这怎么讲？

Text.en: Does he present himself to you in visions to this day? My dreams... are silent of late.
Text.zh: 他如今还会在梦中向你显现吗？我这阵子……已经不做那种梦了。

Text.en: Yes. I still am guided in my dreams by his hand. <continue>You observed an alternate path. Perhaps, not the one he chose for you. <continue>I am certain he will return to you, if you allow it.
Text.zh: 是的。他依然在梦中引导我。<continue>你当初走上另一条路，或许并不是他为你选的那条。<continue>但我确信，只要你愿意，他还会回到你身边。

Text.en: I did not turn away from him. If only he could see... I left because I wanted to understand him. <continue>But to do so... I needed to understand myself.
Text.zh: 我并非背离他。若他能明白……我离开，是想真正理解他。<continue>但要做到这一点……我必须先理解自己。

Text.en: His wisdom will prevail. I know it.
Text.zh: 他的智慧终将得胜。我坚信。

Text.en: So then, how does your sleeping master share his instructions with you?
Text.zh: 所以，你们那位沉睡的主人，是如何向你们传达指示的？

Text.en: Our duties do not end at dusk. As we rest, this is when he speaks to us. <continue>Visions. Portents. In doing so, he has long prepared us for this war. <continue>I would be without purpose at dawn, if not for his messages in my dreams.
Text.zh: 我们的职责并非止于日落。当我们休憩时，他便对我们说话。<continue>在梦中，他赐予我们幻象、预兆。长久以来，他借此动员我们，为这场战争做准备。<continue>若非他梦中赐言，我恐怕将在天亮之后迷失方向。

Text.en: It may sound strange... but I live half in dream. <continue>Truth lies beyond the wall of sleep. It is the very foundation of our faith. <continue>Dreams are more real to me now than the waking world is to you.
Text.zh: 这话听着也许奇怪……但我一半活在梦里。<continue>真相就在睡梦之壁的另一边。这是我们信仰的根基。<continue>如今，梦境于我，比你所处的现实更为真切。

Text.en: To me, this feels like a miserable reality. How do you cope with it?
Text.zh: 在我看来，这种状况挺悲哀的。你是怎么撑下来的？

Text.en: It is hard to explain it, but I feel I am lucky to be visited by the Dreamer in this way. <continue>In my dreams, he speaks to me. In my waking life, I carry out his will. I have purpose.
Text.zh: 这很难解释……但我觉得能这样被幻梦者造访，是我的幸运。<continue>在梦中，他对我说话。醒来时，我践行他的意志。我有了使命。

Text.en: Hm. As long as you are happy.
Text.zh: 嗯。只要你开心就好。
