Text.en: It sounds like you're deluding yourself.
Text.zh: 听起来更像是自欺欺人。

Text.en: It's nothing of the sort. I appreciate that it's not the easiest thing to comprehend... but perhaps one day, you'll understand.
Text.zh: 绝非如此。我明白这确实很难理解……但或许有一天，你会懂的。

Text.en: I think I'll stick to the real world, but thanks all the same.
Text.zh: 我想我还是留在现实世界吧，不过还是谢谢你。

Text.en: Hmm... There is some beauty in that.
Text.zh: 嗯……这倒也有几分美感。

Text.en: I am pleased you think so. Not everyone understands.
Text.zh: 你这么说，我很高兴。并非人人都能理解。

Text.en: But does this not cause you confusion? Between what is real, and what is not?
Text.zh: 可你不会搞混吗？分不清什么是真实，什么不是？

Text.en: There is no distinction. It is <i>{all} real. Just seen through different lenses.
Text.zh: 两者并无分别。<i>{都}是真实，只是看待的角度不同而已。

Text.en: But isn't that just numbing yourself to reality?
Text.zh: 可这不就是在逃避现实吗？

Text.en: Not at all. I am not blind to what goes on in the 'real world'. I even fight to save it. <continue>I just have a foot in both camps, so to speak.
Text.zh: 绝非如此。我并非对“现实世界”中发生的事视而不见。我甚至还在为守护它而战。<continue>只是……可以说，我两边的世界都涉足罢了。

Text.en: Do you miss it?
Text.zh: 你会想念吗？

Text.en: Miss what?
Text.zh: 想念什么？

Text.en: When you're awake, do you miss your 'other life'?
Text.zh: 清醒的时候，你会想念你的“另一种生活”吗？

Text.en: I live only one life. I merely spend it flitting between dream and what you'd call reality. <continue>But yes... sometimes I do miss it.
Text.zh: 我只有一种生活，只是不断在梦境和你所谓的现实之间穿梭而已。<continue>但，没错……有时确实会想念。

Text.en: I reckon I would too.
Text.zh: 换我也会这样。

Text.en: I love a good kip as much as the next bloke, but that seems a little... unhealthy, don'tcha think?
Text.zh: 我跟大家一样，也挺喜欢睡觉的，不过你这情况……有点不太健康吧？

Text.en: You may choose to see it that way. I do not. <continue>In a sense, when I lay my head down to sleep at night... that is when I truly wake.
Text.zh: 你可以这么想。但我不这么觉得。<continue>某种意义上，当我夜晚躺下入睡时……才是真正的清醒。

Text.en: I've heard tongues twist in such a way before... Be careful letting conjurers into your mind.
Text.zh: 这种颠三倒四的傻话我以前听过不少……小心点，别让那些蛊惑者钻进你的脑子里。

Text.en: He is no conjurer. He is the deliverer of truth.
Text.zh: 他不是蛊惑者。他是真理的传递者。

Text.en: All the same... truths and lies are never coherent in a dream.
Text.zh: 随你怎么说……梦里的话，真真假假，从没个准。

Text.en: Perhaps one day, you'll see.
Text.zh: 也许有一天，你会明白的。

Text.en: Can you explain where these Wombgifts came from?
Text.zh: 你能说说这些孕育赠礼到底是从哪儿来的吗？

Text.en: Care to explain these Wombgifts to me?
Text.zh: 能给我讲讲这些孕育赠礼是怎么回事吗？

Text.en: From where did these Wombgifts originate?
Text.zh: 这些孕育赠礼最初是怎么来的？

Text.en: Still not sure I trust these Wombgifts. What are they, exactly?
Text.zh: 我还是不太信得过这些孕育赠礼，这到底是什么东西？

Text.en: I sense there's nowt natural about these Wombgifts.
Text.zh: 我总觉得这孕育赠礼邪乎得很，不像自然之物。

Text.en: They are not native to Wraeclast, if that's what you mean.
Text.zh: 它们并非产自瓦尔克拉斯，如果你是问这个的话。

Text.en: These Wombgifts... do I wanna know?
Text.zh: 这些孕育赠礼……还是别知道的好？

Text.en: Though I am familiar with their function, I've never quite understood Wombgifts.
Text.zh: 我虽熟悉孕育赠礼的功能，却一直没有搞明白它们到底是什么。

Text.en: I dare nae ask... but curiosity gets the best o' me. What are these... Wombgifts?
Text.zh: 我本不该问……但又实在好奇。这……孕育赠礼，到底是什么？

Text.en: The enemy were not always as they are now. The Dreamer has shown us this. <continue>They once carried each other across vast plains. Held each other through immense storms.<continue>They faced all manner of perils together. <continue>The Genesis Tree... Wombgifts... even the blood of the enemy, are traces of what they once were. <continue>I do not know how they became what they are now. But I suspect they dabbled with intrinsic details of life best left untouched.
Text.zh: 敌人并非生来便是如今这副模样。幻梦者曾向我们揭示过。<continue>它们曾越过广袤的平原，彼此搀扶；穿过滔天的风暴，相依相守。<continue>它们曾一同面对世间万般险阻。<continue>起源之树……孕育赠礼……甚至敌人的血液，都是它们曾经模样的残痕。<continue>我并不清楚它们是如何变成现在这样的。但我猜，它们触碰了生命中最不该被触碰的内在本质。

Text.en: You make them sound almost human. <continue>It's hard to fathom that they were once something like us.
Text.zh: 听你这么一说，它们以前倒也挺像人类的。<continue>很难想象它们以前就跟我们一样。

Text.en: I suggest you not dwell on it too deeply. Whatever they once were, they are something else entirely now.
Text.zh: 我劝你别在这事上深究。无论它们曾经是什么，如今已是截然不同的存在。

Text.en: I understand the temptation.
Text.zh: 我能理解这种好奇。

Text.en: Then take it as a cautionary tale.
Text.zh: 那就把它当作一个警示吧。

Text.en: It is hard to imagine them as anything other than the ravenous horde they are now.
Text.zh: 看到如今这饥不择食的怪物模样，很难想象它们还能有什么别的样子。

Text.en: I agree... but in any case...
Text.zh: 我同意……但无论如何……

Text.en: Meddling with things they don't understand. <continue>Perhaps they're more human than they look.
Text.zh: 非要摆弄自己理解不了的东西。<continue>或许它们比看起来更像人。

Text.en: I wouldn't go that far, but...
Text.zh: 倒也不至于这么说，不过……

Text.en: Just like the Vaal.
Text.zh: 就像瓦尔人一样。

Text.en: And we've seen how that ended up.
Text.zh: 而我们已经看到瓦尔人的下场了。

Text.en: Ain't that always the way.
Text.zh: 这种事向来如此。

Text.en: So it would seem.
Text.zh: 好像是这么回事。

Text.en: I cannot imagine a time when the enemy was so... different. <continue>Their rage... their hunger. It feels core to their existence.
Text.zh: 我无法想象，敌人曾经……有过那么不同的样子。<continue>它们的暴怒……它们的饥饿……仿佛是它们存在的核心。

Text.en: Yet this is what the Dreamer has implied to us. In any case...
Text.zh: 然而……幻梦者给我们的启示就是如此。无论如何……

Text.en: The fundamentals of existence... leave that to the Sisters Three to interpret. Only fools delve so deep!
Text.zh: 生命的本质……还是让三姐妹研究去吧。只有蠢材才会深究！

Text.en: It appears so.
Text.zh: 可不是嘛。

Text.en: I choose to believe Wombgifts are remnants of better times in their history.
Text.zh: 我宁愿相信，孕育赠礼是它们历史中美好时代的残存。

Text.en: This Esh and Tul... they are not the original Lords. They are subordinates to a greater fiend. <continue>However, they are still immense threats. The Hiveborn heed their call. Follow their every thought. <continue>They must be destroyed. No matter how many more are grown in their place.
Text.zh: 艾许和托沃……并不是最初的堕落领主。它们只是某个更强大魔头的手下。<continue>尽管如此，它们依然危险得很。裂隙虫群听从它们的号令，执行它们的每一个念头。<continue>必须消灭它们，无论之后还会再滋生多少。

Text.en: Subordinates? Then who is <i>{their} leader?
Text.zh: 手下？那<i>{它们的}头领是谁？

Text.en: Why not just cut the head off the snake?
Text.zh: 为什么不直接斩断蛇头？

Text.en: To do that, you'd have to <i>{find} said snake first.
Text.zh: 要斩蛇头，你得先<i>{找到}那条蛇。

Text.en: Easier said than done, I assume?
Text.zh: 只怕说起来容易，做起来难。

Text.en: It always is.
Text.zh: 向来如此。

Text.en: So regardless of how many we kill, more will always rise to replace them?
Text.zh: 所以，不管我们杀多少，总会有新的冒出来顶上？

Text.en: For the time being, yes. But...
Text.zh: 眼下是如此。不过……

Text.en: Surely there has to be <i>{some} end to it all?
Text.zh: 总该有<i>{个}头吧？

Text.en: So we keep killin' 'em, and they keep growin' 'em back. When does it end?
Text.zh: 所以我们就一直杀，它们就一直长？这得打到什么时候？

Text.en: So they just come back? Then what's the bloody point?
Text.zh: 所以它们能一直再生？那我们到底在忙活什么？

Text.en: I will meet them in battle as many times as it takes.
Text.zh: 无论要打多少次，我都奉陪到底。

Text.en: I suspect you won't need to do so forever.
Text.zh: 我看你也不用一直这样打下去。

Text.en: So... cut off one head, and another grows back? <continue>Am I to be stuck here doing your master's dirty work the rest o' my days?
Text.zh: 所以……砍掉一个头，又会长出另一个？<continue>我这辈子就得困在这儿，替你的主人干这些脏活了？

Text.en: The Dreamer will reveal all in time.
Text.zh: 幻梦者自会在适当的时机揭示一切。

Text.en: Vruun... the Dread Marshal of the Depraved Lords. <continue>The Dreamer showed us that he was vital in the enemy's path to unending rage. <continue>He led countless invasions. Tirelessly rampaging across worlds unknown. His mindless lust beset upon them, leaving behind a trail... <continue>A trail that would become his brood, supplanting entire populations.
Text.zh: 弗伦……堕落领主麾下的恐怖元帅。<continue>幻梦者曾向我们揭示，他在敌人走向无尽狂怒的道路上，起着至关重要的作用。<continue>他发动过无数次入侵，不知疲倦地横扫一个个未知的世界，到处播撒他那盲目的欲望，只留下一条痕迹……<continue>那条痕迹，最终会变成他的子嗣，吞噬整个族裔。

Text.en: A single creature, capable of such destruction by... <i>{breeding?}
Text.zh: 就他一个……仅凭<i>{繁殖}就能造成这么大的破坏？

Text.en: I'm not sure I'd quite call it that. But in essence, I suppose so.
Text.zh: 这说法不太准确。不过，本质上确实如此。

Text.en: A conqueror in every sense of the word.
Text.zh: 还真是名副其实的征服者。

Text.en: Conquest through copulation. A... <i>{novel} tactic, I suppose.
Text.zh: 靠交配来征服世界。这战术……倒<i>{新鲜}。

Text.en: To say the least.
Text.zh: 确实很新鲜。

Text.en: Eugh. Of course it's a male.
Text.zh: 呃。果然是个公的。

Text.en: Eugh indeed.
Text.zh: 可不是嘛。

Text.en: Sounds like <i>{he's} the depraved one.
Text.zh: 听起来，<i>{他才是}真正的堕落者。

Text.en: Sounds like he was having a bloody good time!
Text.zh: 听起来他倒是狠狠消遣了一番啊！

Text.en: A bloody time, yes. A good one? I very much doubt it.
Text.zh: 狠是够狠，但说这是消遣？我可不敢苟同。

Text.en: Ah. Well... yeah. Heh.
Text.zh: 啊。好吧……嗯。

Text.en: Vruun's tale only further shows why the enemy must cease to be.
Text.zh: 弗伦的故事，更说明了敌人必须被消灭。

Text.en: Yes. There is no sense or reason to their actions. Alas...
Text.zh: 没错。它们的所作所为毫无道理可言。唉……

Text.en: You mean to say... this... fellow... went about having his way with everything and anything he could, leading to the fall of entire civilisations?
Text.zh: 你的意思是……这家伙……到处乱来，想怎样就怎样，结果导致整个文明覆灭？

Text.en: More or less.
Text.zh: 差不多。

Text.en: Oh, my head. I've had just about enough of all this nonsense.
Text.zh: 唉，我头都大了。我真是受够了这些破事。

Text.en: His death is yet another blow to the enemy. You've done very well.
Text.zh: 他的死，对敌人来说又是一次重创。你做得非常好。

Text.en: Ailith? You're here? I... I saw you die.
Text.zh: 艾利丝？真的是你？我……明明看见你死了。

Text.en: How is it that you're alive? You don't look mindless enough to be undead.
Text.zh: 你怎么还活着？而且看上去很清醒，不像是亡灵。

Text.en: Ailith! You're alive! How can this be?
Text.zh: 艾利丝！你还活着！这怎么可能？

Text.en: What's going on? I saw you die.
Text.zh: 怎么回事？我明明看见你死了。

Text.en: Ailith? Is that really you?
Text.zh: 艾利丝？真的是你吗？

Text.en: Wait... if you're alive, then who did I see die back there?
Text.zh: 等等……如果你还活着，那之前死的是谁？

Text.en: Ailith... you're... alive?
Text.zh: 艾利丝……你……还活着？

Text.en: Lass! You're alive! How can it be?
Text.zh: 姑娘！你还活着！这怎么可能？

Text.en: Ah... I apologise. I should have warned you. <continue>I am one of many in my line. Only one shall serve at any given time, but we all share the knowledge that the Dreamer gives to us.
Text.zh: 啊……抱歉。我该提前告诉你一声的。<continue>我这一脉，不止我一个人。每次只会有一个在世上行动，但我们共享幻梦者赐予的知识。

Text.en: One of many? How is that possible?
Text.zh: 不止一个人？怎么可能？

Text.en: You <i>{did} see me die... but only the previous iteration of me. <continue>By the Dreamer's will I am restored, as whole and as healthy as I was before.
Text.zh: 你<i>{确实}看见我死了……但死的只是我的上一任。<continue>凭幻梦者的意志，我会被复原，恢复如初，完好如新。

Text.en: And you remember everything we've been through? As though you yourself were there?
Text.zh: 而我们经历的一切，你都记得？就好像你亲身经历过一样？

Text.en: For all intents and purposes, I <i>{was} there. The Dreamer ensures I retain my memories, save for the pain of death itself.
Text.zh: 从各种意义上来说，我<i>{确实}亲身经历了。幻梦者确保了我所有记忆，只是抹去了死亡本身的痛苦。

Text.en: This... will take some time to process...
Text.zh: 这……我得慢慢消化……

Text.en: You devote yourself to someone who sends you to your death, over and over?
Text.zh: 你效忠的人让你一次次送死，你还死心塌地？

Text.en: It is not death. Not really. Focus instead on the life lived in between, and all that is accomplished therein. <continue>Every time that I return, I am as whole as I was before.
Text.zh: 那不是不是真正的死亡。不如专注于两世之间活过的人生，以及其间成就的一切。<continue>每次我归来，都和从前一样完好。

Text.en: That's rather insane, you know.
Text.zh: 这太疯狂了。

Text.en: You're welcome to think that. But I am of sound mind, I assure you.
Text.zh: 随你怎么想。但我很清醒，我向你保证。

Text.en: Then you are some kind of... duplication?
Text.zh: 那你是某种……复制品？

Text.en: In a sense. But please understand: as far as my memories are concerned, I have lived one continuous life, unbroken by the embrace of death.<continue>I am no imposter, no pale imitation. <continue>I am merely... Ailith.
Text.zh: 某种意义上可以这么说。但你要明白，在我的记忆里，我的人生是连续不断的，从未被死亡打断。<continue>我不是冒牌货，不是拙劣的仿品。<continue>我只是……艾利丝。

Text.en: And you <i>{choose} this life?
Text.zh: 而你<i>{选择}了这样的生活？

Text.en: We? So there's multiple of you?
Text.zh: 我们？所以你不止一个？

Text.en: As I say, we do not coexist. Rather, when one falls, another rises to take their... <i>{my}...  place.
Text.zh: 我说过，我们不会同时存在。当一个倒下时，另一个就会出现，接替……<i>{我的}位置。

Text.en: Awfully trusting of you. How do you know you're being remade as you were?
Text.zh: 你对那位幻梦者还真是信任。你怎么知道被复原后还是原来的你？

Text.en: I have faith in the Dreamer. That is enough.
Text.zh: 我信任幻梦者。这就够了。

Text.en: For you, maybe. Not for me.
Text.zh: 也许对你来说够了。对我可不够。

Text.en: Then the Dreamer... remakes you?
Text.zh: 所以，是幻梦者……复原了你？

Text.en: In essence, yes. But do not think of me as any different. I am in every way the same person I was before. <continue>Same memories. Same conviction. Same Ailith.
Text.zh: 本质上是这样。但别把我想得有什么不同。我和以前一模一样，方方面面都一样。<continue>同样的记忆。同样的信念。同样的艾利丝。

Text.en: But you <i>{are} different. How can you not be?
Text.zh: 但你<i>{确实}不一样了，怎么可能一样呢？

Text.en: So you're, what, some kind of twin?
Text.zh: 那你算什么，某种双胞胎？

Text.en: I am myself. As was the Ailith before me. <continue>There is no distinction.
Text.zh: 我就是我。就像我之前的那个艾利丝一样。<continue>毫无区别。

Text.en: Doesn't really answer my question, though, does it? I don't get it.
Text.zh: 这压根没回答我的问题吧？我完全搞不懂。

Text.en: I do not understand. How is this possible? <continue>So you're... no longer yourself?
Text.zh: 我不明白。这怎么可能？<continue>所以……你不再是……你自己了？

Text.en: I am myself. I am in every way the same Ailith that you know. <continue>The Dreamer makes sure of it.
Text.zh: 我就是我自己。我完完全全就是你认识的那个艾利丝。<continue>幻梦者会确保一切保持原样。

Text.en: Who... else is this way?
Text.zh: 还有……谁是这样的？

Text.en: I have been with him since the beginning of his Dream. This is my charge. It is my burden to bear. And my joy to embrace.
Text.zh: 自他的梦境诞生之初，我便与他同在。这是我的使命，是我必须承担的重担，也是我甘之如饴的喜悦。

Text.en: You've been... remade somehow? Do you even remember me?
Text.zh: 你……这是被复原了？你还记得我吗？

Text.en: Yes, of course. <continue>The Dreamer provides us with all we should remember, without the pain we must forget.
Text.zh: 当然记得。<continue>幻梦者赐予我们所需铭记的一切，抹去我们该遗忘的痛苦。

Text.en: Immortal... in a way. Yet another malefaction of the natural world. Why am I surprised? <continue>But... I am glad to see you living.
Text.zh: 某种意义上的……永生。又是对自然秩序的亵渎。我还有什么好惊讶的？<continue>但……我很高兴你还活着。

Text.en: You must not dwell on this. I do not. It is simply another reality in the path we have been given. <continue>Life... goes on.
Text.zh: 你不必为此烦恼。我自己也没放在心上。这只是我们命定之路上的另一种现实罢了。<continue>生命……还在继续。

Text.en: You forgot this.
Text.zh: 你把这个落下了。

Text.en: We're alive. That's a small consolation. Wraeclast has been devastated... and the influence of the Beast lingers on. <continue>As we feared, the Beast's Corruption holds the Hooded One in thrall. Nothing we do can wake him.
Text.zh: 我们还活着。这算是一点小小的慰藉。瓦尔克拉斯已经满目疮痍……而邪兽的影响仍然挥之不去。<continue>正如我们所担心的，邪兽的腐化之力已将兜帽密师牢牢掌控。无论我们怎么努力，都唤不醒他。

Text.en: What chance do we have against the Beast without the Hooded One wielding the Weapon?
Text.zh: 没有兜帽密师来驾驭武器，我们拿什么对抗邪兽？

Text.en: Ugh! What a time to take a nap... How are we to wield the Weapon then?
Text.zh: 呃！偏偏这时候睡觉……我们还怎么驾驭那武器？

Text.en: Then are we not lost? Without him, we have no hope of wielding the Weapon.
Text.zh: 那我们岂不是没救了？没了他，我们根本没法驾驭那武器。

Text.en: But we need him. Or we've no chance to wield the Weapon against the Beast.
Text.zh: 可我们需要他。不然我们根本没法用那武器对付邪兽。

Text.en: Without him, what hope do we have? Only he can wield the Weapon against the Beast.
Text.zh: 没有他……我们还有什么希望？只有他能驾驭那把对抗邪兽的武器。

Text.en: Then we're screwed, aren't we? Can't wield the Weapon with our hooded mate.
Text.zh: 那我们不是彻底完蛋了？没有兜帽那哥们，武器根本没法用。

Text.en: Then where do we turn? Without the Hooded One, we cannot wield the Weapon.
Text.zh: 那我们该怎么办？没有兜帽密师，我们没法驾驭那武器。

Text.en: If the Beast can put a god to sleep, then what hope have we? We cannae wield the Weapon.
Text.zh: 要是那邪兽能让神都睡过去，那我们还有什么指望？我们根本没法驾驭那武器。

Text.en: The situation <i>{is} grim, but science... can be rediscovered. <continue>We must seek further knowledge of the ancients for ourselves. Perhaps with it, we can engineer a solution to our... situation.
Text.zh: 局势<i>{确实}很严峻，但科学……总能被重新发现。<continue>我们必须亲自去追寻更多古人的知识。也许有了知识，我们便能想出办法解决……眼前的困境。

Text.en: An ambitious goal. How do we start?
Text.zh: 好大的志向。我们从哪儿着手？

Text.en: That sounds good and all, but you seem to be missing the 'how' part.
Text.zh: 听着是挺不错，不过你好像漏了最关键的“怎么做”。

Text.en: Such knowledge will not be easy to come by.
Text.zh: 那种知识可不容易到手。

Text.en: And how do we go about that?
Text.zh: 那我们要怎么做？

Text.en: I hope you know where to start, 'cause I haven't a clue.
Text.zh: 希望你知道从哪儿着手，因为我是一点头绪都没有。

Text.en: That's what I like about you, Doryani – always got a trick up your sleeve.
Text.zh: 多里亚尼，我就喜欢你这点——总是留一手。

Text.en: Very well. What do you propose?
Text.zh: 很好，你有什么主意？

Text.en: I'm hopin' ye've some thoughts on how to do that.
Text.zh: 我希望你多少有点主意，知道该怎么做。

Text.en: I have already been working on a plan. This Ziggurat was built over what my ancestors called 'leylines.' <continue>Ancient underground structures... which I believe may span the entire continent. <continue>The machine you see here... I call it... a 'Waygate.' Using the leylines, the Waygate can take us anywhere they reach.
Text.zh: 我早已在筹划。这座塔庙就建在我祖先所说的“地脉”之上。<continue>也就是古老的庞大地下结构……我认为它们可能遍布整个大陆。<continue>你们眼前这台机器……我称之为……“脉门”。借助地脉，脉门能将我们送往其所及的任何地方。

Text.en: Good... the leyline below is resonating correctly...
Text.zh: 好……下方地脉的共振很合适……

Text.en: What is happening? Did we cause this?
Text.zh: 发生什么了？是我们造成的吗？

Text.en: Umm... did we do that?
Text.zh: 呃……那是我们搞出来的吗？

Text.en: Tell me, are we responsible for this?
Text.zh: 你说，这该不会是我们搞出来的吧？

Text.en: What's going on? Did we do that?
Text.zh: 什么情况？是我们弄出来的？

Text.en: Your leylines do that?
Text.zh: 是你的地脉搞的？

Text.en: Whoa! Is that because of us?
Text.zh: 哇！这不会是我们造成的吧？

Text.en: What brought this about? Was it us?
Text.zh: 怎么突然这样了？是我们干的吗？

Text.en: Didn't expect that. And goin' by yer face, I'm guessin you didn't either.
Text.zh: 真没想到。看你那表情，我猜你自己也没想到吧。

Text.en: Incredible! That tower... it must have reacted to the Waygate's energy!
Text.zh: 不可思议！那些塔……一定是对脉门的能量产生了反应！

Text.en: Are we sure that's a good thing?
Text.zh: 这真的是好事吗？

Text.en: And... that's a good thing, I take it?
Text.zh: 所以……这算好事？

Text.en: Might that be dangerous?
Text.zh: 这会不会很危险？

Text.en: You sure that's a good thing? We don't know what this tower does.
Text.zh: 你确定这是好事？我们连这塔是干什么的都不知道。

Text.en: Seems a mite concernin'. Have we woken summat we shouldn't have?
Text.zh: 总觉得有点不对劲。我们是不是弄醒了什么不该弄醒的东西？

Text.en: You're gonna have to tell me if that's good or bad.
Text.zh: 你最好告诉我这算是好还是坏。

Text.en: What does that mean? Should we be concerned?
Text.zh: 这什么意思？我们该担心吗？

Text.en: Ye'll have to break it down for me. Should we be pleased, or concerned?
Text.zh: 你说简单点。我们是该高兴，还是该担心？

Text.en: For now... we simply need to reach the tower, but first, we must test the Waygate...<continue>Take this Waystone. Mark your desired coordinates on it. Place it in the Waygate. Let us see what it can do.
Text.zh: 现在……我们需要去那座塔，但首先，我们还得测试下脉门……<continue>拿着这块引路石。在上面标出你想要前往的坐标，然后放进脉门里。让我们拭目以待吧。

Text.en: Our first step is a success! The Waygate does indeed work.
Text.zh: 我们迈出了成功的第一步！脉门确实有效。

Text.en: Wait... am I the first one who used it?
Text.zh: 等等……我是第一个使用它的人？

Text.en: Wait... you didn't know it would work? Did you just experiment on me?
Text.zh: 等等……你之前不知道这能用？你刚才是在拿我做实验？

Text.en: I was the first to use it? <continue>I am not your plaything to experiment on, Doryani!
Text.zh: 我是第一个用的人？<continue>多里亚尼，我可不是你的小白鼠！

Text.en: You didn't even check that before you had me walk through it?
Text.zh: 你让我进去之前，压根没确认过它能不能用？

Text.en: Coulda told me it weren't tested before you had me use it!
Text.zh: 让我用之前，至少该告诉我这玩意儿没测试过吧！

Text.en: Hang on a minute... did you just use me as bait?
Text.zh: 等等……你该不会是拿我当诱饵吧？

Text.en: We didn't know that before?
Text.zh: 原来我们之前根本不知道能不能用？

Text.en: Ach, ye say that now! Might've thought twice about using it if I knew ye hadn't tested it first.
Text.zh: 啊，你现在才说！早知道没测试过，我用之前可得好好掂量掂量。

Text.en: Science is a process. Would you rather we remain here, cowering in the dark?
Text.zh: 科学总要有个过程。难道你宁愿我们缩在这里，在黑暗中瑟瑟发抖？

Text.en: I should have your skin for that, Thaumaturge...
Text.zh: 就为了这事，我都该剥了你的皮，奇术师……

Text.en: Now that we know the Waygate works, you must reach that ancient tower.<continue>I am certain we will learn more from it.
Text.zh: 既然我们已经知道脉门能用了，那你必须去那座远古高塔看看。<continue>我们肯定能从那里学到更多东西。

Text.en: This tower is indeed Precursor. We should activate it, and study the results.
Text.zh: 这座高塔确实是先驱者造的。我们应该激活它，然后研究其结果。

Text.en: Are you sure that's wise?
Text.zh: 这么做明智吗？

Text.en: Are we really just going to blindly meddle with everything we find?
Text.zh: 我们真要见到什么都乱碰吗？

Text.en: You assume we will live to study those results...
Text.zh: 你怎么就确定我们能活着看到结果？

Text.en: We don't even know what it does.
Text.zh: 我们连它是干什么的都不知道。

Text.en: Awful reckless of ya. What if the results are disastrous?
Text.zh: 你也太莽撞了。万一结果是场大灾难呢？

Text.en: You sure? We don't even know what they're for.
Text.zh: 你确定？我们连它们是做什么的都不知道。

Text.en: Is that not reckless? This tower could do any number of things.
Text.zh: 这还不是莽撞？这座塔什么怪事都可能搞得出来。

Text.en: Ever the mad scientist, aren't ye, Doryani? Try everythin', consequences be damned.
Text.zh: 永远都是个疯狂的科学家，对吧，多里亚尼？什么都先试再说，后果无所谓。

Text.en: I'm making... a judgement call. <continue>Do it.
Text.zh: 我……自有考量。<continue>动手吧。

Text.en: This is very promising. <continue>Seek out the other tower. We should activate that one as well. <continue>Let us see what wonders we may unearth...
Text.zh: 结果很乐观。<continue>找到另一座高塔。我们把它也激活。<continue>看看我们还能发掘出什么奇迹……

Text.en: This is beyond my wildest expectations!
Text.zh: 这比我做梦梦到的还离谱！

Text.en: Wraeclast never holds back. I suppose we have no choice but to keep moving forward.
Text.zh: 瓦尔克拉斯从不让人省心。看来我们别无选择，只能继续前进了。

Text.en: I must say, the Precursors were quite formidable. But... should we expect consequences for all this old-world spelunking?
Text.zh: 不得不说，这些先驱者确实能耐了得。不过……我们这么深挖旧世界的遗迹，会不会惹出什么麻烦？

Text.en: It concerns me how little of this you seem to anticipate ahead of time.
Text.zh: 你好像完全没去预判会出现什么情况，这让我挺担心的。

Text.en: And mine. Is it wise for us to be dredging all this up?
Text.zh: 我也担心。我们把这些东西都挖出来，真的没问题吗？

Text.en: Can't say I expected it neither. <continue>Are we sure we shouldn't slow up a touch,  plan our next move?
Text.zh: 说实话我也没想到会这样。 <continue>我们真的不该放慢脚步，先好好计划计划吗？

Text.en: A bloody great fortress, risen from nothin'. You sure we should be doin' all this?
Text.zh: 一座该死的巨大堡垒，凭空冒了出来。你确定我们真要这么搞？

Text.en: This fortress must have lain dormant for centuries. Are we sure we should be trifling with such things?
Text.zh: 这座堡垒肯定沉睡了好几个世纪。我们真的要去招惹这种东西吗？

Text.en: If ye'd expected this, I'd have said ye were barmy. <continue>I suppose now ye'd have me investigate this fortress, with no thought to my safety?
Text.zh: 要是你早就料到会这样，我准会说你脑子有病。<continue>我看你现在是压根不管我的死活，想让我去探查这座堡垒？

Text.en: We are taking enormous risks, yes, but calculated ones. <continue>It is, as the 'Kalguurans' might say, my <i>{style}. <continue>Just imagine the knowledge that fortress contains!
Text.zh: 我们确实在冒很大的风险，但都是经过计算的。<continue>用“卡古兰人”的话说，这大概就是我的<i>{风格}吧。<continue>想想那座城塞里蕴藏的知识吧！

Text.en: Knowledge is one thing... I'm more concerned by what <i>{else} it might contain.
Text.zh: 知识倒好说……我更担心里面还藏着什么<i>{别的}东西。

Text.en: Knowledge often comes at a cost. I worry what else we might find there.
Text.zh: 要获取知识总要付出些代价。我就怕在那儿还会挖出别的什么来。

Text.en: Understandably. But the potential reward is worth the risk.
Text.zh: 可以理解。但回报可能很大，值得我们冒险。

Text.en: Who am I to say no to a bit of forbidden knowledge?
Text.zh: 送上门来的禁忌知识，我哪能拒绝得了？

Text.en: Your recklessness knows no bounds. It might hold knowledge, yes... or it might hold death.
Text.zh: 你这股莽劲儿真是没边了。那里也许确实藏着知识……但也可能藏着死亡。

Text.en: So it might. But we do not have the luxury of sitting back and hypothesising.
Text.zh: 也许吧。但现在可没工夫让我们纸上谈兵候。

Text.en: I'm sure we'll find more than just 'knowledge' there. <continue>We always do.
Text.zh: 我敢肯定，我们找到的可绝不只是“知识”。<continue>哪次不是这样。

Text.en: Naturally. But you've thus far proved more than capable of dealing with these emergent... complications.
Text.zh: 那是自然。不过事到如今，你已经证明了自己完全有能力应付这些突发……状况。

Text.en: Oh, I can imagine it alright... Problem is I can imagine the dangers as well.
Text.zh: 哦，我当然想象得到……问题是，那些危险我也能想象得到。

Text.en: Beginnin' to suspect that when you say 'knowledge', you really mean 'danger'.
Text.zh: 我开始怀疑你说的“知识”，其实就是“危险”。

Text.en: One often follows the other.
Text.zh: 这两者往往是相伴而来的。

Text.en: Yer lack of caution's carried us this far. Suppose I'd be a fool to question it now.
Text.zh: 正是你这不顾风险的劲头，让我们走到了今天。现在来挑你的毛病，那可真是犯糊涂了。

Text.en: Find your way over there as soon as you can.
Text.zh: 尽快想办法到那边去。

Text.en: The fortress... it is beyond reckoning. <continue>Even the greatest Architects of the Vaal could never have imagined such a wonder...
Text.zh: 这堡垒……真是令人震撼。<continue>即便是瓦尔最伟大的建筑师，也绝不敢想象如此奇观……

Text.en: It boggles the mind. How could they have constructed such a thing?
Text.zh: 真让人难以置信。他们究竟是怎么造出这种东西的？

Text.en: Ha! You're jealous, aren't you?
Text.zh: 哈！你嫉妒了，对吧？

Text.en: How did an ancient civilisation construct something of this size?
Text.zh: 远古文明到底是怎么造出这么庞大的东西的？

Text.en: Seems excessive, if you ask me.
Text.zh: 要我说，有点夸张过头了。

Text.en: Seems you Vaal had your shortcomin's... if that weren't clear already.
Text.zh: 看来你们瓦尔人也有不行的地方……虽然这点早就很清楚了。

Text.en: Never mind imaginin' it. How did they <i>{build} it?
Text.zh: 别管敢不敢想象了。他们到底是怎么<i>{造}出来的？

Text.en: The word 'wonder' seems almost insufficient. It is less a structure than an entire city.
Text.zh: “奇观”这词根本不足以形容它。这哪是建筑，根本就是一整座城市。

Text.en: Can hardly blame 'em. Didnae think such a thing was even possible.
Text.zh: 也怪不得他们。我都没想到还真有这种东西。

Text.en: The Precursors were <i>{masters} of their domain. <continue>They wielded science at a level I am only beginning to comprehend.
Text.zh: 先驱者在他们的领域堪称真正的<i>{主宰}。<continue>他们所运用的科学如此深奥，我现在才刚能摸到点皮毛。

Text.en: Then why are they dead and gone? What could have done that?
Text.zh: 那他们为什么都消失了呢？什么力量能做到这一点？

Text.en: Oh, don't worry. You'll get there one day. Maybe. But it begs the question: who could destroy such a civilisation?
Text.zh: 哦，别急。总有一天你也能做到。也许吧。不过问题来了：谁能毁灭这样一个文明？

Text.en: Perhaps they wielded it too well... Delved too deep, and paid the price. <continue>What else could cause their downfall?
Text.zh: 也许他们运用得太好了……挖得太深，才遭了殃。<continue>不然还有什么能让他们灭亡？

Text.en: Surprisingly humble of you. But if they were so brilliant, then how were they destroyed so utterly?
Text.zh: 难得见你这么谦虚。可如果他们真那么厉害，又怎么会被毁灭得如此彻底？

Text.en: And look where it got 'em: dead. Gone. Just like your Vaal. <continue>What might explain why they're no longer here?
Text.zh: 瞧瞧他们的下场，死光了。消失了。跟你们瓦尔人一样。<continue>那么到底是什么让他们彻底消失的？

Text.en: Well riddle me this, Doryani: if they were so smart, then why are they all dead?
Text.zh: 那你倒是说说看，多里亚尼，既然他们这么聪明，为什么全死光了？

Text.en: And yet, it could not save them from ruin. What could have caused such a precipitous decline?
Text.zh: 可即便如此，也没能让他们逃过毁灭。到底发生了什么，才会衰败得这么彻底？

Text.en: What, then, might've caused their decline? Seein' as they were so smart and all.
Text.zh: 那他们到底为什么衰落？毕竟他们那么聪明。

Text.en: That... is a good question. One that we should endeavour to answer. <continue>See if you can find remnants of their knowledge... or perhaps even clues as to what destroyed them.
Text.zh: 问得好……一个值得我们去深究的问题。<continue>看看能否找到他们知识的残片……甚至可能找到有关他们毁灭原因的线索。

Text.en: What do you make of this? The mural on the ground... is it a warning?
Text.zh: 你有什么想法？地上的壁画……是在警告我们吗？

Text.en: This mural is gorgeously laden with death. What do you make of it?
Text.zh: 这幅壁画华丽地描绘了死亡的景象。你有什么看法？

Text.en: This mural shows a brutal scene... What do you make of it?
Text.zh: 这幅壁画展现了一个残酷的场景……你有什么看法？

Text.en: Does this mural make any sense to you?
Text.zh: 这幅壁画，你看得懂吗？

Text.en: What do you think o' this mural?
Text.zh: 你觉得这壁画是什么意思？

Text.en: This mural's a bit of a mystery. What's it to you?
Text.zh: 这壁画有点费解。你怎么看？

Text.en: This mural – do you recognise it?
Text.zh: 这幅壁画——你认得吗？

Text.en: Have ye any light to shed on this mural?
Text.zh: 你对这幅壁画有什么见解吗？

Text.en: It depicts the fortress under siege. Hmm... but what force could possibly threaten a bastion such as this?
Text.zh: 它描绘的是堡垒遭受围攻的景象。嗯……不过到底是什么力量，才能威胁到如此坚不可摧的堡垒？

Text.en: How is there Corruption in here?
Text.zh: 这里怎么会有腐化？

Text.en: And what of all this Corruption?
Text.zh: 那这些腐化又是怎么回事？

Text.en: What of the Corruption? Its presence here is unexplained.
Text.zh: 这腐化是怎么回事？怎么会出现在这里，根本说不通。

Text.en: And how'd the Corruption get in?
Text.zh: 这腐化又是怎么进来的？

Text.en: That's one question answered – but what o' the <i>{rathin}? What's it doing here?
Text.zh: 这个问题题解决了——可<i>{腐化}呢？它们怎么会跑到这儿？

Text.en: What's Corruption doin' here, of all places?
Text.zh: 偏偏在这种地方出现腐化？

Text.en: I am more concerned by how Corruption managed to penetrate this place.
Text.zh: 我更在意的是，这腐化到底是怎么渗透进来的。

Text.en: This place seems undisturbed since ancient times. How is it that there's Corruption here?
Text.zh: 这地方看起来自远古以来就人迹罕至。怎么会有腐化？

Text.en: The latent Corruption here is not from outside. Their technology appears to have <i>{used it as energy}.
Text.zh: 这里潜伏的腐化并非来自外界。他们的技术似乎会将<i>{将腐化用作能量来源}。

Text.en: I have engineered a prototype based on the Weapon. <continue>It is primitive in comparison, but it should be able to neutralise smaller concentrations of Corruption...
Text.zh: 我根据那把武器，设计了一个原型。<continue>虽然相比之下很粗糙，但用来清除小规模的腐化，应该够用了……

Text.en: My prototype should easily be able to neutralise such a smaller concentration of Corruption...
Text.zh: 我设计的原型机处理这种小规模的腐化，问题应该不大……

Text.en: Now... we must investigate further. Remain calm.
Text.zh: 现在……我们必须进一步探索。保持冷静。

Text.en: What's happening?!
Text.zh: 怎么回事？！

Text.en: You're a clever one. Did you know that would happen?
Text.zh: 你可真机灵。你早知道会这样？

Text.en: Did you intend this?
Text.zh: 你是故意的？

Text.en: Might've appreciated a warning!
Text.zh: 若能提前知会就好了！

Text.en: Did you mean to do that?
Text.zh: 你是有意的？

Text.en: Admit it. You had no idea what was gonna happen.
Text.zh: 承认吧。你也不知道会发生什么。

Text.en: Doryani... were you anticipating this?
Text.zh: 多里亚尼……你早就预见到这个了？

Text.en: Ach! A bit o' warnin' wouldnae go amiss!
Text.zh: 啊！好歹提醒一句啊！

Text.en: This door... it requires three fragments. One is already present. <continue>Something about it... feels wrong. Instinctively disturbing.
Text.zh: 这扇门……需要三块碎片。其中一块已经放上去了。<continue>这块碎片……总感觉哪里不对劲，心里莫名感到不安。

Text.en: Only now you are disturbed?
Text.zh: 你现在才觉得不安？

Text.en: There is an order to all things. A pattern. These fragments... they violate reason....
Text.zh: 万事万物皆有秩序，有规律。这些碎片……它们有悖常理……

Text.en: Don't go soft on me now. I saw what you got up to in that lab of yours.
Text.zh: 你可别这时候装脆弱。你那实验室里搞的那些勾当，我可都看在眼里。

Text.en: Of all the things you've done and seen, <i>{this} is what causes you disquiet?
Text.zh: 你这辈子什么事没做过，什么场面没见过？怎么会被<i>{这玩意儿}搅得心神不宁？

Text.en: I wasn't sure you were capable of being disturbed.
Text.zh: 我还以为你根本不会为这种事感到不安。

Text.en: And here I thought nothin' ruffled the great Doryani.
Text.zh: 我还以为没什么事能让伟大的多里亚尼心烦呢。

Text.en: <i>{You're} disturbed? <i>{You –} the guy that experimented with cuttin' people in half?
Text.zh: <i>{你}觉得不安？<i>{就你——}这个能把人活活切成两半来研究的家伙？

Text.en: If it is disturbing to you, then it should be doubly so for the rest of us.
Text.zh: 如果连你都觉得不安，那我们其他人不得吓死了。

Text.en: If even Atziri's royal thaumaturge is disturbed, then there's little hope for the rest of us.
Text.zh: 要是连阿兹里的皇家奇术师都觉得不安，那我们这些人怕是没什么指望了。

Text.en: Wait. I am detecting two similar resonant signatures much further into the fortress.
Text.zh: 等等。我在堡垒的更深处，探测到另外两个类似的共振信号。

Text.en: I believe the other two fragments are beyond these gates.
Text.zh: 另外两块碎片，应该就在那几道门后面。

Text.en: We need to get inside. Seek out the other two fragments.
Text.zh: 我们得进去，找到另外两块碎片。

Text.en: I will remain here. I must... contemplate the nature of this... <i>{thing}...
Text.zh: 我留在这里。我得……好好想想这<i>{东西}的本质……

Text.en: The way is open. <continue>Hmm... the energies in <i>{this} area are even stronger...
Text.zh: 路通了。<continue>嗯……<i>{这}地方的能量更强了……

Text.en: They seem to lead here...
Text.zh: 信号指向了这边……

Text.en: Proceed with caution. I am still perturbed by the fragments we seek. Return to me at the monolith when you have found one of them.
Text.zh: 小心行事。我对这些碎片还是很不放心。找到其中一块后，回巨塔这里找我。

Text.en: We've come this far. I'll do my best.
Text.zh: 都走到这一步了。我会尽力的。

Text.en: You know, it wouldn't hurt you to say <i>{please.}
Text.zh: 说真的，加个<i>{请}字又不会要了你的命。

Text.en: Would you?
Text.zh: 你说是吧？

Text.en: Oh, you're no fun.
Text.zh: 唉，你真没劲。

Text.en: It shall be done.
Text.zh: 交给我吧。

Text.en: If they're out there, I'll find them.
Text.zh: 只要它们在那儿，我就能找到。

Text.en: Aye. Consider it done.
Text.zh: 行。包在我身上。

Text.en: You got it, boss. Back in a jiffy.
Text.zh: 收到，老大。马上回来。

Text.en: Another proverbial mountain to climb... So be it.
Text.zh: 又一座要翻越的山啊……也罢。

Text.en: Very well. I'll do as ye ask.
Text.zh: 好吧。就依你所说。

Text.en: You found a fragment?
Text.zh: 找到碎片了？

Text.en: You wouldn't believe what I saw out there...
Text.zh: 你绝对想不到我刚刚看到了什么……

Text.en: You've always the tone of disbelief!
Text.zh: 你怎么老是一副不相信的口气！

Text.en: You would not believe the things they are capable of.
Text.zh: 他们那些能耐，说出来你都不会信。

Text.en: I did. You're not going to believe how.
Text.zh: 我做到了。至于怎么做到的，你肯定不信。

Text.en: If I told ya how, you wouldn't believe it.
Text.zh: 就算我告诉你怎么做到的，你也不会信的。

Text.en: Trust me when I tell ya – you ain't gonna believe what happened...
Text.zh: 你得相信我，接下来我要说的事你绝对不敢信……

Text.en: It is a hard story to relate. Most of what happens beggars belief.
Text.zh: 这个故事很难讲清楚。发生的大部分事都叫人难以相信。

Text.en: Aye – and ye wouldn't believe what I went through to get it.
Text.zh: 是啊——为了弄到这东西，我经历的事你绝对不敢信。

Text.en: I believe anything that evidence can support.
Text.zh: 我相信有证据支持的事情。

Text.en: This thing... it seemed to energise the very air. It showed me a past battle, and I was forced to fight it once again.
Text.zh: 这东西……好像给周围的空气都注入了能量。它让我看到了一场过去的战斗，而我被迫……又拼杀了一遍。

Text.en: That <i>{thing} altered the world around me...  conjured up an old foe and made me fight them again.
Text.zh: 那<i>{东西}改变了我周围的世界……召唤出我的老对头，还逼我跟他们又打了一架。

Text.en: Inside, the world around seemed to... change... I was suddenly thrust into a memory and forced to live it once more.
Text.zh: 进去之后，周围的世界好像……变了……我突然被丢进一段回忆里，被迫重新经历了一遍。

Text.en: Whatever this <i>{thing} is, I don't like it. <continue>It forced me into a memory... I had to fight for my life.
Text.zh: 不管这<i>{玩意儿}是什么，我反正不喜欢。<continue>它逼我进入了一段回忆……我不得不拼命搏杀。

Text.en: That thing can warp reality. I saw it for meself... not just saw it but lived it. <continue>There I was, fightin' a foe I'd already fought.
Text.zh: 那东西能扭曲现实。我亲眼看见的……不止看见，是亲身经历。<continue>当时我就在那儿，跟之前的老对手又打了一架。

Text.en: That fragment o' yours is no joke. Bloody thing had me thinkin' I was back in the past. <continue>Only... I wasn't just thinkin' it. It was real.
Text.zh: 你那个碎片可不是闹着玩的。那该死的玩意儿让我以为自己回到了过去。<continue>只不过……不光是“我以为”，而是真真切切地发生了。

Text.en: I see now why those relics disturb you. It conjured up demons from my past. <continue>Not only that, but warped the very world around me.
Text.zh: 我现在明白为什么那些遗物让你不安了。它把我过去的宿敌都变了出来。<continue>不止如此，还扭曲了我周围的世界。

Text.en: It's cursed, that. It played tricks on my mind, made me fight a past battle.
Text.zh: 那东西被诅咒了。它在我脑子里耍花招，让我与过去的敌人重新打了一仗。

Text.en: I cannot tell if you are being serious.
Text.zh: 我很难判断你是不是认真的。

Text.en: I most certainly am.
Text.zh: 我当然是认真的。

Text.en: Quite. Not that I'm complaining. <continue>It's not often I get the pleasure of killing someone a second time.
Text.zh: 确实。我倒不是在抱怨。<continue>把同一个人杀两次这种美事可不多。

Text.en: As serious as the doom of the desert.
Text.zh: 比沙漠的末日还认真。

Text.en: Dead serious.
Text.zh: 当然是认真的。

Text.en: Do you see me laughin'?
Text.zh: 你看我像在笑吗？

Text.en: I may not be the funniest bloke in the world, but if I was tellin' a joke, you'd know it.
Text.zh: 我可能不是什么搞笑高手，但我要是真在开玩笑，你肯定看得出来。

Text.en: Quite serious.
Text.zh: 非常认真。

Text.en: Aye, lad. I'd swear it on Aoife herself.
Text.zh: 是的，小子。我敢拿艾欧菲本人起誓。

Text.en: Perhaps Corruption has finally gotten to you. You seem to be going mad. <continue>We shall worry about this later... Just place the fragment you found.
Text.zh: 也许腐化终究还是侵蚀了你。你看着好像要疯了。<continue>不纠结这个了……先把你找到的碎片放上去吧。

Text.en: So be it.
Text.zh: 那就这样吧。

Text.en: Fine.
Text.zh: 行吧。

Text.en: As you wish.
Text.zh: 随你。

Text.en: Fine by me.
Text.zh: 我没意见。

Text.en: Whatever you say.
Text.zh: 随你怎么说。

Text.en: Yeah... best leave all that in the past where it belongs.
Text.zh: 是啊……过去的事还是让它留在过去吧。

Text.en: Yes. Let us press on.
Text.zh: 好，我们继续吧。

Text.en: Believe me, I'm no madder than I was afore... <continue>But as for the fragment... gladly.
Text.zh: 信不信随你，我没有变疯……<continue>但至于那碎片……乐意奉上。

Text.en: The final gate is open.
Text.zh: 最后一道门打开了。

Text.en: We should be able to find a fragment here...
Text.zh: 应该能在这里找到一块碎片……

Text.en: This time, try not to get caught up in any... imaginary battles.
Text.zh: 这次，别再卷进什么……幻想中的战斗了。

Text.en: You still don't believe me? After all we've seen?
Text.zh: 都经历了这么多了，你还是不相信我？

Text.en: Believe me or not, I don't care. I saw what I saw.
Text.zh: 你信不信，我不在乎。我看见了就是看见了。

Text.en: You still do not believe me? I know you are a smart man... but what reason do you have to doubt my sanity?
Text.zh: 你还是不信我？我知道你这人聪明……可你凭什么怀疑我神志不清？

Text.en: If that's meant to provoke me, you should know I could not care less that you don't believe me.
Text.zh: 如果你是想激我，那我告诉你，我才不在乎你信不信我。

Text.en: What happened happened, whether you believe it or not.
Text.zh: 发生过就是发生过，不管你信不信。

Text.en: I told ya, I wasn't jokin'! What's it gonna take for you to believe me?
Text.zh: 我跟你说了，我没在开玩笑！到底怎样你才肯信？

Text.en: You still disbelieve my account of what happened?
Text.zh: 你还是不相信我讲的经过？

Text.en: Very clever, lad. I take it this means you dinnae believe me?
Text.zh: 真会说啊，小子。我猜你这意思是不相信我？

Text.en: It is not a matter of <i>{belief.} Just lack of evidence. Don't dwell on it.
Text.zh: 这不是<i>{信不信}的问题，是缺乏证据。别纠结了。

Text.en: You have the final fragment. Where did you find it? Another battle in a... memory?
Text.zh: 你拿到了最后一块碎片。在哪儿找到的？又是在什么……记忆中的战斗里？

Text.en: Enough. Let's not get into that again.
Text.zh: 够了。再重复也没啥意义。

Text.en: Yes, but you don't believe me so... who cares?
Text.zh: 对，可你又不信我，所以……管它呢？

Text.en: Perhaps  – but there is no use in trying to convince you.
Text.zh: 也许吧——不过说服你也没意义。

Text.en: Spare me your scepticism and let's get on with it.
Text.zh: 别跟我来这套怀疑论了，继续干正事吧。

Text.en: Still on about that, are ya?
Text.zh: 你还没纠结完这个啊？

Text.en: I already know what you're gonna say, so why don't we just skip this part, eh?
Text.zh: 我已经知道你要说什么了，要不咱们直接跳过这一段？

Text.en: Whatever transpired, you still would not believe it – and it is of no consequence now.
Text.zh: 不管发生了什么事，你都不会信的，而且现在这也不重要了。

Text.en: Why bother askin'? Ye'll only doubt what I tell ye anyhow.
Text.zh: 为什么非要问呢？反正我说什么你都会起疑。

Text.en: I simply have no idea what you're talking about. <continue>Place the final fragment. We must disrupt whatever is happening in the Monolith before it is too late.
Text.zh: 我根本不知道你在说什么。<continue>把最后一个碎片放上去吧。我们必须在不可挽回之前，阻止巨塔那边发生的事。

Text.en: Place the fragments. We must disrupt whatever is happening in the Monolith before it is too late.
Text.zh: 把碎片放上去。我们必须在不可挽回之前，阻止巨塔那边发生的事。

Text.en: Now... what happened back there?
Text.zh: 刚才……那边发生了什么？

Text.en: I faced some sort of ancient Arbiter... it was trying to activate a powerful object of flame. It referred to it as... the Fourth Edict of the Mother Soul.
Text.zh: 我遇到了一位古老的仲裁官……它正试图激活一个强大的火焰之物。它把那东西叫作……原初之魂的第四律令。

Text.en: There was a guardian from ancient times there. He had a relic – a flaming orb of great power. <continue>He called it the 'Fourth Edict of the Mother Soul'.
Text.zh: 那里有个来自远古时代的守卫。他带着一件遗物——一颗蕴藏巨大力量的火焰之球。<continue>他管它叫“原初之魂的第四律令”。

Text.en: There was an ancient guardian. He possessed a relic of flame. I know not of its purpose, but he referred to it as 'the Fourth Edict of the Mother Soul'.
Text.zh: 有个远古的守卫。他持有一件火焰遗物。我不清楚它有什么用，但他称其为“原初之魂的第四律令”。

Text.en: I faced an ancient Arbiter. It held a flaming orb... something it called 'the Fourth Edict of the Mother Soul'.
Text.zh: 我遇上了一位远古的仲裁官。它拿着一颗火焰之球……说是叫“原初之魂的第四律令”。

Text.en: Went toe-to-toe with an ancient guardian. Had some kinda flamin' orb... called it the 'Fourth Edict o' the Mother Soul'.
Text.zh: 跟一个远古守卫狠狠干了一架。他有个什么火焰之球……叫“原初之魂的第四律令”。

Text.en: Fought some ancient bloke. He said a whole load o' shite I didn't understand, but there was one thing in particular. <continue>He had this flaming orb... called it 'the Fourth Edict of the Mother Soul'.
Text.zh: 跟来自远古的家伙打了一架。他说了一大堆我听不懂的屁话，不过有件事我记住了。<continue>他拿着个火焰之球……叫“原初之魂的第四律令”。

Text.en: I quarrelled with an ancient being... and in its possession was a flaming orb. It called it 'the Fourth Edict of the Mother Soul.
Text.zh: 我跟一个远古存在起了冲突……它手里有一个火焰之球。它称其为“原初之魂的第四律令”。

Text.en: Where to begin? With the ancient bein' who tried puttin' me down, or with the flaming orb it called 'the Fourth Edict o' the Mother Soul'?
Text.zh: 从哪儿说起好呢？是那个想干掉我的远古存在，还是它那个叫“原初之魂的第四律令”的火焰之球？

Text.en: Hmm... more clues. And this 'Mother Soul'... are all the Edicts related to this? <continue>Tell me, what became of this... Fourth Edict?
Text.zh: 嗯……又多了些线索。还有这个“原初之魂”……难道所有律令都和它有关吗？<continue>告诉我，第四律令……后来怎么样了？

Text.en: The Lich we unleashed... he stole it before I could obtain it. <continue>He claimed it 'once meant their doom', but that it shall serve <i>{his} master now.
Text.zh: 我们放出来的那个巫妖……在我拿到手之前抢走了它。<continue>他声称那东西<i>{曾是他们的克星}，但现在要为<i>{他的}主人所用了。

Text.en: That pesky little Lich made off with it. Said it once meant the doom of his kind, but now would serve his master.
Text.zh: 那个讨厌的小巫妖把它抢走了。说那东西曾是他们一族的克星，但现在要为他的主人所用了。

Text.en: That fiend of the Abyssals... he waited until the fight was won, then swooped in and stole it. <continue>According to the creature, it once meant the doom of his kind. But he seemed convinced it would serve his master now.
Text.zh: 那个深渊魔物……他等到我们打完，突然冲出来把东西偷走了。<continue>照那家伙的说法，它曾是他们一族的克星。不过现在他认定这东西能为他的主人所用。

Text.en: Was just about to get a closer look when the Lich we freed came back and stole it. <continue>He said it once meant the doom of his people. No wonder he wanted to get his hands on it.
Text.zh: 我正准备仔细看看，结果我们放出来的那只巫妖又回来把它偷走了。<continue>他说它曾是他们一族的克星。难怪他这么想要。

Text.en: It's in the wind now. Bloody Lich came back and took it... said it once meant the doom o' his people, but now it would serve his master.
Text.zh: 现在那东西不翼而飞。那该死的巫妖回来把它抢走了……说还说这东西曾是他们一族的克星，但现在要为他的主人所用了。

Text.en: Wouldn't you know it, that bloody Lich we freed swooped in and stole it. He said it 'once meant their doom', but not any longer. <continue>Seemed right pleased to get his hands on it, truth be told.
Text.zh: 你说怪不怪，我们放走的那只巫妖突然冒出来把它偷走了。他说它“曾是他们的克星”，但现在不会是了。<continue>说实话，他得手的时候高兴得很。

Text.en: The Lich... the one who flew his prison... he retrieved it before I could. <continue>He claimed it once meant the doom of the Abyssals, but if anything, he seemed to view it as their salvation now.
Text.zh: 那个巫妖……从囚牢逃出去的那个……在我之前把它拿走了。<continue>他声称它曾是深渊魔物的克星，但看他的样子，现在那东西倒成了他们的救赎。

Text.en: That Lich returned and made off with it, damned nuisance that he is. <continue>Said somethin' about it once meanin' their doom, but that it would serve his master now.
Text.zh: 那只巫妖回来了，把它给顺走了，真是烦死人。<continue>说了些什么它曾是他们的克星，但现在要为他的主人所用。

Text.en: The Lich taking it was unfortunate, to say the least. <continue>So, the Precursors must have used this Fourth Edict... this orb of flame... against the Abyssals. <continue>This must have meant both their dooms!
Text.zh: 巫妖抢走了它，可以说太不走运了。<continue>先驱者一定是用了这第四律令……这个火焰之球……来对抗深渊魔物。<continue>肯定就是这东西让他们双方全都覆灭！

Text.en: Give me a moment.
Text.zh: 给我一点时间。

Text.en: We must reach the central tower and try to learn more. <continue>Perhaps with further knowledge of the Edicts, we can find a way to wake the Hooded One and finally... stop the Beast.
Text.zh: 我们必须抵达中央塔楼，试着了解更多信息。<continue>或许，掌握更多有关律令的知识，我们就能找到唤醒兜帽密师的方法，最终就能……阻止邪兽。

Text.en: How many of these damned Edicts did they invent?
Text.zh: 他们到底发明了多少个该死的律令？

Text.en: Just how many of these Edicts are there?
Text.zh: 到底有多少个这样的律令啊？

Text.en: It seems everything we learn of these Edicts raises only more questions.
Text.zh: 关于这些律令，我们知道得越多……疑问反而越多。

Text.en: How many more of these Edicts can I expect to find?
Text.zh: 还有多少个这样的律令等着我去找？

Text.en: How many o' these Edicts can there be?
Text.zh: 到底有多少个这样的律令啊？

Text.en: Don't tell me there's <i>{more} o' these bloody Edicts. Can hardly keep track as is.
Text.zh: 别告诉我还有<i>{更多}这种该死的律令。现在这些我都快记不住了。

Text.en: Have you an estimate on how many Edicts there are?
Text.zh: 你有没有估计过总共有多少个律令？

Text.en: I'd settle for knowin' how many Edicts there are first.
Text.zh: 哪怕能先知道总共有多少律令也行啊。

Text.en: Well... we know of the Second, which is the Beast. We know of the Third, which is the Weapon. And we know of the Fourth, which is this orb of flame. <continue>I suspect all that remains to uncover is the First Edict.
Text.zh: 嗯……我们知道第二律令，就是邪兽。第三律令，就是那把武器。现在我们又知道第四律令，就是这个火焰之球。<continue>我看还没发现的就只有第一律令了。

Text.en: Hmm. The closer we get, the stronger the energies become... <continue>There... that must be the tower we see in these murals. <continue>And it appears the Lich is most interested in whatever is up there...
Text.zh: 嗯。离得越近，共振就越强……<continue>那里……一定就是我们在壁画中看到的那座塔。<continue>而且巫妖似乎对上面的东西很感兴趣……

Text.en: Reach the central tower. We must learn more.
Text.zh: 去中央塔楼。我们必须了解更多信息。

Text.en: [NOAUDIO] This statue... a woman appears with child.
Text.zh: 这尊雕像……一个有身孕的女子。

Text.en: What do you think it means?
Text.zh: 你觉得这意味着什么？

Text.en: And what? Careless women fall with child all the time.
Text.zh: 那又怎样？粗心女人怀上孩子，这种事天天都有。

Text.en: Could she be a matriarch of their time?
Text.zh: 她会不会是那个时代的主母？

Text.en: What do you make of this?
Text.zh: 你对此有什么看法？

Text.en: Not what I expected to find. What d'ya think it means?
Text.zh: 我可没想到会找到这个。你觉得这意味着什么？

Text.en: Whaddaya think her deal is?
Text.zh: 你觉得她是什么来头？

Text.en: What might this mean?
Text.zh: 这意味着什么？

Text.en: Who is she? And why is she here?
Text.zh: 她是谁？她为什么在这里？

Text.en: [NOAUDIO] Perhaps this has something to do with the 'Mother Soul.' <continue>It may allude to the Precursors' ability to... alter life. <continue>For instance, I believe the Arbiter you faced was a carefully designed being.
Text.zh: 或许这与“原初之魂”有关。<continue>可能暗示了先驱者们拥有……改造生命的能力。<continue>比方说，我相信你遇到的那位仲裁官，就是一个被精心设计出来的生命。

Text.en: I see... I wonder what that means for the rest of our quest.
Text.zh: 我明白了……不知道这对接下来的任务意味着什么。

Text.en: They could alter life, you say? Hmm... <continue>Maybe I ought to learn a thing or two from our long dead friends.
Text.zh: 你是说，他们能改造生命？唔……<continue>也许我该向这些死了几千年的朋友学个一两招。

Text.en: Do you foresee what it could mean for us?
Text.zh: 你能预见到这对我们意味着什么吗？

Text.en: What does that tell us?
Text.zh: 这说明了什么？

Text.en: It weren't natural, that's for certain. Wonder what this says about the road ahead.
Text.zh: 反正肯定不是自然形成的。就是不知道这对我们之后的路来说意味着什么。

Text.en: Okay, so what's that mean for us?
Text.zh: 好吧，那对我们来说意味着什么？

Text.en: Curious. What lessons might we take from this?
Text.zh: 有意思。我们能从这件事里了解到什么？

Text.en: All very interestin'... but what does it tell us about our foe?
Text.zh: 真有趣……可这能让我们了解敌人的什么情况？

Text.en: [NOAUDIO] For now, I can only speculate that we may encounter more... designed beings.
Text.zh: 目前，我只能推测，我们可能会遇到更多……被设计出来的存在。

Text.en: The sheer scale of this machine... What could it possibly be for?
Text.zh: 这台机器的规模也太大了……它到底有什么用呢？

Text.en: I was hoping you might have an idea...
Text.zh: 我还指望你能知道点什么呢……

Text.en: Oh, come now. Aren't you our resident genius?
Text.zh: 哦，得了吧。你不是我们这儿的天才吗？

Text.en: I've never laid eyes on such a thing. What do you think?
Text.zh: 我从来没见过这种东西。你怎么看？

Text.en: You're the scientist. You tell me.
Text.zh: 你是科学家。该由你来告诉我。

Text.en: That's where you come in.
Text.zh: 该你发挥作用了。

Text.en: Well, don't ask me!
Text.zh: 别问我啊！

Text.en: I'd hoped you might know.
Text.zh: 我还以为你知道呢。

Text.en: Was hopin' you might tell me.
Text.zh: 我还想着你能告诉我呢。

Text.en: It appears it was capable of channeling immense energy into a single point. <continue>The markings I see indicate there are two vital components to this. <continue>Beyond that, it remains to be seen.
Text.zh: 这台机器能够将巨大的能量汇聚于一点。<continue>我看到的标记表明，它有两个至关重要的部件。<continue>除此之外，还有待观察。

Text.en: Where should I look? And... what should I look <i>{for?}
Text.zh: 我该去哪里找？又该……<i>{找}些什么？

Text.en: Well, that's helpful. So we need to find two somethings, and we need to find them... <i>{somewhere.}
Text.zh: 你这话真是帮了大忙了。所以我们得找两样东西，而且得去……<i>{某个地方}找。

Text.en: Then we must seek these 'components', whatever they are. And wherever they might be.
Text.zh: 那我们就得去找这些“部件”，不管它们是什么，也不管它们藏在哪里。

Text.en: Two components...  That's not much to go on.
Text.zh: 两个部件……这线索也太少了。

Text.en: So what are we to do? Scour the world for these components, when we know neither what they look like nor where they are?
Text.zh: 那我们该怎么办？满世界去找这些部件？可咱们既不知道它们长什么样，也不知道在哪儿啊。

Text.en: So... we're lookin' for two components but we don't know where, and we don't know what they look like. Is that about the gist of it?
Text.zh: 所以……我们在找两个部件，但不知道在哪儿，也不知道长什么样。大概就是这么回事吧？

Text.en: Where should I search for these components? And what might they look like?
Text.zh: 我该上哪儿去找这些部件？它们大概是什么样子？

Text.en: Then we ought to find these 'components'. If only we knew where to look.
Text.zh: 那我们就得去找这些“部件”了。要是知道上哪儿找就好了。

Text.en: Hmm... the machine has a direct connection to the leylines. <continue>Let me try something...
Text.zh: 嗯……看来这台机器与地脉有直接的联系。<continue>让我试试……

Text.en: And once more...
Text.zh: 再来一次……

Text.en: These locations must house what we seek... I am sure of it.
Text.zh: 这些地方必定藏有我们所需之物……我确信无疑。

Text.en: See what you can find, and return to me.
Text.zh: 看看能找到什么，然后回来找我。

Text.en: I reached one of the locations. This... thing... is all I found.
Text.zh: 我到了其中一个地方，就找到了……这个东西。

Text.en: Whatever it is you were after... I think I have one.
Text.zh: 不管你在找什么……我觉得我找到一个了。

Text.en: I risked my life for this. Please, tell me it is what we need...
Text.zh: 我可是拼了命才拿到这个的。拜托告诉我，这就是我们要找的东西……

Text.en: I think I found one of the components we're looking for. <continue>It's... not exactly what I expected.
Text.zh: 我想我找到了一个部件。<continue>它……跟我想象的不太一样。

Text.en: Take a look at this. Found it at one o' the locations you pointed out.
Text.zh: 瞧瞧这个。在你说的其中一个地方找到的。

Text.en: This one of the components we're after?
Text.zh: 这是我们要找的部件吗？

Text.en: These components we're searching for... might this be one of them?
Text.zh: 我们一直在找的那些组件……会不会就是这个？

Text.en: You were right about those locations... Think I found one o' the components there.
Text.zh: 你说那些地点没错……我想我在那儿找到了一个部件。

Text.en: It appears to be some kind of... ovum.  <continue>It is not entirely flesh, neither entirely engineered. <continue>It would require much study to understand it further. For now, it is best we find the other component.
Text.zh: 看起来像是某种……卵。<continue>既不完全是活物，也不完全是人造物。<continue>要进一步了解，需要大量研究。眼下，最好还是先找到另一个部件。

Text.en: I reached one of the locations. This... thing... is all I found.
Text.zh: 我到了其中一个地方，就找到了……这个东西。

Text.en: Whatever it is you were after... I think I have one.
Text.zh: 不管你在找什么……我觉得我找到一个了。

Text.en: I risked my life for this. Please, tell me it is what we need...
Text.zh: 我可是拼了命才拿到这个的。拜托告诉我，这就是我们要找的东西……

Text.en: I think I found one of the components we're looking for. <continue>It's... not exactly what I expected.
Text.zh: 我想我找到了一个部件。<continue>它……跟我想象的不太一样。

Text.en: Take a look at this. Found it at one o' the locations you pointed out.
Text.zh: 瞧瞧这个。在你说的其中一个地方找到的。

Text.en: This one of the components we're after?
Text.zh: 这是我们要找的部件吗？

Text.en: These components we're searching for... might this be one of them?
Text.zh: 我们一直在找的那些组件……会不会就是这个？

Text.en: You were right about those locations... Think I found one o' the components there.
Text.zh: 你说那些地点没错……我想我在那儿找到了一个部件。

Text.en: It appears to be some kind of... seed. <continue>Its energy is immense. <continue>It would require much study to understand it further. For now, it is best we find the other component.
Text.zh: 看起来像是某种……种子。<continue>它蕴含着巨大的能量。<continue>要进一步了解，需要大量研究。眼下，最好还是先找到另一个部件。

Text.en: Let me see what you have found.
Text.zh: 让我看看你找到了什么。

Text.en: I have no idea what to make of these.
Text.zh: 我完全不知道这都是些什么。

Text.en: I made some... <i>{interesting} discoveries.
Text.zh: 我搞到了一些……挺<i>{有意思的}发现。

Text.en: I cannot make sense of what we have found here.
Text.zh: 我也说不好这些东西到底是什么。

Text.en: Not sure what we're dealing with here.
Text.zh: 不太清楚眼前这东西到底是什么。

Text.en: I hope these aren't what I think they are.
Text.zh: 希望不是我想的那种玩意。

Text.en: Found this. Found that. No idea what any of it means.
Text.zh: 捡了这个，拿了那个。完全不知道这些东西有啥用。

Text.en: Here... but do not ask me to explain their function.
Text.zh: 给你……不过可别问我这东西有什么用。

Text.en: Yer guess is as good as mine.
Text.zh: 我也跟你一样一头雾水。

Text.en: Hmm. Intriguing. A seed... and an egg. <continue>I'm unsure of the purpose of this... but it seems obvious what we must do.
Text.zh: 嗯。有意思。一枚种子……和一颗卵。<continue>我还不确定它们的用途……但该怎么做，似乎显而易见。

Text.en: Should we really dabble again with the unknown?
Text.zh: 我们真的还要去招惹这类未知之物吗？

Text.en: There's that signature recklessness I've come to know and... tolerate.
Text.zh: 又是那股子冒失劲儿。我早就见怪不怪……只能忍着了。

Text.en: I'm not sure I follow you...
Text.zh: 我不太明白你的意思……

Text.en: They might be dangerous.
Text.zh: 这可能很危险。

Text.en: Let me guess – plough on without any thought to consequences?
Text.zh: 让我猜猜，就是不管三七二十一硬上呗。

Text.en: Oh, here we go...
Text.zh: 唉，又来了……

Text.en: I'm not sure that's wise. What of the risks?
Text.zh: 我觉得这不太明智。那些风险就不管了？

Text.en: Ye say that like there's no risk involved.
Text.zh: 你说得好像这事儿没风险似的。

Text.en: Again... it is a calculated risk. This could hold the answers we need...
Text.zh: 我说过……这是经过计算的风险。这或许就藏着我们需要的答案……

Text.en: Do you really believe that? Or has your curiosity got the best of you?
Text.zh: 你真这么想？还是只是好奇心作祟？

Text.en: You and your 'calculated risks'.
Text.zh: 你就知道说什么“经过计算的风险”。

Text.en: You'll have me do some strange thing now, won't you?
Text.zh: 你又要让我去做些奇怪的事了，对吧？

Text.en: Or it could hold any number of unimaginable horrors.
Text.zh: 也可能藏着各种无法想象的恐怖玩意儿。

Text.en: For such a smart man, you seem awful keen to repeat past mistakes.
Text.zh: 你这么聪明个人，怎么老想着重蹈覆辙？

Text.en: <i>{Or} it could blow us to smithereens.
Text.zh: <i>{也}可能直接把我们炸成碎片。

Text.en: It seems unwise. Should we not take some time to understand it first?
Text.zh: 这太不靠谱了。难道就不能先花点时间搞明白？

Text.en: All sorts o' things <i>{could} happen – not all of 'em good.
Text.zh: 什么事都<i>{可能}发生，而且不一定是好事。

Text.en: I understand your concern, but we must move forward. <continue>I believe we must... fertilise the egg using the seed... Place them both in the machine.
Text.zh: 我理解你的担忧，但我们必须勇往直前。<continue>看来我们必须……用种子去孕育卵。然后……把它们放进机器里。

Text.en: Words I never expected to hear in my lifetime.
Text.zh: 真没想过有生之年我能听见这种话。

Text.en: Quit flirting with me and let's get on with it.
Text.zh: 别跟我来这套，赶紧办正事。

Text.en: In times like these, I miss the simplicity of the Vastiri... So be it.
Text.zh: 每到这种时候，我就想起瓦斯提里的淳朴……行吧。

Text.en: You want me to...? Alright.
Text.zh: 你想让我……？行吧。

Text.en: Only since you asked so nicely.
Text.zh: 好吧，看在你那么客气的份上。

Text.en: Blimey, mate. Buy me a drink first, will ya?
Text.zh: 我的天啊，老兄。起码先请我喝一杯吧。

Text.en: One of your more unorthodox requests.
Text.zh: 就算是你，这要求也真够另类的。

Text.en: A strangely natural process for somethin' so... unnatural.
Text.zh: 这么不自然的东西……诞生过程倒是挺自然。

Text.en: Incredible! The entire fortress seemed to refocus its power here at that moment!
Text.zh: 太厉害了！那一瞬间堡垒好像把所有力量都集中到这儿了！

Text.en: That was... immense. The air felt alive.
Text.zh: 这……能量太强了。空气好像都活了过来。

Text.en: My, my. This is quite the machine.
Text.zh: 哎呀呀。这机器可真了不得。

Text.en: What have we witnessed? Is this some... new creation?
Text.zh: 我们看到了什么？这是什么……新的造物吗？

Text.en: Should've known better after everything we've seen, but that was... <i>{a lot} more than I expected.
Text.zh: 经历过这么多事，早该见怪不怪了，可这阵仗……比我想的<i>{大太多了}。

Text.en: Don't know what I were expectin'... but it weren't that.
Text.zh: 我也不知道自己在期待什么……但肯定不是这样。

Text.en: Thought the whole place was comin' down for a moment there!
Text.zh: 刚才我还以为这整个地方要塌了呢……

Text.en: That was a wonder to behold. The very air crackled with energy.
Text.zh: 真是奇观啊。空气都噼啪作响，迸发着能量。

Text.en: What in the name o' the Draíocht were these Precursors thinkin'? A machine like this could split ye in two just for standin' near it.<continue>Seems it did the trick, mind.
Text.zh: 德莱契在上，这些先驱者脑子里到底在想什么？这种机器，光是站在旁边就能把人撕成两半。<continue>不过，看起来确实奏效了。

Text.en: I believe we have forged something extremely important... <continue>Ascend the tower and ascertain its purpose. But... tread carefully.
Text.zh: 我相信我们锻造出了极其重要的东西。<continue>现在，登上塔楼，去查清它的用途。但……务必小心行事。

Text.en: The First Edict is the very origin of Divinity!
Text.zh: 第一律令就是神性的起源！

Text.en: You're telling me...
Text.zh: 还用你说……

Text.en: That's putting it lightly.
Text.zh: 你这说得也太轻描淡写了。

Text.en: You state the obvious.
Text.zh: 尽说些明摆着的事。

Text.en: Oh <i>{really?} I couldn't tell.
Text.zh: 哦，<i>{是吗？}我还真没看出来。

Text.en: You don't say?
Text.zh: 还用你说？

Text.en: Incredible? Try 'out of this bloody world!'
Text.zh: 难以想象？那叫“离谱他妈给离谱开门”！

Text.en: Quite the contrary. Not only was it of this world, it is foundational to the world as we know it!
Text.zh: 恰恰相反。这不仅属于这个世界，更是我们这个世界的根基所在！

Text.en: To say the least.
Text.zh: 这么说都算客气了。

Text.en: Aye, that it did.
Text.zh: 是啊，确实如此。

Text.en: I believe what we see here... is the beginning of it all. <continue>This seed... this is the catalyst of the First Edict. The source, the very origin... of Divinity itself!
Text.zh: 我相信我们眼前看到的……就是一切的起源。<continue>这颗种子……这就是第一律令的催化剂。它就是源头……是神性的起源！

Text.en: You mean... <i>{this} is what gave rise to the gods?
Text.zh: 你是说……<i>{这东西}造就了众神？

Text.en: This thing? Are you sure?
Text.zh: 就这东西？你确定？

Text.en: Are you saying <i>{this} seed gave rise to the gods?
Text.zh: 你是说<i>{这枚}种子造就了众神？

Text.en: You mean Divinity... the gods... all of it started here?
Text.zh: 你是说，神性……众神……一切的一切都是从这里开始的？

Text.en: You mean to say <i>{this} is the reason Wraeclast has gods?
Text.zh: 你是说，瓦尔克拉斯之所以有众神，全是因为<i>{这个}？

Text.en: But how can that be? The gods are, well... <i>{the gods}. And this is just some little old seed.
Text.zh: 可这怎么可能？众神，那可是……<i>{众神}啊。而这不过是一枚小小的古老种子。

Text.en: Divinity? Are you certain?
Text.zh: 神性？你确定吗？

Text.en: That's quite the claim. There's many who'd call it blasphemy, to say the gods rose this way.
Text.zh: 这说法可真够大胆。说众神是这般兴起的，怕是会被很多人斥为渎神。

Text.en: Utter desperation must have driven the Precursors to pour all their talent and science into its creation. <continue>The consequences of which were felt throughout all Wraeclast... for all time. <continue>The Arbiter would have seen the world destroyed rather than let it fall into the wrong hands... but thanks to you, Wraeclast has been saved from absolute annihilation. <continue>You... have impressed me.
Text.zh: 先驱者一定是陷入了彻底的绝望，才被迫倾尽所有才智和科技来创造它。<continue>这后果波及整个瓦尔克拉斯……永世不灭。<continue>仲裁官宁可看着世界毁灭，也不愿让它落入歹人之手……但多亏了你，瓦尔克拉斯才逃过了彻底湮灭的命运。<continue>你……让我刮目相看。

Text.en: We can only assume in their desperation they made mistakes.
Text.zh: 我们只能假设，是绝望让他们难免犯错。

Text.en: Seems they poured a few mistakes in as well.
Text.zh: 看来他们还在里面掺了不少错误。

Text.en: And the world has suffered in the shadow of their mistakes.
Text.zh: 而整个世界一直在他们错误的阴影下承受苦难。

Text.en: They sure have a lot to answer for.
Text.zh: 他们欠下的债可太多了。

Text.en: Aye. They've more blood on their hands than even your precious Queen.
Text.zh: 是啊。他们手上的血，比你那宝贝女王还多。

Text.en: So we have these ancient gits to thank for the mess we're in?
Text.zh: 所以我们现在这烂摊子，全得拜这群老古董所赐？

Text.en: For all their good intentions, it seems they made a few errors in judgement.
Text.zh: 纵然他们本意是好的，但显然判断失误了。

Text.en: They must've been desperate. And desperate folk make mistakes.
Text.zh: 他们当时必定是走投无路了。而走投无路的人最容易犯错。

Text.en: Indeed.
Text.zh: 确实。

Text.en: But what purpose did this embryo serve?
Text.zh: 但这个胚胎到底有什么用？

Text.en: What about the embryo? What was it for?
Text.zh: 那胚胎呢？用来做什么的？

Text.en: And what of the embryo? What purpose did it serve?
Text.zh: 胚胎又怎么说？它有什么用？

Text.en: Where does the embryo come in?
Text.zh: 那胚胎能派上什么用场？

Text.en: And what's the embryo for?
Text.zh: 所以那个胚胎是干什么用的？

Text.en: And how's the embryo fit into all this?
Text.zh: 胚胎跟这一切有什么关系？

Text.en: What role does the embryo play in this?
Text.zh: 胚胎在其中起什么作用？

Text.en: Forget the gods a moment. What of the embryo?
Text.zh: 先别管众神了。那胚胎是怎么回事？

Text.en: This requires further study. Whatever this Embryo actually is... I suspect this is what the Abyssals truly desire. <continue>That is reason enough to protect it.  <continue>For now... I must relocate the Embryo and the First Edict.<continue>We have begun to unravel an immense mystery... I am now certain we will find a way to save ourselves.
Text.zh: 这还需要进一步研究。不管这胚胎究竟是什么……我怀疑，这才是深渊魔物真正觊觎的东西。<continue>仅凭这一点，就值得我们去保护它。<continue>眼下……我必须把这胚胎和第一律令都转移走。<continue>我们终于开始触及那巨大的谜团了……我现在确信，我们会找到自救的方法。

Text.en: With this, can we wake the Hooded One?
Text.zh: 有了这个，我们能唤醒兜帽密师吗？

Text.en: Aren't you forgetting someone? Last I checked there's an unconscious shade back at our camp. <continue>Will this finally allow us to wake him?
Text.zh: 你是不是忘了个人？我要是没记错，营地里还躺着个神志不清的鬼影呢。<continue>这下终于能把他弄醒了？

Text.en: Save ourselves... and wake the Hooded One?
Text.zh: 先救我们自己……再把兜帽密师叫醒？

Text.en: And the Hooded One? Will this allow us to wake him?
Text.zh: 那兜帽密师呢？这些东西能帮我们唤醒他吗？

Text.en: Great. Now tell me you're certain this will help us wake the Hooded One.
Text.zh: 很好。那你现在就告诉我，你确定这能把兜帽密师弄醒。

Text.en: That's all well and good, but... what about the Hooded One? Will all this help wake him?
Text.zh: 好是好……可兜帽密师怎么办？这能帮我们叫醒他吗？

Text.en: Do not forget why we first walked this path: to wake the Hooded One. Will this help in that regard?
Text.zh: 别忘了我们踏上此路的初衷，唤醒兜帽密师。这东西能帮上忙吗？

Text.en: All this talk o' gods and ye forget the Hooded One. Surely now we can wake him?
Text.zh: 满嘴神啊鬼的，你们倒把兜帽密师给忘了。这下我们总该能把他弄醒了吧？

Text.en: Perhaps... but I dare not make his situation even worse. It requires study. <continue>Continue to explore the fortress if you wish. I must admit, you have...  impressed me.
Text.zh: 也许吧……但我必须先研究清楚，不能让他的情况变得更糟。<continue>如果你愿意，可以继续探索这座宝贝吧。我得承认，你……让我刮目相看。

Text.en: I retrieved the First Edict from the tower. <continue>The Beast continues to drain the Hooded One's energy, but perhaps the First Edict could empower him directly...
Text.zh: 我从塔楼取回了第一律令。<continue>邪兽还在汲取兜帽密师的能量，但或许第一律令能直接为他注入力量……

Text.en: At least there is hope for him. Hope for us all. Hope for Wraeclast. <continue>Now tell me... have you learned anything further about the embryo? Could that help him?
Text.zh: 至少他还有希望。我们都有希望。瓦尔克拉斯也还有希望。<continue>告诉我……关于那个胚胎，你有什么新发现吗？那东西能帮到他吗？

Text.en: Well, best you hop to it! We don't have years. <continue>How about the embryo? What have you learned?
Text.zh: 嗯，那你最好快点！我们可等不了好几年。<continue>那个胚胎怎么样了？你研究出什么了？

Text.en: Then there is still hope – for him, and for Wraeclast. <continue>What of the embryo? Have you studied it further?
Text.zh: 那就还有希望，他有，瓦尔克拉斯也有。<continue>那个胚胎呢？你有继续研究吗？

Text.en: As long as it doesn't take that long to wake him. <continue>Now... about the embryo... What have you learned?
Text.zh: 可别花那么久才把他叫醒。<continue>好了……说说那个胚胎吧……你研究出什么了？

Text.en: Any chance is better than no chance. <continue>And what about the embryo? Do you think that can help?
Text.zh: 有希望总比没希望强。<continue>那个胚胎呢？你觉得它能帮上忙吗？

Text.en: Well, that's somethin'. Wake the Hooded One and we'll be in good shape. <continue>Don't suppose you've learned anythin' about the embryo that might help us there?
Text.zh: 好歹也算有点进展了。唤醒兜帽密师，我们就好办了。<continue>你有摸清楚那个胚胎能不能帮上忙吗？

Text.en: Hope is a precious thing. We should hold onto it as long as we can. <continue>Now, tell me what you've learned of this embryo. Might it help us to rouse him?
Text.zh: 希望很宝贵，只要还有，就不能放手。<continue>告诉我，你对这个胚胎有什么发现？它能帮我们唤醒他吗？

Text.en: Some hope's better than none. <continue>Now what of the embryo? Might that help us wake him?
Text.zh: 有一丝希望也总比没有好。<continue>那个胚胎呢？能帮我们唤醒他吗？

Text.en: We must not be reckless. The First Edict holds untold power. <continue>And I suspect... it is the impetus behind the creation of <i>{all} the Edicts.
Text.zh: 我们不能鲁莽。第一律令蕴含着难以言说的力量。<continue>而且我怀疑……它是催生<i>{所有}律令的原动力。

Text.en: But what does that even mean? What is a Mother Soul?
Text.zh: 可这到底是什么意思？什么是原初之魂？

Text.en: You'd best do some explaining, Thaumaturge.
Text.zh: 你最好解释得清楚点，奇术师。

Text.en: How can you be sure? We still do not understand what the Mother Soul is.
Text.zh: 你怎么能确定？我们还没弄明白原初之魂是什么呢。

Text.en: What makes you say that?
Text.zh: 你为什么这么说？

Text.en: But what does that mean? We don't even know what the Mother Soul does.
Text.zh: 可这到底意味着什么？我们连原初之魂是干什么的都不知道。

Text.en: That... doesn't help me understand it any better.
Text.zh: 呃……你这么说我还是没法理解。

Text.en: And if it were, what would that mean? What <i>{is} the Mother Soul?
Text.zh: 就算真是这样，那又意味着什么？原初之魂到底<i>{是}什么？

Text.en: How do ye figure? We know so little o' what the Mother Soul is.
Text.zh: 你怎么得出这结论的？我们对原初之魂几乎一无所知。

Text.en: This theory... I find it hard to explain. It is almost... a <i>{feeling}.
Text.zh: 这个理论……我觉得很难解释清楚。它是一种……<i>{感觉}。

Text.en: When I look at the First Edict... I feel tremendous fear. Like staring into infinity... and feeling... <i>{something...} staring back. <continue>I believe the Precursors never intended subsequent Edicts after the First to exist at all.  <continue>But after the First was ordained, the others followed... reactively. Perhaps even desperately.
Text.zh: 当我看着第一律令时……我会感到巨大的恐惧，就像在凝视无限……然后感觉有<i>{某种东西…… }也在凝视着你。<continue>我相信，先驱者在创造出第一律令后，并未打算创造后续的律令。<continue>但第一律令被正式启用之后，其他律令便……随之出现。也许是走投无路之举。

Text.en: So this Mother Soul... its power is beyond reckoning?
Text.zh: 所以这个原初之魂……它的力量深不可测？

Text.en: Sounds awfully powerful... I like the sound of it.
Text.zh: 听起来强得离谱……我喜欢。

Text.en: This Mother Soul... it sounds as though its power is beyond imagining.
Text.zh: 这原初之魂……听上去力量大得超乎想象。

Text.en: This Mother Soul sounds... dangerous.
Text.zh: 这原初之魂听起来……很危险。

Text.en: If that's the case, sounds like this Mother Soul is not to be trifled with.
Text.zh: 要是那样的话，这原初之魂可不是能随便招惹的东西。

Text.en: Sounds like this Mother Soul's no joke.
Text.zh: 听上去这原初之魂可不是吃素的。

Text.en: This Mother Soul must be powerful indeed.
Text.zh: 这原初之魂的力量肯定很强大。

Text.en: Is it not dangerous to hold such a thing in our possession?
Text.zh: 把这东西带在身边，不危险吗？

Text.en: If the Abyssals should take hold of it... oblivion awaits us all. <continue>We <i>{must} protect the First Edict at all costs.
Text.zh: 万一深渊魔物得到了它……等待我们的就只有湮灭了。<continue>我们<i>{必须}不惜一切代价保护第一律令。

Text.en: Forgive my intrusion, but this location is completely overrun with Corruption. <continue>The Cataclysm's lingering effects appear to be thriving... spreading like a disease.
Text.zh: 容我插一句，但这地方已完全被腐化吞噬。<continue>灾变的余波似乎愈演愈烈……像疾病一样蔓延。

Text.en: Corruption's plague must come to an end.
Text.zh: 腐化的瘟疫必须被终结。

Text.en: Corruption's nothing if not consistent. Wherever we turn, there it is, waiting for us.
Text.zh: 腐化这东西还真是一如既往。无论我们走到哪儿，它都在那儿等着我们。

Text.en: Then we must purge it, before it can spread any further.<continue>The only question is how.
Text.zh: 那我们必须在它进一步扩散之前，将它清除干净。<continue>唯一的问题是，怎么清除。

Text.en: If Corruption's a disease, then we're the cure. <continue>And it seems we have our work cut out for us.
Text.zh: 要是腐化是种病，那我们就是解药。<continue>看来我们算是接了个大活啊。

Text.en: There must be summat we can do. Bloody well sick to death of all this <i>{rathin}.
Text.zh: 一定会有办法的。真是受够<i>{腐化}这堆烂事了。

Text.en: This Corruption spreads faster than an itch in a brothel.
Text.zh: 这腐化散播起来，比窑子里的脏病还快。

Text.en: An apt comparison. We must do what we can to curb its spread.
Text.zh: 这个比喻还挺贴切。我们必须尽力遏制它的蔓延。

Text.en: Aye. Like a weed that keeps sproutin' back.
Text.zh: 是啊。就像野草，怎么都除不干净。

Text.en: Indeed. <continue>Travel to the core of this infestation and investigate further. We must find a way to quell Corruption's advance. <continue>I will continue to work on solutions here in the meantime.
Text.zh: 确实。<continue>前往这片腐化之地的核心地带，做进一步调查。我们必须找到阻止腐化蔓延的方法。<continue>我则继续留在这里，研究解决方案。

Text.en: It worked! My prototype shows promise.
Text.zh: 成功了！我的原型机果然奏效了。

Text.en: It worked. This... is progress.
Text.zh: 成功了。这……算是个进展。

Text.en: That went well. I hoped it could handle such concentrations of Corruption.
Text.zh: 进展顺利。我原本就希望它能应对这种程度的腐化。

Text.en: A powerful device like this would have been useful <i>{much} earlier, Doryani...
Text.zh: 多里亚尼……这么强大的东西，要是<i>{再}早点造出来就好了……

Text.en: You've been holding out on me, Thaumaturge. This might have been quite useful earlier!
Text.zh: 你一直在藏私啊，奇术师。这东西要是早点拿出来，用处可大了！

Text.en: You have had this all along? Why only use it now?
Text.zh: 这东西一直都在你手里？为什么现在才拿出来用？

Text.en: <i>{Now} you produce this device. <continue>Where was this when we were hot on the heels of the Beast?
Text.zh: <i>{现在}你倒把这装置拿出来了。<continue>当初我们死追邪兽的时候，怎么没看见它？

Text.en: You been holdin' out on us? Might've been useful to wield that thing against the Beast.
Text.zh: 你一直瞒着我们？要是拿这玩意儿对付邪兽，兴许能派上大用场。

Text.en: Hang on a bloody minute – since when can you do that? Woulda come in handy long before now!
Text.zh: 你他妈给我等一下，你什么时候有这手本事的？早拿出来不就好了嘛！

Text.en: If only you had devised this prototype earlier. It may well have made a difference in our efforts against the Beast.
Text.zh: 你要是早点造出这原型机就好了。当初对付邪兽的时候，说不定就能扭转局面。

Text.en: Ye didnae think to mention this afore? When we've been searchin' for ways to quell the Beast?
Text.zh: 你之前就没想着提一嘴？我们可是一直在找法子压制邪兽啊！

Text.en: This is but a drop in a vast ocean compared to the Precursor Weapon. <continue>There is no way this would be capable of being used against the Beast.
Text.zh: 与先驱者武器相比，这不过是杯水车薪。<continue>想用它来对抗邪兽，绝无可能。

Text.en: So then what have we even achieved here?
Text.zh: 所以我们到底有什么成果？

Text.en: So, in other words... what we've just done here is pointless?
Text.zh: 所以，换句话说……我们之前做的全是无用功？

Text.en: If its uses are so limited, then what have we achieved?
Text.zh: 如果它的用途这么有限，那我们到底有什么成果？

Text.en: Of course. So what've we really achieved, then?
Text.zh: 可不是嘛。我们究竟有什么成果？

Text.en: Then what use is it, really? <i>{Rathin} spreads faster than we can stamp it out. <continue>All o' this is moot unless we can take down the Beast.
Text.zh: 那它到底有什么用？<i>{腐化}蔓延的速度比我们清除的速度还要快。<continue>除非能干掉那头邪兽，不然这一切都白搭。

Text.en: Well what's the bloody point, then? Yeah, it dealt with <i>{this} Corruption. But as long as the Beast's around there'll always be more of it.
Text.zh: 那他妈有什么意义？是，这次是解决了<i>{这片}腐化。可只要邪兽还活着，那腐化就会源源不断冒出来。

Text.en: Then its utility seems... limited, at best.
Text.zh: 那看来，它的实际价值只能说……很有限。

Text.en: What good is it, then? Unless we can kill Corruption at its source, it'll continue to come back.
Text.zh: 那这东西到底有什么用？除非能从源头消灭腐化，不然它迟早还会卷土重来。

Text.en: We continue to unravel the mystery of Corruption and its unmaking... and perhaps, we can use that to our advantage.
Text.zh: 我们正在一步步揭开腐化及其覆灭的奥秘……也许，这能反过来为我所用。

Text.en: I believe I have located another of these Corruption outbreaks. You should seek it out when you can.
Text.zh: 我觉得我又找到了一处腐化爆发点。你有空最好去探一探。

Text.en: The more examples we find, the more we can progress in our research.
Text.zh: 我们掌握的样本越多，研究就推进得越快。

Text.en: We are making progress. This subject differs from the last. That is to our benefit. <continue>These strange mutations may help identify how to calibrate my prototype further.
Text.zh: 我们在取得进展。这个研究对象与上一个不同……这对我们反而有利。<continue>这些奇怪的突变，或许能帮助我进一步校准原型机。

Text.en: I've been meaning to ask... am I safe being constantly exposed to all this Corruption?
Text.zh: 我一直想问你……我老是接触这些腐化，真的安全吗？

Text.en: Not that I'm particularly worried, but... is traipsing through all this Corruption even sanitary?
Text.zh: 倒不是说我有多担心，但是……在这腐化堆里乱窜，真的卫生吗？

Text.en: I must ask you... is it safe constantly being surrounded by Corruption?
Text.zh: 既然说到这儿了……一直暴露在腐化里真的安全吗？

Text.en: What about me? Am I somehow immune from developing these... mutations?
Text.zh: 那我呢？我就能对这些突变……免疫吗？

Text.en: Speakin' o' strange mutations... is it safe for me to be exposed to this much <i>{rathin}?
Text.zh: 说到这些奇怪的突变……我成天接触这么多<i>{腐化}里，真的没事吗？

Text.en: This talk o' mutations has me wonderin'... I'm safe, right? Runnin' about in all this Corruption?
Text.zh: 聊到突变，我就有点犯嘀咕了……我应该没事吧？整天在这腐化里跑来跑去的。

Text.en: I cannot help but wonder: is it safe for us to be in such close proximity to Corruption?
Text.zh: 我真的很想问一嘴，我们离腐化这么近，真的安全吗？

Text.en: On the subject o' mutations... am I safe from those? Given the amount o' time I spend around Corruption.
Text.zh: 说到突变这事……我也会中招吗？毕竟我老是腐化里泡着。

Text.en: Definitely not. But if you develop any tumors or mutations, I will excise them for you. <continue>Besides, if you are so worried... just be quick about it.
Text.zh: 肯定不安全。不过你要是长出什么瘤子或者发生变异，我可以帮你切掉。<continue>再说了，你要是这么担心……就动作快点。

Text.en: Great. Wish I'd known that sooner.
Text.zh: 行吧。你倒是早说啊。

Text.en: What do you think I've been doing, stopping to smell the corpses?
Text.zh: 你以为我一直在干嘛，停下来闻尸体的味儿？

Text.en: In your case... yes.
Text.zh: 对你来说……确实有可能。

Text.en: Okay. Bad example.
Text.zh: 好吧。当我没说。

Text.en: Was that supposed to be reassuring?
Text.zh: 这话可真让人安心啊。

Text.en: Easy for you to say.
Text.zh: 你说得倒轻巧。

Text.en: Doesn't exactly put me mind at ease...
Text.zh: 这话可没法让我安心……

Text.en: Oh, well that solves that then, doesn't it? 'Just be quick. If you get tumors, I'll just cut 'em off!' <continue>You should bloody well hear yourself.
Text.zh: 哦，那问题就解决了呗？“动作快点。要是你长出瘤子，我给你切了就是！” <continue>你听听这说的是人话吗。

Text.en: I had hoped for a less flimsy reassurance.
Text.zh: 我还指望你能给我个定心丸呢。

Text.en: Ye think I've been dawdlin' all this time? I'm goin' as fast as I can, lad.
Text.zh: 你觉得我一直在磨洋工？我已经使出最快速度了，小子。

Text.en: [DNT]
Text.zh: 这话可没法让人放心。

Text.en: [DNT]
Text.zh: 你是不是觉得我一直在磨蹭？

Text.en: I'm sure the negative effects are not something you will have to face for quite some time. <continue>Live for today, as they say. <continue>In any case, you've done well here.
Text.zh: 放心，负面影响不会这么快找上你。<continue>常言道，活在当下嘛。<continue>不管怎样，这次你做得不错。

Text.en: Here... another case of intense Corruption for us to handle.
Text.zh: 这边……又有一处剧烈的腐化需要我们去处理。

Text.en: I feel I am close to upgrading the prototype to reach its optimal capability...
Text.zh: 我感觉距离升级原型，调整到最佳状态已经不远了……

Text.en: Make your way there. Let us see what we can learn.
Text.zh: 你过去一趟吧，看看我们能从中发现些什么。

Text.en: One last specimen. This is exactly what I had hoped for. <continue>I am confident I can perfect the prototype now.
Text.zh: 最后一个样本。这正是我想要的。<continue>现在我有信心完善这个原型机了。

Text.en: Once perfected, what use will it be to us?
Text.zh: 完善之后，能派上什么用场？

Text.en: Bully for you. How do <i>{I} benefit from this 'perfect prototype'?
Text.zh: 真为你高兴。可这“完善后的原型机”对<i>{我}又有什么好处呢？

Text.en: And once perfected? How might it aid us?
Text.zh: 等它完善好了，会有什么用处？

Text.en: And when you've perfected it? What then?
Text.zh: 等你把它完善好了，然后呢？

Text.en: And then what?
Text.zh: 然后干什么？

Text.en: Great! Then what?
Text.zh: 太好了！然后呢？

Text.en: Once you've perfected it – what then? To what end can we use it?
Text.zh: 等你把它完善好了，然后呢？这东西到底能用来干什么？

Text.en: Glad we're makin' progress. But what's the end goal to all this?
Text.zh: 很高兴我们有了进展。但这东西最终会有什么成果？

Text.en: Measure your expectations... but... <continue>It is my intention for us to use it to continue our work across Wraeclast. <continue>Perhaps, we can bring hope to an otherwise dire situation.
Text.zh: 别抱太高期望……不过……<continue>我打算用它继续在瓦尔克拉斯各地推进我们的研究。<continue>也许，我们能为这糟糕透顶的局面带来一丝希望。

Text.en: Bringing hope at the end of the world sounds a worthy cause.
Text.zh: 可以在世界末日带来希望，倒也挺值得一试。

Text.en: That's me – the Bringer of Hope. <continue>Frankly, I'm still unsure how I ended up in this situation.
Text.zh: 那就是我，希望的使者。<continue>坦白说，我自己都不清楚是怎么混到这一步的。

Text.en: A worthy cause.
Text.zh: 这件事很有意义。

Text.en: Of all the people who might bring hope to an otherwise hopeless situation... I wouldn't have picked either of us.
Text.zh: 能为这糟糕透顶的局面带来一丝希望的人……换谁也不可能是我们俩啊。

Text.en: Nor I.
Text.zh: 我也这么觉得。

Text.en: Still, I'm glad we're doing it.
Text.zh: 不过，我很庆幸我们迈出了这一步。

Text.en: Look at you, talkin' about bringin' hope to others.  <continue>We've come a long way, you and I.
Text.zh: 听听你这话，给别人带来希望。<continue>你和我这一路走来可真不容易啊。

Text.en: Never been much for dolin' out hope... but you know what they say: never too late to start.
Text.zh: 我向来都不太能给人带去希望……可你也知道那句话怎么说的：什么时候开始都不晚。

Text.en: A noble goal. One I would gladly work towards.
Text.zh: 一个崇高的目标。我很愿意为之奋斗。

Text.en: I can think of no more worthy a cause than that.
Text.zh: 我想不出比这更值得我付出的事业了。

Text.en: My thoughts exactly.
Text.zh: 我也是这么想的。

Text.en: Wait a moment...
Text.zh: 等一下……

Text.en: Something is off. The energy from this location... it is immense. But it is not Corruption.
Text.zh: 有点不对劲。这个地方的能量……强得离谱。但并不是腐化。

Text.en: I must ask of you one last task. For science.
Text.zh: 最后，我还得请你帮个忙，为了科学。

Text.en: Go and investigate... or kill something, I suppose...
Text.zh: 又是去调查……或者杀点什么，对吧……

Text.en: Let me guess: you'd like me to investigate. Story of my life, lately.
Text.zh: 让我猜猜：你想让我去查查。这都成了我最近的常态了。

Text.en: You would have me investigate?
Text.zh: 你要我去调查？

Text.en: Go there and check it out?
Text.zh: 去那儿看看？

Text.en: Could it be that you want me to take a look?
Text.zh: 所以你是想让我去瞧一眼？

Text.en: Well if history's anythin' to go by, it'll either be 'go there' or 'kill somethin'. <continue>Wait, wait, wait, don't tell me... it's both!
Text.zh: 嗯，按照以往的经验，不是“过去看看”，就是“杀点啥”。<continue>等等，让我先猜猜……这次是两个都要！

Text.en: You'd have me explore the location, I take it?
Text.zh: 你是想让我去查查那个地方，对吧？

Text.en: I assume it's the usual fare. Go there. See what's what.
Text.zh: 估计又是老一套。过去看看，搞清楚情况。

Text.en: Yes. Something tells me it will be worth our time and effort.
Text.zh: 对。直觉告诉我，这事值得我们忙活一场。

Text.en: Somehow the Corruption within this being... it has become something else. The energy has been converted... organised into a stable pattern. <continue>However, madness still ruled this creature's mind. <continue>That is where my prototype and the Precursor Weapon differ, it seems.
Text.zh: 不知何故，这生物体内的腐化……变成了别的东西。能量被转化了……被组织成一种稳定的形态。<continue>然而，这生物的神智，依然被疯狂所支配。<continue>看来，这正是我的原型机与先驱者武器的差距所在。

Text.en: Perhaps with more time and study, you'll find a way to bridge the gap.
Text.zh: 也许假以时日，再多加研究，你就能弥合这差距。

Text.en: We can't all be as brilliant as the Precursors, I suppose.
Text.zh: 看来我们终究没法和先驱者那种天才相提并论。

Text.en: Perhaps given enough time, those differences will cease to be.
Text.zh: 也许假以时日，那些差距终究会消失。

Text.en: Guess your 'perfect' prototype could still do with some perfecting.
Text.zh: 看来你这“完美”的原型机，还是更完美一些啊。

Text.en: Can't always get it right the first time. You'll get there. <continue>Or you won't. What do I know?
Text.zh: 不可能每次都是一把成功。你会搞定的。<continue>也可能搞不定。谁知道呢。

Text.en: Give it time. I'm sure you'll iron out all the kinks.
Text.zh: 多给自己点时间。我敢说你准能把那些毛病都解决掉。

Text.en: It <i>{is} only a prototype. You will improve on what you have now, I'm sure of it.
Text.zh: 它<i>{只是}个原型机。你肯定会把它改进得更好。

Text.en: Ye said the Precursors poured all their energy into the Weapon. The fact your prototype even came close is a miracle in itself.
Text.zh: 你说过先驱者把全部精力都倾注到了那件武器上。你这原型机能做到这地步，本身已是个奇迹。

Text.en: I believe I would require several lifetimes or more to achieve such mastery of Corruption. <continue>But still... I will study what we have here. And it may lead to more significant advancements.
Text.zh: 我觉得，要如此精通腐化之道，恐怕得花上好几辈子的时间。<continue>但即便如此……我还是会研究手头这些东西，说不定能带来更大的突破。

Text.en: I suppose you will have no shortage of work to do then.
Text.zh: 那你可有得忙了。

Text.en: I guess we know what you'll be doing for the next... rest of your life.
Text.zh: 看来大家都知道你……下半辈子要干什么了。

Text.en: I trust it will. I have faith in you.
Text.zh: 我相信你能做到。我对你有信心。

Text.en: Should keep you busy if nothing else.
Text.zh: 就算没别的好处，至少也能让你不闲着。

Text.en: Ought to keep you occupied for a decade or two.
Text.zh: 够你忙上个十年二十年的了。

Text.en: Well if there's anyone who can figure it out, it's you. <continue>... I assume. I wouldn't really know, truth be told.
Text.zh: 要问谁有本事搞明白，那肯定是你。<continue>……大概吧。说实话，我也不好说。

Text.en: There is <i>{always} more one can do to better themself.
Text.zh: 人<i>{总}还有继续提升自己的空间。

Text.en: Somethin' to strive for, if nothin' else.
Text.zh: 就算没别的好处，也是个值得努力的目标。

Text.en: Absolutely. And... I cannot wait.
Text.zh: 当然。而且……我求之不得。

Text.en: Wraeclast has been severely wounded. We are somewhat lucky this Beast was... at least young. <continue>If it had been fully grown, there would be nothing left at all.
Text.zh: 瓦尔克拉斯遭受了重创。我们还算走运，这只邪兽……至少还处于幼年。<continue>如果它完全长成，那这个世界早就什么都不剩了。

Text.en: I suppose that is at least something to be thankful for...
Text.zh: 这倒也算不幸中的万幸……

Text.en: Little baby Beast, barely broke the world. How sad.
Text.zh: 小邪兽崽子，只是差点把世界毁掉而已。真可悲啊。
