Text.zh: 世界上有诸多强大的物品。<continue>在此之上，还有些遗物会动摇我们存在的根基。

Text.en: In what way?
Text.zh: 怎么个动摇法？

Text.en: Now this I've got to hear.
Text.zh: 这我可要听听。

Text.en: Ah, forsaken <i>{ilkora.}
Text.zh: 啊，被遗忘的<i>{伊尔科拉。}

Text.en: What do you mean?
Text.zh: 什么意思？

Text.en: How so?
Text.zh: 怎么说？

Text.en: Now I'm payin' attention. What kinda relics you mean?
Text.zh: 这下我可来精神了。你说的三哪种遗物？

Text.en: I have been taught about such concepts. What have you encountered?
Text.zh: 我曾学习过这类概念。你遇到了什么？

Text.en: You must be careful with such things. What kinds of relics?
Text.zh: 你处理这种东西一定要小心。什么样的遗物？

Text.en: A statue that cannot be forgotten. <continue>Three wooden arrows that have <i>{always} never been loosed from a bow. <continue>Horns that eliminate the concept of death. <continue>It is objects like these that we must keep sealed away, lest the world unravel.
Text.zh: 一尊无法被遗忘的雕像。<continue>三支永远未能从弓上射出的木箭。<continue>能够消除死亡概念的号角。<continue>正是这类物品，我们必须将它们封存起来，以免世界分崩离析。

Text.en: I'll take your word on that.
Text.zh: 我信你的话就是。

Text.en: Ugh... where's the fun in that?
Text.zh: 呃……那还有什么意思？

Text.en: And the world is better for it.
Text.zh: 世界因此变得更好了。

Text.en: Sounds... fanciful.
Text.zh: 听起来……像天方夜谭。

Text.en: Hard to imagine such things could exist.
Text.zh: 难以想象，这种东西竟然存在。

Text.en: Arrows that have <i>{always} never been fired...? Well what if you...? Ohhh, shite... this is a right mess.
Text.zh: <i>{永远}未能射出的箭……？那你要是……？哦，见鬼……那可真是一团乱麻。

Text.en: That is a worthy mission, indeed.
Text.zh: 那确实是一项崇高的使命。

Text.en: By the sounds of it, those should be destroyed, not protected.
Text.zh: 听你这么说，这些东西应该被摧毁，而不是被保护。

Text.en: Must you return to your Order so soon?
Text.zh: 你这么快就要回教团了吗？

Text.en: I get the sense you're itching to return home, now that the job's done.
Text.zh: 我懂了，任务完成了，你开始着急想回家了。

Text.en: Do you intend to return to your Order now that your task is complete?
Text.zh: 任务完成了，你是打算回教团吗？

Text.en: Are you heading out again?
Text.zh: 嘿，你又要走了？

Text.en: Not stickin' around, are ya?
Text.zh: 不打算多待会儿，是吧？

Text.en: That's it, then? You're just runnin' off?
Text.zh: 就这样？你准备就这么跑了？

Text.en: The artefacts have been secured. What will you do now? More missions for the Order?
Text.zh: 神器已经找到了，你现在作何打算？继续为教团执行任务？

Text.en: I feel a parting of ways in our future.
Text.zh: 我觉得，我们就快要分道扬镳了。

Text.en: That is the life that has been given to me.  <continue>The duty that I have accepted.
Text.zh: 这就是我被赋予的人生，<continue>以及我所接受的职责。

Text.en: How can you leave without sharing anything at all with a brother-in-arms?
Text.zh: 你怎么能什么都不跟战友分享就走了？

Text.en: Come now. There's mysterious, and then there's downright cryptic. Tell me something. Anything.
Text.zh: 得了吧，神秘是一回事，装哑巴是另一回事。告诉我点什么。什么都行。

Text.en: You must tell me something of your past, so that I can carry your tale.
Text.zh: 你必须跟我说说你的过去，这样我才能传颂你的故事。

Text.en: Any parting remarks? I'm not one for conversation either, but we've hardly said a word to one another.
Text.zh: 离别前有什么要说的吗？我也不爱说话，可咱们俩几乎一个字都没聊过。

Text.en: Come on, now. You're not gonna tell me anythin' about yourself?
Text.zh: 来嘛。你就不打算跟我说说你自己的事？

Text.en: We never even had an ale. Come on! Talk to your old pal.
Text.zh: 我们连一杯麦酒都没喝过。来嘛，跟你的老伙计聊聊。

Text.en: I have made very few true friends in my life. Tell me something about yourself before you go.
Text.zh: 我这辈子没交过几个真心朋友。走之前跟我说说你的事吧。

Text.en: Take it from me, lad. All we are... well, we're the memories those around us keep. And I've none of you. Talk to me.
Text.zh: 听我说，小子。我们本身……其实就是身边人对我们的记忆。而我脑海里一点关于你的记忆都没有。跟我说说吧。

Text.en: Very well. If I had... to choose something... <continue>As a child, when I was left to die in the sands, a young rhoa befriended me and dragged me to water. <continue>It would bring me scraps of food as well. <continue>It kept me alive for three moons before the Order found me. <continue>That is why I believe that something greater than myself chose me for this duty.
Text.zh: 好吧。如果……非要我说一件的话……<continue>小时候，我被遗弃在沙地里等死，一只小恐喙鸟和我交了朋友，把我拖到了水边。<continue>它还会给我叼来吃剩的食物。<continue>在教团找到我之前，它养活了我整整三个月。<continue>这就是为什么我相信，是某个比我更伟大的存在选中了我，来承担这份职责。

Text.en: I, too, was saved as a child. I treasure my father's kindness. How did that rhoa fare?
Text.zh: 我小时候也曾被人救过。我珍视父亲的仁慈。那只恐喙鸟后来怎么样了？

Text.en: Wow. You suddenly make a bit more sense. Tell me, what happened to the rhoa? Did you keep it as a pet?
Text.zh: 哇，突然间你好理解多了。告诉我，那只恐喙鸟后来怎样了？你把当宠物了？

Text.en: Rhoas are smarter than most know. Did you train it, after?
Text.zh: 恐喙鸟比大多数人想象的要聪明。后来你驯服它了吗？

Text.en: Rhoas are handy like that. What happened?
Text.zh: 恐喙鸟就是这么有用。那后来呢？

Text.en: Rhoas know more than we give 'em credit for. What happened to yours?
Text.zh: 恐喙鸟比我们想象得要聪明。你的那只后来怎么样了？

Text.en: Bit of a heavy tale to open with, but I'll take it. Did ya keep that rhoa as a pet, or...?
Text.zh: 一上来就讲这么沉重的故事，也罢。你把那只恐喙鸟当宠物养了，还是……？

Text.en: That certainly sounds like a sign that you were meant for great things. Where is that rhoa now?
Text.zh: 听起来真像是你命中注定要做大事的兆头。那只恐喙鸟现在在哪儿？

Text.en: There is an intent, a meaning, to the natural world. <continue>And where now is the rhoa?
Text.zh: 自然世界总有其意图和意义。<continue>好了，那只恐喙鸟现在在哪儿？

Text.en: It died.
Text.zh: 它死了。

Text.en: I have no idea what to make of that man.
Text.zh: 我是真搞不懂那家伙。

Text.en: Bye then.
Text.zh: 那回头见吧。

Text.en: He's quite... enigmatic...
Text.zh: 他可真是……高深莫测……

Text.en: A man of few words... Works for me.
Text.zh: 寡言少语……我倒是无所谓。

Text.en: Not one for makin' friends, I take it.
Text.zh: 看来不是爱交朋友的那种人。

Text.en: That's it? That guy is impossible to get a read on.
Text.zh: 这就完了？真是摸不透那家伙。

Text.en: That man is so... mysterious.
Text.zh: 那人实在……太神秘了。

Text.en: Not the chattiest lad, is he?
Text.zh: 不爱说话的小子，对吧？

Text.en: Appreciate the hand. Strange to see a new face out here. Haven't seen a familiar face in weeks, for that matter. Are you joining the expedition? <continue>You're looking for the Chimeral Wetlands? Hmm. Do me a favour? Tell Yorick he's an idiot. Kid isn't built for this work, yet he chose to lead a camp there.
Text.zh: 多谢帮忙。在这种地方能见到新面孔还真稀奇。说起来，我已经好几周没见过什么熟人了。你也来参加探险的？<continue>你在找幻渺湿地？嗯……帮我个忙好吗？告诉约里克，他就是个傻子。那小子根本不是干这个的料，还偏偏要去那边管理营地。

Text.en: Ah, Gwendolyn sent you? Good to know she's still alive.
Text.zh: 啊，是格温多琳派你来的？知道她还活着，我就放心了。

Text.en: We once had a dozen camps. Now there's three. The plants and monsters dwindled our numbers, and the tribes forced us out of their territories. <continue>Camps should be well prepared, organised, and defended. Now we've got one camp led by a woman, and the other led by a child. <continue>Oswald is a good man, though. And the job pays well. But I'm starting to think the pay isn't worth it.
Text.zh: 我们曾经有十几个营地。现在只剩三个了。植物和怪物让我们的人数锐减，各个部落也把我们赶出了他们的地盘。<continue>营地本该准备充分、调度有序、防御完善。如今倒好，一个营地让女人管着，另一个居然让孩子管。<continue>奥斯瓦尔德倒是个好人。这活儿报酬也高。但我越来越觉得，给这点钱真不值当。

Text.en: I've witnessed unspeakable things out here. Man I'd worked with for years, on multiple expeditions, died after eating some bad berries. <continue>'How bad,' you say? Melted his face off. And that didn't even kill him. He was possessed. Had to cut off his head and burn it for him to stop screaming. <continue>And it's been getting worse. Starting to think the Vaal cursed some treasure, and the jungle is enacting their vengeance on us. <continue>Anyway. Thanks for saving the camp. One more day I avoid ending up in Oswald's death journal.
Text.zh: 我在这儿见过一些没法说出口的事。有个跟我共事好多年的家伙，我们多次并肩探险，结果吃了几颗坏浆果就送了命。<continue>你问“有多坏”？脸直接化掉了。而且这还没能弄死他。后来他被附身了。最后只能砍了他的头再烧掉，他才停止尖叫。<continue>之后情况越来越糟。我开始怀疑瓦尔人给宝藏下了诅咒，如今这片丛林在替他们向我们复仇。<continue>总之。谢谢你救了营地。我又多活了一天，没被写进奥斯瓦尔德那本死亡日志里。

Text.en: Yorick's one of many newcomers who should have never been hired. He's a starry-eyed fool, and a liability. <continue>He's downright obsessed with the Vaal. Told me he doesn't even need the money, just wants to 'see their legacy with his own eyes.' <continue>'You'll be lucky to leave here with eyes,' I said. I asked him to check in every week or so. It's been a month... <continue>Knowing him, he's either stuck in a book, or stuck in a trap with a book.
Text.zh: 约里克是那帮根本不该招进来的新人之一。他就是个眼里冒星星的傻瓜，十足的累赘。<continue>他痴迷瓦尔都疯魔了，跟我说自己根本不缺钱，只想“亲眼见证他们的遗产”。<continue>我跟他说：“能带着眼睛活着离开，就算走运了”。我让他每周报个平安。结果现在已经一个月了……<continue>按他的性子，不是埋头看书被书困住了，就是掉进陷阱时手里还捧着本书。

Text.en: I suppose it's better I know the truth. Won't have to worry about the kid any more. <continue>You should visit the temple in his logbook. See what that idiot died for.
Text.zh: 我想，知道真相也好。往后就不用再操心那傻小子了。<continue>你该去他日志里提到的神殿看看。瞧瞧那个白痴究竟是为了什么把命搭进去。

Text.en: I don't <i>{know} she used to be a pirate. It's an educated guess. We're not asking for life stories before we're hiring. <continue>She's always alert. She's good at identifying valuables. She knows how to lead. Yet no record of previous contracts. <continue>We're lucky she's got a moral code and survival instincts as well.
Text.zh: 我不<i>{知道}她以前是海盗，只是合理推测而已。我们雇人前又不查人祖宗八代。<continue>她时刻保持警惕，一眼就能认出值钱物件，还懂得如何领头。可偏偏查不到她以前签过哪些合约。<continue>幸亏她还算有原则，外加求生本能。

Text.en: Thanks for the help! I'm no rookie, but the monsters have been in a frenzy lately. Haven't left my camp in days, and haven't heard from the others in weeks. <continue>If you're heading further into the jungle, would you check on Sebastian's camp in the Infested Barrens for me? It's on your way.
Text.zh: 多谢帮忙！我虽然不是菜鸟，可最近怪物跟疯了一样。我几天没出过营地，几周没听见其他人的消息了。<continue>你要是往丛林深处去，能顺路帮我看看滋孽荒原上塞巴斯蒂安的营地吗？你顺路的嘛。

Text.en: We've got two more camps, close to the Vaal ruins we're exploring. We really only return to the Encampment for supplies or more hands to hold treasure. <continue>Sebastian leads the camp in the Infested Barrens. He's been with this expedition longer than I have. He's one of the few veterans left. <continue>A newcomer, Yorick, leads the camp in the Chimeral Wetlands. Oswald was hesitant but... Yorick was insistent. Hard to deny a volunteer, with so few of us left. <continue>Yorick's no adventurer, but he must be an archaeologist or something, with how he goes on about Vaal architecture and history. It's hard to get him to stop. <continue>I worry for Yorick. The monsters are getting more dangerous. And some of the newcomers joining our expedition have been... untrustworthy.
Text.zh: 我们还有两个营地，离正在发掘的瓦尔遗迹不远。平时只有补给或是运送宝物需要人手时，才会回大本营。<continue>滋孽荒原营地由塞巴斯蒂安带队。他在探险队的时间比我还长，是少数剩下来的老手之一。<continue>一个新来的，约里克，管着幻渺湿地那个营地。奥斯瓦尔德原本不太情愿，可是……约里克执意要去。现在人手太少了，自告奋勇的人可不好拒绝。<continue>约里克算不上探险家，但他肯定是个考古学家之类的，张口闭口瓦尔建筑和历史，想让他闭嘴都难。<continue>我挺担心他的。怪物越来越危险。而且最近加入探险队的一些新人……不太靠谱。

Text.en: Under ideal circumstances, all members of an expedition would be experienced and honourable adventurers. <continue>They'd work together so everyone could survive and get paid. They'd resist the temptation to steal, or lie, or abandon their camp mates. <continue>And they certainly wouldn't murder someone in the night and abscond with the documented and hard-earned valuables of the expedition. <continue>But it's not ideal circumstances. We've lost too many, and need to hire whoever we can.
Text.zh: 理想情况下，探险队成员都该是经验丰富、品行端正的冒险家。<continue>大家通力合作，这样都能活着拿到报酬。不会因为贪心去偷盗、撒谎、抛弃同伴。<continue>更不会趁夜杀人，卷走探险队辛苦挣来、有账可查的财宝。<continue>可现实骨感。我们死了太多人，只能碰上谁雇谁。

Text.en: The monsters have always been tough out here. That's not new. What is new is how they're behaving. <continue>Used to be you'd only find trouble if you walked into a den, or trampled a hive. You'd have to make a mistake to provoke an attack. Something changed. <continue>Now... it's like they're hunting us. Nowhere in the jungle is safe. Maybe we've overstayed our welcome.
Text.zh: 这里的怪物向来难对付。这不新鲜。新鲜的是它们近来的行为。<continue>从前只有你闯进兽穴，或踩塌虫巢，才会惹上麻烦。你得先犯错，才会激怒它们。后来有什么东西变了。<continue>现在呢……好像是它们在猎杀我们。整个丛林里没有一处安全的地方。也许是我们赖得太久，招人嫌了。

Text.en: A guiding light... One I must follow.
Text.zh: 指引之光……我必须追随。

Text.en: Well, no need to go back the way I came...
Text.zh: 好吧，没必要原路返回了……

Text.en: May this pillar of light illuminate the way.
Text.zh: 愿这根光柱照亮前路。

Text.en: There's our way back out.
Text.zh: 那是我们的出路。

Text.en: How many o' these entrances are there?
Text.zh: 这种入口究竟有多少个？

Text.en: Found me a secret entrance!
Text.zh: 我找到了一个秘密入口！

Text.en: Yet another road I must walk.
Text.zh: 又一条我必须要走的路。

Text.en: I must venture off the beaten path once more.
Text.zh: 我又要踏上人迹罕至的道路了。

Text.en: The Master is found. This one has been searching.
Text.zh: 主人已经找到了。此身一直在寻找。

Text.en: The Well... grows as death plagues. The Well... opens <i>{more.}
Text.zh: 灵魂之井……随着死亡蔓延而不断扩张。灵魂之井……<i>{愈发}洞开。

Text.en: Come to the Well. This one burns in the light.
Text.zh: 到灵魂之井这儿来。此身在光芒中灼烧。

Text.en: You found the Well. This one searched for you. Death plagues... and the Well... grows.
Text.zh: 你找到灵魂之井了。此身一直在找你。死亡蔓延……灵魂之井也随之扩张。

Text.en: You have come. This one serves.
Text.zh: 你来了。此身愿意侍奉。

Text.en: The Lightless used the trembling land... to open great wounds above.
Text.zh: 暗光者利用颤抖的大地……在上方撕开了巨大的裂口。

Text.en: And somehow... the disgraced Lich... soars free.
Text.zh: 而那个被放逐的巫妖……竟因此重获自由。

Text.en: You? Hmm... The Source responds.
Text.zh: 是你？嗯……起源有反应。

Text.en: Souls leak from the wounds. Killing... more. And the Well grows.
Text.zh: 灵魂正从裂口中泄漏。死亡……越来越多。灵魂之井也不断生长。

Text.en: You must close... the wounds.
Text.zh: 你必须……封闭那些裂口。

Text.en: Here... <continue>Seal this wound. Guarded by the servant of Kurgal and his kind.  <continue>This one will be near, but cannot be seen. It is not time.
Text.zh: 这儿…… <continue>封住这个裂口。那里由古加尔的仆从和他的同类守卫着。 <continue>此身会在附近，但不能现身。时候未到。

Text.en: Master. A warning. The servant of Kurgal knows you are nearing. <continue>His kind are enthralled by Kurgal's pestilence. Those whose blood is blackened. <continue>When it is done, meet this one at the Well.
Text.zh: 主人。警告。古加尔的仆从已经察觉到你正在接近。<continue>他的同类被古加尔的瘟疫所奴役。他们的血已经发黑。<continue>等一切结束后，到灵魂之井来见此身。

Text.en: Good. The black blood is spilled. Vandroth is returned... to Kurgal below.
Text.zh: 很好。黑血已经流尽。范德洛思……已经被送回古加尔脚下。

Text.en: They are here. <continue>Return them... to the Well.
Text.zh: 他们来了。<continue>把他们送回……灵魂之井。

Text.en: Ahead, there are many. Those who follow, but do not serve. Destroy them all. <continue>This one returns to the Well.
Text.zh: 前方还有很多。那些追随者，却并非真正侍奉者。把它们全部毁掉。<continue>此身会返回灵魂之井。

Text.en: This one sees Kulemak stirs in your wake. You have done well.
Text.zh: 此身看见库勒马克正在因你而苏醒。你做得很好。

Text.en: Another offering for the Well. Here. The servant of Amanamu.
Text.zh: 又一个献给灵魂之井的祭品。给，阿曼娜姆的仆从。

Text.en: The depths widen before it. Tasgul, Servant of Amanamu. <continue>It stands in Amanamu's place. Where Amanamu should have been... but was not. <continue>Too much change. The nether screams for respite.
Text.zh: 深渊在它面前拓宽了。塔斯古尔，阿曼娜姆的仆从。<continue>它占据了阿曼娜姆的位置。那个位置本应属于阿曼娜姆……可它却没有出现。<continue>变化太多了。虚空正在尖叫，渴求安息。

Text.en: That one held an invitation? It sought power from the Source. <continue>Kulemak sees all invited guests. Even those unwelcome.
Text.zh: 那家伙拿着一张请柬？它在向起源寻求力量。<continue>库勒马克看得见所有受邀者，哪怕是不请自来的客人。

Text.en: Now, it is time. The Master is ready. Kulemak awaits. <continue>Too long, these ones suffer. His endless war burdens the Well. <continue>Go... Down. Defeat him. Show the Master Below All your power.
Text.zh: 是时候了。主人准备好了。库勒马克正在等待。<continue>这些存在已经受苦太久。他那永无止境的战争，让灵魂之井不堪重负。<continue>去吧……深入其中。击败他。向万物之下的主宰展示你的力量。

Text.en: A vessel... yes. He is without spark. Kulemak needs power. <continue>Power... not his own. The Lich Lords... serve? <continue>This one is tired. You are... a good master.
Text.zh: 一个容器……没错。他没有火花。库勒马克需要力量。 <continue>需要……不属于他自己的力量。那些巫妖领主……是在侍奉他？ <continue>此身累了。你是个……好主人。

Text.en: This one serves... The Well grows. With more death... more Well. Less... space. <continue>If space ends... no Well.
Text.zh: 此身会继续侍奉……灵魂之井会不断扩张。死亡越多……灵魂之井越大。空间越少……<continue>如果空间耗尽……灵魂之井也将不复存在。

Text.en: Tecrod... betrayer. Usurper. Outcast. <continue>He seeks... the Master's embrace... once more. <continue>Would kill all... to appease him. To gain... his favour.
Text.zh: 特克罗……叛徒。篡位者。被放逐之人。<continue>他想……再次得到主人的拥抱。<continue>他会杀光所有人……只为取悦主人，赢得他的青睐。

Text.en: Tecrod... is no Master. This one will never serve.
Text.zh: 特克罗……不配被称为主人。此身永远不会侍奉他。

Text.en: If these runestones are Kalguuran, not Ezomyte, then... there could be more all over Wraeclast. <continue>I'm coming with you. It'll be an adventure, of sorts.
Text.zh: 如果这些符文石属于卡古兰，而不是艾兹麦，那……瓦尔克拉斯恐怕到处都有。<continue>我跟你一起去。怎么说也算是一场冒险。

Text.en: Well, there's a great deal of... sand... around.<continue>I suppose I signed up for adventure, and adventure is what I've got. <continue>Let's see what remnants we might find in the Vastiri, eh?
Text.zh: 好吧，这儿可真是……黄沙……遍地。<continue>我本来就是来冒险的，现在也算是如愿以偿了。<continue>看看我们能在瓦斯提里找到些什么遗物吧。

Text.en: First Ones help me... I've never felt so sick in all my days. <continue>This is the most bizarre method of transport imaginable. How <i>{do} the Maraketh handle it? <continue>Oh no... if you'll excuse me...
Text.zh: 初生之子救我……我这辈子都没这么难受过。<continue>天底下还能找出比这更奇葩的交通方式吗？马拉克斯人<i>{到底}怎么受得了的？<continue>哦不……失陪一下……

Text.en: From sand... to swamp. We're really doing it rough on this adventure, aren't we? <continue>Never mind. It'll all be worth it, in the end. <continue>Besides, these are the ancient lands of the Vaal. Who knows what remnants we might find out here!
Text.zh: 从沙漠……到沼泽。这趟冒险可真是够受的，是吧？<continue>算了，到最后总会有收获的。<continue>再说了，这可是瓦尔的古老疆域。谁知道咱们能在这儿找到什么遗物呢！

Text.en: These Treasure Hunters are a good bunch. Out here carving their own destiny. How... relatable. <continue>They've given me tips on dealing with the mosquitoes as well... <continue>Not that it's working.
Text.zh: 这帮宝藏猎人都是好样的。跑到这种地方来，靠自己闯出条路。还挺让人……有共鸣的。<continue>他们还教了我怎么对付蚊子……<continue>虽然没什么用。

Text.en: Didn't think we'd be back in Ogham so soon. But familiar faces are a welcome sight. <continue>Let's see if we can pick up the trail of any remnants we missed.
Text.zh: 真没想到这么快又回欧甘了。不过，能见到熟悉的面孔总是件好事。<continue>看看能不能顺便找到之前漏掉的遗物线索吧。

Text.en: Sand again. Great. Must remain positive.<continue>We've got a job to do. Let's seek some runes.
Text.zh: 又是沙子。太棒了。我得保持乐观。<continue>咱们还有正事要办。去找符文吧。

Text.en: The Azmeri ranges... it's <i>{beautiful} here. Finally, somewhere peaceful. <continue>The Azmeri are truly ancient. Let's see what remnants we might uncover.
Text.zh: 阿兹莫里山脉……这儿可真<i>{美}。总算有个清静地方了。<continue>阿兹莫里是个古老的民族。看看这里还能挖出什么遗物吧。

Text.en: Hard to imagine isn't it? What a bloody state the world is in.<continue>I'm here if you need anything.
Text.zh: 很难想象吧？这世界都变成什么鬼样了。<continue>要是你有什么需要，就来这儿找我。

Text.en: That gateway... goes back in time? Are you pulling one over on me? <continue>If you're going in anyway, let me know if you see any runestones. Maybe I'd...  <continue>No, no. Nevermind. I'm quite content to stay in the present actually.
Text.zh: 那个传送门……能回到过去？你是在耍我吧？<continue>你要是真打算进去的话，帮我看看有没有符文石。也许我会……<continue>不，不，算了。我还是老老实实留在现在吧。

Text.en: Who'd have thought... we've almost travelled the world over at this point.  <continue>Learned a great deal along the way. I've you to thank for that. <continue>But the adventure continues!
Text.zh: 谁能想到呢……咱们都快把整个世界跑遍了。<continue>这一路真是学到了不少东西。这都得谢谢你。<continue>不过，冒险可还没结束呢！

Text.en: Not really sure why these runestones are down here. <continue>Although, the mushrooms seem to be growing very well. Hmm... wonder if that's related. <continue>Runeshapes never cease to surprise!
Text.zh: 真搞不懂这些符文石怎么会出现在这儿。<continue>不过，这些蘑菇倒是长得挺好。嗯……不知道两者有没有关系。<continue>符文这东西总能让人大开眼界。

Text.en: It sure is hectic out here... Best keep your wits about you. <continue>The beasts are just as rabid as the undead. Corruption sure is a nasty piece of work.  <continue>Ideally... I'd just stick to studying runeshapes.
Text.zh: 这儿可真够乱的……最好时刻打起精神。<continue>那些野兽跟亡灵一样疯狂。腐化这东西可真够棘手的。<continue>要是能选……我还是想老老实实研究符文。

Text.en: I wish I had visited Ogham before all this. <continue>It is sad to see my distant fellow Ezomytes suffering this way. <continue>But, maybe with your help, they still have a chance.
Text.zh: 真希望我能在这一切发生之前来欧甘看看。<continue>看见远方的艾兹麦同胞这样受苦，我心里真不是滋味。<continue>不过，也许有你的帮忙，他们还能有一线生机。

Text.en: These 'Lost-Men' are pretty mad about bones eh? <continue>The Maraketh don't speak too kindly of them... <continue>Dare I say, in this case, I can see why.
Text.zh: 这帮“失落之民”对骨头可真是着迷啊？<continue>马拉克斯人提起他们来可没什么好话……<continue>说句不好听的，这次我倒是能理解为什么。

Text.en: Sand as far as the eye can see. Sprinkled with some ruins here and there. <continue>This is not my idea of a good time, I must tell you. <continue>Hard to imagine the Maraketh have made their home here for untold amounts of time.
Text.zh: 放眼望去全是沙子，中间零零散散有几座废墟。<continue>说实话，这地方可一点也不好玩。<continue>真难想象马拉克斯人在这种鬼地方生活了不知多少岁月。

Text.en: Burials in the sky... leaving unworthy in the sand... it's bloody well brutal, isn't it? <continue>I don't know about you but... I'm starting to miss Ezomyr. <continue>Oh well. Chin up! Onwards and... upwards, I guess?
Text.zh: 配得之人葬在天上……不配之人扔在沙子里……这可真够残酷的，是吧？<continue>不知道你怎么想，但我……开始想念艾兹麦了。<continue>唉，算了。打起精神！继续前进……大概也只能这样了？

Text.en: You heard them? Constant shrieking and hollering. <continue>Something tells me they aren't just eating fruit. <continue>If you see an ape, might be worth getting ready for a fight.
Text.zh: 你听见了吗？一直在那鬼哭狼嚎。<continue>我有种感觉，他们可不光吃水果。<continue>你要是看见猿猴，最好做好打一架的准备。

Text.en: This lot are right fearsome. Seems the local tribes have been at each other's throats for some time. <continue>Strangely... they don't want to come near me. When they catch sight of my tool glowing, they go running. <continue>Which... I'm not complaining about.
Text.zh: 这帮家伙可真够吓人的。看样子当地部族已经互相掐架很久了。<continue>奇怪的是……他们好像不太敢靠近我。一看到我的工具在发光，他们掉头就跑。<continue>不过……我倒也不介意就是了。

Text.en: Don't... move... too quickly now. <continue>Snakes, bugs, and mad apes, and what else? <continue>No wonder the Vaal are all bloody well dead!
Text.zh: 别……动作……别太快。<continue>蛇、虫子，发疯的猿猴，还有什么来着？<continue>难怪瓦尔人全他妈死光了！

Text.en: Well... you appear quite capable. I seek your aid. The very world is at stake!
Text.zh: 嗯……你看起来挺有本事的。我需要你的帮助。这世界危在旦夕！

Text.en: I grow tired of attempting to save the world... but go on.
Text.zh: 我越来越厌倦拯救世界这种破事了……不过你接着说吧。

Text.en: I can relate to that.
Text.zh: 我懂你这种感觉。

Text.en: What is it this time?
Text.zh: 这回又是什么事？

Text.en: Does the end of the world bore you?
Text.zh: 你觉得世界末日很无聊吗？

Text.en: Yes... but only because I'm not the one ending it.
Text.zh: 确实无聊……谁让动手的人不是我呢。

Text.en: I... see...<continue>Well, your fearlessness is admirable!
Text.zh: 我……懂了……<continue>好吧，你这胆子倒是挺大。

Text.en: As ever. What threatens us now?
Text.zh: 又是这样。这回又是什么威胁？

Text.en: This is Wraeclast we're talking about. It'd be stranger if it wasn't.
Text.zh: 这可是瓦尔克拉斯。要是不出点事才怪呢。

Text.en: Composed in the face of danger. That's a good sign!
Text.zh: 临危不乱。真是好胆量！

Text.en: Aye, love. It always is. <continue>But you'll have to be a smidge more specific.
Text.zh: 是啊，亲爱的，我向来如此。<continue>不过你得说具体点。

Text.en: You're tellin' me...<continue>What exactly are we talkin' about here?
Text.zh: 你倒是说说……<continue>这回到底什么情况？

Text.en: What is it ye need?
Text.zh: 需要我帮什么忙？

Text.en: We call them the 'Hiveborn'. <continue>They are creatures from another world, intent on invading Wraeclast. <continue>They operate under one mind... and they mean our doom.
Text.zh: 我们称之为“裂隙虫群”。<continue>它们是来自另一个世界的生物，意图入侵瓦尔克拉斯。<continue>它们受同一个意志支配……它们的目标，就是毁灭我们。

Text.en: What would you have me do?
Text.zh: 你要我怎么做？

Text.en: I admire their ambition if nothing else. How do we stop them?
Text.zh: 别的不说，它们的野心倒让我佩服。我们该怎么阻止它们？

Text.en: They will not eclipse us so easily. What must I do?
Text.zh: 想击垮我们可没那么容易。我该怎么做？

Text.en: Then let's make them work for it.
Text.zh: 那就让它们尝尝苦头。

Text.en: Let's get to it, then. What needs doin'?
Text.zh: 那就开始吧。需要我做什么？

Text.en: Just what I wanted to hear. How do we stop 'em?
Text.zh: 这话我爱听。我们该怎么收拾它们？

Text.en: Otherworldly creatures? How am I to deal with that?
Text.zh: 异世界的生物？我要怎么对付它们？

Text.en: I am Ailith. Founder of the Keepers of the Flame. We are all that stands in the way of the Hiveborn consuming our world.
Text.zh: 我是艾利丝，苍焰守护者的创立者。我们就是阻挡裂隙虫群吞噬这个世界的最后一道防线。

Text.en: The <i>{Dreamer} is pleased.
Text.zh: <i>{幻梦者}很高兴。

Text.en: The what?
Text.zh: 幻什么？

Text.en: Am I supposed to know who that is?
Text.zh: 我该知道那是谁吗？

Text.en: And who would that be?
Text.zh: 那是谁？

Text.en: You've mistaken me for someone who knows who that is.
Text.zh: 你可能搞错了吧，我可不知道那是谁。

Text.en: Are they now? <continue>Who's this dreamer then?
Text.zh: 是吗？<continue>幻梦者是谁？

Text.en: Who's this Dreamer fella, then? Sounds like he's sleepin' on the job! Heh heh!
Text.zh: 这位幻梦者又是何方神圣？听着像是在睡大觉！嘿嘿！

Text.en: He does not choose to sleep! He was forced to rest... to recover.
Text.zh: 他不是自己想睡的！他是被迫休眠……为了恢复力量。

Text.en: Sorry, miss. Just a little joke.
Text.zh: 抱歉，小姐。开个玩笑。

Text.en: Ah, the man in charge here, yes? I would speak with this Dreamer of yours. Where is he?
Text.zh: 啊，你们这儿的老大，对吧？我想跟你们的幻梦者聊聊。他在哪儿？

Text.en: He recovers, for now. Though I hold hope that you will have the chance to speak with him someday.<continue>But yes... the Benevolent Dreamer is indeed who we serve here.
Text.zh: 他目前还在恢复。不过我相信，总有一天你能见到他。<continue>不过没错……我们侍奉的正是仁爱的幻梦者。

Text.en: I have reports of a powerful foe here. Not exactly the welcome into the fortress I was hoping for...
Text.zh: 我收到报告，这里有强大的敌人。这可不是我期望中的进入要塞的方式……

Text.en: But we must not let this stop us exploring the fortress further. <continue> Take them down.
Text.zh: 但我们绝不能因此停止对要塞的探索。<continue>干掉他们。

Text.en: That Waystone you've found... <continue>It is more sophisticated than the primitive ones we had been using. <continue>This should help us to calibrate the Waygate to reach even more leylines. <continue>Search for more of them... I will uncover ways to decipher their energies.
Text.zh: 你找到的那块引路石……<continue>比我们一直在用的那些原始货色要精妙得多。<continue>这应该能帮助我们校准脉门，触及更多地脉。<continue>去找更多这样的引路石……我会找出解读能量的方法。
